lines.english: His hoe was too short.

translations.bemba: Ulukasu lwakwe lwali ulwipi saana.
translations.kaonde: Lukasu wajinga waipipasha.
translations.lozi: Muhuma wa hae neeli omukuswani hahulu.
translations.lunda: Itemwa dindi deding’a dadihi.
translations.luvale: Litemo lyenyi lyapwile lyalihi chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Khasu lake linali lalifupi kwambili.
translations.tonga: Ijamba lyakwe lyakali lifwaafwi kapati.

lines.english: His doorway was too low.

translations.bemba: Umwinshi wakwe wali uwipi saana.
translations.kaonde: Kinzhilo kyanji kyajinga kyaipipasha.
translations.lozi: Munyako wa hae neeli omukuswani hahulu.
translations.lunda: Chenzelu chindi chedin’ga chachihi.
translations.luvale: Muchikolo chenyi mwapwile mwamwihi chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Khomo lake linali lalifupi kwambili.
translations.tonga: Mulyango waŋanda wakali mufwaafwi.

lines.english: His bed was too short.

translations.bemba: Ubusanshi bwakwe bwali ubwipi saana.
translations.kaonde: Mwanya wanji wajinga waipipasha.
translations.lozi: Mumbeta wa hae neeli omukuswani hahulu.
translations.lunda: Kadidi kindi kedin’ga kakehi.
translations.luvale: Kahela kenyi kapwile kakehi chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Bedi lake linali lalifupi kwambili.
translations.tonga: Bulo bwakwe bwakali bufwaafwi.

lines.english: His bicycle was too short.

translations.bemba: Incinga yakwe yali iipi saana.
translations.kaonde: Nkinga yanji yajinga yaipipisha.
translations.lozi: Njinga ya hae neeli yekuswani hahulu.
translations.lunda: Inkinga yindi yeding’a yayihi.
translations.luvale: Khinga yenyi yapwile yayihi chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Njinga yake inali yaifupi kwambili.
translations.tonga: Ncinga yakwe yakali mfwaafwi.

lines.english: This man was too tall!

translations.bemba: Uyu muntu aalilepeshe saana.
translations.kaonde: Awe muntu walepele bingi!
translations.lozi: Muuna yo neeli yomutelele hahulu.
translations.lunda: Iwu iyala weding’a wamulehi!
translations.luvale: Ou lunga apwile wamusuku chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Bambo uyu anali wamutali kwambili!
translations.tonga: Ooyu mwaalumi wakali mulamfwu.

lines.english: He made a very long hoe handle.

translations.bemba: Aapangile umupini wa lukasu uutali saana.
translations.kaonde: Walengele mupinyi walukasu walepa bingi.
translations.lozi: Napangile mufinyani wa muhuma omutelele hahulu.
translations.lunda: Wapangili muhinyi wetemwa waulehi nankashi.
translations.luvale: Asongele muhinyi walitemo wausuku chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Anapanga mpini wa khasu wautali.
translations.tonga: Waka panga mwiini wajamba mulamfwu.

lines.english: He made very high door frames.

translations.bemba: Aapangile umwinshi uutali saana.
translations.kaonde: Walengele mafulemu akinzhilo alepa bingi.
translations.lozi: Napangile minyako yemitelele hahulu.
translations.lunda: Wapangilen’ga yenzelu yayilehi nankashi.
translations.luvale: Asongele vipamba vyavikolo vyavisuku chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Anapanga mafelemu a zitseko atali kwambili.
translations.tonga: Wakayaka milyango milamfwu kapati.

lines.english: He made a very long bed.

translations.bemba: Aapangile ubusanshi ubutali saana.
translations.kaonde: Kabiji walengele mwanya walepa bingi.
translations.lozi: Napangile mumbeta omutelele hahulu.
translations.lunda: Kadidi kindi keding’a kakalehi.
translations.luvale: Asongele kahela kakasuku chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Anapanga bedi lalitali kwambili.
translations.tonga: Wakabamba bulo bulamfwu.

lines.english: He bought a very high bicycle.

translations.bemba: Aashitile incinga iitali saana.
translations.kaonde: Wapotele nkinga yalepa bingi.
translations.lozi: Nalekile njinga yetelele hahulu.
translations.lunda: Walandili inkinga yayilehi nankashi.
translations.luvale: Alanjile khinga yayisuku chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Anagula njinga yaitali kwambili.
translations.tonga: Wakaula ncinga ndamfwu.

lines.english: He sat on a very high chair. He ate with a very long fork.

translations.bemba: Aaikele pa cipuna icitali saana. Aaleliila kuli foloko iitali saana.
translations.kaonde: Waikele pakipona kyalepa bingi. Waingijishe foloko walepa bingi pa kuja.
translations.lozi: Nainzi fa sipula sesitelele hahulu. Nacisa foloko yetelele hahulu.
translations.lunda: Washakaminen’ga hachitwamu chichilehi nankashi. Wedin’ga nakudya nangutu yayilehi nankashi.
translations.luvale: Atwamine hachitwamo chachisuku chikuma. Alishile fwoloko yayisuku Chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Anakhala pa m’pando wautali kwambili. Anadya ndi foloko yaitali kwambili.
translations.tonga: Waka kkala acuuno cilamfwu. Wakalya amfwoloko ndamfwu.

lines.english: He left his house and lived in a big forest. He lived for many years.

translations.bemba: Aashile iŋanda yakwe no kuya mukwikala mu mpanga. Aikeele imyaka iingi.
translations.kaonde: Washile nzubo yanji kabiji wayile nakwikala mungye. Waikajilenga mungye myaka yavula.
translations.lozi: Nasiile ndu yahae ni kuyo pila mwa mushitu o mutuna. Napilile lilimo zeñata.
translations.lunda: Washiyili itala dindi nakushakama mumavunda. Washakamini yaaka yayivulu.
translations.luvale: Asezele zuvo yenyi nakuya nakutwama mumusenge waunene. Atwamine myaka yayivulu.
translations.nyanja: Anacoka panyumba yake ndipo anakhala ku thengo lalikulu. Anakhala kwa zaka zambili.
translations.tonga: Wakazwa muŋanda yakwe akuyoo kkala musyokwe. Wakakkala kwamyaka minji.

title: His hoe was too short.

lines.english: Look at the animals.

translations.bemba: Mona inama.
translations.kaonde: Mona banyama.
translations.lozi: Amubone lifolofolo.
translations.lunda: Tala tunyama.
translations.luvale: Tala tunyama.
translations.nyanja: Onani nyama.
translations.tonga: Kolanga banyama.

lines.english: The cow says, “Moo.”

translations.bemba: Iŋombe aiti, “Moo.”
translations.kaonde: Ñombe ujila amba, “Moo.”
translations.lozi: Komu ili, “mooo.”
translations.lunda: In’gombi wahoshan’ga nindi, “Moo.”
translations.luvale: Ngombe ngwenyi, “Mooo.”
translations.nyanja: Ng’ombe inena “Moo.”
translations.tonga: Iŋombe yalila kuti, “moo.”

lines.english:
The goat says, “Meh,
meh.”

translations.bemba: Imbushi aiti, “Meh, meh.”
translations.kaonde: Mbuzhi ujili amba, “Mee, mee.”
translations.lozi: Puli ili, “mee, mee.”
translations.lunda: Impembi wahoshan’ga nindi, “Meh, meh.”
translations.luvale: Phembe ngwenyi, “Mee mee.”
translations.nyanja: Mbuzi inena “Meh, meh.”
translations.tonga: Impongo yalila kuti, “mee, mee.”

lines.english:
The horse says,
“Neigh.”

translations.bemba: Kabalwe ati, “Neei.”
translations.kaonde: Mbongolo wamba amba, “Neeeee.”
translations.lozi: Mbongolo ili, “neeee.”
translations.lunda: Imbulu wahoshan’ga nindi, “Neyii”
translations.luvale: Kavalu ngwenyi, “Neee.”
translations.nyanja: Hosi inena “Nei.”
translations.tonga: Hhacci lyalila, “nee.”

lines.english: The pig says, “Grunt.”

translations.bemba: Inkumba aiti, “Gru, gru.”
translations.kaonde: Nkumba wamba amba, “Ggggrrrrr.”
translations.lozi: Kulube ili, “giiii.”
translations.lunda: Ingulu wahoshan’ga nindi, “Gruu”
translations.luvale: Ngulu ngwenyi, “Nguuu nguu.”
translations.nyanja: Nkhumba inena “Gluuuu.”
translations.tonga: Ngulube yavwuluma kuti, “gulu, gulu.”

lines.english:
The chicken says,
“Cluck.”

translations.bemba: Inkoko aiti, “Ko, ko, ko.”
translations.kaonde: Nzolo wamba amba, “Koookoookooo.”
translations.lozi: Kuhu ili, “kukulukuuu.”
translations.lunda: Kasumbi wahoshan’ga nindi, “Koko”
translations.luvale: Kasumbi ngwenyi, “Kokokokooo.”
translations.nyanja: Nkhuku inena “Kokoliko.”
translations.tonga: Inkuku yalila kuti, “kkwiyo.”

lines.english: The dog says, “Woof.”

translations.bemba: Imbwa aiti, “Boo, boo.”
translations.kaonde: Kabwa baboza amba, “Booobooo.”
translations.lozi: Nja ili, “hu hu.”
translations.lunda: Kawa wahoshan’ga nindi, “Woowoo”
translations.luvale: Kawa ngwenyi, “Woo woo woo.”
translations.nyanja: Galu anena “Hu, hu, hu.”
translations.tonga: Mubwa wakuwa, “hau hau.”

lines.english:
The farmer says,
“Shhh!”

translations.bemba: Umulimi ati, “Shii!”
translations.kaonde: Njimi wamba amba, “Shhh!”
translations.lozi: Mulimi uli, “shiiiii!”
translations.lunda: Indimi wahoshan’ga nindi, “Shhh!”
translations.luvale: Njimi ngwenyi, “Shiii!”
translations.nyanja: Mlimi anena “Shhh!”
translations.tonga: Mulimi waamba, “shiii!”

title: Look at the animals.

lines.english: This dress is long.

translations.bemba: Ilaya ili liitali.
translations.kaonde: Aye ndeleshi yalepa.
translations.lozi: Ndelesi ye ki yetelele.
translations.lunda: Iwu mukanji waulehi.
translations.luvale: Eyi khanji yayisuku.
translations.nyanja: Iyi delesi ndilalitali.
translations.tonga: Eeli deleesi ndilamfwu.

lines.english: This jersey is big.

translations.bemba: Sweta iyi ikulu.
translations.kaonde: Aye sweta yabaya.
translations.lozi: Siapalo se sa silami ki sesituna.
translations.lunda: Ichi chikobelu chamashika chachineni.
translations.luvale: Eyi sweta yayinene.
translations.nyanja: Iyi Juzi ndiyaikulu.
translations.tonga: Eeyi nsweta nimpati.

lines.english: This bag is big.

translations.bemba: Icoola ici ciikulu.
translations.kaonde: Akye kyola kyabaya.
translations.lozi: Mukotani wo ki womutuna.
translations.lunda: Ichi chola chachineni.
translations.luvale: Eyi ngonga yayinene.
translations.nyanja: Ichi cola ndicacikulu.
translations.tonga: Eeli bbeeke ndipati.

lines.english: This belt is…

translations.bemba: Umushipi uyu…
translations.kaonde: Awe mushipi wa…
translations.lozi: Lukanda lo ki…
translations.lunda: Iwu mwiha wamumbunda wa…
translations.luvale: Ou muhya wamumbunda wa…
translations.nyanja: Iyi lamba ndi…
translations.tonga: Oolu lutambo lwa mucibuno ndu …

lines.english: This hat is small.

translations.bemba: Icisote ici ciinoono.
translations.kaonde: Ake kakisochi kakeepa.
translations.lozi: Kuwani ye kiye nyinyani.
translations.lunda: Idi itepa dadinyanya.
translations.luvale: Eli litepa lyalindende.
translations.nyanja: Kasoti aka ndi kakang’ono.
translations.tonga: Eeyi ngowani ni nsyoonto.

lines.english: The socks are short.

translations.bemba: Insokoshi shiipi.
translations.kaonde: Ae masokoshi aipipa.
translations.lozi: Masokisi ki a makuswani.
translations.lunda: Ma sokisi amehi.
translations.luvale: Eji jimenya jajihi.
translations.nyanja: Masokisi ndi afupi.
translations.tonga: Ma sookesi ma fwaafwi.

lines.english: But these shoes are new.

translations.bemba: Nomba insapato ishi shiipya.
translations.kaonde: Bino ao masapato akatataka.
translations.lozi: Kono makatulo a ki amanca.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga izhi insapatu zhazhiha.
translations.luvale: Oloze eji jisapato jajihya.
translations.nyanja: Koma nsapato izi ndizatsopano.
translations.tonga: Pele mabbusu aaya mapya.

lines.english: … they fit well.

translations.bemba: … Shilalinga bwino.
translations.kaonde: … afikilamo bulongo.
translations.lozi: … a kwana hande.
translations.lunda: … zhinakuvwalika chachiwahi.
translations.luvale: … jinate kanawa.
translations.nyanja: … zikwanila bwino.
translations.tonga: … Alakkwana kabotu.

title: This dress is long.

lines.english:
Goat, Dog, and Cow
were great friends. One
day they went on a
journey in a taxi.

translations.bemba: Imbushi, Imbwa ne ŋombe baali fibusa saana. Ubushiku bumo baile pa bulendo muli motoka.
translations.kaonde: Mbuzhi, Kabwa ne Ñombe besampile bumbai. Juuba jimo baile palwendo mukamotoka katakisi.
translations.lozi: Puli, Nja ni Komu neli balikani babatuna hahulu. Zazi leliñwi baya mwa musipili ka mota.
translations.lunda: Impembi, Kawa, na Ngòmbi eding’a mabwambu amawahi nankashi. Ifuku dimu anyamukili hanzhila na motoka.
translations.luvale: Phembe, Kawa, na Ngombe vapwile masepa vavanene. Likumbi limwe vatambukile ungeji minyau.
translations.nyanja: Mbuzi, Galu ndi Ng’ombe anali mabwenzi kwambili. Tsiku lina, anapita paulendo ndi galimoto.
translations.tonga: Mpongo, mubwa a ŋombe bakali kumvwana kapati. Bumwi buzuba bakabweza lweendo mumoota.

lines.english:
When they reached the
end of their journey, the
driver asked them to
pay their fares. Cow
paid her fare.

translations.bemba: Ilyo baafikile uko baaleya, namutekenya aabebele ukulipila indalama. Iŋombe yalilipiile.
translations.kaonde: Byobafikile kobailenga, dalaivwa wibambijile amba bapane mali alwendo lwabo. Ñombe aye wapaine mali alwendo lwanji.
translations.lozi: Asebafitile kwa mafelelezo a musipili wabona, muzamaisi wa mota abakupa kuli balifela musipili wabona. Komu se itifela.
translations.lunda: Chashikiliwu kunsa yanzhila yawu, nyamutekenya wayilezheli kufweta madi. Ing’ombi wafweteli madindi.
translations.luvale: Omu vahetele akuze vapwile nakuya, nyamutekenya avalwezele kufweta. Ngombe afwetele chazano chenyi.
translations.nyanja: Pamene anafika pothela pa ulendo wao, mtekenya anawafunsa kuti alipile ndalama. Ng’ombe inalipila yake.
translations.tonga: Nibakasika nkubakali kuya, namutekenya waka baambila kuti ba bbadele mali. Ŋombe yaka bbadela.

lines.english:
Dog paid a bit extra,
because he did not
have the correct money.

translations.bemba: Imbwa yaalipile indalama iikalamba pantu tayakwete indalama iinoono.
translations.kaonde: Kabwa naye wapaine mali anji alwendo kabiji wabikilepo ne akwabo peulu, mambo kechi wajinga namali acheechene.
translations.lozi: Nja ya lifa tifo ye fitelezi hanyinyani, kakuli neisina masheleñi anaswanehela.
translations.lunda: Kawa wafweteli nakushilahu mulon’ga wedin’ga na madi akushikilamu wanyi.
translations.luvale: Kawa afwetele mbongo jakuzomboka museteko, mwomwo kapwile najimbongo jakwesekesako.
translations.nyanja: Galu analipila ndalama yopitililapo chifukwa analibe ndalama yoyenela.
translations.tonga: Mubwa waka bbadela mali aayindilila.

lines.english:
The driver was about to
give Dog his change
when Goat ran away
without paying
anything.

translations.bemba: Namutekenya cilya aalimukupeela Imbwa cenji, Imbushi yabutuka ukwabula ukulipila nangu lumo.
translations.kaonde: Kimye dalaivwa kyoakebelenga kupa kabwa mali anji akyengi, Mbuzhi wanyemene kwakubula kupana mali alwendo.
translations.lozi: Muzamaisi wa mota anasabata kufa Nja masheleñi ayona ana fitelezi, Puli yamata kusina kulifa sesiñwi.
translations.lunda: Nyamutekenya waken’geli kwinka kawa madindi asheliku chatemukiliyu Impembi chakubula kufweta.
translations.luvale: Nyamutekenya asakile kumuhilwishila chenji shimbu Phembe achinyine chakuzeneka kufweta chipwe kamwe.
translations.nyanja: Mtekenya anali pafupi kupatsa Galu chenji yake pamene mbuzi inathawa kopanda kulipila.
translations.tonga: Namutekenya wakali kuyanda kuti ajosye mali aakaindilila kumubwa mpoona mpongo yakatija kakunyina kubbadela.

lines.english:
The driver was very
annoyed. He drove
away without giving
Dog his change.

translations.bemba: Namutekenya tepakufulwa. Efyo aenseshe motoka ukwabula ukubwesesha Imbwa cenji.
translations.kaonde: Dalaivwa wazhingijile bingi. Waendeshele motoka nekuya kwakubula kumupa Kabwa kyengi anji.
translations.lozi: Muzamaisi wa mota na nyemile hahulu. Sazamaisa mota kutokwa nikufa Nja masheleñi ayona.
translations.lunda: Nyamutekenya wadinen’geli nankashi. Wendesheli nakuya chakadi kwinka madi asheliku akawa.
translations.luvale: Nyamutekenya apihililile chikuma. Akatwile minyau chakuzeneka kuhana kawa chenJi yenyi.
translations.nyanja: Mtekenya anakalipa kwambili. Anayenda popanda kupatsa Galu chenji yake.
translations.tonga: Namutekenya wakanyema kapati. Wakeenzya moota wakwe kakunyina kumujosyela mali aakwe mubwa.

lines.english:
That is why, even
today, Dog runs
towards a car to peep
inside and find the
driver who owes him his
change.

translations.bemba: Eco, mpaka na leelo, Imbwa ipepekela motoka pakuti imone mukati nga cakuti namutekenya uwaikwatila indalama emwali.
translations.kaonde: Nanchi kyomumwena kabwa kunyemena kumotoka ne kusumbila mumotoka. Kabwa ukeba kyengi yanji kwidalaivwa yoabujile kumupa.
translations.lozi: Kikabaka leo, neba kacenu le nja isamatelanga kwa mota ni kuyonangela mwahali kubatisisa muzamaisi ya sanani masheleñi ayona.
translations.lunda: Dich chekala hela kulelu, kawa watemukilan’ga kunyotoka nakunonoka neyi mudi ona nyamutekenya wakan’genyi kwinka madi.
translations.luvale: Shikaho, nakulelo lino, kawa eji kuthuchila kuminyau nakunonoka mukachi amone nyamutekenya atwama namukuli wenyi.
translations.nyanja: Ndiye cifukwa cake, ngakhale lelo lomwe, Galu amathamangila galimoto kuona mkati ndi kupeza mtekenya amene ali ndi chenji yake.
translations.tonga: Nka kaambo kaako, asunu mubwa ulatandaanya moota kutegwa asondele mukati akujana namutekenya ujisi cikwelete cakwe.

lines.english:
Goat runs away from
the sound of a car. She
is afraid she will be
arrested for not paying
her fare.

translations.bemba: Imbushi ilabutuka iciunda ca motoka. Ilatiina ukuikata pa mulandu wa kukaana lipila indalama.
translations.kaonde: Mbuzhi unyema inge waumvwa kyongo kyamotoka. Uchiina kumukasa mambo kechi wapaine mali alwendo lwanji ne.
translations.lozi: Puli yamatanga aiutwa mulomo wa mota. Ya saba kuli ikatamiwa kabakala kusalifa masheleñi a musipili wayona.
translations.lunda: Impembi watemukan’ga chivumina cha motoka. Watemukan’ga nindi amba kamukasa mulon’ga wakubula kufweta madi.
translations.luvale: Phembe eji kuchina chivumo chaminyau. Eji kwivwa woma wakumukasa hakuhona kufweta mukuli wambala.
translations.nyanja: Mbuzi imathawa ikamvela galimoto. Imaopa kuti angaimangidwe chifukwa siinalipile mtekenya.
translations.tonga: Mpongo ilatija kufumbwa yamvwa moota kaulila. Ilayoowa kuti inga yaangwa nkaambo kakuti tiiyakabbadela mali.

lines.english:
And Cow is not
bothered when a car is
coming. Cow takes her
time crossing the road
because she knows she
paid her fare in full.

translations.bemba: Elyo Iŋombe yena taisakamana nangu motoka ileisa. Yendafye cilumba-cilumba pa kuciluka umusebo nangu motoka ileisa pantu yalishiba ukuti yalilipila indalama shonse.
translations.kaonde: Pano Ñombe aye kechi waakamwane inge motoka ibena kwiya. Ñombe wenda pachepache pakwabuka mukwakwa mambo wayuka amba wapaine mali anji alwendo onsetu.
translations.lozi: Mi komu ainataba mota aifita. Komu yaitamaelanga ka buunya aitula mukwakwa kakuli yaziba kuli nailifile tifo ya musipili wayona hande.
translations.lunda: Kaha nawa Ing’ombe hatemukang’a wanyi neyi motoka yinankwinza. Ing’ombe wendan’ga nakuditiyilila neyi nakuketula mukwakwa mulon’ga neluki nindi wafweteli madi ezhima.
translations.luvale: Ngombe kwenyi kalizakaminako nge minyau nayiza. Ngombe kazanguwisako hakuzomboka mukwakwa mwomwo ejiva ngwenyi afwetele mwakutesamo.
translations.nyanja: Ndipo Ng’ombe siimaikako nzelu ngati galimoto ili kubwela. Ng’ombe imayenda pang’ono pang’ono cifukwa idziwa kuti inalipila ndalama mokwana.
translations.tonga: Iŋombe taipengani kuti yabona moota. Iŋombe ilasotoka nzila kabotu-kabotu akaambo kakuti yakabbadela mali aakkwene.

title:
Goat, Dog, and Cow
were great friends. One
day they went on a
journey in a taxi.

lines.english:
Long long ago people didn’t
know anything. They didn’t
know how to plant crops, or
how to weave cloth, or how to
make iron tools.
The god Nyame up in the sky
had all the wisdom of the world.
He kept it safe in a clay pot.

translations.bemba: Mu nshita yakale saana, abantu tabaishibe nangu cimo. Tabaishibe ifyakubyala ifilimwa nangu ukupikula, nangu ukupanga ifibombelo fya fyela. Leesa Nyame uwali mu muulu umutali ewakwete amaano yonse mu caalo. Aayasungile mu nongo.
translations.kaonde: Kala kene bantu kechi bayukile bintu biji byonse ne. Kechi bayukile byakubyala bijimwa, kusona bivwalo nangwa byakubunda byela ne. Ka lesa kacheeche ka jizhina ja Nyame kaajinga mwiulu kokaajinga namaana onse apano ntanda. Ake kalesa kalamine ano maana mumpoto yakubumba nabuchimba.
translations.lozi: Kale, kale koo, batu nebasazibi lika. Nebasazibi kucala licalo, kuluka libyana, kapa kupanga lisebeliso za lisipi. Mulimu Nyambe kwa lihalimu na nani butali kaufela mwa lifasi. Na bubulukile hande mwa poto ya lizupa.
translations.lunda: Yaaka yahanyima, antu hiyelukili zhidizhezhimaku. Hiyelukili kutumba mbutuku hela kuton’ga yakuvwala hela kufula yitwa. Nzambi Nyame wamumawula wadin’ga nakashinshi kaheseki. Wayilaminini mumba yakuwumba.
translations.luvale: Makumbi akunyima vathu kavejivile chuma numba chimweko. Kavejivile mwakutumbila vimbuto, chipwe mwakutungila mahina, chipwe mwakusongela vitwa vyavikungoko. Kalunga walijina lya Nyame mwilu apwile nachinyingi chakaye. Achilamine kanawa mundeho yaunonga.
translations.nyanja: Matsiku amakedzana, anthu sanali kudziwa ciliconse. Sanadziwe kubzala mbeu, mwina kusoka zovala, mwina kupanga zitsulo zansimbi. Nyame mulungu wakumwamba anali ndi nzelu pa zonse zamdziko lapansi. Nzeluzi anazisungila bwino mu mbiya.
translations.tonga: Kaindi bantu banji kunyina ncibakazyi. Tiibakazyi kusyanga zyisyango, nokuba kusuma zyisani, nokuba bwakubamba zyintu zyakubelesya aŋanda akumyuunda. Eelyo, kwakali leza wakali kutegwa Nyame wakajisi busongo bwakupa nyika yoonse. Wakabuyobola kabotu munongo.

lines.english:
One day, Nyame decided that
he would give the pot of
wisdom to Anansi.
Every time Anansi looked in the
clay pot, he learned something
new. It was so exciting!

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo, Nyame apeele Anansi inongo ya maano. Lyonse ilyo Anansi aalelolesha mu nongo, alesambililamo icintu cimo icipya. Caliweme nganshi.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo, Nyame walangulukilepo kumupa Anansi aya mpoto ya maana. Nanchi kimye kyonse Anansi kyoatajilengamo mumpoto yakubumba, wafunjijileko kintu kyakatataka kikwabo. Kino kyamulengelanga bingi kusangalala!
translations.lozi: Zazi leliñwi, Nyambe aheza keto yakufa Anansi poto yeo ya butali. Nako kaufela Anansi anatalimelanga mwa poto yeo ya lizupa, naitutanga lika zenca. Nekutabisa luli!
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu, Nyame wazhinini kwinka iyi imba kudi anansi. Impiji yezhima Anansi neyi natali mumba, wadi’nga nakutan’ga chuma chachiha. Chadin’ga chamuzan’galu.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe, Nyame ashinganyekele kuhana ize ndeho yachinyingi kuli Anansi. Lwola lwosena Anansi atalile muze mundeho yaunonga, alinangwilemo vimwe vyavihya. Echi chamusuulwishile chikuma kumuchima!
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina, Nyame anaganiza kupatsa Anansi mbiya ya nzelu. Nthawi iliyonse Anansi akayangana mumbiya, anaphunzilamo cinthu cina catsopano. Cinali cokondweletsa kwambili!
translations.tonga: Bumwi Buzuba Nyame wakayeeya kuti abupe busongo kuli Anansi. Kufwumbwa ciindi Anansi alanga munongo, wakali kwiiya cimbi cintu cipya. Cakali cintu cikkomaninsya.

lines.english:
Greedy Anansi thought, “I’ll
keep the pot safe at the top of a
tall tree. Then I can have it all
to myself!”
He spun a long thread, wound it
round the clay pot, and tied it to
his stomach.
He began to climb the tree. But
it was hard climbing the tree
with the pot bumping him in the
knees all the time.

translations.bemba: Anansi mu kuitemwa, aatontonkenye ati, “Ndesungila inongo pa muulu wa muti uutali pakuti tailubile. Lyena ninshi ikabafye yandi neeka!” Apikula intambo iitali, aipomba ku nongo no kuikaka pa mala. Atampa no kuniina ku cimuti. Nomba cali icayafya ukuniina icimuti ne nongo pantu yalemupunka mu makufi cila nshita.
translations.kaonde: Namambo akwitemwa, Anansi walangulukile amba, “Nsakufya bulongo aye mpoto peulu ya kichi kyalepa. Kuuba bino kukalengela amba aye mpoto yamaana onse ikekaletu yami bunke!” Anansi wazhingile lonzhi walepa wakashila ne ku mpoto ya maana kabiji nekukashila kujivumo. Watendekele ne kukanjila ku kichi. Kyamushupile bingi kukanjila kukichi mambo mpoto yamukozhezhenga mumanungo pakukanjila kimye kyonse.
translations.lozi: Anansi ni lunya lwahae anahana, “Nika beya poto ye kwa halimu a kota yetelele. Mi nikaipulukela yona ninosi!” Atatulula muhala womutelele, autata kwa poto ya lizupa ni kuitama wona famba. Saakala kupahama kwa kota. Kono nekuli tata hahulu kupahama kwa kota ni poto inge imunataka fa mañwele nako kaufela.
translations.lunda: Anansi wachifwa washinganyekeli, “Nikulama iyi imba hewulu damutondu wawulehi. Dichi yikwikala yami nkayami!” wayikasili kutambu mumbunda. Watachikili kukandama kumutondu. Ilan’ga chadin’ga chakala kukandama namba kumutondu yinakumweta mumanun’gu mpinj yezhima.
translations.luvale: Anansi wakuzuzuka ashinganyekele, “Nangulamina ize ndeho helu lyamutondo wausuku. Kaha yose nayipwa yami ukhawami! Ahosele lungoji lwalusuku, nakulujingulwisa haze handeho yaunonga, nakuyikashilila kujimo lyenyi. Aputukile kunyina kuze kumutondo. Oloze chapwile chachikalu kunyina kumutondo shimbu ize ndeho ili nakumuveta hamambuli lwola lwosena.
translations.nyanja: Anansi waumbombo anaganiza, “Ndizaisunga bwino mbiya pamwamba pa mtengo wautali. Motelo izakhala yanga ndekha!” Anatenga nthambo yaitali, yakumangilila mbiya ndikuimangilila pamimba pake. Anayamba kukwela mtengo. Koma cinali cobvuta kukwela cifukwa mbiya inali kumugunda kumyendo nthawi yonse.
translations.tonga: Anansi wakayeeya cakuliyanda, “Ndilaibikka nongo atala acisamu kutegwa busongo bube bwangu endike.” Naakamana, wakaangilila katambo kunongo amucibuno cakwe akutalika kutanta mucisamu. Wakapengana kapati akutanta mucisamu nkaambo inongo yakali kuguma magondo naakali kutanta mujulu.

lines.english:
All the time Anansi’s young son
had been standing at the
bottom of the tree watching. He
said, “Wouldn’t it be easier to
climb if you tied the pot to your
back instead?”
Anansi tried tying the clay pot
full of wisdom to his back, and it
really was a lot easier.

translations.bemba: Inshita yonse ii, umulumendo umwana uwakwa Anansi aiminiine mwisamba lya muti aletamba. Epakusosa ati, “Bushe teeti cangukeko nga mwakakiliile inongo panuma?” Efyo Anansi aeseshe ukukaka inongo ya maano panuma, awe no kwanguka cayanguka.
translations.kaonde: Anansi kimye kyonse kyoakanjilanga kukichi, mwananji wamulume mwanyike waimananga munshi yakichi nakumona bibena kukanjila bashanji. Mwana wibepwizhe bashanji amba, “Nanchi kechi kyafwainwa kupeela kukanjila kukichi inge mwakashila mpoto munyuma nenyi?” Anansi waesekele kukashila mpoto yamaana munyuma kabiji kyamupelejileko bingi kukanjila.
translations.lozi: Nako kaufela, mwana wa Anansi wa mushimani, na yemanga mwatasi a kota inge abuha. Abulela ali, “Kana hakuna kuba bunolo kupahama inge mutamezi poto kwa mukokoto nji? Anansi alika kutamela poto ya lizupa yetezi butali kwa mukokoto wahae, mi kwaba bunolo hahulu.
translations.lunda: Mpiji yezhima, mwana ka Anansi wadin’ga hesshina da mutondu nakutala. Wahosheli nindi, “Hichikwikala chaswayiku neyi wukandama kumutondu namba wunakasili kunyima?” Anansi wesekeli kukasila imba yakashinshi kunyima yindi kaha nawa chedin’ga chaswayi.
translations.luvale: Lwola lwosena mwana Anansi walunga emanyine mwishi yamutondo nakutala. Ambile ngwenyi, “Khumana kachechi kukuhashiwilako nge mukashilila ize ndeho kunyima yove?” Anansi esekele kukashilila ize ndeho yakuzala nachinyingi kunyima yenyi, kaha chachili vene chapwile chachashi chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Pamene zonsezi zinali kucitika, mwana mwamuna mung’ono wa Anansi anali imilile kuonelela pansi pacimtengo. Iye anati, “Kodi sicizakhala capafupi kukwela mtengo ngati mwamangilila mbiya kumusana?” Anansi anayesa kumangilila mbiya yodzala ndi nzelu kumusana ndipo iye anakwela mtengo mosabvutika.
translations.tonga: Mwanaakwe musyoonto wakali kulangilila ciindi coonse munsi acisamu. Wakati, “Inga tiicauba-uba kuti mwalyaangilila kumusana?” Anansi wakasola, nkabela, cakamuubaubila kapati.

lines.english:
In no time he reached the top of
the tree.
But then he stopped and
thought, “I’m supposed to be
the one with all the wisdom,
and here my son was cleverer
than me!”
Anansi was so angry about this
that he threw the clay pot down
out of the tree.

translations.bemba: Ukwabula ukupoosa ne nshita afika na pamuulu wa muti. Nomba atala iiminina no kutontonkaya ati, “Nine mfwile ukukwata amaano yonse, nomba apa umwana wandi akwatapo amaano ukuncila!” Anansi afulwa icibi. Apoosa ne nongo panshi ya cimuti.
translations.kaonde: Muka kimyetu kacheeche wafikile ne peulu ya kichi. Bino waimene ne kulanguluka amba, “Amiwa nalangulukile namba yami nafwainwatu kwikala namaana onsetu, pano bino mwanami wamwekana kwikala namaana kunkila!” Panyuma yakulanguluka bino, Anansi wazhingijile bingi kabiji wataile mpoto yamaana munshi yakichi.
translations.lozi: Kabubebe, afita kwa halimu a kota. Kono akutumana mi anahana, “Neniswanela kuba ni butali bobufitisisa, kono fa mwanake utalifile kunifita!” Anansi a nyemiswa hahulu ki taba ye, mi a poseza poto ya lizupa fafasi kuzwelelela kwa halimu a kota.
translations.lunda: Hakadi nimpinji, washikili kwiwulu damutondu. Ilan’ga wemene nakushin’ganyeka, “yami natela kwikala namaana ilan’ga mwanami wudi wababala kubadika ami!” Anansi wahilili chakwila anata nimba hamaseki kufuma kumutondu.
translations.luvale: Mulwola lwalundende tuthu ahetele helu lyamutondo. Oloze emanyine nakushinganyeka, “Ami yami ngwatelanga kupwa nachinyingi chosena, oloze aha mwanami nazangama kunguhambakana ami!” Anansi apihililile chikuma kaha ambilile ize ndeho yaunonga hamavu kufuma kuze kumutondo.
translations.nyanja: Posacedwa konse anafike pamwamba pa mtengo. Koma iye anaima naganiza, “Ine ndiyenela kukhala ndi nzelu zonse, koma apa mwana wanga ndiye anali ndi nzelu kupambanila ine!” Anansi anakalipa kwambili paizi motelo anataya mbiya ya nzelu pansi kucoka mucimtengo.
translations.tonga: Mukaindi kasyoonto, wakasika atala acisamu. Mpoona wakaima akuyeeya, “Ndime ndeleede kuba abusongo boonse, pesi mwanaangu ulicenjede kwiinda ndime!” Anansi wakanyema kapati akusowa nongo ansi.

lines.english:
It smashed into pieces on the
ground. The wisdom was free
for everyone to share.

And that is how people learned
to farm, to weave cloth, to
make iron tools, and all the
other things that people know
how to do.

translations.bemba: Iŋongo yapona panshi yatobaika. Amaano nomba yabafye ya muntu onse. Ukufuma apo, efyo abantu baishibe ukulima, ukupikula no kufula ifishimbi na fimbipo ifyo abantu baishiba ukucita pali leelo.
translations.kaonde: Mpoto yaponene panshi ne kulajika. Nanchi maana afumine mu mpoto kabiji muntu yense waikele na maana. Akino kyalengejile ne bantu kufunda byakujima, kusona byakuvwala, kubunda byela ne bikwabotu byobayuka kuuba.
translations.lozi: Yapwacakeha liyemba fafasi. Butali bwa abana kuya ku mutu kaufela. Mi kona monobazibezi batu kulima, kuluka libyana, kupanga lisebeliso za lisipi mane ni lika zeñwi zeo batu baziba kueza.
translations.lunda: Yabalukili nakuchikeka hamaseki. Kashinshi kedin’ga kamuntu wezhima kudanzan’gena. Dichi antu elukiliwu kudima, kuton’ga yakuvwala, kufula yitwa nayuma yezhima yelukawu antu kulelu.
translations.luvale: Yapazukile muvihanda haze hamavu. Chinyingi jino chambwambumukile nakuya kuli khala muthu. Hakhiko jino vathu valilongesele kulima, kutunga mahina, kutunga vitwa vyavikungo, navyosena vathu vejiva kulinga.
translations.nyanja: Mbiya inaphwanyika mtizidutswa itafika pansi. Pamenepo nzelu zinafalitsidwa kwa munthu aliyense. Ndiye mwamene anthu anaphunzilila kulima, kusoka zovala, kupanga zitsulo za nsimba ndi zinthu zina zimene anthu adziwa kucita.
translations.tonga: Inongo yakapwaika. Busongo bwakacaala antangalala kubantu boonse. Kuzwa waawo, bantu bakacizyiba kulima, kusuma akucita zyintu zyoonse bantu nzyobazyi kucita.

title:
Long long ago people didn’t
know anything. They didn’t
know how to plant crops, or
how to weave cloth, or how to
make iron tools.
The god Nyame up in the sky
had all the wisdom of the world.
He kept it safe in a clay pot.

lines.english: I am singing.

translations.bemba: Ndeimba.
translations.kaonde: Amiwa mbena kwimba.
translations.lozi: Naopela.
translations.lunda: Inakwimba.
translations.luvale: Nguli nakwimba.
translations.nyanja: Ndiimba.
translations.tonga: Ndila imba.

lines.english: She is waving.

translations.bemba: Aleebaibisha.
translations.kaonde: Amiwa mbena kusokona.
translations.lozi: Wa lumelisa ka kunanula lizoho.
translations.lunda: Nakubayibisha.
translations.luvale: Ali nakunyengesa livoko.
translations.nyanja: Abaibisa.
translations.tonga: Ula bbaibbisya.

lines.english: I am clapping.

translations.bemba: Ndetoota.
translations.kaonde: Amiwa mbena kupompwela.
translations.lozi: Na kambelela.
translations.lunda: Inakusakilila.
translations.luvale: Nguli nakusakwila.
translations.nyanja: Ndiomba m’manja.
translations.tonga: Ndila kamba.

lines.english: She is stretching.

translations.bemba: Aleeyolola.
translations.kaonde: Nsongwakazhi ubena kwiolola.
translations.lozi: Wa ikotolola.
translations.lunda: Nakudolola.
translations.luvale: Ali nakulyolola.
translations.nyanja: Atambasula manja.
translations.tonga: Ula lyoolola.

lines.english: He is calling.

translations.bemba: Aleita.
translations.kaonde: Nsongwalume ubena kwita.
translations.lozi: Wa biza.
translations.lunda: Nakutambika.
translations.luvale: Ali nakusanyika.
translations.nyanja: Aitana.
translations.tonga: Ulaita.

lines.english: I am answering.

translations.bemba: Ndeyasuka.
translations.kaonde: Amiwa mbena kukumbula.
translations.lozi: Na alaba.
translations.lunda: Inakwakula.
translations.luvale: Nguli nakukumbulula.
translations.nyanja: Ndiyankha.
translations.tonga: Ndila vwiila.

lines.english: She is listening.

translations.bemba: Aleekutika.
translations.kaonde: Amiwa mbena kuteleka.
translations.lozi: Wa teeleza.
translations.lunda: Nakutiyilila.
translations.luvale: Ali nakwivwilila.
translations.nyanja: Amvetsela.
translations.tonga: Ulaswiilila.

lines.english: What are you doing?

translations.bemba: Finshi uleecita?
translations.kaonde: Ubena kuba ka?
translations.lozi: Ueza sikamañi?
translations.lunda: Wunakwiladi?
translations.luvale: Uli nakulinga ika?
translations.nyanja: Ucita ciani?
translations.tonga: Ino ucita nzi?

title: I am singing.

lines.english: Where is my cat?

translations.bemba: Puushi wandi alikwisa?
translations.kaonde: Kamotoka kami kajipi?
translations.lozi: Kaze yaka ikai?
translations.lunda: Kamesha kami wudi kudihi?
translations.luvale: Kangatwe kami ali kulihi?
translations.nyanja: Cona wanga ali kuti?
translations.tonga: Ino kaaze wangu uli kuli?

lines.english: Is it under the bed?

translations.bemba: Bushe ali mwisamba lya busanshi?
translations.kaonde: Kaji munshi yamwanya nyi?
translations.lozi: Inzi mwatasi a mumbeta, nji?
translations.lunda: Wudi mwishina dakadid tahi?
translations.luvale: Ali mwishi yakahela tahi?
translations.nyanja: Kodi ali pansi pa bedi?
translations.tonga: Sena uli mujungusi abulo?

lines.english: Is it on top of the cupboard?

translations.bemba: Bushe ali pa muulu wa kabati?
translations.kaonde: Kaji peulu yakabachi nyi?
translations.lozi: Ifa halimu a kabati, nji?
translations.lunda: Wudi hewulu da mesa yayen’ga tahi?
translations.luvale: Ali helu lyachisweko tahi?
translations.nyanja: Kodi ali pamwamba pa kabati?
translations.tonga: Sena uli atala akkabbati?

lines.english: Is it behind the couch?

translations.bemba: Bushe ali kunuma ya cipuna?
translations.kaonde: Kaji kunyuma yakipona nyi?
translations.lozi: Ikwa mulaho wa sipula, nji?
translations.lunda: Wudi kunyima yachitwamu tahi?
translations.luvale: Ali kunyima yachitwamo tahi?
translations.nyanja: Kodi ali kumbuyo kwa mpando?
translations.tonga: Sena uli kunze acuuno?

lines.english: Is it next to the bin?

translations.bemba: Bushe ali mupepi na iŋungulu?
translations.kaonde: Kaji pabwipi namwakutaila ndochi nyi?
translations.lozi: Ikwa tuko a singungulu, nji?
translations.lunda: Wudi kudi mungomu wazhamazhilu tahi?
translations.luvale: Ali kwakamwihi nakwakumbilila swali tahi?
translations.nyanja: Kodi ali pafupi ndi motaila zinyalala?
translations.tonga: Sena uli munsi-munsi amusowelwa dooti?

lines.english: Is it inside the basket?

translations.bemba: Bushe ali muli bashiketi?
translations.kaonde: Kaji mukachi yantumbe nyi?
translations.lozi: Imwa hali a sizuma, nji?
translations.lunda: Wudi mukachi ka chimban’gu tahi?
translations.luvale: Ali mukachi kachizuma tahi?
translations.nyanja: Kodi ali mkati mwa nswanda?
translations.tonga: Sena uli mukati kamutaanga?

lines.english: Is it outside the house?

translations.bemba: Bushe ali panse ya ŋanda?
translations.kaonde: Kaji pangye yanzubo nyi?
translations.lozi: Ifande a ndu, nji?
translations.lunda: Wudi hanzhi detala tahi?
translations.luvale: Ali haweluka wazuvo tahi?
translations.nyanja: Kodi ali pabwalo pa nyumba?
translations.tonga: Sena uli anze aŋanda?

lines.english: Here it is!

translations.bemba: Uyu ali kuno!
translations.kaonde: Ake pape!
translations.lozi: Kiye fa!
translations.lunda: Iwu wudaha!
translations.luvale: Ou ali kuno!
translations.nyanja: Uyu ali apa!
translations.tonga: Ngooyu awa!

title: Where is my cat?

lines.english:
My village had many problems.

We made a long line to fetch water from one tap.

translations.bemba: Mu mushi wandi mwali amafya ayengi. Twalitantame umulongo pakuti twingatapa ameenshi kuli pompi umo.
translations.kaonde: Pamuzhi wetu panjinga makatazho aavula bingi. Twaimananga mumunongo walepa pakuuba amba tutapule mema kufuma kumupompi umotu.
translations.lozi: Munzi wa luna neunani matata amañata hahulu. Nelupanganga mukoloko ulimuñwi womutelele wakuka mezi kwa pompi.
translations.lunda: Chitung’ilu chami chading’a namakabi nankashi. Twading’a munyizela yayilehi nakutaha menzhi ku payipi yimu.
translations.luvale: Limbo lyami lyapwile namaukalu amavulu. Kuswita meya kuvanga kwimana mumukana wausuku kumuyengo umwe.
translations.nyanja: Mudzi wanga unali ndi mabvuto ambili. Timaima m’mzele wautali umodzi kutunga madzi pa pompi imodzi.
translations.tonga: Munzi wangu wakajisi mapenzi manji. Meenda akali kukatazya kapati. Twakali kwiima milongo kutegwa tuteke meenda apompi yomwe.

lines.english: We waited for food donated by others.

translations.bemba: Twaleeloleela ifyakulya ifyakupeelwa ukufuma ku bantu bambi.
translations.kaonde: Twapembelelanga byakuja bitupanga bantu.
translations.lozi: Nelulibelelanga lico ze filwe kuzwelela kubabañwi.
translations.lunda: Twadin’ga nakuhembela kutuholesha yakuda kudi antu acheng’i.
translations.luvale: Twavandaminyinenga kulya chakutukafwa kuvakwetu.
translations.nyanja: Tinayembekezela zakudya zopelekedwa ndi ena.
translations.tonga: Twakali kulindila zyakulya zyacivwole-vwole kuzwa kubantu bambi.

lines.english: We locked our houses early because of thieves.

translations.bemba: Twaleekoma amayanda yesu bwangu pa mulandu wa bapuupu.
translations.kaonde: Twashinkanga mazubo etu bukiji namambo akuchiina bangivi.
translations.lozi: Nelukiyanga mandu yaluna kabubebe bebe bakeñisa masholi.
translations.lunda: Twading’a nakwenzela yinsu swayi mulon’ga wamakombi.
translations.luvale: Twakiyilenga mazuvo etu washi kuchinyisa veji.
translations.nyanja: Tinakhoma manyumba athu mwamsanga cifukwa coopa akawalala.
translations.tonga: Maanda akali kujalwa cakufwambaana akaambo kabantu babba.

lines.english: Many children dropped out of school.

translations.bemba: Abaana abengi balilekele isukulu.
translations.kaonde: Baana bavula balekele masukuulu.
translations.lozi: Bana babañata baitulezi sikolo.
translations.lunda: Anyana amavula alekeli shikola.
translations.luvale: Vanyike vavavulu vechele shikola.
translations.nyanja: Ana ambili analeka sukulu.
translations.tonga: Bana banji bakaleka cikolo.

lines.english: Young girls worked as maids in other villages.

translations.bemba: Utukashana twaleebomba incito ya kuwamya mu mayanda mu mishi imbi.
translations.kaonde: Banyike babakazhi baingijiilnga makito mumizhi ya bukaboyi.
translations.lozi: Basizani babanyinyani nebabelekanga misebezi ya mwa malapa kuba minzi yemiñwi.
translations.lunda: Anyana awambanda azatilengà undungú munyikala yikwawu.
translations.luvale: Vanyike vamaphwevo vazachilenga ungamba mumembo akwavo.
translations.nyanja: Atsikana ang’ono ang’ono anasewenza maganyu m’midzi ina.
translations.tonga: Bana basimbi bakali kubeleka mumaanda abantu bambi.

lines.english: Young boys roamed around the village while others worked on people’s farms.

translations.bemba: Utulumenda twaleyangala mu mushi ninshi bambi baleebombela mu mabala.
translations.kaonde: Banyike babalume bapitañanangatu mumizhi bino bamo baingilanga mumajimi abantu.
translations.lozi: Bashimani babanyinyani neba yembana mwahae, babañwi nebabelekanga mwa masimu abatu.
translations.lunda: Atwansi amayala adingá nakuhitangàna mumukala akwawu adingá nakuzata hazhi famu.
translations.luvale: Vanyike vamalunga vakimbilenga mumembo shimbu vakwavo vazachililenga mumande avathu.
translations.nyanja: Anyamata ang’ono ang’ono anali kuyendayenda m’midzi ina ndipo ena anali kuchita ganyu m’minda ya ena.
translations.tonga: Bana basankwa bakali kuzinguluka biyo mumunzi, bamwi bakali kubelekela mali mumyuunda yabalimi.

lines.english: When the wind blew, waste paper hung on trees and fences.

translations.bemba: Umwela nga wapuupa, ifipepala bapoosa fyalesama ku miti na ku malinga.
translations.kaonde: Inge mwela wapuupa, ndochi ya bipepala yanyamukanga nekwikala kubichi ne kuluvimba.
translations.lozi: Moya aneufukanga, mapepa asinatuso nakolakatelanga kwa likota ni fa makwakwa a malapa.
translations.lunda: Neyi kunahiti mpepela, mapepa amazhilu edin’ga nakulamata hanyitondu nahamalapa.
translations.luvale: Omu peho yahuhwile yapekumwinenga mapepa aze asakaminenga hamafwo nahajimbango nahamalapa avathu.
translations.nyanja: Pamene mphepo ikuntha, mapepala opanda nchito anapacikika pa mitengo ndi mipanda.
translations.tonga: Imuwo waunga, izyipepa zyakali kwaangila muzyisamu alimwi a lukwakwa

lines.english: People were cut by broken glass that was thrown carelessly.

translations.bemba: Abantu baleicena ku mabotolo ayatobeka ayaleeposwa iciposweposwe.
translations.kaonde: Bantu bekozhezhenga kumabotolo alajikilenga obatailenga kitaye taye.
translations.lozi: Batu neba sehakiwanga ki mabotela a pwacakehile anayumbilwe kusina tokomelo.
translations.lunda: Antu edi’ga nukuditapa namagilasi anatiliwu chatama.
translations.luvale: Vathu valilemekelenga navivanjilo vyakupazwojoka evi kavambililenga kanawako.
translations.nyanja: Anthu anacekedwa ndi magalasi oonongeka amane anataidwa mosasamala.
translations.tonga: Bantu bakali kuyaswa amabbodela akapwaikide akaambo kakutazyisowa bweelede.

lines.english: Then one day, the tap dried up and our containers were empty.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo, ameenshi yapwa kupompi ne fipe fyesu tafyakwete ameenshi.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo, uno mupompi wameema waumine kabiji tunchinyi twetu twajingatu kwakubula meema.
translations.lozi: Cwale zazi leliñwi, pompi yaoma mi lingongolo zaluna nelili mukungulu.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu, mupayipi wamenzhi womini kaha nawa zhinswaha zhetu zhedin’ga zhakadi menji.
translations.luvale: Jino likumbi limwe, mupombi womine kaha jisuhwa jetu jasalile jamupolongwa.
translations.nyanja: Ndipo tsiku lina, pompi inauma ndipo migomo yathu inalibe madzi.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba, meenda akaleka kuzwa. Zyipeelo zyesu zyakanyina meenda.

lines.english: My father walked from house to house asking people to attend a village meeting.

translations.bemba: Bataata baile cila ŋanda mukuwita abantu ukwisasangwa ku cilye ca mushi.
translations.kaonde: Ba taata bapitañene kumazubo abantu nakwibabula amba batanwe kumbuñano ya muzhi.
translations.lozi: Bo ndate baya lapa ni lapa kukupa batu kuli batahe kwa mukopano.
translations.lunda: Tata yami wahitilimu hetala hetala kulezha antu kulonda enzi kwibumba dayihosha.
translations.luvale: Tata ahichishilemo mutambi, zuvo hizuvo mangana vathu valikungulule nakushimutwila.
translations.nyanja: Atate anga anayenda khomo ndi khomo kupempha anthu kuti apite ku msonkhano wa m’mudzi.
translations.tonga: Bataata bakeenda mumaanda oonse kwaambila bantu kuti bakasike kumuswangano.

lines.english: People gathered under a big tree and listened.

translations.bemba: Abantu baishileikala mwisamba lya muti no kukutika.
translations.kaonde: Bantu basambakenejile pamo munshi yakichi kikatampe kabiji nekuteleka.
translations.lozi: Batu bakopana mwa tasi a kota yetuna inge bateleza.
translations.lunda: Antu adikunwilili mwishina da mutondu wauneni nakutiyilila.
translations.luvale: Vathu valikungulwile mwishi yamutondo nakwivwilila.
translations.nyanja: Anthu anasonkhana pansi pa mtengo ukulu ndipo anamvesela.
translations.tonga: Bantu bakaswaangana munsi acisamu cipati akuswiilila.

lines.english: My father stood up and said, “We need to work together to solve our problems.”

translations.bemba: Bataata epakwima abati, “Tufwile ukubombela pamo pakuti tupwishe amafya yesu.”
translations.kaonde: Ba taata baimene nekwamba amba,” Twafwainwa kwingijila pa kuuba amba tupwishe ano makatazho.”
translations.lozi: Bondate bayema mi bali, “Luswanehela kubeleka hamoho kufeza matata aluna.”
translations.lunda: Tata yami wemeni nakuhosha nindi, “Twatela kuzatila hamu kulonda tumanishi kukala chetu tudi nachu.
translations.luvale: Tata emanyine nakukhokweza vathu, “Twatela tuzachile hamwe mangana tuhase kukumisa maukalu etu mwimbo.”
translations.nyanja: Atate anga anaima nati, “Tifunika kusewenzela pamozi kuti tithetse mabvuto athu.”
translations.tonga: Bataata bakaimikila akwaamba kuti, “Tweelede kubelekela antoomwe kutegwa tumane mapenzi aaya.”

lines.english: Eight-year-old Juma, sitting on a tree trunk shouted, “I can help with cleaning up.”

translations.bemba: Umwana wamyaka cine-konse-konse uweshina lya Juma, uwaikele pa mulando abilikisha ati, “Kuti nabombako umulimo wa kuwamya.”
translations.kaonde: Mwana wa myaka itanu na isatu aye Juma wabijikile amba,” Nakonsha kwimukwasha kuwamisha.”
translations.lozi: Juma wa lilimo zeketalizoho ni zetalu, yanainzi fa sishingwa ahuwa ali, “Nakona kutusa kwa kukenisa.”
translations.lunda: Juma wayaaka yitanu nayisatu, washakamini hamutayi wamutondu nakupidika nindi,”Nikuyikwashaku kukombozhola.”
translations.luvale: Kanyike Ndumba wamyaka yakusemuka itanu-nayitatu, oku natwame hamungowa atambakanyine, “Ami ngunahase kuzata mulimo wakukomba.”
translations.nyanja: Juma wa zaka zisanu ndi zitatu, omwe anakhala pa nthambi ya mtengo anakuwa nati “Ndingathandize ndi kusesa.”
translations.tonga: Juma, imwana wamyaka ili lusele wakapozomoka kuti, “Inga ndagwasya kucibeela cakugusya dooti.”

lines.english: One woman said, “The women can join me to grow food.”

translations.bemba: Namaayo umo ati, “Banamaayo kuti twabombela pamo ukulima ifyakulya.”
translations.kaonde: Inetu umo waambile amba,” bainetu bafwainwa kunkwasha kujima byakuja.”
translations.lozi: Alimuñwi musali ali, “Basali bakona kukopana nina kucala lico.”
translations.lunda: Mama wumu wahosheli nindi,”Akamama akunkwashako kutumba yakudya.”
translations.luvale: Phwevo umwe ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Maphwevo vanahase kulinunga nayami nakulima vyakulya.”
translations.nyanja: Mai m’mozi anati “azimai angasewenze pamozi ndi ine kuti tilime zakudya.”
translations.tonga: Umwi mukaintu wakati, “Bamakaintu inga bandisangana mukusyanga zyakulya.”

lines.english: Another man stood up and said, “The men will dig a well.”

translations.bemba: Shitaata umbi aiminina ati, “Bashitaata bakemba icishima.”
translations.kaonde: Shetu umo waimene nekwamba amba, “ateba babalume tusa kupoya mushima.”
translations.lozi: Alimuñwi muuna ayema mi ali, “Baana bakayepa lisima.”
translations.lunda: Iyila wumu wemeni nakuhosha nindi,”Amayala akwimba ishima.”
translations.luvale: Lunga mukwavo emanyine nakuhanjika ngwenyi, “Malunga navafula lishima.”
translations.nyanja: Bambo wina anaimilila nati “Amuna azakumba citsime.”
translations.tonga: Mwaalumi umwi wakaimikila akuti “Bamaalumi balasya mugodi wameenda.”

lines.english:
We all shouted with one voice, “We must change our lives.”

From that day we worked together to solve our problems.

translations.bemba: Bonse twapundila pamo atuti, “Tufwile ukwalula imikalile yesu.” Ukufuma bulya bushiku twabombele pamo mukupwisha amafya yesu.
translations.kaonde: Bonsetu twabijikile najiwi jimo amba, twafwainwa kupimpula bwikalo bwetu.” Kufumatu pajoja juuba twaingijilenga pamo nekupwisha makatazho amumuzhi wetu.
translations.lozi: Lwahuwa kaufela luna ka linzwi liliñwi luli; “Luswanela kucinca bupilo bwaluna.” Kuzwa zazi leo, nelubelekanga hamoho kufeza matata aluna.
translations.lunda: Twezhima wetu twabidikili nezu dimu netu,”Twatela kuhimpa kashakaminu ketu.” Kufuma ifuku denadina, twazatilen’ga hamu nakumanisha kukala chetu.”
translations.luvale: Vosena twatambakanyine nalizu limwe, “Twatela kwalumuna chiyoyelo chetu.” Kufuma lize likumbi twazachile hamwe nakukumisa maukalu etu.
translations.nyanja: Tonse tinakuwa ndi mau amozi ndikuti, “tifunika kusintha myoyo yathu.” Kucoka pa tsiku lija, tinasewenzela pamozi kuthetsa mabvuto athu.
translations.tonga: Twakoompolola toonse mujwi lyomwe, “Tweelede kucinca buumi bwesu.” Kuzwa buzuba oobo, twakatalika kubelekela antoomwe akujana nzila yakumana mapenzi eesu.

title:
My village had many problems.

We made a long line to fetch water from one tap.

lines.english:
My heart feels a lot of
things.

translations.bemba: Umutima wandi ulomfwa ifintu ifingi.
translations.kaonde: Muchima wami umvwa byapusana-pusana.
translations.lozi: Pilu yaka inani maikuto amañata.
translations.lunda: Muchima wami watiyang’a yuma yayivulu nankashi.
translations.luvale: Muchima wami wevwa vyavivulu.
translations.nyanja: Mutima wanga umvela zinthu zambili.
translations.tonga: Moyo wangu ulimvwa zyintu zyinji.

lines.english:
I feel happy when my
granny tells us stories
in the evening.

translations.bemba: Ndatemwa nga bamaama baleetushimikila utushimi ubushiku.
translations.kaonde: Ñumvwa kusangalala inge ba nkambo kebetubule tushimi mabanga.
translations.lozi: Niikutwanga tabo bo kuku abalukandekelanga makande manzibwani.
translations.lunda: Natiyang’a muzang’alu neyi nkaka nakutulezha nsang’a mumelela.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kwivwa kuwaha omu khaka mwatutela mijimbu nachingoloshi.
translations.nyanja: Ndimvela kukondwela ngati ambuya anga atiuza nthano m’madzulo.
translations.tonga: Ndilamvwa kabotu akukkomana baneene batwaanina twaano masiku.

lines.english:
I feel silly when I play
with my friend.

translations.bemba: Ndomfwa ukusaamwa nga ndeyangala no munandi.
translations.kaonde: Ñumvwa byapusanako inge mbena kukaya nabakwetu.
translations.lozi: Niikutwanga bukuba ani bapalanga ni mulikanaka.
translations.lunda: Natiyang’a kusupa neyi nahemi nembwambu dami.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kwivwanga vyeka kuheta hakuhema nasepa lyami.
translations.nyanja: Ndimvela kukhala wosangalala ngati ndisewela ndi mzanga.
translations.tonga: Ndilimvwa kwaanguluka kuti kandisobana amweenzuma.

lines.english:
I feel bad when my dad
says he does not have
money.

translations.bemba: Nshumfwa bwino bataata nga batiila tabakwete indalama.
translations.kaonde: Ñumvwa kutama inge ba taata baamba amba bafwao mali.
translations.lozi: Niikutwanga bumaswe bo ndate ababulela kuli abana masheleñi.
translations.lunda: Natiyang’a kutama neyi tata yami nahoshi nindi hakweti madiku.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kwivwanga kupihya nge tata mwahanjika ngwenyi kechi ali najimbongoko.
translations.nyanja: Ndimamvela kuipa ngati atate anena kuti alibe ndalama.
translations.tonga: Ndilimvwa kuusa kuti bataata bandaambila kuti tabajisi mali.

lines.english:
I feel loved when my
mom gives me a hug.

translations.bemba: Ndomfwa ukutemwikwa nga bamaayo bankumbatila.
translations.kaonde: Inge ba maama bankumbata, ñumvwa amba bantemwa.
translations.lozi: Niikutwanga kulatiwa boma abani kumbatelanga.
translations.lunda: Natiyang’a kukeng’a neyi mama yami nankumbati.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kwivwa kuzangiwa nge mama mwangusambilila.
translations.nyanja: Ndimvela wokondedwa ngati amai anga andikumbatila.
translations.tonga: Ndilimvwa kuyandwa kuti baama bandikumbata.

title:
My heart feels a lot of
things.

lines.english:
When Simbegwire’s mother died,
she was very sad. Simbegwire’s
father did his best to take care of
his daughter. Slowly, they learned
to feel happy again, without
Simbegwire’s mother.
Every morning they sat and talked
about the day ahead. Every evening
they made dinner together. After
they washed the dishes,
Simbegwire’s father helped her with
homework.

translations.bemba: Lintu banyina Simbegwire baafwile, aali uwabulanda saana. Bawishi balyesesha na maka yonse ukumusunga bwino no kumusansamusha. Panoono-panoono, baatampile ukusansamuka na kabili, nangu banyina Simbegwire bashalipo. Cila lucelo baleikala pamo no kulanda pafya ubo bushiku buleba. Cila cungulo baaleepekanya umulalilo bonse. Panuma ya kusamfya imbale, bawishi Simbegwire baaleafwako umwana imilimo yaku sukulu.
translations.kaonde: Simbegwire waumvwine bingi bulanda kimye kyafwile bainanji. Bino bashanji Simbegwire baesekele bingi nangovu kumulama bulongo mwanabo wamukazhi. Pachepache batendekele kusangalala jikwabo kwakubula bainanji Simbegwire. Kimye kyonse lukeelo baikalanga nakwisamba pa byobakoba juuba jikalondelapo. Kimye kyonse mabanga bateekanga kajo kamulajilo pamo. Panyuma yakovwa bijiilo, bashanji Simbegwire bamukwashangako kuuba mingilo ya kusukuulu.
translations.lozi: Bo mahe Simbegwire anebatimezi, naishondile hahulu. Bo ndatahe Simbegwire neba likile katata kubabalela mwanaa bona wa musizani. Hanyinyani- hanyinyani, nebaitutile kutaba hape kokusina bo mahe Simbegwire. Molipazulela lizazi kaufela, neba ina niku ambola kaza lizazi leo. Manzibwani neba lukisa za mulalelo hamoho. Kasamulaho wa kutapisa mikeke, bo ndatahe Simbegwire neba mutusanga kueza musebezi wa sikolo oezezwa kwandu.
translations.lunda: Chafwiliyi mama ya Simbegwire wadin’ga wataminina. Tata ya simbegwire welili zhezhima kulonda mwanindi wamubanda ekali chachiwahi. Chanti-chanti atachikili kwikala chiwahi chen’gi nakuwahilila chakadi mama ya Simbegwire. Intetemena yidi yezhima adin’ga nakuhosha hefuku idikwinzahu. Melela adi ezhima adin’ga nakuwayisha yakuda mwayedi wawu. Neyi anakosi dehi yen’ga Tata ya Simbegwire wadin’ga nakukwasha mwanindi mudimu wa kushikola.
translations.luvale: Omu naye ya Simbegwire afwile, alinyengele chikuma. Ise ya Simbegwire alingile mwose ahashile kulinga mangana alame mwanenyi waphwevo. Chindende chindende, valilongesele mwakwivwila kanawa Cheka, chakuzeneka naye ya Simbegwire. Chimene hichimene vatwamine nakuhanjika halikumbi nalihatamo. Chingoloshi hichingoloshi valongesele vyakulya hamwe. Kukumisa kukosa malonga, ise ya Simbegwire amukafwile namilimo yakushikola yakuzachila hembo.
translations.nyanja: Pamene amai a Simbegwire anamwalila, anakhala wacisoni kwambili. Abambo a Simbegwire adacita zothekela zonse kusamalila mwana wawo wamkazi. Pang’ono-pang’ono, adaphunzilanso kusangalalanso, popanda amai a Simbegwire. M’mawa mulimonse amakhala ndikulankhula za tsiku la mawa. Madzulo mulimonse ankadyela pamodzi cakudya camadzulo. Atatsuka mbale, bambo wa Simbegwire anamuthandiza ntchito yasukulu yakunyumba.
translations.tonga: Banyina Simbegwire nibakafwa, Simbegwire wakausa kapati. Bausyi bakasola kumulela akumupa zyoonse. Mukuya kwaciindi, bakatalika kukkomana alimwi nokuba kuti banyina Simbegwire tiibakaliko. Mafwumo-fwumo bakali kwaambaula kujatikizya zyakucita mu buzuba oobo. Masiku bakali kujika antoomwe. Bamana kusanzya mitiba, bakali kumugwasya zyakucikolo.

lines.english:
One day, Simbegwire’s father came
home later than usual. “Where are
you my child?” he called.
Simbegwire ran to her father. She
stopped still when she saw that he
was holding a woman’s hand. “I
want you to meet someone special,
my child. This is Anita,” he said
smiling.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo, bawishi Simbegwire baalicelelwe ukubwela ukucila inshita baalebwelelapo lyonse. Baitile Simbegwire abati, “Ulikwisa we mwana wandi?” Simbegwire aabutukiile kuli bawishi. Aileiminina shika ilyo aamwene bawishi nabekatilila ukuboko kwakwa namaayo. “Mwana wandi, ndefwaya uposhe aba njishile nabo. Niba Anita,” efyalandile bawishi ninshi baalemwentula.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo bashanji Simbegwire kechi babwelele kunzubo bukiji nobe byonka byobaubanga kimye kyonse ne. “Baipwizhe amba, “Ujipi mwanami? Simbegwire wanyemejile kuba shanji. Simbegwire waimenetu zhoo byoamwene amba bashanji bakwachile kuboko kwa babakazhi. Ba shanji bamulumbulwijile amba, “mwanami mbena kukeba namba uyuke uno muntu wakilamo kunema. Uno muntu jizhina janji ye Anita,” ba ambile nakumwemwesela.
translations.lozi: Zazi leliñwi, bo ndatahe Simbegwire nebatile kwandu kakuliyeha hanyinyani kufita monebatelanga mazazi kaufela. “Ukai mwanake?” babiza. Simbegwire amatela bo ndatahe. Angangamana asaboni kuli nebasweli lizoho la musali. “Nibata kuli ukopane nimutu yomuñwi yo yaipitezi, mwanake. Ba kibo Anita,” babulela inge bamenya.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu tata ya Simbegwire wafuntili kwitala chakulaba nankashi. “Wudi kudihi mwana I?” watambikili. Simbegwire watemukilili tata yindi. ilan’ga wemeni chamweniyu Tata yindi nakwati mubanda kuchikasa. “Nakuken’ga wudiluki naniwu wawukalawenu, mwanani. Iwu diyi Anita,” wahosheli iku nakusehelela.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe, Ise ya Simbegwire akotokelele kwiza kuzuvo kuhambakana makumbi osena. Asanyikile ngwenyi, “Uli kulihi mwanami?” Simbegwire athuchilile kuli ise. Oloze emanyine ndundulu omu amwene ise nakwate livoko lyaphwevo. Oku ali nakumwemweta ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Ngunasake uliwane namuthu wamwaza, mwanami, ou ikhiye Anita.”
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina, abambo a Simbegwire adafika kunyumba mocedwa kuposa masiku onse. “Kodi mwana wanga uli kuti?” adayitana. Simbegwire anathamangila kwa abambo ake. Anayima pomwe anawona kuti anagwilila dzanja la mkazi. “Ndikufuna iwe ukumane ndi munthu wapadela, mwana wanga. Uyu ndi Anita,” anatelo akumwetulila.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba bausyi bakaccelwa kujoka kuŋanda. “Uli kuli mwanaangu?” bakaita. Simbegwire wakabazuzila bausyi. Naakamana, wakaimikila nji naakabona bausyi kabajatide kwaanza kwamukaintu. “Ndiyanda kuti uzyibane amuntu waandeene mwanaangu. Oyu ngu Anita,” bakaamba calumwemwe.

lines.english:
“Hello Simbegwire, your father told
me a lot about you,” said Anita. But
she did not smile or take the girl’s
hand.
Simbegwire’s father was happy and
excited. He talked about the three
of them living together, and how
good their life would be. “My child, I
hope you will accept Anita as your
mother,” he said.

translations.bemba: Ba Anita abati, “Mwapola Simbegwire, bawiso balinshimikila ifintu ifingi pali iwe.” Nomba tabamwentwile nangu ukutambika ukuboka ku mwana. Ba wishi Simbegwire baali temwa na ukusansamuka saana. Balandile pafyo bonse batatu bakalaikala pamo, na pafyo imikalile yabo ikawama. Abati, “We mwana wandi, ndesubila ukasumina ba Anita ukuba banoko.”
translations.kaonde: “Byepi Simbegwire, bashobe bambula bintu byavula bingi pe obewa,” Anita waambile. Bino Anita kechi wamwemwesejile nangwa kukwata kuboko kwakwa Simbegwire ne. Bashanji Simbegwire batemenwe ne kusangalala bingi. Besambile pabwikalo bwabo bwakulutwe bonse basatu. Ba shanji bamwambijile mwanabo amba, “Mwanami, naketekela usa kwibaswa ba Anita kwikala bainobe.”
translations.lozi: “Lumela Simbegwire, bo ndataho bani bulelezi hahulu zeñata zahao,” bo Anita babulela. Kono neba sikamenya kapa kuswala lizoho la musizani. Bo ndatahe Simbegwire neba tabile ni kunyakalala. Ba ambola za kupila hamoho kwa bona babalalu, mi ni bupilo bwabona monebukabela hande. “Mwanaka, nasepa ukabalumela bo Anita sina bo maho,” babulela.
translations.lunda: “Simbegwire tata yeyi nalezhi zhazhivulu hadeyi,” Nindi Anita. Ilan’ga hamwetwili kanwaku hela kulwata chikasa chindi. Tata ya simbegwire wadin’ga wamuzan’galu. Wahosheli kachi mwasatu wawu ashakaman’ga hamu, nimukuwahila kashakaminu kawu. “Mwanami, nakuhweleli wukwitiya Anita ekali mama yeyi,” Wahosheli.
translations.luvale: Anita ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Yoya Simbegwire, iso nangulweze vyavivulu hali yove.” Oloze kamwemweteleko chipwe kumukwata kulivoko lyenyi. Ise ya Simbegwire evwile kuwaha. Ahanjikile hali vose vatatu kutwama hamwe, ngocho nomu navatwama nakuwahilila. Ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Mwanami, ngunafwelela nawitavila Anita Kupwa noko.”
translations.nyanja: “Moni Simbegwire, abambo ako andiuza zambili za iwe,” anatelo Anita. Koma sanamwetulile kapena kugwilila dzanja la mtsikanayo. Abambo a Simbegwire anali okondwa komanso osangalala. Anakambilana za atatuwa kukhala pamodzi, komanso momwe moyo wawo ungakhalile bwino. “Mwana wanga, ndikhulupilila kuti wavomela Anita kukhala amai ako,” anatelo.
translations.tonga: “Uli buti Simbegwire, bauso bakandaambila zyintu zyinji zyijatikizya nduwe,” wakaamba Anita. Pesi taakwe naakaseka-seka nokuba kumujata kujanza. Bausyi Simbegwire bakalikkomene. Bakaamba amakani aakuti bakakkale antoomwe botatwe alimwi abuumi mbobunga bwabota. “Mwanaangu, ndasyoma uyakuzumina kuti Anita abe banyoko,” bakaamba bausyi.

lines.english:
Simbegwire’s life changed. She no
longer had time to sit with her
father in the mornings. Anita gave
her so many household chores that
she was too tired to do her school
work in the evenings. She went
straight to bed after dinner.
Her only comfort was the colourful
blanket her mother gave her.
Simbegwire’s father did not seem to
notice that his daughter was
unhappy.

translations.bemba: Ubwikashi bwakwa Simbegwire bwalicinjishe. Taakwete inshita yakuba na bawishi ulucelo. Ba Anita baaleemupeela incito shapa ŋanda ishingi saana icakuti aaleenaka aaleefilwa no kubomba imilimo yaku sukulu icungulo. Aaleeyafye mu kusendama panuma ya kulya icakulya ca mulalilo. Icaleemusansamushafye buulangeti bwamalangi ubwamupeele banyina. Calemoneka kwati bawishi Simbegwire tabaishibe kuti umwana wabo taasansamwike.
translations.kaonde: Bwikalo bwa kwa Simbegwire bwa pimpwilwe. Kechi wajingapo na kimye kyakwikalapo nabashanji kimye kya lukeelo ne. Ba Anita bamupelenga mingilo yavula yapa nzubo kyakuuba keakankalwe ne kunemba mingilo ya kusukuulu mabanga namambo akukooka. Simbegwire wayangatu nakulaala panyuma yakuja kajo ka mabanga. Kyamutekeneshangatu kemwemba wanji wawama wamushijile bainanji. Bino ba shanji Simbegwire kechi bayukile amba mwanabo wajinga nabulandane.
translations.lozi: Bupilo bwa Simbegwire bwa cinca. Nasina nako yakuina ni bo ndatahe kakusanani. Bo Anita nebamufanga misebezi yemiñata ya fa lapa kuli nakatalanga hahulu kupalelwa ni kuñola musebezi wa kwa sikolo manzibwani. Nayanga kwa kulobala hasafeza feela kuca mulalelo. Sene simu ombaombanga feela neli kubo yamibalabala yene bamufile bo mahe. Bo ndatahe Simbegwire nebasika lemuha kuli mwanaa bona nasina tabo.
translations.lunda: Kashakaminu ka Simbegwire kahimpili. Hewedin’ga impinji yakushakama chengi na Tata yindiku muntetemena. Anita wadin’ga nakumwinka nyidimu yayivulu dichi hadin’ga na impinji ya shikola mu melelaku. Wadin’ga nakuya nakukama hohu impinji yezhima neyi nadi yakuda ya melela. Chuma chadin’ga nakumukokwezha hohu ipayi damwinkeliwu kudi mama yindi. Tata ya Simbegwire hadin’ga nakumona wanyi neyi mwanindi nakabakani
translations.luvale: Chiyoyelo cha Simbegwire chalumukile. Kapwile cheka nalwola lwakutwama nayise kuchimeneko. Anita amuhanyine milimo yakukhanda yayivulu shikaho ahonenenga kuzata milimo yenyi yakushikola kuheta chingoloshi. Ahambakanyinyinenga kukahela nge nakumisa kulya chachingoloshi. Lipayi amulanjililile naye, likhiko kaha lyamusuulwishileko halwola luze. Ise kasolokele kuthachikiza nge Simbegwire apwilenga wakulinyengako.
translations.nyanja: Moyo wa Simbegwire unasintha. Sanalinso ndi nthawi yoceza ndi bambo ake m’mawa. Anita anam’patsa ntchito zambili zapanyumba kotelo kuti anali wotopa kwambili kugwila ntchito yake yakusukulu m’madzulo. Anangopita kukagona atadya cakudya camadzulo. Comwe cinangomutonthoza cinali bulangete wokongola womwe amai ake anampatsa. Abambo a Simbegwire sanadzindikile konse kuti mwana wawo anali wosasangalala.
translations.tonga: Buumi bwa Simbegwire bwakacinca. Wakaleka kujanika abausyi mafwumo-fwumo. Anita wakali kumupa milimo minji yakubeleka muŋanda cakuti wakali kwaalilwa kucita ncito yakucikolo masiku. Wakali kuunka kukoona mbwaamanina kulya. Cintu cakali kumubotela biyo ndipayi libotu kapati lyakamupede banyina. Bausyi Simbegwire tiibakali kubikkila maano kuti bazyibe kuti mwana takkomene.

lines.english:
After a few months, Simbegwire’s
father told them that he would be
away from home for a while. “I have
to travel for my job,” he said. “But I
know you will look after each other.”
Simbegwire’s face fell, but her
father did not notice. Anita did not
say anything. She was not happy
either.

translations.bemba: Panumafye ya myeshi inoono, bawishi Simbegwire balilaile pa ŋanda ukuti baleefumapo panshita inoono. Abati, “Mfwile ukuya ku ncito. Nomba ninjishiba ukuti mwakulasunganafye bwino.” Simbegwire taasansamwike, nomba bawishi taabaishibe. Ba Anita taabalandile nangu cimo. Nabo tabaatemenwe iyoo.
translations.kaonde: Pakupitapo bañondo bacheeche, bashanji Simbegwire babujile Simbegwire ne bainanji amba bakafumapo panzubo moba aavula. Bebalaile amba “nkayanga ku mingilo. Bino nayuka mukelamatu bulongo.” Simbegwire wamwesheshe kilungi kyabulanda, bino bashanji kechi bamwene ne. Anita aye kechi waambilepo kintu kiji kyonse ne. Kabiji kechi wamwemwesheshe kiji kyonse nangwa kubula kusangalala ne.
translations.lozi: Hase kufitile li kwelinyana, bo ndatahe Simbegwire baba bulelela kuli bakazwa fa ndu ka nakonyana. “Niswanela kuya kwa musebezi,” babulela. “Kono naziba kuli mukaipabalela.” Simbegwire awisa sifateho, kono bo ndatahe nebasika lemuha. Bo Anita nebasika bulela sesiñwi kakuli nibona nebasikatabela.
translations.lunda: Chimwahitili tukwezhi, Tata ya Simbegwire wayelezhili nindi hakwika hohu wanyi hetala. “Nakuya ku mudimu,” nindi. “ilan’ga neluki nami mukuditala,” Simbegwire wataminini nankashi ilan’ga Tata yindi hachimweni wanyi. Anita hahosheli zhidi zhezhimaku ilan’ga wataminini niyena.
translations.luvale: Omu mwahichile tukweji vavandende, Ise ya Simbegwire avalwezele ngwenyi mwafumaho haze hazuvo chachindende. “Nguli nakuya ungeji wamilimo yami. Oloze Ngunathachikiza namulilama umwe namukwavo.” Simbegwire kumeso kwalumukile, oloze ise kachimweneko. Anita kahanjikileho hachihande khanako. Nayikhiye kevwile kuwahako.
translations.nyanja: Patapita miyezi yaing’ono, abambo a Simbegwire anafotokoza kuti adzacokapo pa nyumba kwakanthawi. “Ndiyenela kupita kuntchito yanga,” adatelo. “Koma ndikudziwa mudzasamalilana.” Nkhope ya Simbegwire idagwa, koma abambo ake sanazindikile konse. Anita sananene ciliconse. Sanasangalale nayenso.
translations.tonga: Nikwakainda myezi misyoonto, bausyi Simbegwire bakaamba kuti balazwa aŋanda kwaciindi cisyoonto. Bakati “Ndilazwa ndiya kukubelekela kumbi. Ndilizyi kuti mulalelana kabotu.” Simbegwire wakalanga ansi cakunyandwa, pesi bausyi tiibakabikkila maano. Anita kunyina ncaakaamba. Taakakkomene awalo.

lines.english:
Things got worse for Simbegwire. If
she didn’t finish her chores, or she
complained, Anita hit her. And at
dinner, the woman ate most of the
food, leaving Simbegwire with only
a few scraps.
Each night Simbegwire cried herself
to sleep, hugging her mother’s
blanket.

translations.bemba: Imikalile yakwa Simbegwire yalibiipiileko. Nga tapwishishe incito isha mu ŋganda, nangu nga ailishanya, ba Anita baaleemuuma. Pa mulalilo, Ba Anita eebaaleelya ifyakulya ifingi, baashilakofye Simbegwire utunoono. Cila bushiku Simbegwire aaleelaala alelila ninshi nakumbatila no bulangeti bwaba nyina.
translations.kaonde: Simbegwire bintu byayilengatu nakutaminako. Inge kechi wapwisha mingilo yapa nzubo nangwa wijizhañanyako, Anita watendekele kumupuma. Kimye kyakuja kajo kamabanga, Anita wajanga kajo kaavula kumushilako Simbegwire bukuuku. Kimye kyonse pakulaala, Simbegwire wajilanga aku saka akumbachila mwemba wamushijile bainanji.
translations.lozi: Lika zamutatafalela hahulu Simbegwire. Haiba nasikafeza kueza misebezi yafa lapa, kapa kubilaela, bo Anita neba munatanga. Hape ka nako ya mulalelo, bo Anita nebacanga lico zeñata, kusiyelanga Simbegwire malamba-lamba. Busihu kaufela Simbegwire naitilelanga konji buloko habuka muswala, ali kufumbatela kubo ya bo mahe.
translations.lunda: Yuma yamutamininini Simbegwire. Neyi nashiyihu mudimu wakubula kwila, hela neyi nayayabali, Anita wukumweta. Hakuda kwa melela, ona muka mama wukuda zhazhivulu nakushiya twatunyanya hohu. Wufuku wezhima, Simbegwire wadin’ga nakudila hakukama naku kamata ipayi da mama yindi.
translations.luvale: Vyuma vyapihililile kuli Simbegwire. Nge kamanyishile milimo yenyiko, chipwe tuhu kulinyenga, Anita amuvetelenga. Kaha kuheta hakulya chachingoloshi, Anita alilenga vyakulya vyosena kuselaho Simbegwire vipalapala kaha. Ufuku wosena Simbegwire alililenga swi nomu ayile mutulo, oku nakwachilila lipayi lyanaye.
translations.nyanja: Zinthu zinafika poipa kwa Simbegwire. Ngati sanamalize ntchito zake, kapena kumadandaula, Anita amamumenya. Ndipo pacakudya camadzulo, maiyo amadya cakudya cambili, nasiyila Simbegwire zidutswa zocepa cabe. Usiku uliwonse Simbegwire amalila yekha kugona, kukumbatila bulangete wa amai ake.
translations.tonga: Zyintu zyakaindilila kumubijila Simbegwire. Anita wakali kumuuma kuti taamaninzya kubeleka milimo yaaŋanda nokuba kuti watongooka. Masiku, mukaintu oyu wakali kulya zyakulya zyoonse akusiila mwana cakulya cisyoonto. Simbegwire wakali kulila masiku oonse, kakumbete payi lyaka mupa banyina.

lines.english:
One morning, Simbegwire was late
getting out of bed. “You lazy girl!”
Anita shouted. She pulled
Simbegwire out of bed. The
precious blanket caught on a nail,
and tore in two.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo ulucelo, Simbegwire alicelelwe ukubuuka. Ba Anita baapatile ati, “We munaŋani wamwanawe!” Efyo baakulwile Simbegwire ukumufunya pa busanshi. Ubulangeti atemwishishe bwaiketwe ku musomali no kulepuka ukwakanika pabili.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo lukeelo, Simbegwire kechi wabukile bukiji ne. “Obewa nkope!” Anita wabijikile. Wamukokele Simbegwire kufuma mumwanya. Mwemba wanji wawama wakobele mumusumali kabiji watabukile ne kwabanapo pabiji.
translations.lozi: Lizazi leliñwi kakusasani, Simbegwire alobala singomba. “Wena musizani yabuzwa!” Anita ahuwa. Sahoha Simbegwire ku muzusa fa mumbeta. Kubo yakakatela fa mapo ni kupazuha kueza liyemba zepeli.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu intetemena, Simbegwire walabili kuhinduka mukadidi. “Wudi wumubanda wakatala!” Anita wazuwili. Wakokeli Simbegwire kufuma mukadidi. Dina ipayi dakwatili kumusumadi nakutabuka hayedi.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe nachimene, Simbegwire akotokelele kuhinduka. Anita atambakanyine ngwenyi, “Ove muvwa wakanyike!” Akokele Simbegwire muze mukahela. Lize lipayi lyamwaza ngachize lyaswikile kulumbambo nakupulika havali.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina m’mawa, Simbegwire anacedwa kuuka. “Iwe mwana waulesi!” Anita anafuula. Anamcotsa Simbegwire pabedi. Bulangete wamtengo wapatali anagwidwa ndi msomali, ndipo unang’ambika pakati.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba mafwumo-fwumo, Simbegwire wakamuka kubuka. “Yebo okasimbi katolo,” wakoompolola Anita. Wakamukwela Simbegwire kuzwa abulo. Ipayi yakwe yakajata ampikili akuzauka muzyibeela zyobilo.

lines.english:
Simbegwire was very upset. She
decided to run away from home.
She took the pieces of her mother’s
blanket, packed some food, and left
the house. She followed the road
her father had taken.

translations.bemba: Simbegwire alifulilwe saana. Aasalilepo ukufyuka pa ŋanda. Aasendele utupimfya twa bulangeti bwaba nyina, alonga no twakulya, no kufuma pa ŋanda. Aakonkele umusebo mwapitile bawishi.
translations.kaonde: Simbegwire waumvwine bingi kutama. Walangulukile kunyemapo pa nzubo. Wasendele bipimvwa byamwemba wamupele bainanji, walongele kajo kabiji wafuminepo pa nzubo. Walondejilengatu jishinda mwailenga bashanji.
translations.lozi: Simbegwire nafilikanile maswe mi abaleha kumata mwa lapa. Ashimba tuemba twa kubo ya bo mahe ni lico mi azwa aikela. A latelela nzila yene bafitile bo ndatahe.
translations.lunda: Simbegwire wadin’ga wataminina nankashi. Wazhinini kufuma Kuna kwitala. Wasendeli tuna tuyisasa twa mapayi amama yindi nayakuda nakufuma kwitala. Walondeli inzhila yahitili Tata yindi.
translations.luvale: Simbegwire apihililile chikuma. Ashinganyekele kuchina haze hembo. Ambachile vize vihanda vyalipayi amuhanyine naye, kulongejeka vyakulya, nakulovoka muze muzuvo. Akavile ize jila ayile ise.
translations.nyanja: Simbegwire anakhumudwa kwambili. Anaganiza zothawa kucoka panyumba. Anatenga zidutswa za bulangete wa amai ake, nanyamula cakudya, natuluka mnyumbamo. Anatsatila njila yomwe abambo ake anapitila.
translations.tonga: Simbegwire wakanyema kapati. Wakayeeya kutija akuzwa aŋanda. Wakabweza tubeela twapayi lyabanyina akubweza cakulya mpoona wakazwa aŋanda. Wakatobelezya nzila bausyi njibakabelesya.

lines.english:
When it came to evening, she
climbed a tall tree near a stream
and made a bed for herself in the
branches.
As she went to sleep, she sang:
“Maama, maama, maama, you left
me.
You left me and never came back.
Father doesn’t love me anymore.
Mother, when are you coming back?
You left me.”

translations.bemba: Cilya bwaila, aniina ku cimuti icitali mupeepi na kamana no kupanga ubusanshi mu misambo. Pa kulaala, alaimba ati: “Maayo, maayo, maayo, mwalinsha ine. Mwalinsha ukwabula ukubwela. Bataata tabatemwa nomba. Maayo ni lilali mukabwela? Mwalinsha ine.”
translations.kaonde: Byokyafikile kimye kya mabanga, wakanjijile ku kichi kyalepa kwipi namukola ne kunengezha pakulaala mumisampi. Saka akyangye kulaala watendekele kwimba lwimbo amba. “Maama, maama, maama, mwansha mwabunke. Mwanshile kwakubula kubwela ne. Ba taata kechi bantemwa byobantemenwe ne. Maama nanchi mukabwela ñanyi kimye? Mwansha bunke.”
translations.lozi: Ka nako ya manzibwani, apahama kota yetelele yeli kwa tuko a lyabwa ni kuipangela mumbeta mwa mitai. Hase alobala, aopela: “Ima, ima, ima, munisiile. Munisiile mi amusika kuta. Bo ndate abasanilata. Ima, mukuta lili? Munisiile.”
translations.lunda: Chikwashikili melela, wakandamini kumutondu nakwala kakadidi mumpaku yamutondu. Chadin’ga nakukamayu, wembili kamina: Maama, maama, maama, wanshiya. Wanshiya chakadi kufunta. Tata hanken’ga chen’giku. Mama wukenza chaakanyi? Wanshiya.”
translations.luvale: Omu kwelavile, anyinyine kumutondo kwakamwihi nakalwiji nakwala kahela mumithango. Shimbu kanda asavale, embile: “Ma-ama ma-ama ma-ama, wanguseza. Wanguseza chakuzeneka kukinduluka. Tata kanguzanga chekako. Mama nauhiluka kumbi muka?”
translations.nyanja: Pofika madzulo, anakwela mtengo wautali pafupi ndi mtsinje ndipo anadzipangila pogona panthambi. Pomwe anagona, anayimba: Maama, maama, maama, munandisiya. Munandisiya osabwelanso. Atate sakundikondanso. Amai, mudzabwela liti? Munandisiya.”
translations.tonga: Nikwakasiya, wakayeeya kutanta mucisamu cilamfwu munsi akalonga akubamba bulo. Naakaunka kukoona, wakaimba: “Baama, Baama, mwakandisiya. Mwakandisiya mpoona tiimwakajoka. Bataata tabacindiyandi. Baama, ino mujoka lili? Mwakandisiya.”

lines.english:
The next morning, Simbegwire sang
the song again. When the women
came to wash their clothes at the
stream, they heard the sad song
coming from the tall tree.
They thought it was only the wind
rustling the leaves, and carried on
with their work. But one of the
women listened very carefully to
the song.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelepo ulucelo, Simbegwire aimbile ulwimbo na kabili. Ilyo banamaayo baishile mu kucapa ifyakufwala mu mumana, baumfwile ulwimbo lwacililishi lulefumina ku cimuti icitali. Mu maano abati mwela uleelisha amabuula, awe bakonkenyepo ne milimo yabo. Nomba umo pali beena akutikishe ku lwimbo.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jalondejilepo, Simbegwire waimbilenga yenka uno lwimbo jikwabo. Bainetu baishile nakuchapa bivwalo kukakola, baumvwine muntu saka emba lwimbo wa bulanda kufuma kukichi kyalepa. Balangulukile amba kampe mwelatu wasunkanyinyenga mabula kabiji batwajijile na mingilo yabo. Bino umo inetu watelekeshe bingi bulongo ku uno lwimbo.
translations.lozi: Kakusasani wa lizazi lelitatama, Simbegwire aopela pina yeo hape. Basali ba ne batile kuto tapisa libyana kwa kanukana, bautwa pina ya matomola pilu yenezwelela kwa kota yetelele. Banahana kuli mwendi ki moya wo no nyanganyisa matali mi bazwelapili ni misebezi yabona. Kono musali yomuñwi wa kubona ateeleza pina yeo katokomelo.
translations.lunda: Ntetemena Simbegwire wembili kana kamina chen’gi. Akamama chenziliwu nakutaha menzhi atiyili kamina kawushona kanakufumina kumutondu. Adin’ga nakutiya neyi hamu mafu hohu kwiwulu da mutondu dichi atwalekelihu na mudimu wawu. Ilan’ga mukamama wuma watiyilili chachiwahi kukamina.
translations.luvale: Omu kwachele chimene, Simbegwire embile cheka uze mwaso. Omu maphwevo vejile nakukosa vyakuvwala vyavo kuze kukalwiji, vevwile mwaso wakulishona naufuminyina kumutondo wausuku wapwileko. Vashinganyekele ngwavo yayize peho kaha yapwilenga nakunyikisa mafwo, shikaho vatwalilileho namilimo yavo. Oloze phwevo umwe hakachi Kavo evwishishile chikuma uze mwaso.
translations.nyanja: M’mawa mwake, Simbegwire anayimbanso nyimboyo. Pomwe azimaimai anabwela kudzachapa zovala zawo pamtsinje, anamva nyimbo yacisoni ikucokela mumtengo wautali. Amaganiza kuti ndi mphepo yomwe imawaza masamba, ndikupitilila ndi ntchito yawo. Koma m’modzi mwa azimaiwo anamvetsela mosamalitsa ku nyimboyi.
translations.tonga: Mafwumo-fwumo aakaccilila, Simbegwire wakaimba nyimbo alimwi. Bamakaintu nibakaboola kuwasha zikobela kumulonga, bakamvwa nyimbo yabuumba kuzwa mucisamu cilamfwu. Bakayeeya kuti muwo weenzya matuvwu, kumane bakatolelela amulimo wabo. Pele umwi mukaintu wakateelesesya kunyimbo.

lines.english:
This woman looked up into the tree.
When she saw the girl and the
pieces of colourful blanket, she
cried, “Simbegwire, my brother’s
child!”
The other women stopped washing
and helped Simbegwire to climb
down from the tree. Her aunt
hugged the little girl and tried to
comfort her.

translations.bemba: Uyu namaayo aalooleshe ku muulu wa cimuti. Lintu aamwene akakashana no tupimfya twa bulangeti ubwamalangi, aapundile ati, “Simbegwire, umwana wakwa ndume yandi!” Banamaayo bambi baaleekele ukucapa bayafwilishako Simbegwire ukwikila ku cimuti. Banyina-senge bakumbatile akakashana no kwesha ukukatalalika.
translations.kaonde: Uno inetu watajishishe bingi kukichi. Wamwene mwanyike wamukazhi ne bipimvwa byanji bya mwemba saka abena kujila. Ponkapo wabijikile amba, “Simbegwire, mwana kolojami wamulume!” Bainetu bakwabo balekele kuchapa ne kukwasha Simbegwire kwikila kukichi. Ba shanji-nkazhi bamukumbachile kabiji baesekele kumutekenesha.
translations.lozi: Musali yo atalimisisa kwa kota. Abona musizani ni liemba za kubo ya mibala-bala, alila, “Simbegwire, mwana a kezelaka!” Basali babañwi batuhela kutapisa batusa Simbegwire kutuluka kwa kota. Bo ndatahe ba basali ba kakumbatela kasizani ni kulika ku kaombaomba.
translations.lunda: Iwu mama watalili kwiwulu da mutondu. Chamweniyu Kansi kwiwulu da mutondu na yisasa yamapayi wadilili, “Simbegwire mwana ka manakwami!” aka mama amakwawu alekeli kutaha menzhi kulonda amukwashi Simbegwire kusuluka kumutondu. Tata yindi wamubanda wamukumbatili nakumukokwezha.
translations.luvale: Ou phwevo atalile kwilu lyamutondo. Omu amwene uze mwana phwevo navihanda vyalipayi ambachile, alilile, “Simbegwire, mwana ndumbwami!” Vaze mapwevo vakwavo vechele Kukosa nakukafwa Simbegwire kusuluka kuze kumutondo. Isephwevo amukumachilile nakweseka kumuvendejeka.
translations.nyanja: Mai uyu anayang’ana m’mtengo. Ataona mtsikanayo ndi zidutswa za bulangete wokongola, aafuula, “Simbegwire, mwana wa mcimwene wanga!” Amai enawo anasiya kutsuka ndikuthandizila Simbegwire kutsika m’mtengo. Azakhali ake anakumbatila kamtsikanaka ndikuyesetsa kumutonthoza.
translations.tonga: Oyu mukaintu wakalanga mujulu mucisamu. Naakabona mwana musimbi atubeela twapayi, wakalila, “Simbegwire mwana wamunyinandumi wangu!” Bamwi bamakaintu bakaleka kuwacca zyisani akumugwasya kuseluka kuzwa mujulu mucisamu. Bakamukumbatila.

lines.english:
