translations.luvale: Khalai omu mwahiluka kwimbo kufuma kushikola, mwatambukila mutondo wamalalanja. Khalai mwahulisa, “Malalanja ove anahi lyehi tahi?”
translations.nyanja: Pamene Khalai abwelela kunyumba kucokela kusukulu, ayendela mtengo wa malalanje. “Kodi malalanje ako apsya kale?” Afunsa Khalai.
translations.tonga: Apiluka kuzwa kucikolo, Khalai ulaunka kucisamu camafwuleenke. “Sena mafwuleenke akabizwa kale?” wabuzya Khalai.

lines.english: “The oranges are still green,” sighs Khalai. “I will see you tomorrow orange tree,” says Khalai. “Perhaps then you will have a ripe orange for me!”

translations.bemba: “Amacungwa yacili ayabishi!” efyasosa Khalai. “Nkesa kumonako mailo we mucungwa” efyasosa Khalai. Limbi lyena nkasanga naukwata icungwa ilyapya.”
translations.kaonde: “Maolengi akiji abishi,” Khalai wijizhañanya Kyawama nkeya kesha,” Khalai waambile amba.” Kampepo ukekalapo najiolengi japya jakumpa!”
translations.lozi: “Maolenji asali a butala,” Khalai ulula moya. “Nikakubona kamuso wena kota ya olenji,” Khalai abulela. “Mwendi nikatofumana olenji yebuzwize!”
translations.lunda: “Malalanji achidi amesu,” kuhumikizha Khalai.”Nakakumona kumadiki mutondu wamalalanji, “nindi Khalai. Hekwawu wukekala na malalanji akwiha anami!”
translations.luvale: “Malalanja achili amavisu,” Khalai mwahizumuka. “Nangukumona hamene ove mutondo wamalalanja,” Khalai mwahanjika. “Phamo kuheta haze naupwa nalilalanja lyakuhya lyakunguhana!”
translations.nyanja: Malalanje akalibe kupya,” anena Khalai. “Ndizakuonanso mailo mtengo wa malalanje,” analankhula Khalai “Mwina, uzandikhalila ndi lalanje lakupya!”
translations.tonga: “Mafwuleenke taaninga bizwa.” waamba Khalai. “Ndiyakuboola kukubona juunza ocisamu camafwuleenke “. Waamba Khalai. “Ndiza kuya kujanika lyomwe libizwide!.”

title: This is Khalai. She is seven years old. Her name means ‘the good one’ in her language, Lubukusu.

lines.english: My little brother sleeps very late. I wake early, because I am great!

translations.bemba: Kandume yandi takabuuka bwangu. Ine ndabuuka bwangu pantu nalicenjela!
translations.kaonde: Nkasami wamulume kechi ulaala bukiji ne. Mbuuka bukiji, mambo nakosa!
translations.lozi: Munyenaka wa mushimani ulobalanga ka kuliyeha. Napakelanga, kakuli niipitezi.
translations.lunda: Manakwami wamunyanya hakamangà swayiku. Nahindukan’ga swayi mulong’a nidi wang’ovu.
translations.luvale: Songo yami walunga eji kukotokela chikuma kusavala nge kunatoko. Ami ngweji kuhindukanga washi mwomwo ngwapwa wakulikwachisa!
translations.nyanja: M’ngono wanga amacedwa kugona. Ndimauka m’mamawa cifukwa ndine wamkulu!
translations.tonga: Musyoonto wangu musankwa ulaccelwa koona. Ndilafwambaana kubuka, nkaambo ndimukali.

lines.english: I am the one who lets in the sun.

translations.bemba: Nine njingisha akasuba mu ŋanda.
translations.kaonde: Amiwa yami nswisha mute kutwela mukachi.
translations.lozi: Kina ya tisezanga kuli lizazi likene.
translations.lunda: Yami nenzunwinan’ga mwaaana.
translations.luvale: Yami ngweji kunehesanga musana kwingila.
translations.nyanja: Ndine ndimalowetsa dzuwa.
translations.tonga: Ndime ndijalwida zuba.

lines.english: “You’re my morning star,” says Ma.

translations.bemba: Bamaayo batiila, “Uli lutanda lwandi ulwakumacaca.”
translations.kaonde: Ba maama bamba amba, “Yobe ntanda wami wakumakya.”
translations.lozi: “Kiwena naleli yaka yakakusasani,” Bo ma babulela.
translations.lunda: “yeyi kanonwesha kami kantetemena,” chahoshan’gayi mama.
translations.luvale: Mama ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Wapwa uthanganyika yami wakuchimene.”
translations.nyanja: “Ndiwe nthanda yanga yam’mawa,” amatelo amai.
translations.tonga: Baama baamba kuti, “Ulinyenyezi yangu yakubucedo.”

lines.english: I wash myself, I don’t need any help.

translations.bemba: Ndaisamba, nshifwaya wakungafwilisha.
translations.kaonde: Neovwa amiwa mwine, kechi nkebapo bukwasho ne.
translations.lozi: Naitapisanga na muñi, ani tokwi tuso.
translations.lunda: Nadiweleshan’ga ami aweni, hinaken’gan’ga lwakwashiku.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kulisanyisa yami yavene, kangwechi kutonda wakungukafwakoko.
translations.nyanja: Ndimasamba ndekha masiku onse, sindifunanso thandizo iliyonse.
translations.tonga: Ndilasamba endike, nseyandi lugwasyo luli loonse.

lines.english: I can cope with cold water and blue smelly soap.

translations.bemba: Nshitiina ameenshi ayatalala nangu sopo yanunka iyamakumbi-makumbi.
translations.kaonde: Amiwa nakonsha kukwanyisha kowa meema amunyango nangwa aji nasopo wanunka kabiji wafituluka.
translations.lozi: Nakona kutapa mezi abata ni mulola wa bundilu onunkelela hande.
translations.lunda: Nateli kuwela menzhi atuta na sopu yawuluya yikweti kevumba kakawahi
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kusana meya atuta nasopo yakalivumba kamwaza.
translations.nyanja: Ndingasambe ndi madzi odzidzila, ndi sopo wamtambo onunkhila.
translations.tonga: Ndinyina penzi ameenda atontola ansipa inunka yabbuluu.

lines.english: Ma reminds, “Don’t forget teeth.” I reply, “Never, not me!”

translations.bemba: Bamaayo balanjibukishako abati, “Wilaba ameeno.” Na ine nayasuka nati, “Teeti ndabe ameeno.”
translations.kaonde: Ba maama bamvulula amba, kweseka kulubako meeno ne. Amiwa nebabula namba, “Kechi kikobiwapoakyo kwiamiwa ne!”
translations.lozi: Bo ma ba hupulisanga, “usike walibala meeno.” Nahalaba nili, “kutokwa, nanya!”
translations.lunda: Mama wan’ganukishan’ga nindi, “Kuvulamena nehi mazhi.” Nakulan’ga nami, “Inehi iyamiku!”
translations.luvale: Mama mwangwanukisa, “Kanda nauvulyama mazoko.” Nangukumbulula, “Kwekha, kechi yamiko!”
translations.nyanja: Amai amandikumbutsa, “osayiwala kutsuka mano.” Ndimawayanka kuti “ine ai, sindingaiwale ai!”
translations.tonga: Baama balandiyeeyezya, “Utalubi kucumba meno.” Ndaingula kuti “Peepe, kutali ndime. Nsekonzyi kuluba.”

lines.english: After washing, I greet Grandpa and Auntie, and wish them a good day.

translations.bemba: Panuma yakusamba, ndaposha bamaama na bamaayo-senge, no kubashalikapo bwino.
translations.kaonde: Inge napwisha kuchapa, ñimuna ba nkambo babalume ne ba taata-kazhi, kabiji mpesha ne juuba jabo jonse.
translations.lozi: Hasenifelize kutapa, nalumelisanga bo kuku ba baana ni bo ma ba bainyani ni kubalakaleza kuba ni lizazi lelinde.
translations.lunda: Neyi naweli dehi, nemushan’ga nkaka na tata wamubanda na kuyilezha ekali nefuku dadiwahi.
translations.luvale: Kukumisa kukosa, ngweji kumeneka khaka natataphwevo, nakuvalweza vatwame kanawa lize likumbi.
translations.nyanja: Ndikasiliza kusamba, ndimapatsa moni agogo amuna ndi alongo a atate anga, ndimawafunila tsiku labwino.
translations.tonga: Ndamana kusamba, ndilaanzya bahaanene amunyina baama akubaambila kuti babe abuzuba bubotu.

lines.english: Then I dress myself, “I’m big now Ma,” I say.

translations.bemba: Elyo panuma naifwika naati, “Ndi mukalamba nomba maayo.”
translations.kaonde: Nebabuula ba maama namba, “nevwika amiwa mwine mambo nakoma,”
translations.lozi: Cwale naitinisa liapalo, “Nihulile na cwale Ima,” na bulela.
translations.lunda: Kaha nadivwikan’ga ami aweni, “Nakuli unu.” Nadilezhan’ga.
translations.luvale: Kaha nangulivwika ami yavene. Nanguhanjika ngwami, “Ngunakolo jino mama.”
translations.nyanja: Kenaka ndimabvala ndekha. “Ndine wamkulu tsopano amama,” ndimanena.
translations.tonga: Ndamana ndalisamika, “Ndimupati lino baama.”

lines.english: I can close my buttons and buckle my shoes.

translations.bemba: Ndamanga amabatani no kukaka intambo shapa nsapato.
translations.kaonde: Nakonsha kwimanga mabatani kabiji nekuvwala nsapato.
translations.lozi: Nakona kuñomela likunupo zaka ni kutama mihala ya kwa makatulo aka.
translations.lunda: Nadivwikan’ga nakukasa nyiha yansapatu yami.
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kusoka jimota jami nakukasa mihya yajisapato jami.
translations.nyanja: Ndimanga mabatani komanso nthambo za nsapato ndekha.
translations.tonga: Inga ndajala nkopela akwaanga mabbusu.

lines.english: And I make sure little brother knows all the school news.

translations.bemba: Nshilaba ukweba kandume yandi ificitika ku sukulu.
translations.kaonde: Kabiji mona kuuba amba namubuula nkasami wamulume masawakya onse akusukuulu.
translations.lozi: Mi nitotalusezanga munyenaka wa mushimani makande kaufela yamanca yaezahalanga kwa sikolo.
translations.lunda: Nawa naken’gan’ga manakwami wakansi eluka zhezhima hadi shikola.
translations.luvale: Kaha nangumona ngwami songo yami walunga nathachikiza mijimbu yosena yakushikola.
translations.nyanja: Ndimayesetsa kuti mbale wanga adziwe nkhani zonse za kusukulu.
translations.tonga: Musyoonto wangu musankwa ndilamuzyibya makani onse aakucikolo.

lines.english: In class I do my best in every way.

translations.bemba: Mu kalashi ndabombesha munshila shonse.
translations.kaonde: Mukalasi, ñingila nangovu mumashinda apusana-pusana.
translations.lozi: Mwa kilasi nalikanga kueza hande ka monikonela kaufela.
translations.lunda: Mu kilasi nadishilan’gaku.
translations.luvale: Mushikola ngweji kulikwachisa mujijila josena.
translations.nyanja: Mukalasi ndimacita zonse zothekela munjila iliyonse.
translations.tonga: Ndilabeleka canguzu lyoonse mucikolo.

lines.english: I do all these good things every day. But the thing I like most, is to play and play!

translations.bemba: Ncita fyonse ifi fisuma cila bushiku. Nomba icikulu ico natemwisha, kwangala.
translations.kaonde: Ñingila bintu byawama moba onse. Bino kintu kyonatemwisha, ke kukaya!
translations.lozi: Niezanga lika ze kaufela zende ka zazi ni zazi. Kono nto iliñwi yenilata hahulu ki kubapala ni kubapala!
translations.lunda: Nelan’ga yuma iyi ifuku neyi ifuku. Elan’ga chuma chinaken’ga nankashi kuhema nakuhema.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kulinganga evi vyamwaza vyosena kumbi hikumbi. Oloze chuma ngwazanga chikuma, chapwa kuhema hema!
translations.nyanja: Ndimacita zabwino zonsezi tsiku ndi tsiku. Koma cimene ndikondetsetsa kwambili ndi kusowela!
translations.tonga: Ndilacita zyintu zyoonse zyibotu lyoonse. Pele cintu nceyandisya kapati nkusobana.

title: My little brother sleeps very late. I wake early, because I am great!

lines.english: In a village on the slopes of Mount Kenya in East Africa, a little girl worked in the fields with her mother. Her name was Wangari.

translations.bemba: Mu mushi waba mumbali ya lupili lwa Kenya ku kabanga mu Africa, umukashana umwaice aalebomba na banyina mwibala. Ishina lyakwe aali ni Wangari.
translations.kaonde: Amwa mu kyalo kya Kenya mukabeta ka kubuyeke musela bwa Afilika, muji muzhi muji mutumba wakunkuluka, mwaikalanga mwanyike wamukazhi waingilanga mumajimi na bainanji. Jizhina janji wajinga Wangari.
translations.lozi: Mwa munzi wo kwatuko alilundu la Kenya kwa upa wa Africa, mwanana wa musizani nabelekanga mwa masimu ni bo mahe. Libizo lahae neeli Wangari.
translations.lunda: Mumukala ha zhimpidi zha Kenya kukabeta kamuzhika wa Africa, Kansi wamunyaya wamumbanda wazatilen’ga mumahembi na mama yindi. Izhina diyi Wangari.
translations.luvale: Mwimbo limwe haushikumukilo waphili ya Kenya ku East Africa, mwanaphwevo azachile nanaye muwande. Lijina lyenyi ikhiye Wangari.
translations.nyanja: M’mudzi wina womangidwa pamatelo a phili la Kenya Kum’mawa kwa Africa, kamtsikana kakang’ono kamagwila nchito m’munda ndi amai ake. Dzina lake anali Wangari.
translations.tonga: Mumunzi umwi uuli mujeleele lyamulundu utegwa Kenya cisi ca Afulika nkocili kujwe, kasimbi kamwi kasyoonto kakali kubeleka mumyuunda abanyina. Izyina lyankako lyakali Wangari.

lines.english: Wangari loved being outside. In her family’s food garden she broke up the soil with her machete. She pressed tiny seeds into the warm earth.

translations.bemba: Wangari alitemenwe ukusangwa panse. Aaleimbaula umushili no lupanga mwibala lyabo. Aabyele utuseke utunoono mu mushili wakabilila.
translations.kaonde: Wangari watemenwe bingi kwikala pangye. Watemenwe kujima mu mashamba akisemi na lukasu wanji. Wabyalanga nkunwa mumushiji.
translations.lozi: Wangari nalata hahulu kuina fande. Mwa simu ya lico ya lubasi lwahae na limanga ka sabule. Nacezi tupeu totunyinyani-nyinyani mwa mubu.
translations.lunda: Wangari waken’gelen’ga kwikala hanzhi. Watabwili maseki amwitempa da chisaka chindi namukwali. Wanyanchikili tuzhimbutu kwishina damaseki.
translations.luvale: Wangari azangilenga kupwa haweluka. Mulithepa lyavo achipwilenga mavu namukwale wenyi. Ashinyinyikile tumbuto twatundende mumavu.
translations.nyanja: Wangari amakonda kucezela pabwalo. Wangari anagaula mudimba mwao nabzyala tumbewu mnthaka yomwe inali yothuma.
translations.tonga: Wangari wakali kuyandisya kuba anze. Mumuunda wamukwasyi, Wangari wakalima akusyanga tumbuto tusyoonto-syoonto mubulongo bukasaala.

lines.english:
Her favourite time of day was just after sunset. When it got too dark to see the plants, Wangari knew it was time to go home.

She would follow the narrow paths through the fields, crossing rivers as she went.

translations.bemba: Inshita aatemwishishe ya cungulo lilya akasuba kaawa. Wangari aaleinukafye nga cakuti kwafiita saana icakuti umuntu tekuti amone ifimenwa. Pakuya aaleepita mu kashila katondo mu mabala no kuciluka imimana.
translations.kaonde: Kimye kyoatemweshe pa juuba ke kimye inge juuba kejiye nakuzhika. Inge pafita kakankalwe kumona bijimwa, popo ayukanga amba kimye kyakuya kunzubo kyafika. Wapitanga mujishinda jakaloolo pakachi kamajimi saka aabuka mikola.
translations.lozi: Nako ya lizazi yanalata hahulu neeli manzibwani. Hanekubanga lififi hahulu kuli hasakona kubona licalo, Wangari nazibanga kuli neeli nako yakuya kwa ndu. Na latelelanga kanzilanyana kene kafita mwa masimu, kusila linuka inge ayoya.
translations.lunda: Hefuku, wadin’ga nakuken’ga neyi mutena wunakulembalemba. Neyi kuneyili dehi himpinji yakutala zhimbutu, Wangari welukili nindi himpinji yakufunta kwitala. Wadin’ga nakulondela tuzhinzhila twatunyanya mumahembi, nakuhanuka tulon’ga chedin’ga nafuntayi.
translations.luvale: Lwola lwenyi azangile chikuma shina chingoloshi, likumbi hilinalauka. Omu kwelavile kumona vimbuto kuhasa jino hichiku, Wangari athachikijile ngwenyi hilwola lwakuya kuzuvo. Mwakavangiza kaze kaphundujila kapulasanyine muwande, kuzauka tulwiji chosena ayilenga.
translations.nyanja: Nthawi imene anali kukonda kwambili mtsikanayu tsiku lililonse inali pamene dzuwa itangolowa kumene. Ndipo mdima ukagwila kuti aone zomela, Wangari anali kudziwa kuti nthawi yopita kunyumba yafika tsopano. Ndipo popita kunyumba anali kudzela njila zing’ono, kudutsa minda mpaka kuwoloka mitsinje kufika kwao.
translations.tonga: Wakali kukkomana kapati kuti zuba lyazwa akubbila. Kuti naa waleka kuzibona kabotu zyisyango, wakali kuzyiba kuti kwasiya nciindi cakuya kuŋanda. Wakali kwiinda mukazila kasyoonto kainda mumyuunda mane waakuzabuka mulonga kayoobuya.

lines.english:
Wangari was a clever child and couldn’t wait to go to school. But her mother and father wanted her to stay and help them at home.

When she was seven years old, her big brother persuaded her parents to let her go to school.

translations.bemba: Wangari aali mwana uwacenjela kabili aaleefwaisha ukuya ku sukulu. Nomba bawishi na banyina baaleefwaya ukuti aleikalafye pa ŋanda no kubaafwa imilimo. Ilyo aafikile pa myaka yakufyalwa cine-lubali, ndume yakwe umukalamba aalandile na bafyashi basuka basuminisha Wangari ukuya ku sukulu.
translations.kaonde: Wangari wajinga mwanyike wajimukile bingi kabiji wakebeshe bingi kutendeka sukuulu. Bino ba inanji ne ba shanji bakebeshe bingi amba ekalenga pa nzubo saka ebakwashako mingilo yapa nzubo. Byoafikizhe myaka yakusemwa itanu na ibiji, kolojanji wamulume wakambizhe ba nsemi amba bamutendekeshe sukuulu.
translations.lozi: Wangari neeli mwana yanatalifile mi nanyolezwi kuya kwa sikolo. Kono bo mahe ni bo ndatahe nebabata kuli asike akena sikolo mi abatuse fandu. Hana kwanisize lilimo zeketa izoho ni zepeli, kezelaa hae yomuhulu asusueza bashemi ba bona kumulumeleza kuya kwa sikolo.
translations.lunda: Wangari wadin’ga Kansi wababala nankashi kaha nawa wadin’ga nakuken’gesha Kuya kushikola. Ilan’ga atata na mama yindi adin’ga nakuken’ga ashakaman’ga hetala nawu kolanda ayikwashi kukon’ga nyidimu. Chashikiliyu yaaka yitanu nayiyedi, manakwindi washinjilili anvwali zhindi kulonda amwitezhi Kuya kushikola.
translations.luvale: Wangari apwilenga mwana wakuzangama kaha kazangile kwenyeka lwola kuhona kuya kushikolako. Oloze ise nanaye vasakile atwame nakuvakafwanga hembo. Omu ahetele myaka yakusemuka itanu-nayivali, yayenyi walunga avalwezele visemi jenyi vamweche ayenga kushikola.
translations.nyanja: Wangari anali mwana wocenjela kwambili ndipo anali wofunitsitsa kupita kusukulu kukaphunzila. Koma makolo ake sanafune kuti kamtsikana aka kaphunzile koma kazikhala pa nyumba ndi kugwila ncthito. Pamene Wangari anali ndi zaka zisanu and ziwili, mukulu wake wamwamuna anagonjetsa makolo awo pokambilana kuti Wangari apite kusukulu akaphunzile.
translations.tonga: Wangari wakalimwana musongo amana ucenjede, aboobo wakali kulomohya kapati kuti aunke kucikolo. Pesi banyina abausyi bakali kuyanda kuti kakkala biyo aŋanda akubagwasya milimo. Naakakkwanya myaka ciloba yakuhyalwa, mupati wakwe wakabakombelezya bahyali bakwe kuti bamutole kucikolo.

lines.english:
She liked to learn! Wangari learnt more and more with every book she read. She did so well at school that she was invited to study in the United States of America.

Wangari was excited! She wanted to know more about the world.

translations.bemba: Aalitemenwe ukusambilila! Muli lyonse ibuuku aleebelenga aleesambililamo ifipya. Aalibombele bwino saana mu masambililo icakuti baalimwitile ukuya mu kusambilila ku caalo ca United States of America. Wangari aatemenwe icibi! Aaleefwaya ukwishibilapo ifingi pesonde.
translations.kaonde: Watemenwe bingi kufunda! Wangari wafunjilenga bintu byavula mu mabuuku onse oatangilenga. Waingijile bingi bulongo kusukuulu kabiji akino kyalengejile kumwita kuya nakufunda ku kyalo kya Amelika. Wangari wasekejile bingi! Wakebeshenga bingi kuyuka byavula muntanda.
translations.lozi: Nalata kuituta! Wangari naituta zeñata mwa libuka zanabalanga. Naezize hande hahulu kwa sikolo kuli mane amemiwa kuyo itutela kwa naha ya United States of America. Wangari nanyakalalile hahulu! Nabata kuziba hahulu zeñata za lifasi.
translations.lunda: Waken’geli kutan’ga! Wangari watan’gili chakubadika namukanda wezhima waweniyu. Welili chachiwayi kushikola kaha nawa amutambikili kuya nakutan’ga shikola yaku United States of America. Wangari wadin’ga namuzan’galu! Waken’geli kwiluka yuma yayivulu yamukayii.
translations.luvale: Azangile kutanga! Wangari alilongesele vyavivulu mumikanda atangilenga. Hakulinga kanawa mushikola vamusanyikile kuya nakutangila ku United States of America. Wangari awahililile chikuma! Atondele kwijiva vyavivulu vyamukaye.
translations.nyanja: Wangari anakonda kuphunzila kwambili motelo kuti anaphunzila kopitilila kupyolela mkuwelenga mabuku osiyana-siyana. Ndipo anakhoza kwambili pa sukulu motelo kuti anapeza umwayi wokaphunzila ku dziko lakutali la United States of America. Wangari anasangalala kwambili cifukwa anali kufunitsitsa kudziwa zambili zapa dziko lapansi.
translations.tonga: Wakali kuyandisya kwiiya! Wangari wakali kwiiya zyintu zyipya ciindi coonse kufwumbwa abala bbuku. Wakalaa maanu kapati mucikolo. Wakacita kabotu kwiindilila mucikolo, bakamutamba kuti akaakuiile nyika nkwiili ku hisi hijatene ihya ku America. Wangari wakakkomana. Wakali kuyandisya kuzyiba zyintu zyinji zyamunyika.

lines.english: At the American university Wangari learnt many new things. She studied plants and how they grow. And she remembered how she grew: playing games with her brothers in the shade of the trees in the beautiful Kenyan forests.

translations.bemba: Wangari aalisambiliile ifintu ifingi ifipya pa sukulu lyapa muulu mu America. Aasambilile palwa fimenwa nefyo fikula. Aaleibukisha nefyo aaleekula: ukwangala ifyangalo na bandume yakwe mu cintelelwe ca miti ya mpanga iisuma mu Kenya.
translations.kaonde: Pasukuulu mukatampe wa Yunivesiti wamu Amelika, Wangari wafunjile bintu byavula bingi byakatataka. Wafunjile pa bijimwa kabiji nebyo bikoma. Kabiji wavulukile nebyo akomenenga: kukaya bisela na bakolojanji babalume mukimfutele kya bichi mumasaka awama amu kyalo kya Kenya.
translations.lozi: Fa sikolo sesipahami sa America Wangari naitutile lika zenca zen’gata. Naitutile licalo ni molihulela. Mi nahupulanga ni mwanahulela: kubapala lipapali ni likezeli zahae mwa muluti wa likota za mishitu ye minde ya Kenya.
translations.lunda: Kushikola yayineni ya America, Wangari welukili yuma yayivulu nankashi. Watan’gili ha zhimbutu nimuchizhakulilan’ga. Wanukili chadin’ga nakukulayi: chadin’ga nakuhemawu namanakwindi munyivuli ya mavunda aKenya.
translations.luvale: Ku Yunivesiti ya America Wangari alilongesele vyuma vyavihya vyavivulu. Alinangwile vyamihako nomu yeji kukolanga. Kaha anukile mujila akolelele: kuhema ngunja navayaya jenyi mumuvule wamitondo mumisenge yamwaza yamu Kenya.
translations.nyanja: Wangari anaphunzila zinthu zambili pamene anali pa American Univeziti. Anaphunzila pa zomela ndi mumene zimakulila. Zimenezi zinamukumbutsa mumene anali kusewelela ndi abale ake mthunzi ya mitengo mthengo laku-dziko lokongola la Kenya.
translations.tonga: Ku America, wakaiya zyintu zyinji zyipya. Wakali kwiiya lwiiyo lwakubambilila zyisyango. Wakayeeya mbwaakali kusyanga zyisyango naakali mucisi cokwabo ca Kenya.

lines.english:
The more she learnt, the more she realised that she loved the people of Kenya. She wanted them to be happy and free.

The more she learnt, the more she remembered her African home.

translations.bemba: Ilyo aaleeya aleesambilila, aatampile ukwiluka pafyo aatemenwe abantu bamu caalo ca Kenya. Aaleefwaya ukuti babe ne nsansa no buntungwa. Cilya aleeya alesambilila, ukufuluka ku mwabo ku Africa nako kwalekulilako.
translations.kaonde: Byoapitaizhe kufunda, popo ayukile amba nanchi watemenwe bingi bantu bamu kyalo kya Kenya. Wakebeshenga bingi amba bekale basangalala kabiji ba kasuluka. Byo apitaizhe kufunda, wavulukilenga bingi muzhi wabo mu Afilika.
translations.lozi: Ka mwanaitutela hahulu, ki kamo na lemuha kuli nalata hahulu batu ba naha ya Kenya. Nabata kuli babe babatabile ni kulukuluha. Ka mwanaitutela hahulu, ki kamo na hupulelanga kwa ndu yahae mwa Africa.
translations.lunda: Mukuswezha kutan’ga, dimu elukiliyi nindi waken’geli antu amu Kenya. Waken’geli antu akasunuka nawamuzan’galu nawa. Mukuswezha kutan’ga, dimu anukililiyi kumukala windi ku Africa.
translations.luvale: Kulihakilako chenyi kutanga chamulingishile kweuluka nge azanga lifuchi lya Kenya. Atondelenga vapwenga vakuwahilila nakusokoka. Mukulinangula vyavivulu mukhiko anukilenga limbo lyenyi lya Africa.
translations.nyanja: Pamene anali kuphunzila tsiku ndi tsiku anazindikila kuti akonda anthu akwao ku Kenya. Anali kufuna kuti anthu kudziko limeneli tsiku lina akapate ufulu ndi mtendele. Pamene anapitiliza ndi maphunzilo ake, anapitiliza kukumbukila kumalo lakwao ku Africa.
translations.tonga: Mwaakali kuya kumbele kwiiya, cakali kumukubulusya mbwaakali kubayandisya bantu baku Kenya. Wakali kuyanda kuti kabakkomene alimwi kabaangulukide. Mazuba mbwaakali kuya bweenda ambwaakali kwiiya ku America, cakali kumuyeeyezya kuŋanda ku Afulika.

lines.english: When she had finished her studies, she returned to Kenya. But her country had changed. Huge farms stretched across the land. Women had no wood to make cooking fires. The people were poor and the children were hungry.

translations.bemba: Panuma yakupwisha amasambililo, aabwelele ku Kenya. Nomba aasangile icaalo cakwe calicinja. Kwali amabala ayakulu nganshi panga yonse. Banamaayo tabaakwete inkuni sha kukosesha umulilo. Abantu baali abapiina abaana nabo baali ne nsala.
translations.kaonde: Panyuma yakupwisha kufundo kwanji, wabwelele ku Kenya. Wataine kyalo kyanji kyapimpulwa. Wataine mafwamu akatampe mu kyalo. Bainetu kechi bajingapo nakwakuchaba nkunyi yakubanzilapo mijilo yakuteekelapo ne. Bantu bayanjile kabiji ne baana bajinga na nzala.
translations.lozi: Hasa felize lituto zahae, hakutela kwa naha ya Kenya. Kono naha yahae nese icincize. Masimu amatuna na ambekile sibaka sesituna. Basali nebasina likota zaku apehisa. Batu nebanyandile mi banana nebashwile tala.
translations.lunda: Chamanishiliyi kutan’ga kwindi, wafuntili kumukala windi ku Kenya. Ilan’ga waweni kayi kindi kahempa. Waweni Maha amaneni kayi kezhima. Aka mama hiyadin’ga nanchawa zhakubutulaku. Antu edin’ga nawuzhwen’gi kaha nawa anyana edin’ga namazala.
translations.luvale: Omu amanyishile kutanga chenyi, ahilukile ku Kenya. Oloze lifuchi lyenyi lyalumukile. Mawande amanene atanjile lifuchi lyosena. Maphwevo kavapwile najikhunyi jakuwikisa kahya kakutelekelahoko. Vathu vapwilenga vakuyanda kaha vana vapwilenga nazala.
translations.nyanja: Anabwelela kudziko lakwao ku Kenya pamane anamaliza maphunzilo ake ndipo nthawi imeneyi dziko la Kenya linali litasintha. Mapulazi akulu akulu anatenga malo ochuluka. Azimai anali kusowa kotheba nkhuni cifukwa mitengo kunalibe. Anthu anali osauka ndipo ana anali kuoneka anjala.
translations.tonga: Naakamana lwiiyo lwakwe, wakapiluka ku Kenya. Wakajana kuti zyintu zyakacinca. Myuunda yakakomenzyegwa. Bamakaintu bakanyina kwakutebbela nkuni kuti bajike. Bantu bakalipengede alimwi bana bakali aanzala.

lines.english: Wangari knew what to do. She taught the women how to plant trees from seeds. The women sold the trees and used the money to look after their families. The women were very happy. Wangari had helped them to feel powerful and strong.

translations.bemba: Wangari aalishibe ifyakucita. Aafundile banamaayo ifyakubyala imiti ukubomfya imbuto. Banamaayo baalishitishe imiti no kubomfya ulupiya mu kusunga indupwa shabo. Banamaayo balitemenwe nganshi. Wangari alyafwile abantu ukumfwa ukuti nabo baali na maka kabili abakosa.
translations.kaonde: Wangari wayukile bya kuuba. Wafunjishile bainetu byakujimba bichi kufumya ku nkunwa. Bainetu bapoteshenga bichi ne kwingijisha mali kulaminamo bisemi byabo. Bainetu basangalele bingi. Wangari wibakwashishe kwikala nangovu kabiji ne kukosa.
translations.lozi: Wangari nazibile zakueza. Aluta basali mwa kucalela likota kuzwa kwa lipeu. Basali neba lekisa likota ni kuitusisa masheleñi kubabalela mabasi abona mi nebatabezi hahulu. Wangari nabatusize kuli baikutwe kuba ni mata ni kutiya.
translations.lunda: Wangari walukili zhakwila. Watan’gishili akamama mwakutumbili nyitondu kufuma ku zhimbutu. Awa akamama alandishilen’ga yina nyitondu nakuwanamu madi akukwasha nachu yisaka yawu. Akamama adin’ga namuzan’galu. Wangari wayikwashili kukasunuka nakuditiya Kulema.
translations.luvale: Wangari ejivile vyakulinga. Alwezele maphwevo mwakutumbila mitondo kufuma kumikoswa yavimbuto. Vaze maphwevo valanjishilenga ize mitondo nakuzachisa jize jimbongo kulama jithanga javo. Vaze maphwevo vawahililile chikuma. Echi chafumine hali Wangari kuvakafwa valivwe ngolo nakutakama.
translations.nyanja: Wangari anali kudziwa cofunika kucita kuti athetsa mabvuto amenewa: anaphunzitsa azimai kubzyala mitengo kucokela kumbewu. Azimai amenewa anayamba kugulitsa mitengo zao zitakula ndikupeza ndalama zosamalila ma banja awo. Cifukwa cacimenechi azimai anakhala wokondwela kwambili ndi Wangari amene anawa thandiza kuti akhale ndi mphanvu komanso olimba.
translations.tonga: Wangari wakalizyi cakucita. Wakayiisya bamakaintu kuti batalike kusyanga zyisamu kubelesya snake zya hisamu. Bamakaintu bakatalika kusambala zyisamu akubelesya mali kugwasyilizya mikwasyi yabo. Bakakkomana kapati. Wangari wakabagwasya alimwi bakalimvwa kuba anguzu.

lines.english: As time passed, the new trees grew into forests, and the rivers started flowing again. Wangari’s message spread across Africa. Today, millions of trees have grown from Wangari’s seeds.

translations.bemba: Mu kuya kwa nshiku, imiti iipya yalikulile no kusanguka impanga, na meenshi mu mimana yatampile ukupita. Imbila yakwa Wangari yalisalangene mu Africa yonse. Pali Ieelo, imiti imintapendwa yaalikula ukufuma ku mbuto shakwa Wangari.
translations.kaonde: Pakupitapo myaka, bichi byakatataka byonse byakomene ne kwikala kejisaka kabiji ne mikola yatendekele kupita meema jikwabo. Sawakya wakwa Wangari wasampukile mu kibunji kya Afilika kyonse. Leelo, biumbi ne biumbi bya bichi byajimwa kufuma ku nkunwa yakwa Wangari.
translations.lozi: Nako hainze ifita, likota zenca zenecezwi selihula kueza mishitu mi ni linuka zakala kububa hape. Liñusa la Wangari la zibahala mwa linaha za Africa. Kacenu, likiti-kiti za likota lihulile kuzwelela fa peu ya Wangari.
translations.lunda: Chiyahitili impinji, yina nyitondu yayiha yameneni mumavunda, kaha tulon’ga twatachikili kuhita mpwezhi chen’gi. Imbila ya Wangari yatiyakeni mu Africa mwezhima. Lelu, makumbakazhi anyitondu anameni kufuma ku zhimbutu zha Wangari.
translations.luvale: Hakuhita chalwola, mitondo yakolele nakupwa misenge, tulwiji twaputukile kuhitangana cheka. Mujimbu wa Wangari watanjile Africa yosena. Lelo, makhombakaji amitondo anasoko kufuma kujimbuto ja Wangari.
translations.nyanja: Patapita zaka zambili, mitengo imene inabzyalidwa ija, inakula ndi ku panga thengo. Mitsinje inayambanso kukhala ndi madzi. Mbili ya Wangari inafika ponseponse mu Africa. Lelolino, mitengo yamitundu-mitundu mamilyoni tilkuonayi inacokela ku mbewu ya Wangari.
translations.tonga: Mukuya kwaciindi, zyisamu zyakakomena. Milonga yakatalika kukunka alimwi. Bantu banji bakamvwa mpuwo ya Wangari. Sunu, zyuulu-zyuulu zyazyisamu zyakasyangwa kuzwa kambuto zya Wangari.

lines.english: Wangari had worked hard. People all over the world took notice, and gave her a famous prize. It is called the Nobel Peace Prize, and she was the first African woman ever to receive it.

translations.bemba: Wangari alibombeshe saana. Abantu isonde lyonse balyumfwile pa milimo yakwe no kumupeela icilambu icaishibikwa saana. Baaciita ukuti Nobel Peace Prize mu Cingeleshi, emukuti Icilambu ca Cibote, kabili ewali namaayo uwantanshi mu Africa ukupoka ici cilambu.
translations.kaonde: Wangari waingijile nangovu. Bantu muntanda yonse bamwene mingilo yanji kabiji bamupeele kilambu kyamunema. Wangari yewajinga inetu mutanshi mu Afilika kutambulapo kino kilambu.
translations.lozi: Wangari nabelekile katata. Batu mwa lifasi kaufela nebalemuhile mi bamufa mupuzo wotumile. Ubizwa Nobel Peace Prize mi neeli yena musali wapili mwa Africa kuamuhela mupuzo woo.
translations.lunda: Wangari wazatili nan’govu zhakubadika. Antu mukayi kezhima atiyili imbila yindi kaha nawa amwinkeli infwetu. Ayitambikilen’ga nawu infwetu Yalema yakuunda (Noble Peace Prize), kaha diyu wadin’ga watachi mukamama mu Africa kutambula infwetu kana.
translations.luvale: Wangari azachile nangolo. Vathu vosena mukaye vamwene milimo yenyi, vamuhanyine muchato waulemu. Vauvuluka ‘Nobel Peace Prize’, kaha ikhiye apwilenga phwevo wamu Africa watete kutambula ou muchato.
translations.nyanja: Wangari anasewenzadi mwamphamvu. Motelo kuti anthu dziko lonse lapansi anazindikila nchito yaikulu yomwe anacita, ndipo anapatsidwa mphoto yodziwika kwambili padziko lonse lapansi. Mphoto imeneyi inali kuchedwa kuti Kulemekezedwa ndi Mtendele, ndipo anakhala mkazi woyamba mu Aflica kulandila mphoto yotelo.
translations.tonga: Wangari wakabeleka canguzu. Bantu banji bakamuzyiba nyika yoonse mboizulwa. Bakamupa bulumbu bwa luumuno butegwa Nobel kulumbula milimo yakwe mibotu. Wakali muntu wakusaanguna kupegwa bulumbu bwa Nobel bwa luumuno bwamusyobo ooyu nyika ya Afulika mbozulywa.

lines.english: Wangari died in 2011, but we can think of her every time we see a beautiful tree.

translations.bemba: Wangari afwile mu mwaka wa 2011, lelo kuti twamwibukisha ilyo lyonse twamona umuti uwayemba.
translations.kaonde: Wangari wafwile mumwaka wa 2011, nangwa byonkabyo, twakonsha kumuvuluka kimye kyonse kyotumona kichi kyawama.
translations.lozi: Wangari natimezi mwa silimo sa 2011, kono lwa kona kumuhupulanga nako kaufela halubona kota yende.
translations.lunda: Wangari wafwili muchaaka cha 2011, ilan’ga tutweshi kumushin’ganyeka impinji yezhima neyi tunamoni mutondu wawuwahi.
translations.luvale: Wangari afwile mu mwaka wa 2011, oloze tweji kumushinganyekanga lwola lwosena natumona mutondo wamwaza.
translations.nyanja: Wangari anamwalila mu caka ca 2011, koma timamukumbukila tikamaona mtengo wokongola uliwonse mthengo.
translations.tonga: Wangari wakafwa mu 2011, pesi inga tulamuyeeya twabona bubotu bwazyisamu.

title: In a village on the slopes of Mount Kenya in East Africa, a little girl worked in the fields with her mother. Her name was Wangari.

lines.english: One day, Rabbit was walking by the riverside.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo, kalulu aile aleenda mu lulamba lwa mumana.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo, Kalulu waendelenga kubwipi namukola.
translations.lozi: Zazi leliñwi, Shakame neizamaya kwa munanga wa nuka.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu Kachinchi wadin’ga nakwenda kwakamwihi nakalon’ga.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe, mbwanda apwile nakutambuka kungenge yakalwiji.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku limodzi, Kalulu analikuyenda mumbali mwamtsinje.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba, Sulwe wakali kweenda munsi aamulonga.

lines.english: Hippo was there too, going for a stroll and eating some nice green grass.

translations.bemba: Imfubu nayo eko yaali, yaletandala no kulya umulemfwe uusuma saana.
translations.kaonde: Kyovwe naye wajinga konka, kabiji wenda uja nsono yanenkuma bulongo.
translations.lozi: Kubu niyona neiliteni, mi neiya kwa kuzamaya-zamaya ni kuyo fula bucwani bobunde bobutala.
translations.lunda: In’uvu niyena wedin’ga koku, kwendazhala nakuda tumatahu twatovu.
translations.luvale: Nguvu nayikhiye apwile kuze, nakupasala nakulya tumwila twaushindeshinde.
translations.nyanja: Mvuu naye anali komwekonso, kuyenda-yenda ndi kudya udzu wabwino.
translations.tonga: Civwubwe wakaliko awalo, kayaa kweendeenda akulya twakulya bubotu bwa nyanzabili.

lines.english:
Hippo didn’t see that Rabbit was there and she accidentally stepped on Rabbit’s foot.

Rabbit started screaming at Hippo, “You Hippo! Can’t you see that you’re stepping on my foot?”

translations.bemba: Imfubu tayamwene ukuti Kalulu nao eko ali, epakumunyanta pa kuulu. Kalulu ayambile ukupundilila imfubu. “Iwe Mfubu! Taulemona ukuti naunyanta pa kuulu?”
translations.kaonde: Kyovwe kechi wamumwene kalulu ne kabiji wamunyanchile kukuulu. Kalulu watendekele kumupachila kyovwe amba,” Obewa Kyovwe! Kechi wamoma amba wanyanta pakuulu nenyi?”
translations.lozi: Kubu neisikabona kuli Shakame neiliteñi mi aihata fa lihutu kakusaziba. Shakame yakala kuomanya Kubu, “Wena Kubu! Hauboni kuli unihatile fa lihutu, nji?”
translations.lunda: Inùvu wamweni wanyi neyi kachinchi wadin’ga koku dichi wamudatili hamwendu. Kachinchi watachikili kwabokela Inùvu, “Eyi Inùvu hiwunamoni neyi wunandati hamwenduku?”
translations.luvale: Nguvu kamwene nge mbwanda kwapwile kuzeko shikaho amulyachile hachipundo. Mbwanda aputukile kutetemuka, “Ove Nguvu! Kawamweneko ngwove unangulyate hachipundo?”
translations.nyanja: Mvuu sanaone kuti kalulu naye alipo ndipo mosadziwa, anaponda pamwendo wa kalulu. Kalulu anayamba kufuula ndikukalipila Mvuu, “Iwe Mvuu! Suona kuti wandiponda pamwendo?”
translations.tonga: Civwubwe taakalizyi kuti Sulwe wakali munsi-munsi, mpoona wakamulyata kumaulu. Sulwe wakatalika kubwentela Civwubwe, “Ebo Civwubwe, tobwene kuti wandilyata kumaulu?”

lines.english:
Hippo apologised to Rabbit, “I’m so sorry. I didn’t see you. Please forgive me!”

But Rabbit wouldn’t listen and he shouted at Hippo, “You did that on purpose! Someday, you’ll see! You’re going to pay!”

translations.bemba: Imfubu epakulomba ubwelelo kuli Kalulu. “Njelelako, nshacikumona. Napaapaata njelelako!” Nomba Kalulu taaleefwaya no kumfwa ifyo yaaleelanda, epakukalipila Mfubu ati, “Wacicitafye umufulo! Ubushiku bumo ukacimona, nkakulimuna!”
translations.kaonde: Kyovwe walombele lulekelo lwamambo kwi kalulu, “Napopwela ndekeleko mambo. Kechi najikukumona ne. Bino kalulu kechi waunvwine ne, kabiji watwajijile nakupachila kyovwe amba, “Wakubilamotu nshiji! Juuba jimo ukamona byonkakuba! Ukalapila juuba jimo! ”
translations.lozi: Kubu yakupa swalelo ku Shakame. “Uniswalele. Nenisikakubona! Nakupa, uniswalele luli.” Kono Shakame nasalati kuteeleza zeo mi azwelapili kuhuweleza ni kuomanisa Kubu, “Uezize kamabomu! Zazi leliñwi ukabona! Ukalifa!”
translations.lunda: Inùvu wadanakeneni kudi Kachinchi, “In’ganakeni’. Hinakumonaku. Nalembi In’ganakeni!” Ilan’ga kachinchi hachitiyiliku wazuwilili Inùvu, “Wunandati mulon’ga wadin’ga nakukeng’a! Ifuku dimu, Wukamona wukafweta!
translations.luvale: Nguvu alikonekelele kuli Mbwanda, “Ngukonekeleko. Kangwakumonangako. Ngukonekeleko ove mukwetu!” Oloze Mbwanda kamvwilileko shikaho amutambakanyine Nguvu, “Wachilingilangamo kaha! Likumbi limwe, naukachimona! Naukafweta!”
translations.nyanja: Mvuu anapepesa kwa kalulu “Pepani. Sindinakuoneni. Mundikhululukile!” Koma kalulu sanamvele pepeso nakalipila Mvuu “Iwe wacitila dala! Tsiku limodzi uzaona ndizabwezela!”
translations.tonga: Civwubwe wakalomba kulekelelwa kuli Sulwe, “Tiindakubwene. Ndalomba kondilekelela.” Sulwe taakayanda kuteelela. “Wacita caali kundilyata! Bumwi buzuba, uyoocibona! Uya kucibbadelela ncoocita sunu.”

lines.english:
Rabbit went to find Fire and said, “Go, burn Hippo when she comes out of the water to eat grass. She stepped on me!”

Fire answered, “No problem, Rabbit, my friend. I’ll do just what you ask.”

translations.bemba: Kalulu epakuya mukufwaya Mulilo no kumweba ati, “Kabiye oce Mfubu nga afuma mu meenshi aisa mu kulya icaani. Acinyanta!” Mulilo epakwasuka ati, “Takuli bwafya mune Kalulu, nalacita ifyo fine.”
translations.kaonde: Kalulu waile kwi Mujilo nekumubuula amba,” Ganga ukansokeleko Kyovwe namujilo inge wafuma mumeema waiya nakuja nsono. Wajikunyanta!” Mujilo wakumbwile amba,” Kafwako lukatazhone nsakuya nakuba byonkabyo.”
translations.lozi: Shakame yayobata mulilo ni kuubulela kuli, “Zamaya, uyocisa Kubu aikazwa mwa mezi kuyofula bucwani. Neinihatile!” Mulilo waalaba, “Hakuna butata, Shakame mulikani. Nikaeza kamo kupezi.”
translations.lunda: Kachinchi wayili nakuwana kesi hakuhosha nindi, “Yakamochi Inùvu neyi nafumi mumenzhi nakuda matahu. Wandata!” Kesi wakwili, “Kukala kosi, kachinchi imbwambu dami. Nikwila zhiwunalombi.”
translations.luvale: Mbwanda ayile nakuwana kakahya nakwamba ngwenyi, “Yako, umwoche Nguvu omu mwafuma mumeya nakutonda kulya mwila. Angulyatanga!” Kakahya akumbulwile ngwenyi, “Ukalu wauchi, Mbwanda, sepa lyami. Nangulinga nge omu unangulweze.”
translations.nyanja: Kalulu anapita kusakila moto ndiponso anati, “Pita, umutenthe Mvuu akacoka mumadzi pakudya udzu. Anandiponda!” Moto unayankha, “Palibe bvuto kalulu munzanga. Ndizacita motelo.”
translations.tonga: Sulwe wakaunka kuya kuyandaula mulilo akumwaambila kuti “Koya, umuumpe Civwubwe azwa mumeenda kuya kukucela bwizu. Wakandilyata!” Mulilo wakavwuwa, “Kwiina penzi mweenzuma. Ndilacita Mbubwenoobo.”

lines.english: Later, Hippo was eating grass far from the river when, “Whoosh!” Fire burst into flame. The flames began to burn Hippo’s hair.

translations.bemba: Panuma ya kashita akanoono, imfubu yaleelya icaani ukutali na mumana, “uuuu” Mulilo abilimuka mu lubingu. Ulubingu epakwamba ukooca umushishi wakwa Mfubu.
translations.kaonde: Pakupita kimye, kyovwe wajilenga nsono kwalepa na mukola. Mujilo waubatu uushi. Kyovwe wabazhimukiletu mujilo kealulume. Mujilo watendekele kusoka booya bwakwa Kyovwe.
translations.lozi: Kasamulaho, Kubu neifula bucwani kwahule ni nuka mi, “Mawee!” Mulilo wa lyakama kutuka hahulu. Malimi a mulilo akala kucisa booya bwa Kubu.
translations.lunda: Chihahitili mpiji, Inùvu wadin’ga nakuda matahu kwakulehi nakalon’ga, chikabutukili kesi ka nyilan’gi. Nyilan’gi yatachikili kocha insuki zha Inùvu.
translations.luvale: Lwola lwekha, Nguvu apwile nakulya mwila kwakusuku nakalwiji omu evwile, “Epu-u!” milangi yakahya inepuka. Milangi yaputukile kwocha ungona wa Nguvu.
translations.nyanja: Pambuyo pace, Mvuu analikudya mauzu patali ndi madzi pamene moto unayamba. Moto unayamba kutentha tsitsi la Mvuu.
translations.tonga: Civwubwe wakali kulya bwizu kule amulonga. “maawe!” Mulilo wayakisya. Mulilo wakatalika kuumpa boya bwa Civwubwe.

lines.english:
Hippo started to cry and ran for the water. All her hair was burned off by the fire.

Hippo kept crying, “My hair has burned in the fire! My hair is all gone! My beautiful hair!”

translations.bemba: Imfubu epakwamba ukulila no kubutukila ku menshi. Mulilo alyoceele umushishi wakwa Mfubu onse. Mfubu akonkenyepo ukulila ati, “Umushishi wandi wapya! Umushishi wandi onse waya! Umushishi wandi ubusuma!”
translations.kaonde: Kyovwe watendekele kujila ne kunyemena ku meema. Booya bwanji bonse bwapile namujilo. Kyovwe watwajijile kujila amba, “Booya bwami bwapya namujilo! Booya bwami bonse bwaya! Booya bwami bwawama!”
translations.lozi: Kubu yakala kulila mi yamatela mwa mezi. Booya bwa yona kaufela nebucisizwe ki mulilo. Kubu yaekeza kulila, “Booya bwaka bucisizwe ki mulilo. Booya bwaka kaufela buile. Booya bwaka bobunde!”
translations.lunda: Inùvu watachikili kudila nakutemukila kumenzhi. Insuki zhezhima zhasukumini kukesi. Inùvu watwalekelihu kudila,”Insuki zhami zhinasukumi kukesi! Insuki zhami zhezhima zhinayi! Insuki zhami zhazhiwahi!”
translations.luvale: Nguvu aputukile kulila nakuthuchila kumeya. Ungona wosena wawemene nakakahya. Nguvu atwalilileho kulila, “Ungona wami unaweme nakakahya! Ungona wami wosena unayi! Ungona wami wamwaza ngachize!”
translations.nyanja: Mvuu anayamba kulila nakuthamangila mumadzi. Tsitsi lake lonse linapya ndi moto. Mvuu anapitiliza kulila, “Tsitsi langa laphya ku moto! Tsitsi langa lonse lapita! Tsitsi langa labwino!”
translations.tonga: Civwubwe wakatalika kulila akutijaanina kumeenda. Boya bwakwe boonse bwakapya amulilo. Civwubwe wakali kuyaa bulila. “Boya bwangu bwaumpwa amulilo. Boya bwangu bwaunka. Boya bwangu bubotu.”

lines.english:
Rabbit was happy that Hippo’s hair was burned.

And to this day, for fear of fire, the hippo never goes far from the water.

translations.bemba: Kalulu alitemenwe ukuti umushishi wa mfubu walipya. Mpaka na leelo, mukutina umulilo, imfubu taiya kutali na meenshi.
translations.kaonde: Kalulu wasangalele pakumona amba booya bwakwa kyovwe bonse bwapya. Kufikatu ne jaleelo, kyovwe namambo akuchiina mujilo, kechi uya kwalepa na meema ne.
translations.lozi: Shakame neitabile kuli booya bwa Kubu nebucile. Mi ni kacenule, kakusaba mulilo, Kubu aiyangi kwahule ni mezi.
translations.lunda: Kachinchi watiyili chiwahi hakusukuma chansuki zha Inùvu. Niku lelu, mulon’ga wa kesi, Inùvu hayan’ga kwakulehi namenzhiku.”
translations.luvale: Mbwanda awahililile hakuwema chaungona wa Nguvu. Nakulelo lino ngana, hawoma wakakahya, Nguvu kaya kwakusuku nameyako.
translations.nyanja: Kalulu anakondwela kuwona tsitsi la Mvuu lapya. Mpaka lelo, pakuwopa moto, Mvuu samayenda kutali ndi madzi.
translations.tonga: Sulwe wakakkomana kubona kuti boya bwa Civwubwe bwakapya. Kusikila sunu, Civwubwe taunki kule ameenda akaambo kakuyoowa mulilo.

title: One day, Rabbit was walking by the riverside.

lines.english: I can run with it.

translations.bemba: Kuti nabutuka nao.
translations.kaonde: Nakonsha kwingijisha mubiji kunyema.
translations.lozi: Nakona kumata niwona.
translations.lunda: Inateli kutemuka nawu.
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kuthuta nawo.
translations.nyanja: Ndingathamange nalo.
translations.tonga: Inga ndatijaana anguwo.

lines.english: I can jump with it.

translations.bemba: Kuti natoloka nao.
translations.kaonde: Nakonsha kwingijisha mubiji kutolauka.
translations.lozi: Nakona kutula niwona.
translations.lunda: Inateli kukiluka nawu.
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kutumbuka nawo.
translations.nyanja: Ndingajumphe nalo.
translations.tonga: Inga ndasotoka anguwo.

lines.english: I can dance with it.

translations.bemba: Kuti nashana nao.
translations.kaonde: Nakonsha kwingijisha mubiji kuzha.
translations.lozi: Nakona kubina niwona.
translations.lunda: Inateli kuhan’gana nawu.
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kukina nawo.
translations.nyanja: Ndingavine nalo.
translations.tonga: Inga ndazyana anguwo.

lines.english: I can swim with it.

translations.bemba: Kuti naowa nao.
translations.kaonde: Nakonsha kwingijisha mubiji kufwenka.
translations.lozi: Nakona ku tapa niwona.
translations.lunda: Inateli kuwela nawu.
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kuhala nawo.
translations.nyanja: Ndingasambile nalo.
translations.tonga: Inga ndayamba anguwo.

lines.english: I can skip with it.

translations.bemba: Kuti naciluka nao.
translations.kaonde: Nakonsha kwingijisha mubiji kukilauka.
translations.lozi: Nakona ku tulaka-tulaka niwona.
translations.lunda: Inateli kutomboka nawu.
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kutumbwojoka nawo.
translations.nyanja: Ndingasewele nalo.
translations.tonga: Inga ndasotooka anguwo.

lines.english: I can kick with it.

translations.bemba: Kuti napanta nao.
translations.kaonde: Nakonsha kwingijisha mubiji kupanta.
translations.lozi: Nakona ku laha niwona.
translations.lunda: Inateli kwaasa nawu.
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kwasa nawo.
translations.nyanja: Ndingamenye nalo.
translations.tonga: Inga ndafwusa kuulu anguwo.

lines.english: I can escape with it.

translations.bemba: Kuti nafyuka nao.
translations.kaonde: Nakonsha kwingijisha mubiji kupuluka.
translations.lozi: Nakona ku picuka niwona.
translations.lunda: Inateli kutemuzhoka nawu.
translations.luvale: Ngunahase kuchina nawo.
translations.nyanja: Ndingathawe nalo.
translations.tonga: Inga ndaloboka anguwo.

lines.english:
But I can never fly with
it.

translations.bemba: Nomba teti impupuke nao.
translations.kaonde: Bino kechi nakonsha kwingijisha mubiji nakutumbukilako ne.
translations.lozi: Kono hanikoni kufufa niwona.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga hinatweshi kutuku nawuku.
translations.luvale: Oloze kangwechi kuhasa kutuka nawoko.
translations.nyanja: Koma siningauluke nalo.
translations.tonga: Pele nsekonzyi kuuluka anguwo.

title: I can run with it.

lines.english: Thuli has short hair.

translations.bemba: Thuli akwata umushishi uwipi.
translations.kaonde: Tuuli uji nansuki yaipipa.
translations.lozi: Thuli unani milili yemikuswani.
translations.lunda: Thuli wukweti insuki jajihi.
translations.luvale: Thuli ali najikhambu jajihi.
translations.nyanja: Thuli ali ndi tsitsi lalifupi.
translations.tonga: Thuli ujisi masusu mafwaafwi.

lines.english: Anna has long hair.

translations.bemba: Anna akwata umushishi uutali.
translations.kaonde: Anna uji nansuki yalepa.
translations.lozi: Anna unani milili yemitelele.
translations.lunda: Anna wukweti insuki jajilehi.
translations.luvale: Anna ali najikhambu jajisuku.
translations.nyanja: Anna ali ndi tsitsi lalitali.
translations.tonga: Anna ujisi masusu malamfwu.

lines.english:
Cathy has the longest
hair.

translations.bemba: Cathy akwata umushishi uutali ukucila bonse.
translations.kaonde: Katalina uji nansuki yalepesha.
translations.lozi: Cathy unani milili yemitelele kakufitisisa.
translations.lunda: Cathy wukweti insuki jalehesha.
translations.luvale: Cathy ali najikhambu jajisuku kuhambakana.
translations.nyanja: Cathy ali ndi tsitsi lalitali koposa.
translations.tonga: Cathy ujisi masusu malamfwu kwiinda.

lines.english:
Zama has plaited her
hair.

translations.bemba: Zama naluka umushishi wakwe.
translations.kaonde: Zama waichika nsuki yanji.
translations.lozi: Zama uikotile milili.
translations.lunda: Zama nayiindi insuki jindi.
translations.luvale: Zama navinjisa jikhambu jenyi.
translations.nyanja: Zama wamanga tsitsi lake.
translations.tonga: Zama wakaluka masusu aakwe.

lines.english: Baba has a beard.

translations.bemba: Baba alikwata umwefu.
translations.kaonde: Baba uji namyevu.
translations.lozi: Baba unani mulelu.
translations.lunda: Baba wukweti wevu.
translations.luvale: Baba ali nawevu.
translations.nyanja: Baba ali ndi ndevu.
translations.tonga: Baba ujisi malezu.

lines.english:
Zanele has combed her
hair.

translations.bemba: Zanele nasakula umushishi wakwe.
translations.kaonde: Zanele wasakula nsuki yanji.
translations.lozi: Zanele ukamuzi milili yahae.
translations.lunda: Zanele nasakuli insuki jindi.
translations.luvale: Zanele nasakula jikhambu jenyi.
translations.nyanja: Zanele wapesula tsitsi lake.
translations.tonga: Zanele wakamuna masusu aakwe.

lines.english: Thabo has cut his hair.

translations.bemba: Thabo nabeya umushishi wakwe.
translations.kaonde: Taabo wachiba nsuki yanji.
translations.lozi: Thabo upumile milili yahae.
translations.lunda: Thabo naketuli insuki jindi.
translations.luvale: Thabo navatula jikhambu jenyi.
translations.nyanja: Thabo wagela tsitsi lake.
translations.tonga: Thabo waagela masusu aakwe.

lines.english:
Themba has shaved his
hair.

translations.bemba: Themba nabeya umushishi wakwe.
translations.kaonde: Teemba wabeya nsuki yanji.
translations.lozi: Themba ukutile milili yahae.
translations.lunda: Themba natehuli insuki jindi.
translations.luvale: Themba nateula jikhambu jenyi.
translations.nyanja: Themba wagela tsitsi lake.
translations.tonga: Themba wagela masusu.

title: Thuli has short hair.

lines.english: I wake up and make fire.

translations.bemba: Ndabuuka no kukosha umulilo.
translations.kaonde: Mbuka nakubanza mujilo.
translations.lozi: Nazuhanga niku tumbula mulilo.
translations.lunda: Nahindukan’ga nakubutula kesi.
translations.luvale: Ngwahinduka nakuwika kahya.
translations.nyanja: Ndimadzuka ndi kusonkha moto.
translations.tonga: Ndilabuka ndamana ndakunka mulilo.

lines.english: I boil some water.

translations.bemba: Ndakafya ameenshi.
translations.kaonde: Nteeka Meema Aselauka.
translations.lozi: Nabilisanga mezi.
translations.lunda: Natatishan’ga menji.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kuzumisa meya.
translations.nyanja: Ndimawilitsa madzi.
translations.tonga: Ndajika meenda.

lines.english: I chop the firewood.

translations.bemba: Ndateba inkuni.
translations.kaonde: Ntentaula Nkunyi.
translations.lozi: Napumanga likota zakutumbulisa mulilo.
translations.lunda: Natetan’ga nchawa.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kuteta jikhunyi.
translations.nyanja: Ndimadula nkhuni.
translations.tonga: Ndagonka nkuni.

lines.english: I stir the pot.

translations.bemba: Ndakumba mu mpooto.
translations.kaonde: Nkumbaula mu mpoto.
translations.lozi: Na kundunganga mwa mupika.
translations.lunda: Nafunga’ga Mumba
translations.luvale: Ngweji kusunganga mundeho.
translations.nyanja: Ndimabvundula m’poto.
translations.tonga: Ndakopa mumpoto.

lines.english: I sweep the floor.

translations.bemba: Ndapyanga.
translations.kaonde: Mpyanga Munzubo.
translations.lozi: Na fiyelanga fafasi.
translations.lunda: Nakomban’ga mwitala.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kukombanga hamavu.
translations.nyanja: Ndimapsyela munyumba.
translations.tonga: Ndakukula ansi muŋanda.

lines.english: I wash the dishes.

translations.bemba: Ndasuka imbale.
translations.kaonde: Ngovwa Masanyi.
translations.lozi: Natapisanga mikeke.
translations.lunda: Nakosan’ga yen’ga.
translations.luvale: Ngweji kukosanga malonga.
translations.nyanja: Ndimatsuka mbale.
translations.tonga: Ndasanzya mitiba.

lines.english:
Why do I work so hard…

… when my brother is busy playing?

translations.bemba: Muulandunshi mbombesesha ifi… ilyo ninshi ndume yandi aleeyangalafye?
translations.kaonde: Ene mambo oñingijila nangovu… …bino nkasami wamulume aye saka akayatu?
translations.lozi: Kiñi zeni belekelanga katata… … munyenaka yena inge apatehile kubapala?
translations.lunda: Mulon’gadi nazatilan’ga nan’govu… .... mwanyikami yena kakuhema hohu?
translations.luvale: Ika nanguzachila nangolo ngana… … Shimbunyi ndumbwami walunga mwalihemena kwenyi?
translations.nyanja: Chifukwa nciani ndimagwila ncthito mwaphamvu ine ndekha… Pamene mphwanga atangwanidwa ndi kusewela cabe?
translations.tonga: Nkaambo nzi ncendibelekela canguzu boobu… … kakuli musyooonto wangu wiide kusobana?

title: I wake up and make fire.

lines.english: Chicken and Millipede were friends. But they were always competing with each other. One day they decided to play football to see who the best player was.

translations.bemba: Inkoko ne Ciyongoli fyali fibusa. Nomba lyonse baaleecimfyanya. Ubushiku bumo, baatontonkenye ukuti bateye umupila pakuti bamone uwaishibishe ukuteya.
translations.kaonde: Nzolo ne Munyongolo besampile bumbai. Bino kimye kyonsetu bekyombeshanga. Juuba jimo baumvwañene kuteya mpila ya kumaulu pakuuba amba bamone wayukisha kuteya mpila.
translations.lozi: Kuhu ni Likondondo neeli balikani. Kono nebalata kukanganisananga nako kaufela. Zazi leliñwi, balumelelana kubapala mbola yamahutu kuli babone kuli caziba kimañi.
translations.lunda: Kasumbi na munzhon’olu edi’na mabwambu. Ilanà edi’na nakudipika. Ifuku dimu akenèli kutuma ngunja kulonda awani nkuminkumi hakachi kawu.
translations.luvale: Kasumbi na Chingolongochi vapwile masepa. Oloze vapwilenga nakulipecha umwe namukwavo. Likumbi limwe vasakwile kuhema ngunja nakumona hiya ejiva chikuma kuhambakana.
translations.nyanja: Nkhuku ndi Bongololo anali abwenzi. Koma anali kukonda kupikisana paiwo okha. Tsiku lina, anaganiza kusewela m’pila wa myendo kuti aone ngati katswili ndani.
translations.tonga: Inkuku a Joongolo bakali benizinyina. Nokuba boobo, lyoonse bakali kuyanda kuzundana. Bumwi buzuba bakayeeya kuti baume mupila kutegwa bazyibe mukali akati kabo.

lines.english: They went to the football field and started their game. Chicken was fast, but Millipede was faster. Chicken kicked far, but Millipede kicked further. Chicken started to feel grumpy.

translations.bemba: Baile ku cibansa ca mupila no kwamba ukuteya. Inkoko yali iyayangukilwa nomba Iciyongoli calyangukishe ukucilapo. Inkoko yapantiile ukutali nomba Iciyongoli capantiile ukutali ukucilapo. Inkoko epakwamba ukumfwa ububi.
translations.kaonde: Baile kukibanza ne kutendeka kuteya mpila. Nzolo wanyemenenga bukiji, bino Munyongolo wakijilemo kunyemesha lubilo kukila nzolo. Nzolo wapanchile mpila kwalepa, bino Munyongolo aye wapanchile kwalepesha. Nzolo watendekele kuzhingila.
translations.lozi: Baya kwa libapalelo lambola ya mahutu ni kuyokala papali yabona. Kuhu neinani bubebe kono Likondondo nelinani bubebe bobufitisisa. Kuhu ya lahela mbola kwahule kono Likondondo lalahela mbola kwahule luli mane kufitelela kuhu. Kuhu yakala kuishonda.
translations.lunda: Ayili ku chibanza nakutuma ngunja. Kasumbi wadi’na nakutuma swayi ila’na munzhon’olu wadi’na nakutumisha swayi kubadika kasumbi.
translations.luvale: Vayile kuchivaza changunja nakuputuka kwasa. Kasumbi apwile nalumbushi, oloze Chingolongochi ahambakanyine. Kasumbi ashile ngunja kwakusuku, oloze Chingolongochi ayashile hahasuku kuhambakana. Kasumbi aputukile kwivwa kupihya kumuchima.
translations.nyanja: Anayenda kubwalo la m’pila ndipo anayamba masewela awo. Nkhuku inafulumila, koma Bongololo anafulumila kopambana. Nkhuku inapandila kutali koma bongololo anapandila kutali mopambana. Nkhuku inayamba kukalipa.
translations.tonga: Bakaunka kubbuwa lya mupila akutalika musobano wabo. Nkuku yakali alubilo, pele Joongolo lyakali kwiinda. Nkuku yakauma mulpila kule, pesi Joongola lyakaindilizya kuuma kwiindilila akasisya nkuku. Inkuku yakatalika kulimvwa kutyompwa.

lines.english: They decided to play a penalty shoot-out. First Millipede was goal keeper. Chicken scored only one goal. Then it was the chicken’s turn to defend the goal.

translations.bemba: Baumfwene ukuti kube ukupantafye iyakwingisha mu cipanda. Iciyongoli ecabalilepo ukwikata mu cipanda. Inkoko yaingishafye kamo. Epakucinjana pakuti Inkoko nayo yaba mukwikata mu cipanda.
translations.kaonde: Baumvwañene kutendeka kupanta mapenoti. Pakutendeka, Munyongolo wajinga kiipa mugolo. Nzolo watwezhezhetu kamo. Bino Nzolo naye kyafikile kimye kyanji kyakukwata mpila mugolo.
translations.lozi: Balumelelana kulaha mbola yakunwisa ili fapataa muswali wa mbola mwa linwisezo. Kakukala, Likondondo laba muswali wa mbola. Kuhu yanwisa feela mbola iliñwi. Mi yafita nako ya kuli Kuhu ibukeleze mwa linwisezo la mbola.
translations.lunda: Asakwili kutuma ngunja yama penoti. Hatachi munzhon’olu wadin’na mugoolu. Kasumbi wenìzhili hohu Ngunja yimu. Ichi yadinà mpinji ya kasumbi kutuma ngunja.
translations.luvale: Valivwasanyine kwasa jipenoti. Chingolongochi ikhiye alivangile kupwa mungolo. Kaha Kasumbi engishile ngunja imwe kaha. Shikaho lwapwile jino lwola lwa Kasumbi kupwa mungolo.
translations.nyanja: Anaganiza kuti asewele mapenoti. Bongololo anayambila kukhala wogwila m’pila. Nkhuku inamwesa cigoli cimodzi. Tsopano inali nthawi yankhuku kuti igwile m’pila.
translations.tonga: Bakayanda kuti baume mupila wa kunwisya . Joongolo nguwakasaanguna kuya mugoolo. Inkuku yakanywinsya biyo goolo lyomwe. Mpoonya ono cakasika ciindi cakuti nkuku ayalo ijate bbola mugoolo.

lines.english:
Millipede kicked the ball and scored.

Millipede dribbled the ball and scored. Millipede headed the ball and scored. Millipede scored five goals.

translations.bemba: Iciyongoli epakupanta no kwingisha. Iciyongoli cabela no kwingisha. Iciyongoli cauma iyakumutwe no kwingisha. Iciyongoli caingisha utukato tusaano.
translations.kaonde: Munyongolo wapanchile mpila nekutwezha. Munyongolo wapikile mpila jikwabo ne kutwezha jikwabo. Munyongolo watwezhezhe ne jikwabo namutwe. Mukupezhako Munyongolo watwezhezhe mpila jitanu.
translations.lozi: Likondondo la laha mbola ni kunwisa. Likondondo lanyunya mbola ni kunwisa. Likondondo nelilengile mbola ka toho ni kunwisa. Likondondo nelinwisize limbola zeketalizoho.
translations.lunda: MUnzhon’olu watumuni ngunja nakwinìzha. Munzhon’olu wahitishili ngunja nakwinìzha. Munzhon’olu watumini nguja namutu nakwinìzha. Munzhon’olu wenìzhili ngunja zhitanu.
translations.luvale: Chingolongochi ashile ngunja nakwingisa. Chingolongochi ahichishile ngunja nakwingisa. Chingolongochi ashile namutwe nakwingisa. Chingolongochi engishile jingunja jitanu.
translations.nyanja: Bongololo anasewela ndipo anamwetsa. Bongololo ananyunya ndi kumwetsa. Bongololo anamwesanso ndi mutu. Bongololo anamwetsa zigoli zisanu.
translations.tonga: Njoongolo lyakauma mupila akunywinsya. Joongolo lyakanyunya akunywinsya. Joongolo lyakauumya mutwe mupila akunywinsya. Eelyo Joongolo antoomwe lwakanywinsya magoolo osanwe.

lines.english: Chicken was furious that she lost. She was a very bad loser. Millipede started laughing because his friend was making such a fuss.

translations.bemba: Inkoko yalifulilwe ukuti yaluusa umupila. Iciyongoli caatampile ukuseka umunankwe pantu aaleilishanya.
translations.kaonde: Nzolo wazhingijile bingi pakumona amba waluusa. Kyatamine bingi mambo walushile kutama. Munyongolo watendekele kuseka mukwabo pakuzhingila kutama.
translations.lozi: Kuhu neifilikanile hahulu kakunwisiwa. Neeli muluzi ya maswe luli. Likondondo lakala kuseha kabakala litongoko za kuhu.
translations.lunda: Kasumbi wahilili mulon’ga wakuhona. Wadin’ga wataminina hakuluza. Munzhon’olu watachikili kuseha mulon’ga chakuhila cha kasumbi.
translations.luvale: Kasumbi apihililile hakuluza. Alujile mwamunene. Chingolongochi aputukile kuseha mwomwo sepa lyenyi asulakanyine.
translations.nyanja: Nkhuka inakalipa kuti inagonja. Inagonja kothelathu. Bongololo anayamba kuseka cifukwa ca madandaulo amnzake pambuyo pakugonja.
translations.tonga: Nkuku yakanyema akaambo kakuzundwa. Yakazundwa cibyaabi. Joongolo lyakagwagwamuka kuseka mweenzyinyina akaambo kambuli mbwaakali kulibonya kumeso.

lines.english: Chicken was so angry that she opened her beak wide and swallowed the millipede.

translations.bemba: Inkoko yalifulilwe saana yasoba iciyongoli no kucilya.
translations.kaonde: Nzolo wazhingijile kyakine kine, kabiji washinkwile kanwa kanji ne kumumina Munyongolo.
translations.lozi: Kuhu yafilikana hahulu mi yakwaulula mulomo wayona nikumiza Likondondo.
translations.lunda: Kasumbi wahilili nakwenzununa kanwa kindi nakuminya munzhon’olu.
translations.luvale: Hakupihilila changana Kasumbi asokolwele muvumbo wenyi nakumina Chingolongochi.
translations.nyanja: Nkhuku inakalipa kwambili ndikutsegula kamwa nameza bongololo.
translations.tonga: Nkuku yakanyema mpoona yakajula mulomo akumena Joongolo.

lines.english:
As Chicken was walking home, she met Mother Millipede. Mother Millipede asked, “Have you seen my child?” Chicken didn’t say anything.

Mother Millipede was worried.

translations.bemba: Cilya inkoko ileeya ku ŋanda, yakumanya nyina wa ciyongoli. Nyina waciyongoli eipusha ati, “Bushe naumonako umwana wandi?” Inkoko tayayaswike nangu cimo. Nyina wa ciyongoli tepakusakamana.
translations.kaonde: Nzolo byoabwelelenga kunzubo, wasambakene bainanji Munyongolo. Bamwipwizhe amba, “Wamumonapo mwanami nyi?” Nzolo kechi wakumbwilepo biji byonse ne. Bainanji Munyongolo ba akaminwe.
translations.lozi: Kuhu aneikuta kwandu yakopana ni mahe Likondondo. Bo mahe Likondondo babuza, “Kuli uboni mwanake?” Kuhu neisika bulela sesiñwi. Mahe Likondondo aikalelwa.
translations.lunda: Kasumbi chadin’ga nakwendayi nakufunta kwitala, waweni mama ya munzhon’olu. Mama ya munzhon’olu wehwili nindi, “Wunamoniki mwanami?” Kasumbi hahosheli zhidizhezhimaku.
translations.luvale: Omu apwile Kasumbi nakuya kwimbo, aliwanyine nanaye ya Chingolongochi. Naye ya Chingolongochi ahulishile, “Unamonoko mwanami?” Kasumbi kahanjikileho numba chimweko. Naye ya Chingolongochi alizakaminyine.
translations.nyanja: Pamene nkhuku inali kuyenda kunyumba, inakumana ndi amake abongololo. Amake Bongololo anafunsa nati, “Kodi wamuonako mwana wanga?” Nkhuku siyinalankhule ciliconse. Amake Bongololo anada nkhawa.
translations.tonga: Nkuku niyakali kweenda kuya kumunzi, yakaswaanganya banyina Joongolo. “Sena wamubona mwanaangu Joongolo?” bakabuzya banyina. Inkuku kunyina nciyakaamba nociba comwe.

lines.english: Then Mother Millipede heard a tiny voice. “Help me mom!” cried the voice. Mother Millipede looked around and listened carefully. The voice came from inside the chicken.

translations.bemba: Elyo nyina wa ciyongoli aumfwile akalishiwi akanoono. “Mutuule maayo!” Nyina wa ciyongoli aloleeshalolesha no kumfwikisha. Ishiwi lyaleefuma mu mala ya nkoko.
translations.kaonde: Ponkapo bainanji Munyongolo baumvwine kajiwi kacheeche. Munyongolo wajijilenga amba, “Maama, nkwashaiko!” Bainanji Munyongolo bakenkentele konse-konse bulongo. Baumvwine jiwi saka jifumina munda yakwa Nzolo.
translations.lozi: Mahe Likondondo hautwa kanzwi kakainyani-nyani, kali, “Hamunituse ima!” Mahe Likondondo aitemauna kuli autwisise hande. Linzwi lautwahala kuzwelela mwahalaa Kuhu.
translations.lunda: Mama ya munzhon’olu watiyili ka kambila . “Inkwashi mama! wadilili. Mama ya munzhon’olu watiyilili chachiwahi. Imbila yafuminini mwivumu da kasumbi.
translations.luvale: Kaha naye ya Chingolongochi evwile kalizu kakandende, “Ngukafwe mama!” Naye ya Chingolongochi atalile oku noku nakwivwilila kanawa. Lizu lyafuminyine mukachi ka Kasumbi.
translations.nyanja: Amake Bongololo anamva timau tating’ono. “Ndithandizeni amai!” liu linalila. Amake Bongololo anayangana uku ndi uku, ndi kumvetsetsa ndi cidwi. Mau anacokela mumimba mwa nkhuku.
translations.tonga: Kabacili antoomwe banyina joongola bakamvwa kajwi kasyoonto kakalila kuti, “Amundigwasye baama!” Banyina joongola bakazibauka koonse-koonse cakubikkila maanu. Kajwi kakali kulimvwisya kuti kazwida mwida lyankuku.

lines.english: Mother Millipede shouted, “Use your special power my child!” Millipedes can make a bad smell and a terrible taste. Chicken began to feel ill.

translations.bemba: Nyina wa ciyongoli epakupunda ati, “Bomfya amaka yobe mwana wandi!” Iciyongoli limo cilanunka ububi saana, no kumfwika ububi mu kanwa. Inkoko epakwamba ukumfwa ububi.
translations.kaonde: Bainanji Munyongolo babijikile amba, “Mwanami ingijisha ngovu yobe yapusanako!” Munyongolo watendekele kulupula bwema bwatama kabiji bwaumvwanyikenga ne. Nzolo watendekele kumvwa kubela.
translations.lozi: Mahe Likondondo ahuwa, “Belekisa maata ahao aipitezi mwanake!” Makondondo akona kupanga muunkoo maswe ni kusa tabusa. Mi Kuhu yakala kuikutwa kukula.
translations.lunda: Mama ya munzhon’olu wabidikili, “Zatishaku inòvu zheyi mwanami!” anyizhon’olu akweti ivumba datama nakalulisha. Kasumbi watachikili kutiya kukata.
translations.luvale: Naye ya Chingolongochi atambakanyine, “Zachisa ngolo jove ove mwanami!” Chingolongochi nahase kufumisa livumba lyalipi nachipepa chachipi. Kasumbi aputukile kuviza.
translations.nyanja: Amake Bongololo anafuula nati, “Sewenzetsa mphamvu zako zapadela mwana wanga!” Bongololo atha kununkha ndi kusamveka bwino. Nkhuku inayamba kusamvela bwino mthupi.
translations.tonga: “Belesya nguzu zyako zyaandeene mwanaangu!” Bakapozomoka banyina joongolo. Majoongolo alabamba kanunko kamwi kaya kabi alimwi akupa kubija mukanwa. Inkuku yakatalika kumvwa bubi, kuvwundaukwa kumoyo.

lines.english: Chicken burped. Then she swallowed and spat. Then she sneezed and coughed. And coughed. The millipede was disgusting!

translations.bemba: Inkoko yalibyolele. Yamina amate kabili yafwisa. Elyo yatesula no kukoola. Yakoola kabili. Iciyongoli tepabubi.
translations.kaonde: Nzolo watendekele nekubyola. Wamininenga ne kushipa mate. Kabiji wachamwine ne kukopola. Wakopwele nejikwabo. Munyongolo waumvwanyikile kutama.
translations.lozi: Kuhu yatokola. Yamiza ni kushelula. Yaitimula ni kuhotaula kabakala munyembu wa Likondondo leneimizize.
translations.lunda: Kasumbi wagikwili. Kaha waminyini nakwifwizha. Hakukohola na kupemba. Naku kohola. Munzhon’olu watiyili kuhiloka.
translations.luvale: Kasumbi atawile, kaha aminyine nakufwiza. Kaha achehwile nakukohola. Chingolongochi evwikile vyekha kaha!
translations.nyanja: Nkhuku inageya. Ndipo inamela ndi kutaya mata. Ndipo inakosomola. Bongololo anali kunyansisa.
translations.tonga: Inkuku limwi yakatifwuka, “vuuu,” mpoonya yamena alimwi akuswida. Alimwi yakakola alimwi yakeesyemuka, itisyaaaa! Joongolo lyakali kusesemya!

lines.english: Chicken coughed until she coughed out the millipede that was in her stomach. Mother Millipede and her child crawled up a tree to hide.

translations.bemba: Inkoko yakoola mpaka yakoola Iciyongoli icali mu mala. Nyina wa ciyongoli no mwana wakwe efyo baninine ku cimuti eko babelama.
translations.kaonde: Nzolo wakopwelengatu kyakubula kuleka ne pakatu wamulasamo Munyongolo munda yanji. Munyongolo ne bainanji bakalabile ne kukanjila kukichi nakufyama.
translations.lozi: Kuhu yahotaula kufitela ikwa Likondondo lene imizize. Mahe Likondondo ni mwana hae ba hohobela kwa kota kuyoipata.
translations.lunda: Kasumbi wakohweli ninochu akwohweliyi munzhon’olu kufuma mwivumu dindi. Mama ya munzhon’olu na mwanindi akandamini kumutondu nakuswama.
translations.luvale: Kasumbi akohwele nomu uze Chingolongochi apwile mujimo lyenyi alovokele. Naye namwana Chingolongochi vanyinyile kumutondo nakuswama.
translations.nyanja: Nkhuku inakosomola kufikila itakosomolela panja Bongololo amene anali mumimba mwake. Bongololo ndi amai ake anakalawa ndi kukwela m’mtengo kubisala.
translations.tonga: Yakakola nkuku kusikila limwina joongolo yazwa mwida. Banyina joongolo alimwi amwana bakakalaba kutanta mucisamu akuyuba.

lines.english: From that time, chickens and millipedes were enemies.

translations.bemba: Ukufuma apopene inkoko ne fiyongoli fyalipatana.
translations.kaonde: Kufuma pakyonkakyo kimye, banzolo ne Minyongolo baikele kebalwanyi.
translations.lozi: Kuzwelela fona foo, likuhu ni likondondo baba lila.
translations.lunda: Kufuma henahana, Tusumbi na nyinzhon’olu ekala hachambu.
translations.luvale: Kufuma lize likumbi, tusumbi navingolongochi vapwa vakakhole.
translations.nyanja: Kucokela pamenepo, Bongololo ndi Nkhuku anakhala adani.
translations.tonga: Kuzwa ciindi eeco, majoongolo alimwi ankuku tazyilyatani.

title: Chicken and Millipede were friends. But they were always competing with each other. One day they decided to play football to see who the best player was.

lines.english: Once there was a very hungry crocodile.

translations.bemba: Kwaliko Iŋwena iyali ne nsala saana.
translations.kaonde: Kala kene kwajinga kiwele waumvwine nzala.
translations.lozi: Nekunani kwena yene shwile hahulu tala.
translations.lunda: Kwedin’ga in’gandu wanzala.
translations.luvale: Lwola lumwe kwapwile ngandu wazala chikuma.
translations.nyanja: Panthawi yina, kunali n’gona yanjala kwambili.
translations.tonga: Kaindi kwakali ciwena wakamvwide nzala kapati.

lines.english: He searched for food slowly and quietly. And then…

translations.bemba: Yaaleefwaya ifyakulya mumutalalila ukwabula ukupanga icongo. Elyo nomba…
translations.kaonde: Waile pachepache saka azhindama nakukeba byakuja.
translations.lozi: Neibatisisa zakuca hanyinyani hainyani ka kukuza. Mi cwale…
translations.lunda: Wedin’ga nakuke’nga yakudya chovu-chovu muwumwenena. Henohu …
translations.luvale: Atondele vyakulya chindende chindende kaha nawa muuholela. Kukasumuka …
translations.nyanja: Inasakila cakudya mosafulumila ndi mwacetecete. Kenako…
translations.tonga: Wakayandaula cakulya cakubendelela mukawiiwi. Mpoona …

lines.english: POW!!! The crocodile strikes!

translations.bemba: Wiyu!!! Iŋwena yaikata icakulya!
translations.kaonde: Puku!!! Kiwele wakwachile!
translations.lozi: POOO!!! Kwena seiswala!
translations.lunda: POWU!!! Inga’ndu nakwati!
translations.luvale: Ngo!!! Ngandu nakamata!
translations.nyanja: Phoo!!! Ng’ona inagwila!
translations.tonga: Po!!! Ciwena wajata.

lines.english: After that he is no longer hungry, and he is happy.

translations.bemba: Panuma yakulya, Iŋwena yaikuta kabili yasansamuka.
translations.kaonde: Kufuma ponkapo kechi waumvwinepo nzala jikwabo ne, kabiji wasangalele.
translations.lozi: Kuzwafo aisautwa tala, mi yatabela.
translations.lunda: Kufumohu inzala yinamani kaha nawa nazan’galali.
translations.luvale: Kufuma haze kechi cheka nazalako, kaha nawahilila.
translations.nyanja: Kucokela apo njala inasila, ndiponso ali osangalala.
translations.tonga: Kuzwa waawo taakamvwa nzala alimwi. Naakamana wakakkomana.

lines.english: Until he gets hungry again.

translations.bemba: Mpaka yaumfwa insala na kabili.
translations.kaonde: Kanatu waumvwa nzala jikwabo.
translations.lozi: Kufitela foikautwela tala hape.
translations.lunda: Champi natiyi inzala chen’gi.
translations.luvale: Nomu mwapwa nazala cheka.
translations.nyanja: Mpaka akakhalenso ndi njala.
translations.tonga: Kusikila akamvwe nzala alimwi.

title: Once there was a very hungry crocodile.

lines.english:
Once upon a time, Hen and
Eagle were friends. They lived
in peace with all the other birds.
None of them could fly.

translations.bemba: Patiile akantu, Inkoko na Pungwa baali fibusa. Baleikala mu mutende ne fyuni fimbi. Ifyuni fyonse tafyalepupuka.
translations.kaonde: Kala kene, kyaje ne mpungu besampile bumbai. Baikalanga bulongo na bakwabo bañonyi. Kafwako wakonsheshenga kutumbukane.
translations.lozi: Kanako yen’wi, Nasikuku ni Mbande neeli balikani. Nebapila mwa kozo ni linyunywani zeñwi kaufela. Nekusina yene kona kufufa.
translations.lunda: Mafuku amunyima Kasumbi na kambembi edin’ga mabwambu. Ashakamini mukuwunda natuzhili akwawu. Hikwedinga wadi’nga nakutukaku.
translations.luvale: Lwola lumwe, Kasumbi na Chiselele valikwachile usepa. Vatwamine mukuunda natujila vakwavo vosena. Wauchi numba umwe ahashile kutuka.
translations.nyanja: Panali-panali, nkhuku ndi nkhwazi anali abwenzi. Anakhala mumutendele ndi mbalame zina. Panalibe paiwo amene anali kuuluka.
translations.tonga: Kaindi, Nkuku a Musyika bakali kumvwana kapati. Bakali kukkala muluumuno. Kunyina wakali kuuluka.

lines.english:
One day, there was famine in
the land. Eagle had to walk very
far to find food. She came back
very tired.
“There must be an easier way
to travel!” said Eagle.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo, kwaliponene insala. Pungwa aile aleefwaya ifyakulya ukutali saana. Abwelele ninshi nanaka saana. “Kufwile kwabako inshila yakwendelamo ukwabuka ukucuula!” efyasosele Pungwa.
translations.kaonde: Mwaka umo, mu kyalo mwajinga nzala. Mpungu wayile kwalepa bingi nakukeba byakuja. Nanchi wakokele bingi pa kimye kyoabwelelenga. Mpungu walanguiukile mba, “Kwakonsha kwikalapo jishinda jimo japeela kwendelamo!”
translations.lozi: Zazi leliñwi, nekunani lukupwe mwa naha. Mbande neinani kuya kwahule-hule kuli iyobata lico. Neikutile inge ikatezi hahulu. “Kuswanela kuba ni mukwa obunolo wa kuzamaya!” Mbande yabulela.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu kwadin’ga nzala yakapweli mwilun’ga. Kambembi wendeli ilun’ga dadilehi nakuwana yakuda. Wafuntili wakuzeya nankashi. “Kwatela kwikala nzhila ya swayi mukwenda” nindi kambembi.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe, kwapwile zala yayinene mungalila. Chiselele atambukile thunda yayisuku kutonda vyakulya. Ahilukile nazeye. Ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Kwatela kupwa jila imwe yayashi yakutambukilamo!”
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina, kunali njala kudziko. Nkhwazi anali kuyenda kutali kukasakila cakudya. Anabwelako olema kwambili. “Kufunikila kukhala njila ina yapafupi mumayendedwe” Nkhwazi inatelo.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba, kwakali nzala mucisi. Musyika wakeenda musinzo mulamfwu kuyandaula cakulya. Wakapiluka kakatende cakwiindilila. Wakati, “Kweelede kuba nzila ngubauba yakweenda musinzo mulamfwu.”

lines.english:
After a good night’s sleep, Hen
had a brilliant idea. She began
collecting the fallen feathers
from all their bird friends.
“Let’s sew them together on top
of our own feathers,” she said.
“Perhaps that will make it easier
to travel.”

translations.bemba: Panuma yakubuuka ulucelo, Inkoko yakwata amaano. Yatampile ukutoola amasako ukufuma ku fyuni fyonse. Ati, “Tiyeni tubililile pamo aya masako pa muulu wa aya twakwata. Limbi kuti catwangukilako mumyendele. ”
translations.kaonde: Panyuma yakulaala bulongo bufuku, Kyaje walangulukilepo maana awawama. Watendekele kutolaula mayona onse abakwabo bañonyi. Kyaje waambile amba, “Iyai twiasonene peulu yamayona etu, kampepo kwenda kusa kwitupelelako.”
translations.lozi: Kasamulaho a busihu bwakulobala hande, Nasikuku yaba ni muhupulo womunde hahulu. Yakala kunopa-nopa mafufa anawile a linyunywani zeñwi kaufela. “Alualukeleni fa halimu a mafufa aluna,” yabulela. “Mwendi lukakona kuzamaya kabunolo.”
translations.lunda: Hakufuma nakukama chachiwahi, kasumbi wadin’ga nakuzhina chachiwahi. Watachikili kusendazhola mavuzhi kudi akwawu achen’gi. “Twatuyiton’gi hewulu damavuzhi etu,” wahosheli. Hamu ochu chikutukwasha kwenda.
translations.luvale: Kusavala nge kuche, Kasumbi ashinganyekele mwakulinga. Aputukile kunonojola ungona waholokele kufuma kutujila vakwavo. Ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Twayenu tuwatongele hamwe helu lyamangona etu. “Phamo nachihehwisa kutambuka.”
translations.nyanja: Mumawa mwace, nkhuku inali ndi ganizo labwino. Inayamba kutola nthenga za mbalane iliyonse yamene inagwa. “Tiyeni tisokele pamodzi na nthenga zamene tili nazo” inatelo nkhuku. “Mwina ici cidzakhala capafupi kuyenda.”
translations.tonga: Niyakabuka muŋonzi zyibotu, Nkuku yakabaa muzeezo mubotu. Yakatalika kubwezelela mapepe kuzwa kuzyiyuninyina. “Katwaasuma antoomwe atala amapepe eesu,” yakaamba nkuku. “Ndiza inga caubauba kweenda misinzo.”

lines.english:
Eagle was the only one in the
village with a needle, so she
started sewing first.
She made herself a pair of
beautiful wings and flew high
above Hen.
Hen borrowed the needle but
she soon got tired of sewing.
She left the needle on the
cupboard and went into the
kitchen to prepare food for her
children.

translations.bemba: Pungwa ewalifye na keela mu mushi, kanshi ewabalilepo no kubila. Aipangila amapindo ayasuma saana no kupupukila mu muulu umutali. Inkoko epakwashima akeela, nomba yalifilwa ukubila kumulandu wa kunaka. Epakusha akeela pa kabati, yaaya mukupekanya ifyakulya fya baana.
translations.kaonde: Mumuzhi yensetu, Mpungu yewajingatu nanguya kabiji yewatendekejilepo ne kusona. Wilengejile mwine byapi byawama kabiji watumbukile peulu pene. Kyaje walombeleko nguya bino waumvwine kukooka kusona. Nanchi wikilekele kusona watuula ne nguya pakabachi waya mukibamba mwakuteekela nakuteeka byakuja bya baana banji.
translations.lozi: Mbande neeli yona feela inosi yeneinani ndonga mwa hae, kona kuli yakalisa kuluka. Neitukezi mafufa amabeli amande hahulu mi ya kwanisa kufufa fahalimu a Nasikuku. Nasikuku yakalima ndonga kono hanyinyani feela yakatala kuluka. Yasiya ndonga fahalimu a kabati ni kuya mwa liapehelo kuyo apehela bana bayona lico.
translations.lunda: Kambembi diyi hohu wadin’ga hohu na ndon’gu mumukali kankayindi dichi watachikili kuton’ga yena. Waton’geli zhi mbandu zhazhiwahi zhayomweni nakutuka hewulu dakasumbi. Kasumbi walombeliku ndon’gu ila’nga wazeyeli kutin’ga. Washiyili ndon’gu ha kabati nakuya nakutelekela yakuda anyanind.
translations.luvale: Chiselele ikhiye kaha apwilenga nandongo muze mwimbo, shikaho aputukileko ikhiye kutonga. Alitungililile mavava avali amwaza nakutuka helu lya Kasumbi. Kasumbi alombele ndongo oloze azeyele kutonga. Asezele ndongo helu lyachisweko nakuya muchisambwe akawahise vyakulya vyavana venyi.
translations.nyanja: Nkhwazi ndiye anali cabe ndi nsingano yotungila pamudzi, iye anayambilila kusoka. Anazipangila mapiko awili abwino-bwino nakuuluka pamwamba pa nkhuku. Nkhuku inabweleka nsingano koma analema kutunga. Anasiya nsingano yosokela pa kabati ndipo anayenda kukakonza cakudya ca ana ake ku khicini.
translations.tonga: Musyika nguwakajisi nyeleti yakusumya mumunzi oonse. Aboobo, nguwakasaanguna kusuma. Wakalibambila mababa mabotu kapayi kubelesya nyeleti. Nkuku yakalomba nyeleti kutegwa isume ayalo. Yakakatala kufwambaana. Yakasiya nyeleti mukkabati akuunka kukujika zyakulya zyabana bakwe.

lines.english:
But the other birds had seen
Eagle flying away. They asked
Hen to lend them the needle to
make wings for themselves too.
Soon there were birds flying all
over the sky.

translations.bemba: Nomba ifyuni fimbi fyalimwene uko pungwa apupwike. Fyalomba Inkoko ukufyashimako akeela pakuti nafyo fibilileko amasako. Mu kashitafye akanoono, ifyuni ifingi fyayamba ukulapupuka mu muulu.
translations.kaonde: Bino bañonyi bakwabo bamwene Mpungu saka abena kutumbuka kuya kwalepa. Ponkapo bañonyi bakwabo balombele nguya kwi Kyaje amba nabo bengijisheko kusonenako bwapi byabo. Ponkapo bañonyi baavula batumbukilengatu konse-konse.
translations.lozi: Kono linyunywani zeñwi neliboni Mbande haifufa. Selikupa Nasikuku kulikalima ndonga kuli liitukele mafufa azona. Onafo, sekuba ni linyunywani zene fufa-fufa mwa mbyumbyulu kaufela.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga atuzhila makwawu amweni kambembi nakutuka. Alombeli kasumbi ndon’gu kulonda atonì imbandu zhawu. Chantesha hohu, tuzhila amavulu atachikili kutuka mumawulu.
translations.luvale: Oloze vaze tujila vakwavo vamwene chiselele mwatuka nakuya. Vahulishile Kasumbi avalevaneko ndongo mangana vatungise mavava avo navakhiko. Kakandende kaha kukasumuka mwilu munazale natujila vali nakutuka.
translations.nyanja: Mbalame zina zinaiona nkhwazi kuuluka. Zinafunsa nkhuku kuti iwabweleke nsingano kuti zipangile mapiko youlukila nao. Mosacedwa, kunali mbalame zambili kuuluka mumwamba.
translations.tonga: Bayuni bambi bakamubona kauluka musyika. Mpoona bakalomba nyeleti kunkuku kutegwa abalo basume mababa. Mpoona, kwakaba bayuni banji bauluka.

lines.english:
When the last bird returned the
borrowed needle, Hen was not
there. So her children took the
needle and started playing with
it.
When they got tired of the
game, they left the needle in
the sand.

translations.bemba: Elyo icuuni cakulekelesha caleetele akeela, Inkoko tayalipo. Abaana bankoko baasendele akeela batampa kwangasha. Ilyo banakile ukwangala, baashiile akeela mumucanga.
translations.kaonde: Kimye ñonyi wapeleleko kusona poabwezhezhe nguya, Kyaje kechi wajingapo ne. Nanchi baana bakwa Kyaje batendekele kukaisha nguya. Byobakookele nakukaya bashile aya nguya mubusenga.
translations.lozi: Nyunywani ya mafelelezo aneikutisa ndonga, Nasikuku nasiyo. Cwale bana bahae bashimba ndonga nikukala kubapala niyona. Hase bakatezi kubapala, basiya ndonga mwa mubu.
