translations.lunda: Kazhila wakukumishilaku chafuntishiliyi yina ndo’nu, kasumbi hedi’nga kokuku. Dichi anyana atachikili kuhemesha yina ndon’gu. Amanishili kuyihemesha, ashiyili ndon’gu mumaseki.
translations.luvale: Omu kajila wakukumishila ahilwishile ize ndongo yakulevana, Kasumbi kapwilehoko. Shikaho vana venyi vambachile ize ndongo nakuputuka kuyihemesa. Omu vazeyele kuhema nayo vayisezele muusekeseke.
translations.nyanja: Pamene mbalame yomalizila inabweza nsingano yosokela, nkhuku panalibe. Ana a nkhuku anatenga nsingano nakuyamba kusowela nayo. Pamene analema kusowela, anasiya nsingano ija mumcenga.
translations.tonga: Wamamanino muyuni naakajosya nyeleti, Nkuku tiiyakaliko. Mpoona bana banjiyo bakaibweza akutalika kusobanya. Nibakamana kusobana, bakaisiya nyeleti mumuseenga.

lines.english:
Later that afternoon, Eagle
returned. She asked for the
needle to fix some feathers that
had loosened on her journey.
Hen looked on the cupboard.
She looked in the kitchen. She
looked in the yard. But the
needle was nowhere to be
found.

translations.bemba: Mu nshita ya cungulo, Pungwa abwela. Aaleefwaya akeela pakuti alundeko amasako nayambi no kubililila ayanenwike elyo aile pa bulendo bwakwe. Inkoko ekwamba ukufwaya akeela. Yafwaya mu cikini. Yafwaya mu lubansa, akeela tekakumoneka.
translations.kaonde: Jonkaja juuba mabanga, Mpungu wabwelele. Walombele nguya amba asoneneko mayona akasulukile pa kimye kyoajinga palwendo. Kyaje watajile mu kabachi. Kabiji wakebele ne mukinzanza. Wakeba ne lubanza yense. Bino nguya kechi yamwekele ne.
translations.lozi: Musihali o, Mbande aikutile, yakupa kwa ndonga kuli ilukisa mafufa ayona hanasinyehezi mwa musipili. Nasikuku yabata fa kabati. Yabata mwa liapehelo mane ni mwa lapa. Kono ndonga neisika fumaneha.
translations.lunda: Melela efuku denadina, kambembi wafuntili chen’ga. Walombeli ndon’gu kulonda awayishi mavuzhi asenkenyeli mukutuka kwindi. Kasumbi watalili ha kabodi. Watalili nimwakutelekela. Watalili hanzhi. Ilan’ga ndo’gu yadin’ga kosi.
translations.luvale: Halikumbi lize kuchingoloshi, Chiselele ahilukile. Ahulishile ndongo mangana atungise mangona asekenyene haungeji wenyi. Kasumbi atondele hachisweko. Atondele muchisambwe. Atondele muweluka. Oloze ize ndongo kayiwanyineko.
translations.nyanja: Mumazulo, nkhwazi anabwelela. Anapempha nsingano kuti asokele nthenga zimene zinasokomoka paulendo. Nkhuku inasakila nsingano pakabati, mophikila, ndi panja pa nyumba. Koma nsingano sinapezeke.
translations.tonga: Masyikati, Musyika wakapiluka. Wakabuzya akali nyeleti kutegwa abambe mababa aakwe akasoka alekehya naakali mulweendo. Nkuku yakatalika kuyandaula, mu kabbati, mu chikuta, mulubuwa, pesi nyeleti tiiyakajanika.

lines.english:
“Just give me a day,” Hen
begged Eagle. “Then you can
fix your wing and fly away to
get food again.”
“Just one more day,” said Eagle.
“If you can’t find the needle,
you’ll have to give me one of
your chicks as payment.”

translations.bemba: “Mpelakofye ubushiku bumo,” Inkoko yapaapaata Pungwa. “Elyo ukeesabikako amasako ku mapindo yobe no kupupuka ukuya mukufwaya ifyakulya na kabili.” Pungwa epakuti “Nakupelafye ubushiku bumo, nga wafilwa ukumona akeela kandi, ukampeela umwana obe umo nga malipilo.”
translations.kaonde: Kyaje wabujile Mpungu amba, “Mpepotu juuba jimo napopwela, apa bino ukawamishe byapi kabiji ukaye ne nakukeba byakuja jikwabo.” “Juubatu jimo,” Mpungu wamwambile Kyaje jikwabo amba, “Inge ukakankalwe kwiimona nguya, nanchi ukampapo mwanobe umo nkaje.”
translations.lozi: “Unife feela lizazi liliñwi,” Nasikuku yakupa Mbande. “Mi ukakona kulukisa mafufa ahao ni kufufa kuyonga lico hape.” “Lizazi hape liliñwi,” Mbande yabulela. “Haiba hauna kuifumana ndonga, ukanifa kaciyociyo kalikañwi fa tuchiyochiyo twahao kuli ibe yona tifo.”
translations.lunda: “Nyikanku hohu ifuku dimu,” walembeli kudi kambembi. “Kulonda wuwayishi imbandu zheyi wutuki nakuken’ga yakuda chengi’. Ifuku dimu hohu,” nindi kambembi. “Neyi wukuyiwana wanyi ndon’gu, wukunyinka mwaneyi asinsilimu.”
translations.luvale: Kasumbi alambililile Chiselele, “Nguhaneko likumbi limwe.” Atwalilileho ngwenyi, “Kaha nauliwahisa livava nakutuka nakuya nakutonda vyakulya cheka.” Chiselele ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Likumbi limwe kaha, nge nauhona kuyiwana ize ndongo, kaha naunguhanaho mwanove umwe kupwa fweto.”
translations.nyanja: “Ndipatseni tsiku limodzi” Nkhuku inapempha nkhwazi. “Kuti mukakonze phiko lanu ndikuulukanso kukasakila cakudya.” “Tsiku limodzi cabe” Nkhwazi anatelo. “Ngati siupeza nsingano, uzandipatsa mwana wako m’modzi kukhala malipilo.”
translations.tonga: “Kondipa biyo buzuba bomwe.” Nkuku yakakombelehya. “Mpemunya uyakwaabamba mababa aako akaule ukaye kuyoo yandaula cakulya. Musyika wakati, “Kuti utaijani nyeleti, uyakundipa mwana wako omwe kubbadela mulandu ooyu.”

lines.english:
When Eagle came the next day,
she found Hen scratching in the
sand, but no needle.
So Eagle flew down very fast
and caught one of the chicks.
She carried it away.
Forever after that, whenever
Eagle appears, she finds Hen
scratching in the sand for the
needle.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, elyo Pungwa aishile, aasangile Inkoko ileefwaya akeela mumucanga. Pungwa epakupupukila panshi bwangu-bwangu no kwikatapo akaana kankoko kamo no kukasenda. Ukufuma apopene lyonse Pungwa nga isa asanga Inkoko ileefwaya akeela mumucanga.
translations.kaonde: Bino Mpungu byoabwelele juuba jalondejilepo, wataine Kyaje ubena kupalaya mubusenga kabiji kechi wiimwene nguya ne. Ponkapo Mpungu wasumukile munshi bukiji-bukiji kabiji wakwachilepo nemwana wakwa Kyaje umo. Mpungu wasendele mwana. Kufuma pakyonka kya kimye Mpungu, umona Kyaje saka abena kusalaya nakukeba nguya mubusenga.
translations.lozi: Mbande haiyotaha lizazi lelitatama, ya fumana Nasikuku inge ifata mwa mubu, kono nekusina ndonga. Cwale Mbande yafufa kabubebe kutaha fafasi niku pamula kaciyociyo kalikañwi ni kuya nikona. Kuzwelela foo, nako kaufela Mbande isabonahala feela, ifumananga Nasikuku inge afata-fata mwa mubu kubata ndonga.
translations.lunda: Chafuntiliyi kambembiifuku damuchiyedi, waweni kasumbi nakusanda mumaseki. Dich kambembi watukili hamaseki nakuhitula mwana kakasumbi. Watukili nindi mwiwulu. Kufuma henohu, neyi kambembi namwekani wawanan’ga kasumbi nakukengà nakusandasanda mumaseki ndon’gu.
translations.luvale: Omu Chiselele ejile likumbi lyacheleko, awanyine Kasumbi ali nakusanda muusekeseke, oloze ndongo yauchi. Shikaho chiselele atukilile hamavu washi nakukwataho kamwana kamwe. Akambachile nakuya nako. Hayamyaka kufuma haze, nge chiselele mwasoloka, mwawana Kasumbi ali nakusanda muusekeseke kutonda ize ndongo.
translations.nyanja: Pamene nkhwazi inabwela tsiku lotsatilapo, anapeza nkhuku asakilabe mumcenga, koma nsingano sanaipeze. Nkhwazi anauluka mwamsanga ndikugwila kamwana ka nkhuku kamodzi. Anapita nako kutali. Kucokela nthwiyo, nkhwazi ikaonekela cabe, iona nkhuku isakila nyeleti mumicenga.
translations.tonga: Buzuba bwakatobela, Musyika wakaboola alimwi kukubweza nyeleti. Wakajana nkuku ilayanga mumuseenga pesi nyeleti tiiyakajanika. Musyika wakajata kana kankuku komwe akukatola. Kuzwida waawo, kufwumbwa asika musyika, ulajana nkuku ilapalaula ansi kuyandaula nyeleti.

lines.english:
As the shadow of Eagle’s wing
falls on the ground, Hen warns
her chicks. “Get out of the bare
and dry land.”
And they respond:
“We are not fools. We will run.”

translations.bemba: Nga kwamoneka icinshingwa cakwa Pungwa panshi, Inkoko ilacenjesha abaana baiko. “Fumeni palwalala.” Elyo tumwasuka ati, “Tatuli fipuba, tulebutuka.”
translations.kaonde: Nanchi Kyaje inge wamona mayona alakasha Mpungu panshi, ujimuna baana banji. “Kyaje ubuula baana banji kufumapo pampunzha pabula bichi.” Baana banji bamumvwina: Kabiji baana banji bamba amba, “Kechi twibileya ne, tusakunyema.”
translations.lozi: Muluti wa Mbande usabonahala feela fafasi, Nasikuku ulemusa tuciyociyo twahae. “Hamuzwe mwa patelo mokusina sesiñwi,” mi twa alaba: “Hauliyanganu. Lyuka mata.”
translations.lunda: Neyi mwevulu wa kambembi wanamwekani hamaseki, kasumbi waswekan’ga anyanindi. “Fumenu hatoka hahomu” wena akulan’ga nawu, “Tudi asupaku, tukutemuka.
translations.luvale: Chosena Kasumbi mwamona muvwimbimbi walivava lya Chiselele nauholokela hamavu, Kasumbi mwejivisa vana venyi, “Fumenu muweluka mutoma.” Kaha vana veji kukumbulula ngwavo, “Katwahulamako. Natuchina.”
translations.nyanja: Ngati mthunzi wa phiko ya nkhwazi waonekela kucoka kumwamba, Nkhuku icenjeza ana ake. “Cokani poonekela.” Ndiponso iwo akuyankha, “Sindife oputsa, tizathamanga.”
translations.tonga: Kuti cinzimweemwe ca Musyika calibonya ansi, Nkuku ilacenjezya bana banjiyo akuti, “Kamuzwa antangalala atayubiki.” Kwamana bana balavwiila balati “Tatuli bafwuba-fwuba tulalunduka.”

title:
Once upon a time, Hen and
Eagle were friends. They lived
in peace with all the other birds.
None of them could fly.

lines.english: It was a little girl who first saw the mysterious shape in the distance.

translations.bemba: Umukashana umunoono ewabalilepo ukumona icintu cileisa akatalamukila.
translations.kaonde: Mwana wamucheeche wamukazhi yewajinga mutanshi kumona kintu kyabula kuyukanyikwa paleepa.
translations.lozi: Neeli kanana ka kasizani kene kakalile kubona sibupeho sa sika sene sikomokisa senesili kwahule nyana.
translations.lunda: Wadin’ga kansi wamunyaya waweni chuma chakadi kwiluka hahalehi.
translations.luvale: Apwile kanyike waphwevo avangilile kumona uze mujimba wakukomwesa hakasuku.
translations.nyanja: Kanali kamwana kakakazi kang’ono komwe kanaona cinthu ca maonekedwe odabwitsa patali.
translations.tonga: Kakali kasimbi kasyoonto kakasaanguna kubona cintu cakali kunyandya kumbele lyabo.

lines.english: As the shape moved closer, she saw that it was a heavily pregnant woman.

translations.bemba: Ilyo ico cintu cafikile mupepi, aamwene ukuti ni namaayo uwali pabukulu.
translations.kaonde: Bino akino kintu byokyafwenyenye pabwipi, wamwene amba nanchi wajinga inetu wajinga najimi jakoma.
translations.lozi: Sibupeho sa sika seo hanze sisutelela bukaufi, habona kuli neeli musali yana nani mulwalo omutuna hahulu.
translations.lunda: Chuma chenichi chichaswilili mwakamwihi, wadin’ga mukamama nakulishi ivumu.
translations.luvale: Omu uze mujimba waswenyene mwakamwihi, amwene ngwenyi apwile phwevo walijimo.
translations.nyanja: Pamane cinthu cinabwela pafupi, anaona kuti anali mzimai omwe anali ndi mimba yaikulu.
translations.tonga: Mbocakali kuyaa buswena afwaafwi, bakabona kuti wakali mukaintu wakalaa da likinkide.

lines.english:
Shy but brave, the little girl moved nearer to the woman.

“We must keep her with us,” the little girl’s people decided. “We’ll keep her and her child safe.”

translations.bemba: Nangu umukashana aali ne nsoni alishipile no kupalama mupepi na namaayo. “Tufwile twamusunga uyu namaayo,” efyalandile abantu. “Tulemusunga bwino no mwana wakwe.”
translations.kaonde: Mwanyike nangwa waumvwine bumvu, bino wajinga nangovu kabiji waile kubwipi nakwajinga inetu bajinga najimi. Balongo bauno mwanyike wamukazhi ba ambile amba, “Tusa kumulamanga uno inetu ne mwananji bulongo.”
translations.lozi: Kamaswabi kono kabundume, kasizani ka sutelela kwa tuko a musali yoo. “Luswanela kuina niyena,” batu bahabo kasizani babulela. “Luka mubabalela hande ni mwanaahae.”
translations.lunda: Wadin’ga wansonyi ilan’ga ona Kansi wamunyanya wadikakili nakuswila kudi ona mukamama wevumu. “Twatela kumulama nanetu,” antu zha nona Kansi adikasili. “Tukumulama namwanindi chachiwahi.”
translations.luvale: Oku sonyi oloze nawa nakumika, uze kanyike waphwevo aswenyene kwakamwihi nauze phwevo. Vathu jauze kanyike waphwevo valivwasanyine ngwavo, “Twatela kumulama kanawa namwanenyi.”
translations.nyanja: Mwamanyazi koma mopanda mantha, kamwana kanasendela pafupi ndi mzimai. “Tifunika kuwasunga,” anthu a kamwana kakazi anaganizila. “Tizamusunga ndi mwana wake bwino-bwino.
translations.tonga: Aaka kana kasimbi, ansoni hyakwe pele icakutayoowa, kakaswena munsi-munsi amukaintu. “Tweelede kubagwasya akubabamba andiswe.” Eelyo bantu boonse bakazumina. “Tulababamba amwanaabo.”

lines.english:
The child was soon on its way.

“Push!”

“Bring blankets!”

“Water!”

“Puuuuussssshhh!!!”

translations.bemba: Papatafye akashita kanoono umwana aba munshila. “Sunka!” “Leeta amalangeti!” “Ameenshi!” “Suunkaa!!!”
translations.kaonde: Mwananji wakijinga ukyangye kusemwa. “Shinjika!” “Letai mwemba!” “Meema!” “Shinjika!”
translations.lozi: Mbututu nasainzi fabukaufi. “Kasha!” “Hamutise likubo!” “Mezi!” “Kaaaaaaaaaaashaaaaaa!!!”
translations.lunda: Mwana wadin’ga kwakamwihi nakusemuka. “Shinjika!” “Nentaku mapayi!” “Menzhi!” “Shiiiiiiiinjika!!! ”
translations.luvale: Mwana apwile kwakamwihi nakusemuka. “Shinjika!” “Nehenu mapayi!” “Meya!” Shinjika!!!”
translations.nyanja: Mwana anali pafupi kubadwa. “Kankha!” “Bwelesani zovimba!” “Manzi!” “Kankhaaaa!!!”
translations.tonga: Mwana wakali munzila kuti atumbukwe. “Tonka!” “Kamuleta mapayi.” “Amulete meenda.” “Tooonkaaaaa!”

lines.english:
But when they saw the baby, everyone jumped back in shock.

“A donkey?!”

translations.bemba: Nomba ilyo baamwene umwana, bonse batolokela kunuma mu kusunguka. “Punda?”
translations.kaonde: Bino panyuma yakumona mwana, bonsetu batolokele, babwelele panyuma kabiji bakuminye. “Mbongolo nyi?!”
translations.lozi: Kono hase babona mbututu, kaufela batulela mwamulaho ka kukomoka. “Mbongolo?!”
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga chamweniwu mwana, ezhima wawu akilukili nakudihayamina. “Donki?!”
translations.luvale: Oloze omu vamwene uze khemba, vosena vamotokele nakulikomokela. “Chimbulu?!”
translations.nyanja: Koma pamene anaona mwana wakhanda, aliyense analumpha modabwa. “Bulu?!”
translations.tonga: Nibakamubona mwana, boonse bakasotokela munsi akunyandwa kapati. “Imbongolo?”

lines.english:
Everyone began to argue.

“We said we would keep mother and child safe, and that’s what we’ll do,” said some.

“But they will bring us bad luck!” said others.

translations.bemba: Bonse baatampile ukupaashanya. “Twacitila tulesunga umwana na nyina bwino, kanshi efyo twalacita,” efyo abantu bamo basosa. “Nomba bakatuletela ishamo!” efyo bambi baasosele.
translations.kaonde: Bonse batendekele kwipachika. Bantu bamo baambile amba, “Twajikumvwañana amba tusa kumula inanji ne mwananji bulongo, kabiji byobyo tusa kulondela.” Kumvwa bakwabo amba, “Kampepo bakonsha kwituletela mashamo!”
translations.lozi: Kaufela bona bakala kukananisana. “Nelubulezi kuli lukababalela mushemi ni mbututu wahae, mi zeo kona zelukaeza,” babañwi babulela. “Kono bakalutiseza bumai!” babañwi babulela.
translations.lunda: Ezhima wawu atachikili kudibobwesha. “Twahosha netu tukulama mama na mwanindi chachiwahi kaha dichu Tukwila nawa,” chahosheliwu amakwawu. “Ilan’ga akutunentela yiyobu!” chahosheliwu amakwawu.
translations.luvale: Vosena vaputukile kulihamika. Vamwe vahanjikile ngwavo, “Twahanjikanga ngwetu natulama vosena namwana nanaye kanawa shikaho mukhiko natulinga. “Oloze vakwavo vahanjikile ngwavo, “Mwatunehela luvinda!”
translations.nyanja: Aliyense anayamba kukangana. “Tinanena kuti tizasunga make pamozi ndi mwana wake bwino-bwino, ndipo tizacita motelo,” ena anatelo. “Koma azatibweletsela soka!” enanso ananena.
translations.tonga: Boonse bakatalika kukazyanya. “Twaamba kuti tulababamba banyina amwana, aboobo mbotuticite oobo.” Bamwi bakaamba, “Kuti tubabambe, balatuletela malweza.”

lines.english:
And so the woman found herself alone again.

She wondered what to do with this awkward child.

She wondered what to do with herself.

translations.bemba: Efyo nomba namaayo aisangile eka na kabili. Taishibe ifyakucita no mwana wa musango uyu. Taishibe ifyakucita umwine.
translations.kaonde: Namambo aino milanguluko ya bantu, uno inetu witaine bunke jikwabo. Kechi wayukile bya kuuba nayewa mwana wabujile kulumbuluka ne. Kikwabo kekya kuuba amba kechi wayukile bya kuuba ne.
translations.lozi: Musali yoo haipumana hanosi hape. Haikomokela ili sanakaeza ni mbututu yahae yecwalo yeo. Abilaezwa ki zanakaeza kuli hakone kuitusa hanosi.
translations.lunda: Dichi ona mukamama wadiweneni kankayindi chen’gi nawa. Wadin’ga nakushin’ganyeka mwakwililayi nanona mwana wayiyobu. Wadin’ga nakushin’ganyeka mwakwililayi nayomweni.
translations.luvale: Shikaho uze phwevo aliwanyine ukhawenyi cheka. Kathachikijile mwakulinga nauze mwana wanganako. Kathachikijile omu mwalinga hali yaveneko.
translations.nyanja: Cifukwa ca ico, mzimai anakhalanso yekha. Anabvutika kuganiza zomwe azacita ndi mwana wodabwisa. Anabvutika kuziganizila cocita.
translations.tonga: Mukaintu wakalijana alikke alimwi. Wakakatazyigwa cakucita kumwana ooyu waandeene. Wakabula cakucita mukamwini.

lines.english: But finally she had to accept that he was her child and she was his mother.

translations.bemba: Panuma aasuminafye ukuti umwana aali mwana wakwe elyo nao ali ni nyina.
translations.kaonde: Kyapeleleko, wamuswiletu mwana amba kabiji yeinanji.
translations.lozi: Kono kwanalule-lule halumela ni kuikeleza kuli ki mwanahae mi kiyena mahe Mbongolo yeo.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga kunkumina wachitezheli nindi wadin’ga mwanindi kaha nawa yena himama yindi.
translations.luvale: Kusongo etavijile ngwenyi apwile mwanenyi kaha nawa ikhiye naye.
translations.nyanja: Koma pothela, anavomela kuti bulu anali mwana wake ndipo anali mai wake.
translations.tonga: Limwi wakazumina kuti mwana wakwe amana mwana wakwe nimbongolo mpemunya wakali banyina mbongolo.

lines.english:
Now, if the child had stayed that same, small size, everything might have been different. But the donkey child grew and grew until he could no longer fit on his mother’s back.

And no matter how hard he tried, he could not behave like a human being. His mother was often tired and frustrated. Sometimes she made him do work meant for animals.

translations.bemba: Nomba nga cakuti umwana taaleekula, alifye umunono, fyonse nga fyalifye bwino. Lelo uyu punda alikulile saana icakuti aleka ukukumana mu numa yaba nyina. Elyo nangu eshe shani, ificitwa fyakwe tafyali fya buntu. Inshita yonse banyina baleebafye ne cifukushi kabili abanaka. Limo-limo baaleemupeela incito sha nama.
translations.kaonde: Nanchi inge auno mwana waikeletu pakipimo kimo kwakubula kukoma, inge kyawamineko. Pano uno mbongolo wamwana wakomenengatu pakatu nyuma ya ba inanji yakeepa kabiji keakankalwe kufikamo munyuma. Nanchi nangwa waesekelenga kumwesha byubilo bya bumuntu byepi, bino kechi wakonsheshe kwikala nobe muntu ne. Onkao mambo, ba inanji jaavujishatu baikalangatu bakooka kabiji nakijikila. Kimo kimye ba inanji baubanga mingilo yafwainwa kwingila banyama.
translations.lozi: Cwale, kambe mwanana yoo nainelelezi onacwalo yomunyinyani, nekukaba ni shutano. Kono Mbongolo yamwana yahula mane kufita fa kupalelwa kukwana kwa mukokoto wa maayona. Mi nihaneilika katata, neisakoni kuba ni mikwa yeswana sina ya batu. Bo maayona hañata nebakatala ni kufilikana. Fokuñwi nebaisebezisanga misebezi ya lifolofolo.
translations.lunda: Dichi neyi ona mwana washakamini nakushika hachipimu China, kasi yuma yezhima yahimpili. Ilan’ga ona Donki wakuli ninochu chashikiliyu hachipimu chakadi kushika kunyima ya mama yindi. Mudi mwezhima esekeleliyu hahimpili yilwilu neyi muntuku. Mama yindi wadin’ga wahila na wakuzeya nawa. Impinji zhikwawu wamwililen’ga kukon’ga nyidimu zhatunyama.
translations.luvale: Jino nge mwana uze asalile ngachize, chakuzeneka kukola kachi vyosena vyalumukile. Oloze uze chimbulu chamwana akolele nakuhona kuta munyima yanaye. Numba tuhu esekele ngachilihi, kahashile kuyoya nge muthuko. Naye kakavulu azeyele nenyi nakukwata matoto. Lwola lukwavo amulingishilenga milimo yakutela kulinga tunyama.
translations.nyanja: Tsopano, ngati mwana anakhala cimodzimodzi, ndi thupi ing’ono, zinthu zinakakhalako mosiyana. Koma bulu anakula ndi kukula kufikila nthawi yomwe sankakhala pa msana pa mai wake. Ndipo mkhalidwe wake unasiyana ndi munthu. Amai ake anali olema nthawi zamblili komanso aukali. Nthawi zina, anatuma mwana kucita nchito zomwe zinafunikila kucitika ndi nyama.
translations.tonga: Niyatakali kukomena mbongolo, nicakali kabotu. Pesi Mbongolo eyi yakakomena limwi yakatalika kukatazya kubbala kumusana wabanyina. Mbongolo yakasola pesi tiiyakacikonzya kupona mbuli muntu. Banyina bakali kukatala kapati. Ciindi coonse bakali kujanika balinyemede. Zyimwi zyiindi bakali kumupa mulimo wabanyama.

lines.english:
Confusion and anger built up inside Donkey. He couldn’t do this and he couldn’t do that. He couldn’t be like this and he couldn’t be like that.

He became so angry that, one day, he kicked his mother to the ground.

translations.bemba: Punda alifye awakalipa, taishibe ifyakucita kabili aatampile ukumfwa icifukushi. Teti acite icili conse. Teti abe ifili fyonse. Alifulilwe saana icakuti, ubushiku bumo, alipantile banyina bapona na panshi.
translations.kaonde: Kuvulañana ne bukaji byakomenenga mu uno Mbongolo. Kechi wakonsheshe kuuba kintu kiji kyonse ne. Kabiji kechi wakonsheshenga kwikala ne. Kabiji watendekele kwikala bingi nabukaji. Juuba jimo wazhingijile bingi kabiji wapanchile bainanji nakibaaka bapona ne panshi.
translations.lozi: Mifilifili ni bunyemi zahula mwahalaa minahano ya Mbongolo. Neisakoni kueza ze ni zale. Neisakoni kuba mo ni mwale. Seinyema hahulu kueza kuli, zazi leliñwi, yalahela bo maayona fafasi.
translations.lunda: Kuhila nachambu chenzili mudi Donki. Wakan’genyi kwilizhi hela kwila zhina. Wakan’genyi kwikala China hela kwikala ichi. Wahilili chakubadika dichi ifuku dimu wahinwini mama yindi heseki.
translations.luvale: Liwayanga namatoto vyachimbilile mukachi kachimbulu. Nevi alingile vene vyauchi. Kahashile kupwa ngana nyi ngachizeko. Kufutuka echi chamulingishile likumbi limwe ashinjike naye nakumuholwela hamavu.
translations.nyanja: Msokonezo ndi mkwiyo unakula mu mtima wa bulu. Anali kulephela kucita zilizonse. Analephela kukhala ndi mkhalidwe weni weni. Anali okwiya kotelo kuti, tsiku lina, anamenyela amai ake pansi.
translations.tonga: Mbongolo yakanyongana akunyema kapati. Yakanyema kapati akaambo kakuti tiiyakaangulukide kuti inga yakonhya kucita zimwi zintu nhyoyakali kuyanda kuchita. Bumwi buzuba, kunyema kwakaindilila, yakababbakela banyina mane bawa ansi.

lines.english: Donkey was filled with shame. He started to run away as far and fast as he could.

translations.bemba: Punda alyumfwile insoni. Aatampile ukubutuka ukuya ukutali saana.
translations.kaonde: Mbongolo waumvwine bumvu. Kabiji watendekele kunyema kuya kwalepa.
translations.lozi: Mbongolo yaikutwa maswabi. Yakala kumata kuya kwahule hahulu kamoneikonela.
translations.lunda: Donki wadin’ga nansonyi. Dichi watemukili nakuya kwakulehi lufuchi.
translations.luvale: Chimbulu evwile sonyi. Aputukile kuchina nakuya kwakusuku.
translations.nyanja: Bulu anacita manyazi. Anayamba kuthawila kutali komwe angathe kupita ndipo anatelo mwmusanga.
translations.tonga: Mbongolo yakafwa nsoni. Yakatalika kulunduka kutija kuya kule.

lines.english:
By the time he stopped running, it was night, and Donkey was lost.

“Hee haw?” he whispered to the darkness.

“Hee Haw?” it echoed back. He was alone.

Curling himself into a tight ball, he fell into a deep and troubled sleep.

translations.bemba: Ilyo Punda alekele ukubutuka, ninshi nakufiita, taishiibe uko aali. “Hee haw?” efyo aitootoosha mumfifi. “Hee Haw?” aumfwa iciunda. Ali eka. Aipeta, apona na mutulo utwinetwine utwamalangulushi.
translations.kaonde: Nanchi kimye kyoanyemene bwajinga bufuku kabiji uno Mbongolo walubijilemo. “Hee haa?” Winongotwelejile mwine mumfishi. “Hee haa?” waumvwine kilulumo kyajiwi janji. Wajinga bunke. Wivungile-vungile kabiji waponejile mutulo twalukatazho.
translations.lozi: Haito tuhela kumata, neseili busihu mi Mbongolo yalateha. “Hee hau?” ya shobotela lififi. “Hee Hau?” mulumo seuikutela. Neinzi inosi. Yaiputa-puta inge mbola, buloko tuna bwaiswala mi yalobala-maswe kalipilaelo.
translations.lunda: Impinji yalekeliyi kutemukayi, kwadin’ga kweyila hiwufuku kaha nawa wazhimbeli. “Hee haw?” wabidikili mumwidima. “Hee haw?” izu dindi datiyakeni chen’gi. Wadin’ga kankayindi. Wadizhin’gili, nakufwa tulu twakufwa.
translations.luvale: Omu echele kuthuta, kukasumuka kunatoko, hiufuku, kaha Chimbulu ajimbalile. Ayevetelele ufuku, “Hi-i hwaaa” Mungulungunda walizu lyenyi wevwikile uze ufuku likha, “Hiii hooo?” Apwile ukhawenyi. Alivungile nge ngunja nakusavala tulo twakuyandangila.
translations.nyanja: Pa nthawi imene analeka kuthamanga, unali usiku, Bulu anasowa. “Hee, hyu?” ananong’oneza ku mdima. Anafika pamathelo. Anayamba kusanduka ka bola kokhwima. Anagona mu tulo twatukulu twa mabvuto.
translations.tonga: Niyakaleka kulunduka mbongolo, akali masiku, imongolo yakasweka. “Hii, hoo.” Yakang’utauhya mumudima. “Hiii hooo?” yakaongolola. Yakali iilikke mbongolo. Yakalivwunga akoona. Yakoona pele yakalipengede mumoyo maningi.

lines.english: Donkey woke up to find a strange old man staring down at him. He looked into the old man’s eyes and started to feel a twinkle of hope.

translations.bemba: Punda ukubuuka asanga shikulu-bantu uo ashaishibe aleemulolesha. Alolesha mu menso yakwa shikulu-bantu amona ukuti kuti amwafwilisha.
translations.kaonde: Mbongolo byoabukile wataine shetu mukote ubena kumutala. Watajile mumenso auno shetu mukote kabiji kyamuletelejileko luketekelo.
translations.lozi: Mbongolo yazuha mi yafumana muuna-muhulu yanailubukezi. Yatalimela mwa meeto a muuna-muhulu yo ni kukala kuba ni sepo.
translations.lunda: Donki wahindukili nakuwana iyala wamukulumpi wakadi kwiluka nakumutala. Watalili mu mensu anona iyala nakutachika kutiya kukoleka.
translations.luvale: Chimbulu ahindukile nakuwana mukulwane walunga wakuhona kwijiva namunongamina nakumutala. Chimbulu atalile mumeso auze mukulwane walunga kaha evwile nakumuchima hwo-o.
translations.nyanja: Bulu anauka ndi kupeza nkhalamba ili kumuyangana. Anayangana mu maso a nkhalambayo ndi kuyamba kukhala ndi ciyembekezo.
translations.tonga: Niyakabuka Mbongolo, yakajana kadaala kaiimvwi munsi munsi kakamulanga. Imbongolo yakamulanga kumeso mudaala, akubona bulangizi.

lines.english:
Donkey went to stay with the old man, who taught him many different ways to survive.

Donkey listened and learned, and so did the old man. They helped each other, and they laughed together.

translations.bemba: Punda aile mu kwikala na shikulu-bantu, uwamufundile inshila sha kwikalilamo ishingi. Punda aaleumfwa no kusambilila, shikulu-bantu nao wine aaleesambilila. Baleyafwana no kusekela pamo.
translations.kaonde: Mbongolo waikelenga nauno mukote wamulume kabiji wamufunjishileko bintu byavula pa byo afwainwa kwikala mubwikalo. Mbongolo waumvwijilenga kabiji ne kufunda. Uno shetu mukote neaye waubilenga kintu-kimo. Bekwashanga ne kuseka pamo.
translations.lozi: Mbongolo yaya kuyoina ni muuna-muhulu yoo, yanailutile miinelo yeshutana-shutana mwa kuipiliseza. Mbongolo yateeleza ni kuituta zeñata hahulu mi ni muuna-muhulu yoo, niyena haitutani kuteeleza cwalo. Nebatusana ni kuseha hamoho.
translations.lunda: Donki wayili nakushakama nanona iyala, wamulezhili yuma yayivulu yakashakaminu. Donki washakamini nakutan’ga nanona iyala nawa. Adikwashili wumu namukwawu kaha nawa asehelin’ga hamu.
translations.luvale: Chimbulu ayile nakutwama nauze mukulwane walunga, uze amunangwile Chimbulu jijila jajivulu jakuyoyelamo. Chimbulu evwililile nakulilongesa, nge mwalingile nawa uze mukulwane walunga. Valikafwile, kaha vasehele nakuwahilila nawa hamwe.
translations.nyanja: Bulu anapita kukakhala ndi nkhalamba ija, imene inam’phunzitsa njila zambili zomwe angakhalilemo. Bulu anamvetsela ndi kuphunzila, cimodzi-modzi nkhalamba nayenso inamvetsela ndi kuphunzila. Anathandizana ndipo anaseka pamodzi.
translations.tonga: Imbongolo yakaunka kukukkala amudaala ooyu. Mudaala wakayiisya Mbongolo Ibupone. Mbongolo yakamvwa alimwi akwiiya. Bakali kugwasyanya kubeleka akuseka antoomwe.

lines.english: One morning, the old man asked Donkey to carry him to the top of a mountain.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo, shikulu-bantu aipwishe punda ukumusenda pa muulu wa lupili.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo lukeelo, uno mukote wamulume wabujile Mbongolo kumupaapa nekumutwala peulu ya mutumba.
translations.lozi: Kalizazi leliñwi, ili nako ya kakusasani, muuna-muhulu abulelela Mbongolo kuli imushimbe kumuisa fa halimu a lilundu.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu ona iyala wehweli Donki kumutwala hewulu da impidi
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe nachimene, uze mukulwane walunga alombele Chimbulu kumutwala helu lyaphili.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina m’mawa, nkhalamba inapempha Bulu kuti ainyamule kuipeleka pa mwamba pa phili.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba, mudaala wakalomba Mbongolo kuti imubbale akumutola kumulundu.

lines.english:
High up amongst the clouds they fell asleep.

Donkey dreamed that his mother was sick and calling to him.

And when he woke up…

translations.bemba: Pa muulu mu makumbi basendama. Punda aalotele ukuti banyina nabalwala kabili balemwita. Ilyo abukile…
translations.kaonde: Baile peulu pene pamakumbi, kabiji baponejile mutulo. Mbongolo walotele amba bainanji babeela kabiji babena kumwita. Kabiji byo abukile…
translations.lozi: Fahalimu a lilundu mwahalaa malu bautwa buloko mi balobala. Mbongolo yalola kuli bo maayona nebakula mi nebaibiza. Mi aito zuha…
translations.lunda: Hewulu damavwi henahana, wena akamini tulu. Donki waloteli neyi mama yindi nakati kaha nawa wadin’ga nakumubideka. Chahindukiliyi....
translations.luvale: Helu mukachi kamavwi valezumukilile mutulo, Chimbulu alotele naye naviji kaha ali nakumusanyika. Omu ahindukile…
translations.nyanja: Pamwamba pa mithambo, anagona. Bulu analota kuti amai ake anali kudwala ndipo anali kumuitana. Ndipo pamene anauka…
translations.tonga: Nibakasika atala akati kamakumbi, mudaala ambongolo bakoona. Mbongolo yakalota kuti banyina baciswa mpoona bakali kumwiita kuyanda lugwasyo. Naakabuka…

lines.english: … the clouds had disappeared along with his friend, the old man.

translations.bemba: … asangile amakumbi nayaluba pamo no munankwe, shikulu- bantu.
translations.kaonde: … makumbi azhimañene pamo namukwabo, aye mukote.
translations.lozi: … malu nasabonahali hamoho cwalo ni mulikanaayona, muuna-muhulu.
translations.lunda: … Mavwi hadin’ga hosi hamu nanona ibwambi dindi.
translations.luvale: … mavwi ajimukile nasepa lyenyi hamwe, uze mukulwane walunga.
translations.nyanja: … Mithambo inasowa pamozi ndi mzake, nkalamba ija.
translations.tonga: … wakajana makumbi azimaana antoomwe amwenzyinyina, mudaala.

lines.english: Donkey finally knew what to do.

translations.bemba: Panuma Punda alishibe ifyakucita.
translations.kaonde: Mbongolo ponkapo wasajile bya kuuba.
translations.lozi: Mbongolo, kasamulaho, yaziba sakueza.
translations.lunda: Donki welukili zhakwila haniyi impinji.
translations.luvale: Chimbulu jino ejivile vyakulinga.
translations.nyanja: Bulu pomaliza anadziwa zomwe anafunika kucita.
translations.tonga: Mbongolo yakacizyiba cakucita.

lines.english:
Donkey found his mother, alone and mourning her lost child. They stared at each other for a long time.

And then hugged each other very hard.

translations.bemba: Punda aasangile banyina, beka baleeloosha umwana uwalubile. Baliloleshanya akashita akatali. Elyo bakumbatana saana.
translations.kaonde: Mbongolo wataine ba inanji bunke saka bajila mwanabo waelekele. Basambakene ne kwitala kimye kyabaya. Ponkapo Mbongolo ne ba inanji bepakachijilemo kyakosa bingi.
translations.lozi: Mbongolo yayofumana bo maayona, balinosi inge basweli kulila mwanaabona yanalatehile. Sebailubukanela kanako yetelele. Nikuikumbatela hahulu.
translations.lunda: Donki waweni mama yindi kankayindi nakudila kuzhimbala chamwanindi. Aditalili swiii hampinji yayilehi. Kaha nawa adikumbatili nankashi.
translations.luvale: Chimbulu awanyine naye, ukhawenyi nalinongamina nakulinyenga hali mwanenyi. Valitalile usumbi halwola lwalunene. Nakulikwata mukasamba.
translations.nyanja: Bulu anapeza amai ake, okha ali kulilila mwana wao wosowa. Anapenyana kwakanthawi. Kenaka anakumbatilana mwamphamvu.
translations.tonga: Mbongolo yakajana banyina kabali balikke kabalila mwana wabo wakasweeka. Bakalangana kwaciindi cilamfwu. Nibakamana, bakakumbatana canguzu.

lines.english:
The donkey child and his mother have grown together and found many ways of living side by side.

Slowly, all around them, other families have started to settle.

translations.bemba: Umwana Punda na banyina balikulila pamo elyo kabili balisanga inshila ishingi ishakwikalilamo bwino pamo. Panoono-panoono, bonse ababashinguluka, na balupwa balitampa ukwikala bwino.
translations.kaonde: Mbongolo ne ba inanji bakomejile pamo ne kutana mashinda akwikajilamo. Bisemi bikwabo byatendekele pachepache kwiya nakushimika ne kwikala konka kobekalajila.
translations.lozi: Mbongolo ya mwana ni bo maayona bahula hamoho mi bafumana linzila zeshutana-shutana mwakupilela hamoho. Hanyinyani-hanyinyani, kaufela mabasi amañwi anabapani ni bona akala kutwaela ni kupila hande.
translations.lunda: Mwana wa Donki na mama yindi anakulili hamu kaha nawa anawani zhinzhila zhazhivulu zhakushakaminamu. Kufuma hana, antu amakwawu apompeli nakutachika kushakama hamu nawu.
translations.luvale: Uze mwana Chimbulu nanaye vanakolelela hamwe nakuwana jijila jajivulu jakutwamina hamwe. Chindende chindende mungalila yavo jithanga jikwavo jinaputuka kutwama muze.
translations.nyanja: Bulu ndi amai ake akulila pamozi ndipo anapeza njila zosiyana-siyana zokhalilamo pamodzi. Pang’ono pang’ono, onse anthu okhala pafupi nao, mabanja lao anayamba kukhala nao pamozi mopanda vuto leni-leni.
translations.tonga: Mbongolo abanyina bakomena antoomwe, bakajana nzila yakupona antoomwe. Asyoonto- syoonto bantu bakatalika kuyaka maanda munsi-munsi lyabo akukkala antoomwe.

title: It was a little girl who first saw the mysterious shape in the distance.

lines.english: Tingi lived with his grandmother.

translations.bemba: Tingi aaleikala na banakulu.
translations.kaonde: Tingi waikalanga na ba nkambo yanji babakazhi.
translations.lozi: Tingi naapila nibo kukwaahae babasali.
translations.lunda: Tindi weding’a nakushakama nankaka yindi wamubanda.
translations.luvale: Tingi atwamine nakhaka yenyi waphwevo.
translations.nyanja: Tingi amakhala ndi agogo ake akazi.
translations.tonga: Tingi wakali kukkala abaneene bakwe.

lines.english: He used to look after the cows with her.

translations.bemba: Aaleafwa banakulu ukucema iŋombe.
translations.kaonde: Balamanga bañombe pamo ne ba nkambo yanji babakazhi.
translations.lozi: Nalisanga likomu ni bona.
translations.lunda: Weding’a nakuhemba ang’ombi na nkaka yindi.
translations.luvale: Apwilenga nakulama vangombe hamwe nakhaka yenyi waphwevo.
translations.nyanja: Amakonda kuweta ng’ombezo.
translations.tonga: Antoomwe abanene bakwe, bakali kuzilanganya ŋombe.

lines.english: One day the soldiers came.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo abashilika balishile.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo bashilikale baishile.
translations.lozi: Lizazi leliñwi masole bataha.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu mashidika enzili.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe maswalale vejile.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina asilikali anabwela.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba kwakasika basikalumamba.

lines.english: They took the cows away.

translations.bemba: Baasendele iŋombe no kuya nasho.
translations.kaonde: Bebatambwile bañombe bonsetu.
translations.lozi: Babaamuha likomo ni kulishimba.
translations.lunda: Asendeli ang’ombi nakuya nawu.
translations.luvale: Vambachile vangombe nakuya navo.
translations.nyanja: Anatenga ng’ombezo kupita nazo.
translations.tonga: Basikalumamba bakazibinga ŋombe akuzyitola.

lines.english: Tingi and his grandmother ran away and hid.

translations.bemba: Tingi na banakulu baalibutwike babelama.
translations.kaonde: Tingi ne ba nkambo yanji babakazhi banyemene ne kufyama.
translations.lozi: Tingi ni bo kukwaahae babasali ba mata ni kuiyopata.
translations.lunda: Tingi na nkaka yindi wamubanda atemukili nakuswama.
translations.luvale: Tingi nakhaka yenyi waphwevo vachinyine nakuswama.
translations.nyanja: Tingi ndi agogo ake adathawa ndi kubisala.
translations.tonga: Tingi abaneene bakwe bakatija akuya kuyuba.

lines.english: They hid in the bush until night.

translations.bemba: Baabeleme mu mpanga mpaka bwaila.
translations.kaonde: Bafyamine mungye kufikatu ne bufuku.
translations.lozi: Baipata mwa mushitu kufitela busihu.
translations.lunda: Aswamini mumpata kushika niwufuku.
translations.luvale: Vaswamine mumusenge kuheta nakuufuku.
translations.nyanja: Adabisala kuthengo mpaka usiku.
translations.tonga: Bakaliyubide musyokwe limwi kwasiya.

lines.english: Then the soldiers came back.

translations.bemba: Abashilika balishile na kabili.
translations.kaonde: Bashilikale babwelele.
translations.lozi: Cwale masole bakuta hape.
translations.lunda: Mashidika afuntili cheng’i.
translations.luvale: Kaha maswalale vejile cheka.
translations.nyanja: Kenako asilikaliwo anabwelela.
translations.tonga: Basikalumamba bakajoka alimwi.

lines.english: Grandmother hid Tingi under the leaves.

translations.bemba: Banakulu baafishile Tingi panshi ya mabuula.
translations.kaonde: Ba nkambo yanji bamufile Tingi mumabula.
translations.lozi: Bo kukwaahae Tingi babasali bamupata mwatasi amatali.
translations.lunda: Nkaka wamubanda waswekeli Tingi mumafu.
translations.luvale: Khaka yenyi waphwevo aswekele Tingi kwishi ya mafwo.
translations.nyanja: Agogo adabisa Tingi pansi pamasamba.
translations.tonga: Baneene bakamusisa Tingi kunsi amatuvwu.

lines.english: One of the soldiers put his foot right on him, but he kept quiet.

translations.bemba: Umushilika umo aanyantile Tingi, lelo Tingi aalifye tondolo.
translations.kaonde: Mushilikale umo wamunyanchile pano bino aye waikeletu nzoo.
translations.lozi: Alimuñwi wa masole habeya lihutu lahae fahalimu ahae, kono hakutumana.
translations.lunda: Mushidika wumu wamudatili namwendu, ilang’a wamweneni hohu.
translations.luvale: Liswalale umwe amulyachile lihinji oloze Tingi aholele kulu.
translations.nyanja: M’modzi wa asilikali adaika phazi lake pa iye, koma iye adakhala cete.
translations.tonga: Umwi wabasikalumamba wakalyata akali Tingi, pele Tingi wakaumuna wii.

lines.english: When it was safe, Tingi and his grandmother came out.

translations.bemba: Lintu abashilika baile, Tingi na banakulu balifisamwike.
translations.kaonde: Pakumona amba bashilikale baya, Tingi ne bankambo yanji balupukile.
translations.lozi: Hasekubile hande, Tingi ni bo kukwaahae babasali ba zwa mwateñi.
translations.lunda: Chikwawundili, Tingi na nkaka yindi wamubanda afumini
translations.luvale: Omu valingile vaze maswalale vanayi, Tingi nakhaka yenyi vafumine haze vaswamine.
translations.nyanja: Kutakhala bwino, Tingi ndi agogo ake adatuluka.
translations.tonga: Nibakaunka basikalumamba, Tingi abaneene bakayubuluka.

lines.english: They crept home very quietly.

translations.bemba: Baile ku ŋanda umutalalila.
translations.kaonde: Bakalabiletu kishinshi nekutwela munzubo.
translations.lozi: Bananalela kwa ndu kusina kupanga lilata.
translations.lunda: Abalakatili kwitala lufuchi-lufuchi.
translations.luvale: Vatambukile chindende chindende muuholela nakuya kwimbo.
translations.nyanja: Anabwelela kunyumba mwakacete-cete.
translations.tonga: Mukaumu-umu bakasobelela kuya kuŋanda yabo.

title: Tingi lived with his grandmother.

lines.english: It is dry.

translations.bemba: Taileloka.
translations.kaonde: Kwauma.
translations.lozi: Kuomile.
translations.lunda: Kunomi.
translations.luvale: Kunomu.
translations.nyanja: Ndikouma.
translations.tonga: Nkuyumu.

lines.english: The sun is hot.

translations.bemba: Akasuba nakakaba.
translations.kaonde: Mute wasama.
translations.lozi: Lizazi la cisa.
translations.lunda: Mwaana unatati.
translations.luvale: Musana weye kunazumu.
translations.nyanja: Dzuwa ndilotentha.
translations.tonga: Izuba lyabalisya kulapya.

lines.english: It is windy.

translations.bemba: Umwela uleepuupa.
translations.kaonde: Kuji mwela.
translations.lozi: Kunani moya.
translations.lunda: Kudi impepela.
translations.luvale: Kuli peho.
translations.nyanja: Kuli Mphepho yokuntha.
translations.tonga: Kuli muwo.

lines.english: It is cloudy.

translations.bemba: Kuli amakumbi.
translations.kaonde: Kuji kikumbi.
translations.lozi: Kunani malu.
translations.lunda: Kudi mavu.
translations.luvale: Kuli mavwi.
translations.nyanja: Kuli mitambo.
translations.tonga: Kuli makumbi.

lines.english: It is cold.

translations.bemba: Nakutalala.
translations.kaonde: Kwatalala.
translations.lozi: Kwa bata.
translations.lunda: Kunatuti.
translations.luvale: Kunatutu.
translations.nyanja: Ndikodzidzila.
translations.tonga: Kulatontola.

lines.english: It is raining.

translations.bemba: Imfula ileeloka.
translations.kaonde: Mvula ibena kunoka.
translations.lozi: Pula yanela.
translations.lunda: Yinakunoka.
translations.luvale: Vula ili nakunokha.
translations.nyanja: Mvula ilokwa.
translations.tonga: Imvwula ilawa.

lines.english: There is thunder.

translations.bemba: Ileepanta.
translations.kaonde: Mvula ibena kupaata.
translations.lozi: Kunani mishika.
translations.lunda: Kudi muvesu.
translations.luvale: Kuli mikalateta.
translations.nyanja: Kuli mphezi.
translations.tonga: Kuli kuzuma.

lines.english: I see a rainbow.

translations.bemba: Namona umukolamfula.
translations.kaonde: Namona kakongolo.
translations.lozi: Ni bona nambwamutalati.
translations.lunda: Namoni Kansulun’gunda.
translations.luvale: Ngunamono khongolo.
translations.nyanja: Ndili kuona utawaleza.
translations.tonga: Ndabona vwilicoongo.

title: It is dry.

lines.english: Andiswa watched the boys play soccer. She wished that she could join them. She asked the coach if she can practise with them.

translations.bemba: Andiswa aaleetamba abalumendo baleeteya umupila waku makasa. Aaleekabila ukuteya na beena. Aalilombele bakafundisha ba mupila nga kuti bamusuminisha ukuteyako.
translations.kaonde: Andiswa watambilenga bansongwalume saka bateya mpila ya kumaulu. Walangulukilenga inge kyakonsheka kutwelamo nekuteya nabo mpila. Walombele luusa amba inge kyakonsheshe kumuswisha kuteya nabo.
translations.lozi: Andiswa nabuha bashimani inge balaha mbola yamahutu. Nanani takazo ya kubapala ni bona. Hakupa muluti kuli haitute ni bona.
translations.lunda: Andiswa watambilen’ga anyaana amayala anakwasa nguja. Wedin’ga nakuken’ga nindi ekali wumu wawu. Wehwili ilomboli adilon’geshi nawu.
translations.luvale: Andiswa apwile nakutala vanyike vamalunga vapwile nakwasa ngunja yakumahinji. Asakile kachi aheme navo. Ahulishile mukakunangula ngunja nge nahase kulilongesela hamwe navo.
translations.nyanja: Andiswa anapenyelela anyamata akusowela mpila. Analakalaka kusowela nao. Anapempha atsogoleli amasowela ngati angaloledwe kusowela nao.
translations.tonga: Andiswa wakali kulangilizya basankwa kabasobana mupila. Wakali kulombozya kuti inga wabasangana bumwi buzuba. Wakalomba basikusobanya mupila kuti asangane basimupila kutegwa awalo aume antoomwe ambabo.

lines.english: The coach put his hands on his hips. “At this school, only boys are allowed to play soccer,” he said.

translations.bemba: Bakafundisha baabikile amaboko mu musana. Basosele ati, “Pano pa sukulu, abalumendo bekafye ebasuminishiwa ukuteya umupila waku makasa.”
translations.kaonde: Ntangi wakwachile maboko mumusana. Wamwambijile amba, “Pauno sukuulu baswishatu kuteya mpila ke banyike babalume kwapwa.”
translations.lozi: Muluti wa mbola haiswala mwa manoka. “Fa sikolo se, ki bashimani feela baba lumelelizwe kubapala mbola ya mahutu,” habulela.
translations.lunda: Ona ilomboli wadikwatili mumbunda. “Hanu hashikola amayala hohu diwu atezha kwasa nguja,” nindi
translations.luvale: Mukakunangula ngunja ahakile mavoko enyi hambunda nakuhanjika ngwenyi, “Hano hashikola, malunga kaha vakhiko vetavisa kwasa ngunja yakumahinji.”
translations.nyanja: Atsogoleli amasowela anaika manja yao muciuno cake. “Pano pasukulu, anyamata okha ndiye ololedwa kusowela mpila,” anatelo.
translations.tonga: Basikusobanya mupila bakalijata akasolo. “Aano acikolo, ibana basankwa mbebazumizidwe kuuma mupila” bakaamba.

lines.english: The boys told her to go play netball. They said that netball is for girls and soccer is for boys. Andiswa was upset.

translations.bemba: Abalumendo bamwebele ukuya mu kuteya umupila waku minwe. Baasosele ukutiila umupila waku minwe ewabakashana. Andiswa aalifulilwe.
translations.kaonde: Banyike babalume bamubujile kuya nakuteya mpila yakumaboko. Bamubujile amba mpila yakumaboko yoya banyike babakazhi kabiji mpila ya kumaulu ya banyike babalume kwapwa. Andiswa wazhingijile bingi.
translations.lozi: Bashimani ba mubulelela kuli hayo bapala mbola ya mazoho. Bamubulelela bali, mbola ya mazoho kiya basizani mi ya mahutu kiya bashimani. Andiswa nanyemile.
translations.lunda: Amayala amulezheli kuya nakwasa nguja yakumakasa. Amulezheli nawu nguja yakumakasa yawambanda na nguja yakunyendu ya mayala.
translations.luvale: Vaze vanyike vamalunga vamulwezele kuya nakwasa ngunja yakumavoko. Vahanjikile ngwavo ngunja yakumahinji yapwa yamalunga, shina yakumavoko ikhiko yamaphwevo. Andiswa kasuulukile nachoko.
translations.nyanja: Anyamata anamuuza kuti akasowele masowela ampila wamanja. Ananena kuti mpila wamanja ndi wa atsikana ndipo mpila wa miyendo ndi wa anyamata. Andiswa anakhumudwa.
translations.tonga: Basankwa bakamwaambila kuti aunke kukuuma mupila wamaanza nkaambo mupila wamaulu ngwa basankwa. Aako kaambo kakamunyemya Andiswa.

lines.english: The next day, the school had a big soccer match. The coach was worried because his best player was sick and could not play.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, isukulu lyali no kuteya ubwangalo bwamupila waku makasa uukalamba. Bakafundisha baalisakamene pantu umulumendo uwaishibishe ukuteya umupila aalifililwe ukuteya pantu aalilwale.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jalondejilepo, sukuulu yajinga nampila ikatampe. Bantangi batangijilanga kipanyi kyampila baumvwine bingi moyo mambo nkaizhi wabo mwine wabelele kabiji kechi wakonsheshe kuteyane.
translations.lozi: Lizazi lelitatama, sikolo sa bona nesinani kangisano yetuna ya mbola ya mahutu. Muluti wa mbola ya mahutu naikalezwi kabakala kuli mubapali wahae yomutuna nakulile mi nasakoni kubapala.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dasinsilimu, shikola yedin’ga nakukwesezheka munguja chachineni. Ilomboli wadakameneni mulon’ga umu windi mukanguja akuhwelelayi wakatili kaha nawa hatwesheli kwasaku.
translations.luvale: Lyacheleko, shikola yapwilenga nakulipecha chachinene changunja yakumahinji. Mukakunangula ngunja alizakaminyine mwomwo muthu wenyi wakwijiva chikuma ngunja apwile nakukola kaha kahashile kuhemako.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lotsatila, sukulu inakhala ndi masowela akulu ampila. Asogoleli ampila anadankhawa cifukwa katswili wao wampila anadwala ndiponso sanakwanitse kusewela mpila.
translations.tonga: Buzuba bwakatobela acikolo kwaali musobano mupati. Bayi ba mupila bakali tyompedwe nkaambo kakuti musankwa ngubakali kusyoma wakalicisidwe, aboobo taakali kukonzya kuuma mupila.

lines.english: Andiswa ran to the coach and begged him to let her to play. The coach was not sure what to do. Then he decided that Andiswa could join the team.

translations.bemba: Andiswa aabutukiile kuli bakafundisha no kubapaapaata ukuti bamusuminishe ukuteyako umupila. Bakafundisha tabaishibe ifyakucita. Lelo basukile basuminisha Andiswa ukuteyako umupila.
translations.kaonde: Andiswa wanyemejile kubantangi batangijilenga kipanyi kya mpila ya kumaulu nekwibapopwela amba bamutwezhemo. Nanchi baswishishe amba Andiswa atwelemo ne kuteya na kipanyi.
translations.lozi: Andiswa hamatela ku muluti wa mbola ya mahutu ni kuyo mukupa kuli hamulumeleze kubapala. Muluti nasazibi sakueza. Kasamulaho, hamulumeleza kuli hakone kubapala ni babapali babañwi.
translations.lunda: Andiswa watemukilili ku ona ilomboli nakumulomba kulonda atumi nguja. Ilomboli helukili zhakwilaku. Dichi wachitezheli kasi Andiswa atumi nguja namukanka windi.
translations.luvale: Andiswa athuchililile kuli mukakunangula ngunja nakumulembelela amwitavile kwasa ngunja. Oloze mukakunangula ngunja kejivile vyakulingako. Kutwala muze etavilile Andiswa kuhema ize ngunja yakumahinji.
translations.nyanja: Andiswa anathamagila kwa atsogoleli amasowela ampila kupapata kuti amuvomeleze asowele. Musogoleli sanadziwe cocita. Anaganiza kuti Andiswa angasowele mpila.
translations.tonga: Andiswa wakazuzila ku bayi ba mupila akubalombai kuti bamunjizye mumusobano. Bayi ba mupila tiibakazyi cakucita aciindi eeco, mpoona bakamuzuminzya kuti aume mupila antoomwe abasankwa.

lines.english: The game was tough. Nobody had scored a goal by half time.

translations.bemba: Ubwangalo bwalikosele. Tapaali abaingisheko akakato mpaka inshita ya kutuusha.
translations.kaonde: Mpila yakosele. Kafwako batwezhezhepo golone kufikatu nepakachi kakimye kyobebapele kuteya mpila.
translations.lozi: Mbola neitiile luli. Hakuna niyana nwisize nihaiba nako haneifitile fahali.
translations.lunda: Nguja yakoleli nankashi. Hikwadin’ga wen’gizhili ngujaku muchibalu chatachiku.
translations.luvale: Ngunja ize yapwile yayikalu. Kuheta halwola lwakunoka nava vengishile vauchi.
translations.nyanja: Masowela anali obvuta. Kulibe anagoletsa kufika pakati panthawi yamasewela.
translations.tonga: Musobano wakali muyumu. Kunyina bakanywinsyide pe nicakamana cibeela cakusaanguna.

lines.english: During the second half of the match one of the boys passed the ball to Andiswa. She moved very fast towards the goal post. She kicked the ball hard and scored a goal.

translations.bemba: Mu cipande ca bubili icabwangalo, Andiswa aalisendele umupila. Aalibutukishe saana ukulungama ku cipanda. Andiswa aalipantishe umupila no kwingisha akakato.
translations.kaonde: Pa kimye kyobabwelelemo jabubiji nsongwalume wamupanchijile mpila Andiswa. Wanyemene lubilo lwine nekuya kukipanda. Andiswa wapanchile mpila ne kutwezha.
translations.lozi: Mwa nako ya kalulo yabubeli, mushimani yomuñwi halahela mbola ku Andiswa. Andiswa hamatela kapili-pili fabukaufi ni linwisezo la mbola. Hailaha mbola katata mi hainwisa.
translations.lunda: Muchibalu chamuchiyedi, mayala amwinkelihu nguja Andiswa. Wayendesheli swayi kwakwihi na goolo. Wayitumini nguja nan’govu nichiyen’gilili.
translations.luvale: Kuheta muchihanda chamuchivali, umwe wavaze vanyike vamalunga ahanyine ngunja kuli Andiswa. Andiswa athuchile nayo lumbushi kuheta kujiphanda jangolo. Ashile ize ngunja nakwingisa.
translations.nyanja: Munthawi yaciwili yampila mnyamata m’modzi anapatsila Andiswa mpila. Mtsikana anathamanga mwamsanga kupita kugolo. Anamenya mpila mwamphamvu ndikugoletsa cigoli.
translations.tonga: Mucibeela cabili camusobano, umwi musankwa wakazi kumupa mupila Andiswa, wakaubweza mupila akutiyaanina kugoolo, wakauma mupila mane muntangala akunywinsya.

lines.english: The crowd went wild with joy. Since that day, girls were also allowed to play soccer at the school.

translations.bemba: Ibumba lyalitemenwe nganshi. Ukutula pali bulya ubushiku, abakashana baalibasuminishe ukuteya umupila waku makasa.
translations.kaonde: Bantu bonse baumvwine bulongo. Kufumatu pajonkaja juuba, bansongwakazhi bebaswishishenga kuteya mpila yakumaulu pasukuulu.
translations.lozi: Sicaba kaufela sa tabela ni kunyakalala hahulu. Kuzwa lona lizazi leo, basizani bakala kulumelezwa kulaha mbola ya mahutu.
translations.lunda: Imbumba dawantu dadikuwili chikupu nakuwahilila. Kufuma henohu, ambanda niwena ayitezhelen’ga kutuma nguja.
translations.luvale: Lizavu lyawahililile. Kufuma vene lize likumbi, vanyike vamapwevo navakhiko vavetavishile kwasanga ngunja yamahinji haze hashikola.
translations.nyanja: Anthu openyelela mpila anakondwela kwambili. Kucokela pa tsiku limenelo, atsikana analoledwa kusewela masowela ampila pa sukuklu.
translations.tonga: Yoonse mbunga yakali kweebelela yakasotoka mujulu cakukkomana. Kuzwa buzuba oobo bana basimbi mucikolo bakazuminzyigwa kuuma mupila wkumaulu.

title: Andiswa watched the boys play soccer. She wished that she could join them. She asked the coach if she can practise with them.

lines.english:
Odongo and Apiyo lived in the city with their father.

They looked forward to the holidays. Not just because school was closed, but because they went to visit their grandmother. She lived in a fishing village near a large lake.

translations.bemba: Odongo na Apiyo baaleikala na bawishi ku kalaale. Lyonse baaleekabila saana ukuba pa cuuti. Tepamulandufye wakuti baaleisala isukulu lelo nico baalefwaisha ukuya mu kutandala kuli banakulu. Banakulu baaleikala mu mushi uwabalondo besabi uwali mupepi na cibeemba icikulu.
translations.kaonde: Odongo ne Apiyo baikalanga mutaunyi ne bashabo. Bakebelenga bingi kuya nakukokoloka. Kechi namambo akuuba amba bashinkile sukuulu ne, bino ke kuuba amba bakebelenga kuya nakupempula ba nkambo yabo babakazhi. Ba nkambo yabo babakazhi baikalanga mumuzhi mwafwanga masabi kubwipi nakizhiba kikatampe.
translations.lozi: Odongo ni Apiyo nebapila hamoho ni bo ndataabona kwa tolopo. Nebalata hahulu nako ya pumulo. Neisi feela kuli likolo nelikwala, kono kabakala kuli nebayo potelanga bo kukwaabona. Bo kukwaabona nebapila mwamunzi wo kwatuko a lisa lelituna mone kuyambiwanga litapi.
translations.lunda: Odongo na Apiyo adin’ga nakushakama mumbaka na Tata yawu. Adin’ga nakuken’ga impinji yakunoka. Bayi mulon’ga wakwenzela cha shikola hohuku ilan’ga aken’gelen’ga Kuya nakumona nkaka yawu wamubanda. Wadin’ga nakushakama mwilun’ga datufuta twanshi kwakwihi na kalon’ga.
translations.luvale: Odongo na Apiyo vatwaminenga mumbaka nasevo. Vapwilenga nakutalilila kumakumbi akunokha. Kechi nge mwomwo vanasoko shikolako, oloze mwomwo vayile nakumona khaka yavo waphwevo. Khaka yavo ou atwaminenga hamusumba kwakamwihi nakalwiji wamunene.
translations.nyanja: Odongo ndi Apiyo anali kukhala mu tauni ndi atate awo. Amakondwelela masiku acuti. Sikuti Kamba kakuti masukulu anatsekela, koma cifukwa amapita kwa agogo awo. Agogo awo anali kukhala m’mudzi wogwila nsomba pafupi ndi nyanja yaiukulu.
translations.tonga: Odongo alimwi a Apiyo bakali kukkala mudolopo antoomwe abausyi. Mbokuli kuti bakalizyi kuti bakeelede kuunka kuli baneenenyina ciindi camupumuno, bakakkala kabalangila mupumuno kuti usike. Bakaapanyina bakali kukkala mumunzi waba sikuzela nswi munsi munsi akawiya.

lines.english:
Odongo and Apiyo were excited because it was time to visit their grandmother again.

The night before, they packed their bags and got ready for the long journey to her village. They could not sleep and talked the whole night about the holiday.

translations.bemba: Odongo na Apiyo baalisansamwike saana ilyo inshita yakuya mu kutandalila banakulu yafikile na kabili. Ubushiku balaliile ubulendo, baalongele ifipe fyabo ukupekanya ubulendo ubutali ubwakuya ku mushi. Ubo bushiku, tabaaleele iyo, baaceseshefye ukulanda pali cuuti.
translations.kaonde: Odongo ne Apiyo basangalele bingi mambo kyajinga kimye kyakuya nakupempula ba nkambo yabo babakazhi jikwabo. Bufuku bwa kuuba amba kesha bakayanga balongele byola byabo kabiji benengezhele kuya lwendo lwa kumuzhi kwaba nkambo yabo babakazhi. Nanchi abo bufuku kechi balajiile ne namambo akuuba besambilengatu pa mambo moba akukokoloka.
translations.lozi: Odongo ni Apiyo nebatabile kakuli neseili nako ya kuya kuyo potela bo kukwaabona babasali hape. Busihu bwa kuzuha lizazi la kufunduka musipili tuna wo, baitukiseza ni kulonga libyana zabona mwa mikotana. Bapalelwa kulobala mi baambola busihu kaufela kaza musipili wabona wa kuya kwa pumulo.
translations.lunda: Odongo na Apiyo adin’ga namuzan’galu mulon’ga yadin’ga impinji yakuya nakutala nkaka yawu wamubanda chen’gi. Adiwayishili wufuku wena wuna kulonda ayi nakutala nkaka yawu wamubanda kumukala. Hiyatwesheliku kukama kuhosha insan’gu ya Kuya nakunoma hohu wufuku wezhima.
translations.luvale: Odongo na Apiyo vawahililile chikuma mwomwo lwapwile lwola lwakutambukila kakha yavo cheka. Shimbu kanda kuchenga, valongejekele jingonga javo nakulizanga kutambuka ize thunda yayisuku yakuya kwimbo lyakhaka yavo. Kavasavalileko, ufuku wosena wakushimutwila kunokha chavo.
translations.nyanja: Odongo ndi Apiyo anali okondwela cifukwa inali nthawi yokayendelanso agogo awo. Usiku wa ulendo usanacitike, analongelato katundu kukonzekela ulendo wautali kupita kumudzi. Usiku uyu, anawa, sanagone ndipo anacezela kulankhula usiku wonse pa za cuti.
translations.tonga: Odongo alimwi aa Apiyo bakalikkomene nkaambo kakuti cakali ciindi cakuyakukuswaya bakaapanyina alimwi. Buzuba bwakweenda kabutanasika, bakalongela zyibbudu zyabo alimwi akukkala kabalibambilide kunyamuka kuya kumunzi buzuba butobela. Kwiina nibakoona masiku oonse, bakali kwiile kwaambaula zyijatikizya mupumuno wabo.

lines.english:
Early the next morning, they left for the village in their father’s car.

They drove past mountains, wild animals and tea plantations. They counted cars and sang songs.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelopo uluceeloceelo, baimine ubulendo bwakuya ku mushi muli motoka yaba wishi. Mu nshila, bapitile mumpili, bakumenye ne nama shampanga kabili baapitile na mumabala ya tii. Mu nshila balepeenda bamotoka no kwiimba inyimbo.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jalondejilepo lukeelo keelo, banyamukile kuya kumuzhi mu motoka yaba shabo. Bapichile mitumba, mu banyama bamungye nemu jisaka ja bichi byobalengelako masamba. Babajilenga myotoka ne kwimba nyimbo.
translations.lozi: Lizazi lelitatama, ili nako ya kakusasani, bakala musipili wabona ni moota yabo ndataabona. Bafita mwa malundu, mwahalaa lifolofolo ni mwa masimu amatuna mokucezwi licalo za tii. Nebasweli kubala limota ni kuopela lipina.
translations.lunda: Chiyashikili intetemena anyamukili mumotoka ya Tata yawu nakuya kumukala. Endesheli kuhita muzhimpidi, tunyama na matempa amaneni. Achindilen’ga nyotoka na kwimba tumina.
translations.luvale: Lyacheleko nachimene, vakatukile muminyau yasevo. Vahichile mujiphili, mutunyama vamuchipapa namande atiyi. Valavilenga jiminyau ungeji wosena nakwimba myaso nawa.
translations.nyanja: M’mamawa kutaca, ulendo unapangika wopita kumudzi mgalimoto ya atate awo. Anayenda kupitilila maphili, nyama zamuthengo ndi minda ikulu-ikulu kwambili. Ana awa, anawelenga magalimoto munjila ndipo anayimba nyimbo.
translations.tonga: Mafwumo-fwumo buzuba bwakatobela, bakanyamuka kuya ku munzi mumootokala wa bausyi. Bakainda mumalundu alimwi amumyuunda mipati mobalima zyisyango mbuli zyisamu zyatii. Bakali kuyaabubala myootokala kumwi kabaimba anyiimbo.

lines.english: After a while, the children were tired and fell asleep.

translations.bemba: Ilyo paapitile nshita, abaana baalinakile bapona na mutulo.
translations.kaonde: Pakupitapo ka kimye, banyike bakokele ne kuponena mutulo.
translations.lozi: Hasekufitile nakonyana, banana ba, bakatala mi balobala.
translations.lunda: Chiyahitili impinji anyana azeyeli nakukama.
translations.luvale: Omu mwahichile kashimbu, vaze vanyike vazeyele kaha valezumukilile mutulo.
translations.nyanja: Patapita nthawi, ana awa analema ndipo anagona.
translations.tonga: Nikwakainda kaindi, bana bakakatala amana bakoona.

lines.english:
Father woke up Odongo and Apiyo as they arrived in the village.

They found Nyar-Kanyada, their grandmother, resting on a mat under a tree.

Nyar-Kanyada in Luo, means ‘daughter of the people of Kanyada’. She was a strong and beautiful woman.

translations.bemba: Ilyo baafikile ku mushi, bawishi bashibwishe Odongo na Apiyo. Baasangile banakulu ba Nyar-Kanyada naabasendama pa mpasa mwisamba lya cimuti. Ishina lya Nyar-Kanyada mu ci Luo lipilibula ukuti, umwana wa beena Kanyanda. Ba Nyar-Kanyada baali abayemba saana kabili abakosa.
translations.kaonde: Byobafile kumuzhi ba taata bebabushishe ba Odongo ne Apiyo. Ba ataine ba nkambo yabo babakazhi abo bajizina ja Nyar-Kanyada, saka baikala nakukokoloka pakilalo munshi ya kichi. Nyar-Kanyada mumulaka wa Luo kyalumbulula amba “mwana wamukazhi wabena Kanyada”. Ba Nyar-Kanyada bajinga bainetu bakosa kabiji ba laamba.
translations.lozi: Bo ndatae Odongo ni Apiyo babazusa hase bafitile mwahae yabo kukwaabona. Nebafumani bo kukwaabona, bo Nyar-Kanyada inge baipumulisa fa museme mwatasaa kota. Libizo le la Nyar-Kanyada mwa mushobo wa si Luo litalusa kuli, “mwana wa musali wa batu bakwa Kanyada”. Neeli yanatihile mi yo munde.
translations.lunda: Tata yawu wayihindwishili a Odongo na Apiyo chashikiliwu mumukala. Aweni Nyar-Kanyada nkaka yawu nakunoma hachisalu mwishina da mutondu. Nyar-Kanyada mumuchidi wa Luo kwalumbuluka, ‘mwana wamubanda wa wantu zha Kanyada’ wadin’ga wan’govu mukamama wamuwahi nawa.
translations.luvale: Sevo ahindwile Odongo na Apiyo omu vahetele mwimbo. Vawanyine Nyar-Kanyada, khaka yavo, ali nakunokha hachisalo mwishi yamutondo. Nyar-Kanyada muchitundu cha Luo, “chalumbunuka mwana vathu vaku Kanyada”. Apwile phwevo wangolo kaha wamwaza.
translations.nyanja: Pamene anafika mu mudzi, atate awo anautsa Odongo ndi Apiyo. Anapeza Nyar-Kanyada, ambuya awo aligone pa mpasa munsi mwa mutengo. Nyar-Kanyada muciluo, atanthauza kuti “mwana wamkazi wa a Kanyada.” Ambuya awo anali muzimai wampamvu, ndipo wokongola kwambili.
translations.tonga: Bausyi bakabusya Odongo alimwi aa Apiyo nibakasika kumunzi. Bakabajana banyinakulu ba Nyar-Kanyada, balalyookezya amunseme munsi acisamu. Izyina eeli lya Nyar-Kanyada mumulaka wa Luo, caamba kuti “Musimbi mwana abantu baku Kanyada”. Wakali mucembele uulimvwide alimwi mubotu.

lines.english:
Nyar-Kanyada welcomed them into the house and danced around the room singing with joy.

Her grandchildren were excited to give her the presents they brought from the city.

“First open my gift,” said Odongo.

“No, my gift first!” said Apiyo.

translations.bemba: Ba Nyar-Kanyada balibapokeleele mu ŋanda no kutampa ukushana no kwimba ne nsaansa ishiingi saana. Abeshikulu balisansamwike saana no kupeela banakulu ifyabupe babaleeteele ukufuma ku kalaale. Odongo aasosele ati, “Balileenipo ukwisula icabupe imuleteele.” “Awe, balileenipo icabupe imuleteele!” efyasosele Apiyo.
translations.kaonde: Ba Nyar-Kanyada batambulwijile bankana babo ne kwibatwezha munzubo kabiji bazhilenga nekwimba na lusekelo. Bankana babo basekejile bingi nekwibapa byabupe byobebasendejile kufuma kutaunyi. Odongo yewajinga mutanshi amba, “Tendekelaipo kushinkula bupe bwami,” Apiyo naye amba, “Ine, tendekelaipo bupe bwami!”
translations.lozi: Nyar-Kanyada abaamuhela hande baenyi bahae ni kubina inge apotoloha-potoloha mwa ndu ni kuopela tupina katabo. Baikulu bahae Nyar-Kanyada nebatabile hahulu mi bamutambeka limpo zahae zene bamulwalezi zenezwelela kwa tolopo. “Kakukala hamukwaulule mpo yezwa kuna,” abulela Odongo. “Baatili, hamukalele yaka pili,” abulela Apiyo.
translations.lunda: Nyar-Kanyada wayishikizhili mwitala kaha nawa wembili na kuhanga kamina kalumwen’gu. Ezhikulu zhindi atiyili chachiwahi kumwinka ma wana afumini nawu kumbaka. “Chatachi, enzununaki wana wami,” nindi Odongo. Inehi wana chata kwenzununa wikali wami!” nindi Apiyo.
translations.luvale: Nyar-Kanyada avatambwile muze muzuvo yenyi nakukina nakujinguluka muze kusolola kuwahilila. Vazukulu jenyi vawahililile hakumuhana ovyo vamunehelele kufuma kumbaka. Odongo ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Chatete sokolola wana wami.” Kwivwa Apiyo nawa muze ngwenyi, “Chiku, vangila wami!”
translations.nyanja: Ambuya anakondwela kwambili ndipo anavina vina, nayimba nyimbo zacisangalalo. Azukulu nawo anakondwela kwambili, ndipo anapasa ambuya awo mpaso zomwe anawabwelesela. “Yambililani kusegula yanga mpaso,” anati Odongo. “Yambililani yanga,” anati Apiyo.
translations.tonga: Nyar-Kanyada wakabatambula beenzu bakwe muŋanda yakwe alimwi kwakaba kuzyana akwiimba cakukkomana mukati kaŋanda. Bazyukulu bakwe bakalimvwa kukkomana kubaa ciindi cakubapa zyipego nzyibakabaletela kuzwa kudolopo. “Kusaanguna amujule cipego cangu,” wakaamba Odongo. “Peepe, musaangune kujula cangu anzyina,” wakaamba Apiyo.

lines.english: After she opened the presents, Nyar-Kanyada blessed her grandchildren in a traditional way.

translations.bemba: Panuma yakwisula ifyabupe, ba Nyar-Kanyada baapaalile abeshikulu babo ukulingana ne ntambi.
translations.kaonde: Panyuma ya kushinkula byabupe, ba Nyar-Kanyada bapesheshe bankana babo mukisho kyabo.
translations.lozi: Hase bafelize kukwaulula limpo zabona, bo kukwaabona ba bafuyola ka siizo.
translations.lunda: Henohu Kanda enzununi ma wana indi, Nyar-Kanyada wayikiswilili ezhima wawu muchisemwa.
translations.luvale: Omu akumishile kusokolola mawana, Nyar-Kanyada akiswile vazukulu jenyi mwaya chisemwa.
translations.nyanja: Pomwe anasegula mpaso, Ambuya awo anawadalisa azukulu awo monga mwa mwambo.
translations.tonga: Bakaapanyina nibakamaninzya kujula zyipego zyabo, bakabaleleka bazyikulu babo mumulawo wabo.

lines.english: Then Odongo and Apiyo went outside. They chased butterflies and birds.

translations.bemba: Panuma ya ifi fyonse, Odongo na Apiyo baile panse. Baatampile ukupepeka fipelebesha ne fyuni.
translations.kaonde: Panyuma yakupwisha byonse, Odongo ne Apiyo balupukile pangye. Batendekele kupangisha bipupulwa ne bañonyi.
translations.lozi: Habafelize zeo, Odongo ni Apiyo bazwela fande nikukala kumatisa lipulumuki ni linyunywani.
translations.lunda: Nawa Odongo na Apiyo ayili hanzhi. Adin’ga nakuhan’ga Tuzhil natunzwanzwa.
translations.luvale: Jino Odongo na Apiyo vayile haweluka. Vahangile tujila natuuyauya.
translations.nyanja: Ndipo Odongo na Apiyo anayenda panja nayamba kupilikisa ma bulaula na mbalame.
translations.tonga: Kumane waawo, Odongo alimwi a Apiyo bakaunka anze. Bakatalika kutandaanya nkonkolekwa alimwi atuyuni.

lines.english: They climbed trees and splashed in the water of the lake.

translations.bemba: Baaleniina ku fimuti elyo no kusansana ameenshi ayamuli beemba.
translations.kaonde: Bakanjijilenga kubichi ne kwisupila meema amukizhiba.
translations.lozi: Bapahama kwa likota ni kutapwita mwa mezi a mwa liisa.
translations.lunda: Adin’ga nakukandama nyitondu nakuhemesha menzhi amuklon’ga
translations.luvale: Vanyinyine kumitondo nakuhemena mumeya amukalwiji.
translations.nyanja: Ana awa, anakwela mitengo ndipo anasewela m’madzi amnyanja.
translations.tonga: Bakatanta muzyisamu akufwusa zyakufwusa-fwusa mucizyiba.

lines.english: When it was dark they returned to the house for dinner. Before they could finish eating, they were falling asleep!

translations.bemba: Ilyo pafiitile, balibwelelemo ku ŋanda mu kulya icakulya ca cungulo-bushiku. Ilyo baali tabalapwisha no kulya, baponeene umutulo!
translations.kaonde: Byopatendekele kufita, babwelele munzubo nakuja kajo kamulajilo. Bino saka bakyangye kupwisha kuja batendekele kukunuka!
translations.lozi: Hase lilikezi lizazi, bakutela kwa hae kuli bayoca mulalelo. Basikafeza kale kuca bakala kuozela!
translations.lunda: Chikweyilili afuntili kwitala nakunda kuda kwa melela. Henohu Kanda amanishi kuda, atachikili kukama!
translations.luvale: Omu kwelavile vahilukile kuzuvo nakulya vyakulya vyachingoloshi. Shimbu kanda vamanyise kulya, valezumukilile mutulo.
translations.nyanja: Pamene kunada, ana anabwelela kunyumba kukadya cakudya ca madzulo. Koma akalibe kutsiliza kudya, anayamba kumva tulo!
translations.tonga: Nikwakasiya, bakajokela kuŋanda kuya kulya cakulya ca kulalila. Kabataninga akumaninzya kulya, bakatalika kufwukula!

lines.english: The next day, the children’s father drove back to the city leaving them with Nyar-Kanyada.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, bawishi balibwelelemo ku kalaale. Baashile Odongo na Apiyo kuli ba Nyar-Kanyada.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jalondejilepo, bashabo babwelele ne kutaunyi bino bashile baana babo na ba nkambo yabo abo ba Nyar-Kanyada.
translations.lozi: Lizazi lelitatama, bo ndataabona bafunduka kukutela kwa tolopo kusiya banana kubo kukwaabona, bo Nyar-Kanyada.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dasinsilihu, Tata yawu wafuntili chen’gi ku mbaka nakuyishiya na Nyar-Kanyada.
translations.luvale: Lyacheleko, sevo akindulukile kumbaka kuvaseza na Nyar-Kanyada.
translations.nyanja: M’mawa mwake, atate awo a Odongo ndi Apiyo anabwelela ku tauni ndikuwasiya ndi ambuya awo Nyar-Kanyada.
translations.tonga: Buzuba bwakatobela, bausyi bakabasiya bana kuli banyinakulu ba Nyar-Kanyada akujokela kudolopo.

lines.english: Odongo and Apiyo helped their grandmother with household chores. They fetched water and firewood. They collected eggs from the chickens and picked greens from the garden.

translations.bemba: Odongo na Apiyo baaleafwa banakulu imilimo yonse iyapaŋanda. Baaletapa ameenshi no kuteeba inkuni. Baaleetoola na mani ya nkoko no kusaba umusaalu ukufuma mwibala.
translations.kaonde: Odongo ne Apiyo bakwashishenga ba nkambo yabo mingilo ya pa nzubo. Bachabilenga nkunyi nekutapula meema. Batolawilenga make abanzolo ne kwapa bishu mumashamba.
translations.lozi: Odongo ni Apiyo batusa bo kukwaabona kwa misebezi ya mwa lapa. Ba bakela mezi ni kulwalela likota. Neba nopanga mai ali kuhu ni kuyanganga miloho mwa simu.
translations.lunda: Odongo na Apiyo adin’ga nakukwasha nkaka yawu nyidimu yahetala. Adin’ga na kukotola inchawa na kutaha menzhi. Adin’ga nakusenda matete kufuma kudi tusumbi nakuwayisha mafu I mwitempa.
translations.luvale: Odongo na Apiyo vakafwile khaka yavo waphwevo namilimo yakukhanda. Vaswichilenga meya nakuchava jikhunyi. Vambachile maulu kufuma kutusumbi nakuhela mafwo mulithepa.
translations.nyanja: Odongo ndi Apiyo anathandiza ambuya awo nchito za panyumba. Ana awa anatunga madzi ndi kusakila nkhuni. Anatola mazila ankhuku ndi kuthyola ndiyo m’dimba.
translations.tonga: Odongo alimwi aa Apiyo bakabagwasya banyinakulu milimo yaaŋanda. Bakateka meenda akutebba nkuni. Bakali kubwezelela amaji aankuku alimwi akucela cisyu kuzwa mumuunda.

lines.english: Nyar-Kanyada taught her grandchildren to make soft ugali to eat with stew. She showed them how to make coconut rice to eat with roast fish.

translations.bemba: Banakulu bafundile abeshikulu baabo ifyakunaya ubwali ubwanaka. Baalibalangile ne fyakwipika umupuunga uwakuliila nesabi ilyakooca.
translations.kaonde: Ba Nyar-Kanyada bebafunjishilenga bankana babo mwakukumbila nshima yakuja na nyama. Bebafunjishile ne byakuteeka mupunga wakuja namasabi a kusoka.
translations.lozi: Nyar-Kanyada aluta baikulyae kusoka buhobe bwakucisa ni mulo. Nimwakutatehela laisi ya kucisa ni litapi zakubesa.
translations.lunda: Nyar-Kanyada watan’gishili ezhikulu zhindi mwakuhondela nshima yayovu nakuda na mbizhi. Wayilezhe mwakutelekela losu lwa kokonati nanshi yakocha.
translations.luvale: Nyar-Kanyada anangwile vazukulu jenyi mwakuhikila shima yayivwovu mangana valyenga namusoji. Avalwezele mwakutelekela loso lwavyelu mangana valise navayishi vakwocha.
translations.nyanja: Ambuya awo anapunzisa adzukulu awo kuphika nsima, nsomba, ndi ndiyo zina zakumudzi.
translations.tonga: Nyar-Kanyada wakabayiisya bazyukulu bakwe kujika nsima yakulya aa musinza. Wakabatondezya alimwi abwakujika mupunga uuligwa answi ziyokedwe .

lines.english:
One morning, Odongo took his grandmother’s cows to graze. They ran onto a neighbour’s farm.

The farmer was angry with Odongo. He threatened to keep the cows for eating his crops. After that day, the boy made sure that the cows did not get into trouble again.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo, Odongo aile mu kucema iŋombe sha banakulu. Iŋombe shabutukilile mwibala lya bena mupalamano. Umwine webala aafuliilwe Odongo pafyacitiike. Umulimi aebele Odongo ukuti alamupoka iŋombe pa kumuliila ifilimwa fyakwe. Ukufuma apo, umulumendo aaliposeleko amaano ukumona ukuti iŋombe tashileetele imilandu na kabili.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo lukeelo, Odongo watwajile bañombe baba nkambo yanji nakuja munyemvu. Bañombe bayile nakuja mufwamu yabobekala nabo kubwipi. Bena fwamu bazhingijile bingi na Odongo. Bamuchinyishile amba bakonsha ne kutambula ba ñombe namambo akuja bijimwa byabo. Panyuma yajoja juuba, mwanyike wamwene kuuba amba bañombe kechi bakonshe kuleta lukatazho lukwabo ne.
translations.lozi: Lizazi leliñwi, Odongo haisa likomo zabo kukwaahae kwa kufula. Zakena mwa simu yene bapaani ni yabo kukwaahae. Mulimi yoo anyemela Odongo. Hamusabisa kuli nakakwalela likomu zabo kukwaahae mwa mulaka wahae kabakala kuli licile licalo zahae. Kuzwa lizazi leo, Odongo akala kumamelanga likomu hanayanga kwakulisa.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu, Odongo watweli in’gombi zha nkaka yindi wamubanda nakuda matahu. En’ngilili mwiha dambala. Mudimi wahilili na Odongo. Wazhinini kusenda ona in’gombi mulon’ga waku da imbuti zhindi. Kufuma ifuku denadina, iwu Kansi weyala Wazhinini hakamba ken’gila mukukala chen’giku.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe nachimene, Odongo ayile nakulisa vangombe jakhaka yenyi. Vaze vangombe vengilile muwande wamuthu valihachile nenyi. Uze mwenyawande apihililile na Odongo. Evwishile woma ngwenyi mwakwachilamo vaze vangombe mwomwo vanamulila vimbuto vyenyi. Kufuma lize likumbi, uze kanyike akingile vaze vangombe kuchina navahilukilamo.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina, Odongo anapita kukadyetsela ng’ombe. Ng’ombe zina zinalowa m’munda mwa anthu ena. Mlimiyu anakalipila Odongo kwambili. Anaopseza kuti adzasunga pakudya mbewu zake. Patapita tsikulo, munyamata anatsimikidza kuti ng’ombe zisakhalenso mumabvuto.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba mafwumo-fwumo, Odongo wakajulila ŋombe zyabanyinakulu akuzyitola kukucela. Zyakanjila mumuunda wabasimukobonyina. Mulimi ooyu wakamunyemena kapati Odongo. Wakalikalauka akuyanda kuti ŋombe azyijate kuciba cakwe akaambo kakuti zyalya mumuunda wakwe. Kuzwa buzuba oobu, mwana musankwa wakabona masimpe kuti ŋombe zyakwe taziyinki kabili mumyuunda yabantu.

lines.english:
On another day, the children went to the marketplace with Nyar-Kanyada. She had a stall selling vegetables, sugar and soap.

Apiyo liked to tell customers the price of items. Odongo would pack the items that customers bought.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumbi, abaana baile naba Nyar-Kanyada ku maliketi. Baalikwete incende apo aleshitiisha umusaalu, shuga elyo na sopo. Apiyo aatemenwe ukweba abantu umutengo wa fintu baaleshitisha. Odongo aatemenwe ukulonga ifintu ifyo abantu baaleeshita.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jikwabo jalondejilepo, banyike baile kukisankanyi na ba Nyar-Kanyada. Bajinga natebulu pobapoteshelanga bishu, shuka ne sopo. Apiyo watemenwe kubuula bapota mitengo yabintu. Odongo aye walongelanga bapota bintu byobapota.
translations.lozi: Lizazi leliñwi hape, banana baya kwa musika hamoho ni bo Nyar-Kanyada. Nebanani sintolo-nyana monebalekisezanga miloho, swikili ni mulola. Apiyo natabelanga hahulu kubulelelanga batu liteko zalika za mwa sintolo. Odongo yena nalongelanga lika batu benabaleka.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dikwawu anyana adin’ga nakuya ku chisankanu na Nyar-Kanyada. Wadin’ga nakachitamba hadin’ga nakuladishilayi tu suga na sopu. Apiyo waken’geli kulezha akastoma nyitengu yayuma. Odongo wadin’ga na kulon’ga yuma yalandilen’gawu akastoma.
translations.luvale: Halikumbi likwavo, vanyike vayile kuchisakano na Nyar-Kanyada. Apwilenga nakatambo alanjishililenga mafwo, sukili nasopo. Apiyo azangilenga kulweza vathu jindando javyuma. Odongo alongejekelenga vyuma vize valanjilenga vathu.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku linanso, ana anapitaa ku musika ndi ambuya awo. Anali ndi stolo yogulitsamo ndiyo za m’munda, shuga ndi sopo. Apiyo anali kukonda kuuza anthu ogula mitengo ya zinthu. Odongo anali kukonda kulongeza zinthu zimene anthu anali kugula.
translations.tonga: Buzuba bumbi, bana bakaunka kumaaketi antoomwe a Nyar-Kanyada. Bakaapanyina bakajisi cintoolo mobakali kusambala cisyumani, imunyo alimwi ansipa. Apiyo wakali kumvwa kabotu kwaambila bantu myuulo yazyintu, Odongo walo wakali kubikka muzipepa zya kuyumwida zyintu nzyibakali kuula bantu.

lines.english: At the end of the day they drank chai tea together. They helped grandmother to count the money she earned.

translations.bemba: Icungulo baanwine tii na banakulu. Panuma, bayafwileko banakulu ukupenda indalama baapangile.
translations.kaonde: Panyuma yakupwa juuba batomanga makabekabe pamo. Bakwashangako ba nkambo yabo kubala mali obapoteshamo.
translations.lozi: Hase bakotokile, manzibwana, nebanwanga tii hamoho. Hape nebatusanga bo kukwaabona kubala masheleñi afumanwi mwalizazi leo.
translations.lunda: Kunsa yefuku aken’gelen’ga kunwa Chai tiyi hamu. Amukwashilen’gaku nkaka yawu kuchinda madi anawaniyu.
translations.luvale: Hakukuma chalikumbi vanwine tiyi yachai hamwe. Vakafwile khaka yavo kulava jimbongo awanyine.
translations.nyanja: Pakuthela kwa tsiku anali kumwa tiyi ya chai pamodzi. Anathandiza ambuya awo kuwelenga ndalama zimene analinazo.
translations.tonga: Izuba lyabbila, bakali kunywa tii antoomwe. Bakali kubagwasya bakaapanyina kubala mali ngubajana mubuzuba oobu.

lines.english:
But too soon the holidays were over and the children had to go back to the city.

Nyar-Kanyada gave Odongo a cap and Apiyo a sweater. She packed food for their journey.

translations.bemba: Lelo tacaposele ne nshita iitali cuuti alipwile na baana baali no kubwelelamo ku tauni. Ba Nyar-Kanyada baapeele Odongo akasote elyo Apiyo baamupeele sweeta. Baabalongeele ne filyo ifyakulya pa buleendo.
translations.kaonde: Kimye kyakukokoloka kyapwile kabiji banyike bakebewe kubwela kutaunyi. Nyar-Kanyada wapemule Odongo kisochi kabiji Apiyo wamupele sweta. Ba Nyar-Kanyada balongejile bankana babo kajo kakuja palwendo.
translations.lozi: Kono kanakonyana, mazazi a pumulo afeela mi banana nebanani kukutela kwa tolopo. Bo Nyar-Kanyada bafa Odongo mpo ya kuwani mi Apiyo yena bamufa sweta. Babalongela lico za kucela mwa musipili.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga chakadi kuleha, kunoka kwakumini kaha nawa anyana yadin’ga himpinji yakufunta chen’gi kumbaka. Nyar-Kanyada wenkeli Odongo itepa na Apiyo sweta. Walon’geli yakuda yakudila munzhila.
translations.luvale: Oloze chachindende kaha makumbi akunokha akumine, shikaho vanyike vakindulukile kumbaka. Nyar-Kanyada ahanyine Odongo lupasa kaha Apiyo sweta. Avalongejekelele vyakulila mujila.
translations.nyanja: Koma mosacedwa cuti cinali kutha ndipo ana amafunika kubwelela ku tauni. Ambuya anapatsa Odongo kapu ndipo anapatsa Apiyo juzi. Ambuya analonga cakudya capaulendo.
translations.tonga: Pele kabatana akuyeeyela, mazuba amupumuno akamana, eelyo bana bakajokela kudolopo. Nyar-Kanyada wakapa Odongo kasoti mpoonya Apiyo wakapegwa nsweta. Bakababikkila cakulya cakulya munzila mulweendo lwabo.

lines.english:
When their father came to fetch them, they did not want to leave. The children begged Nyar-Kanyada to go with them to the city.

She smiled and said, “I am too old for the city. I will be waiting for you to come to my village again.”

translations.bemba: Ilyo bawishi baishile mu kubasenda, tabaaleefwaya ukubwelelamo. Abaana bapaapaata ba Nyar-Kanyada ukuti baye nabo ku kalaale. Banakulu baamwentwilefye no kusosa ati, “Nalikota saana uwakwikala ku kalaale. Nkalamuloleelafye mpaka ilyo mukeesa kuno mushi na kabili.”
translations.kaonde: Kimye kyaishile bashabo kwibasenda, kechi bakebelenga kuya ne. Banyike balombele Nyar-Kanyada kuya nabo kutaunyi. Nyar-Kanyada waambile amba, “Nakota kechi nakonsha kuya nakwikala mutaunyi ne. Kemupembelelanga kwiya kuno kumuzhi jikwabo.”
translations.lozi: Bo ndataabona hane batobaanga, banana nebasalati kukutela kwa tolopo. Bakupa bo kukwaabona kuli baye ni bona kwa tolopo. Bamenya ni kubulela kuli, “Nihulile hahulu, hanikoni kupila mwa tolopo, nika milibelela kufitela mukatonipotela hape.”
translations.lunda: Tata yawu chenziliyu nakuyisenda, heyaken’geli kuyaku. Anyana akalakeli nawa Nyar-Kanyada ayi nawa kumbaka. Waseheli mwe nindi, “nakuli nankashi Kuya kumbaka. Nikuyihembelan’ga mukenzi kunu kumukala chen’gi.”
translations.luvale: Omu sevo ejile nakuvambata, kavazangile kukatukako. Vashinjililile Nyar-Kanyada ngwavo ayenga navo kumbaka. Amwemwetele nakwamba ngwenyi, “Ngwakolo chikuma mwakutwamina mumbaka mwauchi. Nangumivandamina mwizenganga cheka kuno kwimbo.”
