translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu namweni imban’gu yayineni yidi hanzhi ha mwana kwitala da nkaka. Chinehwili mudimi wayu, wangakwili nindi, “Imban’gu yami yakafuta.” Kumbadi yayu kwadin’ga mafulu amakondi adin’ga nakubalumunayi impinji neyi impinji. Nadin’ga waken’ga kwiluka. “Indi owu mafulu ankahi dinu eyi nkanka?” Nehwili. Wangakwili hohu nindi, “Mafulu ami akafuta.”
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe ngwamwene mbango yayinene vanayitumbika hamusana haweluka wazuvo yakhaka. Omu ngwahulishile ovyo ayilingishilenga, kukumbulula chapwile, “Yapwa mbango yami yakafuta.” Kwakamwihi nayize mbango kwapwile mafwo amakonde amavulu aze khaka alumwinenga mwamundende mwamundende. Ngwasakile nguthachikize. Ngwahulishile ngwami, “Nyi awa mafwo aka, khaka?” Kukumbulula chafumineko chapwile, “Himafwo ami akafuta.”
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina, ndinaona nswanda ili pa dzuwa panja pa nyumba ya agogo. Pamene ndinafunsa nchito yake ya nswanda, yankho inali yakuti, “Ndi nswanda yanga yamasenga.” Pafupi ndi nswanda, panali mayani a nthochi yomwe agogo anayikamo nthawi ndi nthawi. Ndinali ndi mafunso ambili. “Kodi mayani ndi aciani?” ndinafunsa. Yankho yomwe anandipatsa ndiyakuti, “ndi mayani anga a masenga.”
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba ndakabona cinzuma ca matete kunze aŋanda yabaneene. Nindakabuzya kuti cinzuma cakali canzi, buinguzi mbondakapegwa mbwakuti, “Ncinzuma camaleele.” Munsi-munsi acinzuma kwakali matuvwu aamabbana ngubakali kupindamuna ciindi aciindi. Ndakayandisisya kuzyiba. “Ngaanzi matuvwu aaya baneene “? Bakavwiila kuti “Matuvwu amaleele.”

lines.english:
It was so interesting watching Grandma, the bananas, the banana leaves and the big straw basket. But Grandma sent me off to my mother on an errand.

“Grandma, please, let me watch as you prepare…”

“Don’t be stubborn, child, do as you are told,” she insisted. I took off running.

translations.bemba: Caliweme ukutamba bamaama, inkonde, amabuula ya nkonde, no museke uukulu. Nomba bamaama epakuntuma ukuli bamaayo. Elyo nabeba nati, “Maama napaapaata lekeni imoneko ifyo mucita…” Bamaama epakuti, “We mwanawe uleumfwa, cita ifyo nakweba endesha.” Efyo naile ulubilo.
translations.kaonde: Kyajinga kyalusekelo bingi kumona ba nkambo, makonde, mabula a makonde ne musansa. Ba nkambo ba ntumine ku ba maama nakwingila mingilo. Nebabujile namba, “Nkambo, ndekai ngikale pa kuuba monenga byomubena kunengezha…” “Kukosama koobe obewa mwanyike, ubaatu byonka byonakubula,” bañambijile. Nanyamukile lubilo.
translations.lozi: Neku tabisa kubuha bo kuku, makonde, matali a makonde ni sizuma sesituna. Kono bo kuku baniluma kuya ku bo ma. “Kuku, nikupa kuli munisiye ni buhe zemulukisa…” “Usike waba mwanana wa mahanyi, eza zeu bulelezwi,” batundamena. Senifunduka inge ni mata.
translations.lunda: Chadin’ga chamuzan’galu nankashi hakumona nkanka, makondi, mafu amakondi na imban’gu yayineni. Ilan’ga nkaka wantumini kudi mama nakumulandila twakulanda. “Nkaka nalembi, nakenga kukutalan’ga chiwukudiwayishan’ga…” “Kandi wikala waditavuku neyi chiyakuhoshan’gawuku,” wafuntilililihu. Nanyamukili nakuya.
translations.luvale: Chapwile chamwaza chikuma kumona khaka, makonde, mafwo amakonde nayize mbango yayinene. Oloze khaka angutumine kuli mama. “Khaka ngunasakwila ngwechenu ngumone omu namuwahisanga…” Ahilukilileho ngwenyi, “Kanda kupwanga najiphami nganako, ove mwana, linga nge omu vanakulweze,” Ngwaputukileko lumbushi.
translations.nyanja: Cinali cosangalasa kuona agogo anga, nthochi, mayani a nthochi ndi nswanda yaikulu. Koma agogo anandituma kuti ndipite kwa amai anga. “Agogo, conde, lekani ndikhale nainu pamene mukonzeka…” “Osacita nthota, mwana, cita zomwe ndakuuza,” anakakamiza. Ndinanyamuka ndi liwilo.
translations.tonga: Cakali kukkomaninsya kulanga baneene, mabbanana, matuvwu amabbanana acinzuma camatete cipati. Baneene bakandituma kuunka kuli baama. “Baneene, ndiyanda kubona mbomubamba mabbanana…” “Mwaneebo utandikatazyi mwana, kocita mbuli mboambilwa.” Bakazumanana, mpoona Mbondakainka kandiya kuzuza.

lines.english:
When I returned, Grandma was sitting outside but with neither the basket nor the bananas.

“Grandma, where is the basket, where are all the bananas, and where…”

But the only answer I got was, “They are in my magic place.” It was so disappointing!

translations.bemba: Ilyo nabwelele, nasangile bamaama nabekala panse, nomba tapaali inkonde nangu umuseke. “Maama, umuseke ulikwisa, ne nkonde shilikwi, nga…” Bamaama epakuti, “Fili kuncende yandi iyankama.” Nshatemenwe.
translations.kaonde: Byonabwelele, ba nkambo baikele pangye kwakubula musansa nangwa makonde. Nebepwizhe ba nkambo namba, “Nkambo, musansa uji pi, ne makonde onse aji pi…” Bino ba nkambo bankumbwile amba, “Aji mumpuzha yami ya majiki.” Kyañumvwishishe bingi bibi.
translations.lozi: Hasenikutile, bo kuku nebainzi fande kusina sizuma kapa makonde. “Kuku, sizuma sikai, makonde kaufela akai, mi lika kaufela likai…?” Kono kalabo yeneni filwe feela neeli, “liinzi mwa sibaka saka sa mabibo.” Neeli nto yeneswabisa!
translations.lunda: Chinafuntili, nkaka wadin’ga washakama hanzhi ilan’ga chakadi imban’gu hela makondi. “Nkaka, indi makondid adikudihi, indi imban’gu yidi kudihi na…” Ilan’ga wakwili hohu nindi, “Adi mwilun’ga dami da kafuta.” Chadin’ga chawunen’gu nankashi!
translations.luvale: Omu ngwahilukile, khaka atwamine haweluka oloze chakuhona ize mbango chipwe aze makonde. Ngwamuhulishile, “Khaka, mbango ili kulihi, makonde osena ali kulihi, kulihi…” Oloze kumbulwilo ngwatambwile yapwile, “Ali muchisete chami chakafuta.” Changunehelele nauvwa!
translations.nyanja: Pamene ndinabwelela, agogo anali khale panja koma analibe nthochi. “Agogo, kodi nswanda ili kuti, nthoci zonse zili kuti, ndipo ali kuti…” Koma yankho yomwe anandipatsa ndi yakuti, “zonse zili mu malo anga amasenga.” Zinali zokhumudwitsa.
translations.tonga: Nindakajokela, baneene bakalikkede anze kakunyina cinzuma amabbanana. “Baneene, ino cinzuma amabbanana oonse zyili kuli…?” Bwiinguzi mbundakapegwa mbwakuti, “Ali kubusena bwamaleele.” Cakandityompya kapati!

lines.english:
Two days later, Grandma sent me to fetch her walking stick from her bedroom.

As soon as I opened the door, I was welcomed by the strong smell of ripening bananas. In the inner room was grandma’s big magic straw basket. It was well hidden by an old blanket. I lifted it and sniffed that glorious smell.

translations.bemba: Panuma ya nshiku shibili, bamaama bantumine mukusenda inkonto yabo ku muputule. Cilya naisulafye iciibi, akaceena kankonde ishapya kampokelela. Kukati ekwali umuseke wa nkaama. Ninshi nabafisa bwino-bwino mu bulangeti bwakale. Nafimbulapo nanunshako akaceena akasuma.
translations.kaonde: Pakupitapo moba abiji, ba nkambo bantumine kuya nakwibaletela mukombo kukibamba kyakulalamo. Byonashinkwiletu kibelo, nanunkwile bwema bwa makonde apya. Mukibamba kyamukachi mwajinga musansa waba nkambo wa majiki. Bekifile bulongo kumwemba wakala. Nekinyamwine ne kununkula bwema bwawama.
translations.lozi: Hase kufitile mazazi amabeli, bo kuku baniluma kuyobangela mulamu wa bona kwa musiyo wa bona. Nisa kwahulula feela sikwalo, naamuhelwa ki muunko wobuhali wa makonde anali bukaufi nikubuzwa. Mwa musiyo nekunani sizuma sesituna sa bo kuku sa mabibo. Nesipatilwe hande ki kubo yakale. Seni iapula ni kununka muunko womunde kakufitisisa.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu, nkaka wantumini Kuya nakusenda mukombu windi kwakukama. Chinenzwinini chenzelu, anshikizhili kudi ivumba da makondi akwiha. Mukachi kakapeka kakukama, kwadin’ga imban’gu yayineni ya kafuta. Yadin’ga yakusweka mwipayi da hayaka. Nayinyemwini nakuhumba kana kadivumba da wukalawenu.
translations.luvale: Omu mwahichile makumbi avali, khaka angutumine kumunehela mukombo wenyi muze mukapete kenyi kakusavalila. Yayize sokololo kuchikolo, vangutambwokesele kulivumba lyamakonde akuhya. Mukachi kazuvo mwapwile ize mbango yakhaka yayinene yakafuta. Yapwilenga yakusweka kanawa nalipayi lyamwaka. Ngwalyehwile nakuhumbilila uze upengo-pengo.
translations.nyanja: Patapita masiku awili, agogo anandituma kukatenga ndodo yao kucoka ku cipindi cao cogonamo. Pamene ndinatsegula citseko, ndinamva nthochi kununkhila. Mukati mwa cipinda munali nswanda ya masenga ya agogo. Inali yobisika ndi gombeza wakale. Ndinasegula ndipo ndinamva kununkhila kokoma.
translations.tonga: Nikwakainda mazuba obilo, baneene bakandituma kuti ndibabwezele nkoli yakweenzya kuzyuli kwabo. Nindakanjila kuzyuli, ndakatambulwa akununkila kwa mabbanana abizwa. Ndakabona cinzuma camaleele kacisisidwe kabotu mungubo yakaindi. Ndakainyamuna akununkizya kanunko kaya kabotelezya maningi.

lines.english:
Grandma’s voice startled me when she called, “What are you doing? Hurry up and bring me the stick.”

I hurried out with her walking stick. “What are you smiling about?” Grandma asked.

Her question made me realise that I was still smiling at the discovery of her magic place.

translations.bemba: Ishiwi lyaba maama epakuntinya lintu banjutile. “Finshi ulecita? Endesha ndetela inkonto.” Efyo naendeshe ukutwala inkoto. Bamaama epakunjipusha ati, “Finshi uleseka.” Cilya banjipusha elyo naibukisha ukuti ncili ndesekelela pa kusanga incende yankama yaba maama.
translations.kaonde: Jiiwi ja ba nkambo jambazhimwine byobangichile. “Ubena kuuba ka? Pelawizha, ndetele mukombo kuno.” Napelawizhizhe kutwala mukombo. Ba nkambo bangipwizhe amba, “Ubena kumwemwesela ka?” Jipuzho jabo jandengejile kuvuluka amba nkimwemwesela pa byonamwene mumpuzha yabo yamajiki.
translations.lozi: Linzwi la bo kuku lani pundumuna hase banibiza, “Weza sikamañi?” Uakufe unitiseze mulamu.” Seniakufela fande ni mulamu wabona. “Kiñi zeumenya-menya?” Bo kuku babuza. Puzo yabona yanilemusa kuli nenisa menya-menya kabakala zenenifumani mwa sibaka sabona sa mabibo.
translations.lunda: Izu da nkaka da kansumwini chabidikiliyu,, “Wunakwiladi?” endesha nentaku mukombu. “Mulon’gadi unakusehelela?” Nkaka wehwili. Kwihula chindi chan’gwanukishili nami nakusehelela mulon’ga nawani chisweku chindi cha kafuta.
translations.luvale: Lizu lyakhaka lyangukasumwine omu asanyikile, “Uli nakulinga ika? Zanguwisako ngunehele mukombo.” Ngwazanguwishile namukombo wenyi. Khaka ahulishile, “Uli nakumwemweta ika?” Chihula chenyi chalingile ngwanuke ngwami ngwapwile likha nakumwemweta hakuwana chiswamo chenyi chakafuta.
translations.nyanja: Mau a agogo anandiopsya pamene anati, “Ucita ciani? Fulumila bweletsa ndodo.” Ndinapita panja mofulumila kupeleka ndodo. “Umwetulila ciani?” Agogo anafunsa. Funso yao inandidziwitsa kuti ndinali kumwetulila nthoci zomwe ndinaona mumalo a masenga.
translations.tonga: Ijwi lyabaneene lyakanditilimuna. “Ucita nzi? Koleta nkoli cakufwambaana.” Ndakazwa cakufwambaana akubapa nkoli yakweenzya. “Ino usekelela nzi?” Mubuzyo wakandipa kuzyiba kuti ndakacili kumweta-mweta akaambo kakubona busena bwamaleele bwa baneene.

lines.english:
The following day when grandma came to visit my mother, I rushed to her house to check the bananas once more.

There was a bunch of very ripe ones. I picked one and hid it in my dress. After covering the basket again, I went behind the house and quickly ate it. It was the sweetest banana I had ever tasted.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, elyo bamaama baishile mukupempula bamaayo, nabutukile ku mwabo mukumona inkonde na kabili. Nasangile umusemo wa nkonde ishapya. Nasendako lumo nafisa mwilaya. Nasha nafimbapo bwino-bwino na kabili. Nabutukila ku lukungu lwa ŋanda no kulya ulukonde bwangu-bwangu. Iyi nkonde yali iyalowesha ukucila pa nkonde shonse isho nalilepo.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jalondejilepo, ba nkambo byobaishile na kupempula ba maama, naile kunzubo yabo lubilo nakumona makonde jikwabo. Kwajinga kizanze kya makonde apya. Natolelemo jimo ne kwijifya mundeleshi. Panyuma yakutana musansa jikwabo, naile kunyuma ya nzubo ne kuja jikonde bukiji-bukiji. Jajinga jikonde jatobala kyakine kine jonkyangye kujapo kala.
translations.lozi: Lizazi leli tatami bo kuku hanebatile kutopotela bo ma, na matela kwa ndu yabona kuyonangela makonde hape. Nekunani sikocela sa makonde abuzwize luli. Seninopa liliñwi ni kulipata mwa ndelesi. Hase nikwahezi sizuma hape, naya kwa mulaho wa ndu nikuyoca likonde leo kabubebe. Neeli likonde lelimunati hakalo le nisamba nabe nice.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dasinsilihu chayiliyi nkaka nakutala mama, natemukilili kwitala dindi nakutala ana makondi chen’gi nawa. Kwadin’ga mukata waha nankashi. Nasendelihu yimu nakusweka mu kanji yami. Chinabutili muna mu imban’gu, nayili kunyima yetala nakunda dina ikondi. Dadin’ga ikondi daswezha kutowala Kandi nidan’gahu dehi.
translations.luvale: Likumbi lyachako omu khaka ejile nakutala mama, ngwathuchilile kuzuvo yenyi ngwami ngukatale cheka aze makonde. Kwapwilenga mususu wamakonde akuhya chikuma. Ngwanoneleko limwe nakulisweka mukhanji yami. Kukumisa kufwika kuze kumbango cheka, ngwayile kunyima yazuvo nakulilya washi. Lyapwile likonde lyakuyema chize kanda ngwivwengangaho lyehi.
translations.nyanja: Tsika lotsatilapo pamene agogo anabwela kutandalila amai, ndinathamgila ku nyumba yao kukaonanso nthoci. Panali zina zomwe zinapsya kwambili. Ndinatengapo imozi ndi kuibisa mu delesi yanga. Pambuyo pakutseka nswanda, ndinapita kuseli kwa nyumba ndipo ndinadya nthoci mofulumila. Inali nthoci yonzuna kuposa nthochi zonse zomwe ndinalawapo.
translations.tonga: Buzuba bwakaccilila, baneene nibakaunka kukuswaya baama, ndakazuzila kuŋanda yabo. Kwakali mulwi wamabbanana abizwide. Ndakabweza lyomwe akusisa mucisani ncindaasamide. Ndakaunka kunze aŋanda akulilya. Lyakali kuweela kwiinda mabbanana oonse ngindakalya kale mubuumi bwangu.

lines.english:
The following day, when grandma was in the garden picking vegetables, I sneaked in and peered at the bananas.

Nearly all were ripe. I couldn’t help taking a bunch of four.

As I tiptoed towards the door, I heard grandma coughing outside. I just managed to hide the bananas under my dress and walked past her.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, ilyo bamaama baile mwibala mu kuswa umusaalu, naile lushenshe mu kumona pa nkonde. Ninshi shonse shili mukupya. Efyo nasendelemo shine. Cilya ndebendelela ku ciibi, naumfwa bamaama baleekoola panse. Efyo nafishile inkonde mwilaya no kuya pita epobaali.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jalondejilepo, ba nkambo byobajinga mu mumashamba, nabombokele ne kuya nakutala pa makonde. Nataine amba onsetu makonde apile. Nakankelwe kwikanya kabiji natolelemo makonde ana. Byonaendejilenga kumana na kuya kukibelo, naumvwine ba nkambo bakopola pangye. Nalangulukile byakufya makonde mundeleshi ne kulupuka.
translations.lozi: Lizazi lelitatama, bo kuku anebayanga miloho mwa simu, seni ikuzwa ni nikukena kuyo nangela makonde. Kaufela ona nasabuzwize. Nenipalezwi kutuhela kusashimba sikocela sa makonde amane. Haninze ninyanyokela kwa munyako, nautwa bo kuku bahotola fande. Senikona feela kupata makonde mwa ndelesi ni kuba fitelela.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dikwawu dasinsilimu, nkaka wadin’ga nakwagula mafu akuda mwitempa. Nadiwembeli mwitala nakuhempula makondi. Ezhima wawu ashikeni kwakamwihi nakwiha. Hinatwesheli kudikan’gaku, nasendeli awana. Chinadin’ga nakudiwemba nakuken’ga kwidika, natiyili izu da nkaka akohola mukachi. Natwesheli hohu kusweka makondi ami mukanji nakumuhitakana.
translations.luvale: Likumbi lyachako, shimbu khaka apwile mulithepa nakuhela mafwo, ngwavombokelelemo nakunonoka hamakonde. Amavulu apwile akuhya. Ngwasutwileko makonde awana. Omu ngwapwile nakuya chindende chindende kuchikolo, ngwevwile khaka mwakohola haweluka. Ngwakumishile kusweka makonde mukhanji yami nakuhita kuze apwile.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lotsatilapo, pamane agogo anali mu dimba kutenga ndiwo zamasamba, ndinalowa munyumba mwakabisila ndikuona nthoci. Pafupi fupi zonse zinali zakupsya. Ndinatengapo zinai. Pamene ndinali kupita ku chotseko mwakacetecete, ndinamva agogo akosomola panja. Ndinabisa nthoci mu delesi langa ndipo ndinawapitilila.
translations.tonga: Buzuba bwakatobela, baneene nibakali kubeleka mumuunda, ndakaunka muŋanda akusondela akali mabbanana. Ndakajana oonse alibizwide. Ndakacikonzya kubweza one. Nindakali kuzwa anze, ndakamvwa baneene kabakola. Mpoona, ndakasisa mabbanana muchisani ncindakasamide akubaindilila.

lines.english:
The following day was market day. Grandma woke up early. She always took ripe bananas and cassava to sell at the market.

I did not hurry to visit her that day. But I could not avoid her for long.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, bwali buushiku bwakushitisha ku maliketi. Bamaama babukile lucelocelo. Baaletwala inkonde ishapya na tute lyonse mu kushitisha ku maliketi. Nshaceleele mu kubamona ubo bushiku, nomba nalibafulwike.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jalondejilepo jajinga juuba jakisankanyi. Ba nkambo babukile lukeelo-keelo. Batwalanga makonde apya ne makamba nakupotesha kukisankanyi. Aja juuba kechi napelawizhizhe kuya nakwibapempula ne. Bino kechi nakonsheshe kwiba fyama kimye kyalepa ne.
translations.lozi: Lizazi lenelitatami neeli lizazi la musika. Bo kuku nebapakezi. Nebaisanga makonde abuzwize ni mwanja kuyo lekisa kwa musika. Neni sikaitahanela kuyo bapotela zazi leo. Kono nenisakoni kuicanganisa bona ka nako yetelele.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dasinsilihu dadin’ga da chisaka u. Nkaka wahindukili swayi. Wadin’ga natukwala makondi akwiha na nyikamba ha chisankanu. Hinatemukilili kwitala dindiku. Ilan’ga nadin’ga mwakamwihi nayena impinji neyi impinji.
translations.luvale: Likumbi lyashishilemo lyapwile lyakulanda nakulanjisa hamaliketi. Khaka ahindukile chimenemene. Kakavulu ambachilenga makonde akuhya nalupa lwakulanjisa kumaliketi. Kangwanguhwishile kuya nakumutala lize likumbi khanako. Oloze kangwahashile kuhona kumumona hashimbu yayisukuko.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lotsatilapo inali tsiku lopita ku msika. Agogo anauka msanga. Anali kutenga nthoci zakupsya ndi cinangwa kukagulisa pa mtsika. Sindinafulumile kuwatsatila tsika lija. Koma sindinakwanise kukhala kopanda iwo.
translations.tonga: Buzuba bwakacilila, bwakali bwamakwebo. Baneene bakali kutola mabbanana abizwide amwanja kukusambala kumusyika. Oobo buzuba tiindakaunka cakufwambaana kuya kubaswaya. Pele tacakali kukonhyeka kutababona kwaciindi cilamfu.

lines.english:
Later that evening I was called by my mother and father, and Grandma. I knew why.

That night as I lay down to sleep, I knew I could never steal again, not from grandma, not from my parents, and certainly not from anyone else.

translations.bemba: Mu cungulo, bamaayo, bataata na bamaama balinjitile. Naishiba ne lyashi. Ubushiku bulya lintu naile mu kusendama, nasambilile ukuti nshakabwekeshepo ukwibila bamaama, abafyashi bandi nangu umuntu umbi na kabili.
translations.kaonde: Pajonkaja juuba mabanga ba maama, ba taata ne ba nkambo bangichile. Nayukile kine kintu kyobangichijile. Abwa bufuku byonalaajile, nayukile namba kechi nkabwezhapo jibiji kwiba, kuba nkambo, ku banse nangwa kubantu bakwabotu ne.
translations.lozi: Nako yamanzibwani lizazi leo, nabiziwa ki bo ma, bo ndate ni bo kuku. Nenizibile zene banibizeza. Busihu bo aninze nilobezi, naziba kuli nenisa swaneli kuuzwa nikamuta hape, isiñi ku bo kuku, isiñi kwa bashemi baka mi hape sihulu-hulu kwabatu basili.
translations.lunda: Melela efuku denadina, antambikili kudi Tata, Mama nayena nkaka. Nelukili mulon’ga. Wufuku wuna chinakamini, nadiahin’gili hinikamba keya kudi Tata hela mama hela nkaka chen’giku swezhe kudi muntu wachen’gi wudi wezhima.
translations.luvale: Lwola lwekha kuchingoloshi vangusanyikile kuli mama natata, nakhaka. Ngwejivile mwomwo ika. Uze ufuku omu ngwasavalile, ngwejivile ngwami kangwechi kukevaho chekako, kechi kwivila khakako, kechi kwivila visemi jami chipwe khala muthuko.
translations.nyanja: M’madzulo tsiku lija, amai ndi atate ndi agogo anandiitana. Ndinadziwa comwe anali kundiitanila. Usiku uja pamene ndinagona pansi, ndinadziwa kuti sindizakabwelezapo kubela agogo, makolo anga kapena munthu wina aliyense.
translations.tonga: Nokwakaba kumazuba, baama, bataata abaneene bakandiita. Ndakazyiba ncibakali kundiitila. Nindakoona, ndakazyiba kuti nseelede kubabbida baneene, bazyali bangu nokuba muntu uli oonse.

title:
Grandma’s garden was wonderful, full of sorghum, millet, and cassava.

But best of all were the bananas.

Although Grandma had many grandchildren, I secretly knew that I was her favourite. She invited me often to her house. She also told me little secrets.

But there was one secret she did not share with me: where she ripened bananas.

lines.english: Tom carries a tray of ripe bananas.

translations.bemba: Tom alasenda ulupe lwa nkonde ishapya.
translations.kaonde: Tom usenda tule wamakonde apya.
translations.lozi: Tom ushimbanga mukeke wa makonde abuzwize.
translations.lunda: Tom wasenda’ga chimban’gu cha makondi akwiha.
translations.luvale: Tom mwambata lwalo lwamakonde akuhya.
translations.nyanja: Tom amanyamula nswanda ya nthoci zakupsya.
translations.tonga: Tom wanyamuna mabbanana abizwide mucinzuma.

lines.english: Tom goes to the market to sell bananas.

translations.bemba: Tom alaya ku maliketi mu kushitisha inkonde.
translations.kaonde: Tom uya kukisankanyi nakupotesha makonde.
translations.lozi: Tom uyanga kwa musika kuyolekisa makonde.
translations.lunda: Tom wayan’ga kuchisankanu nakulandisha makondi.
translations.luvale: Tom mwaya kumaliketi nakulanjisa makonde.
translations.nyanja: Tom amapita ku msika kukagulisa nthoci.
translations.tonga: Tom waunka kumusyika kukusambala mabbanana.

lines.english: People at the market are buying fruit.

translations.bemba: Abantu pa maliketi baleeshita ifitwalo.
translations.kaonde: Bantu babena kupota bipangwa mukisankanyi.
translations.lozi: Batu kwa musika balekanga litolwana.
translations.lunda: Antu ha chisankanu anakulanda makondi.
translations.luvale: Vathu kumaliketi vali nakulanda mihako.
translations.nyanja: Anthu pa msika agula ziphatso.
translations.tonga: Bantu kumusyika baula michelo.

lines.english:
But no one is buying

Tom’s bananas.

They prefer to buy fruit from women.

translations.bemba: Nomba tapali nangu umo uuleshita kuli Tomu.
translations.kaonde: Bino kafwako wapotelenga makonde akwa Tom ne. Bantu bapotelengatu bipangwa kubainetu.
translations.lozi: Kono hakuna yalekanga makonde a Tom. Balata kuleka litolwana kwa basali.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga ninowu nakulanda makondi a Tom kosi. Aken’ga kulanda makondi kudi muka mama.
translations.luvale: Oloze naumwe wauchi ali nakulanda makonde a Tom. Vasaka kulanda mihako kuli maphwevo.
translations.nyanja: Koma palibe amene agula nthoci za Tom. Asankha kugula zipatso za azimai.
translations.tonga: Pesi kunyina uula mabbanana akwe Tom. Balombozya kuula micelo kuli bamakaintu.

lines.english: “In our community, only women sell fruit,” people say. “What kind of a man is this?” people ask.

translations.bemba: “Mu mushi wesu, banamaayofye ebashitisha ifitwalo,” efilanda abantu. “Mwaume wa musango shani uyu?” efyo bepusha.
translations.kaonde: “Muno munyaunda yetu, babakazhitu bobonkatu bapotesha bipangwa,” byobyamba bantu. “Nanchi awe ke mwanamulume wamutunduka ka?” bantu waipuzha.
translations.lozi: “Mwa silalanda saluna, ki basali feela baba lekisanga litolwana,” batu babulela. “Ki muuna ya cwañi yo?” batu babuza.
translations.lunda: “Muchitun’gili chetu akamama hohu diwu alandishan’ga nyikabu,” chahoshan’gawu antu. “Iyala wakufwana ng’ahi iwe?” Antu ehulang’a
translations.luvale: Vathu veji kuhanjika ngwavo, “Mungalila yetu, maphwevo kaha vakhiko veji kulanjisanga mihako.” Shikaho nge lunga navahulisa ngwavo, “Lunga muka ou?”
translations.nyanja: “M’mudzi mwathu, azimai okha ndio amene agulitsa nthoci,” anthu amatelo. “Kodi uyu ndi mwamuna wotani?” Anthu afunsa.
translations.tonga: “Muminzi yesu mbaamakaintu balo basambala michelo,” bantu baamba. “Mwaalumi wamusyobo nzi ooyu?” bantu babuzya.

lines.english:
But Tom does not give up.

He calls, “Buy my bananas!

Buy my sweet ripe bananas!”

translations.bemba: Nomba Tomu taleka. Aleeta abantu, “Shiteni inkonde shandi! Shiteni inkonde shandi ishapya kabili ishalowa!”
translations.kaonde: Bino Tom aye kechi wikilekele kupoteshane. Waichilenga bantu amba, “Potai makonde! Potai makonde ami aapya bulongo kabiji atobala!”
translations.lozi: Kono Tom azwafi. Wa huweleza, “Hamuleke makonde aka! Hamuleke makonde aka abuzwize mi amunati!”
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga Tom halekang’a wanyi. Hakubidika, “Landenu makondi ami! landenu akwiha atowala
translations.luvale: Oloze Tom kecheleko. Mwasanyika, “Landenu makonde ami! Landenu makonde ami ayema akuhya kanawa!”
translations.nyanja: Koma Tom saleka. Apunda, “Gulani nthoci zanga! Gulani nthoci zanga zakupsya komanso zonzuna!”
translations.tonga: Tom taakatyompwa. Wakaita “Kamuula mabbanana angu! Kamuula mabbanana angu abizwide alimwi alweela!”

lines.english:
One woman picks up a bunch of bananas from the tray.

She looks at the bananas carefully.

translations.bemba: Namaayo umo asendapo inkonde shimo pa lupe. Ashilolekesha bwino-bwino.
translations.kaonde: Inetu umo watolelemo makonde mutule. Wiatajishishe makonde bulongo.
translations.lozi: Musali yomuñwi ananula sikocela sa makonde mwa mukeke. Hatalimisisa makonde katokomelo.
translations.lunda: Mukamama umu asenda nimuvun’ga umu wamakondi hachiban’gu. Hakutalishisha ana makondi.
translations.luvale: Phwevo umwe mwambata mulumba umwe wamakonde halwalo. Mwashishika aze makonde kanawa.
translations.nyanja: Mkazi umozi atengapo nthochi zogula. Ayanganitsitsa nthoci mwacidwi.
translations.tonga: Umwi mukaintu wakanyamuna mabbanana kugusya mucinzuma. Waalangisisya mabbanana.

lines.english: The woman buys the bananas.

translations.bemba: Uyu namaayo ashita inkonde.
translations.kaonde: Uno inetu upota makonde.
translations.lozi: Musali yoo aleka makonde.
translations.lunda: Ona mukamama alanda ninana makondi.
translations.luvale: Phwevo mwalanda aze makonde.
translations.nyanja: Mzimai agula nthoci.
translations.tonga: Mukaintu ulaula ma bbanana.

lines.english:
More people come to the stall.

They buy Tom’s bananas and eat them.

translations.bemba: Abantu abengi baisa pali Tomu. Balashita inkonde shakwa Tomu no kushilya.
translations.kaonde: Bantu baavula beeya pakitamba kyanji. Bapota makonde akwa Tom ne kuja.
translations.lozi: Batu babañata bataha fa sintolo. Baleka makonde a Tom ni kuaca.
translations.lunda: Antu amavulu enzili iku ku chitamba. Alandili makondi a Tom na kuyada.
translations.luvale: Vathu vavavulu naveza kuze kukatambo. Navalanda makonde kuli Tom nakulya.
translations.nyanja: Anthu ambili abwela kusitolo. Agula nthoci za Tom ndi kuzidya.
translations.tonga: Bantu banji balasika ku cintoolo cha Tom kuula ma bbanana akwaalya.

lines.english:
Soon, the tray is empty.

Tom counts the money he earned.

translations.bemba: Ukwabula ukupoosa inshita, inkonde shapwa mu lupe. Tomu apenda indalama apanga.
translations.kaonde: Makonde akwa Tom kechi abanda kupwa ne. Tom ubala mali oamwenamo.
translations.lozi: Kanako nyana, fa mukeke kufela. Tom wabala masheleñi a fumani.
translations.lunda: Chantesha hohu, chimban’gu chikumani. Tom achinda madi indi aweniyu.
translations.luvale: Kalinwomu, lwalo lunasale lwamupolongwa. Tom mwalava jimbongo nawanemo.
translations.nyanja: Posacedwa, zonse zatha. Tom awelengela ndalama zomwe wapanga.
translations.tonga: Mukaindi kaniini, cinzuma Cha Tom cinyina ma bbanana. Tom wabala mali ngaajana kwiinda mukusambala.

lines.english:
Then Tom buys soap, sugar, and bread.

He puts the things in his tray.

translations.bemba: Tomu ashitamo isopo, shuga no mukate. Afibiika mu lupe.
translations.kaonde: Tom upotamo, sopo, shuka ne shinkwa. Tom usenda bintu byoapota mutule wanji.
translations.lozi: Cwale Tom waleka mulola, swikili, mi sinkwa. Lika ze alibeya mwa mukeke wahae.
translations.lunda: Henohu Tom alanda ni sopu,shuga na dinkendi. Washili yumiyi mu chiban’gu chindi.
translations.luvale: Jino Tom mwalanda sopo, sukili nachindanda. Mwahaka vize vyuma mulwalo lwenyi.
translations.nyanja: Pambuyo pake, Tom agula sopo, shuga, ndi mkhate. Aika zinthu mu nswanda yake.
translations.tonga: Kwamana, Tom waula nsipa, ccukela alimwi aa cinkwa. Wabikka zyintu eezyi mucinzuma cakwe.

lines.english: Tom balances the tray on his head and goes home.

translations.bemba: Tomu alaatengeseela ulupe lwakwe pa mutwe no kubwelela ku ŋanda.
translations.kaonde: Tom usenda tule wanji pamutwe saka alekelelako ne kuya kunzubo.
translations.lozi: Tom watengenya mukeke wahae fa toho anze aya kwandu.
translations.lunda: Tom aditwika ni chiban’gu chindi amutu.
translations.luvale: Tom mwahaka lwalo hamutwe wenyi nakuya kwimbo.
translations.nyanja: Tom waika nswanda yake pa mutu ndipo apita ku nyumba.
translations.tonga: Tom watukka cinzuma amutwe akuunka kuŋanda.

title: Tom carries a tray of ripe bananas.

lines.english: Fire gives warmth.

translations.bemba: Umulilo ulapeela icikabilila.
translations.kaonde: Mujilo upana kyuya.
translations.lozi: Mulilo wafa mufutumala.
translations.lunda: Kesi katatishan’ga.
translations.luvale: Kakahya keji kuneha liyena.
translations.nyanja: Moto umapatsa kuthuma.
translations.tonga: Mulilo ulakasaazya.

lines.english: Fire gives light.

translations.bemba: Umulilo ulapeela ulubuto.
translations.kaonde: Mujilo upana kyeya.
translations.lozi: Mulilo wafa liseli.
translations.lunda: Kesi katwikan’ga chezhezhi.
translations.luvale: Kakahya keji kuneha musana.
translations.nyanja: Moto umapatsa kuwala.
translations.tonga: Mulilo ulapa mumuni.

lines.english: Fire is wonderful.

translations.bemba: Umulilo usuma.
translations.kaonde: Mujilo wawama.
translations.lozi: Mulilo ki womunde.
translations.lunda: Kesi kakawahi.
translations.luvale: Kakahya kamwaza.
translations.nyanja: Moto ndiwabwino.
translations.tonga: Mulilo mubotu.

lines.english: And it is powerful.

translations.bemba: Elyo kabili walikwata amaka.
translations.kaonde: Kabiji mujilo uji nangovu.
translations.lozi: Hape unani maata.
translations.lunda: Kahanawa kakweti in’govu.
translations.luvale: Kaha katwama nangolo.
translations.nyanja: Ndipo ndiwaphamvu.
translations.tonga: Alimwi ulaa nguzu.

title: Fire gives warmth.

lines.english:
Sakima lived with his parents and his four year old sister.

They lived on a rich man’s land.

Their grass-thatched hut was at the end of a row of trees.

translations.bemba: Sakima aaleikala na bafyashi bakwe pamo na nkashi yakwe uwamyaka ine. Baleikala pancende ya mukankaala umo. Iŋanda yabo iyafyani yabeleele kumpela ya miti.
translations.kaonde: Sakima waikalanga na bansemi yanji ne nyenga yanji wamyaka yakusemwa ina. Baikalanga mumpunzha ya munonshi. Nzubo yabo yansono yajinga kunsa kwapela bichi.
translations.lozi: Sakima naapila ni bashemi bahae ni kezelaahae wa lilimo zene. Neba pila fa mubu wa muuna yanafumile. Ndu yabona ya bucwani neinzi kwa mafelelezo a mukoloko wa likota.
translations.lunda: Sakima wadin’ga nakushakama nawavwali zhindi na muhelindi wayaka yiwana. Ashakaminan’ga helun’ga deyala waheta. Chinsambu chawu chadin’ga kunkumina ya nyikanka ya nyitondu.
translations.luvale: Sakima atwaminenga navisemi jenyi nandumbwenyi waphwevo wamyaka yakusemuka iwana. Vatwaminenga halimbo lyalunga umwe wakupita. Zuvo yavo yakwambila namwila yapwile kusongo yamukana wamitondo.
translations.nyanja: Sakima anali kukhala ndi makolo ake ndi mlongo wake wa zaka zakubadwa zinai. Anakhala pa malo a munthu wolemela, Nyumba yao inali ya udzu pothela pa mzele wa mitengo.
translations.tonga: Sakima wakali kukkala abazyali bakwe amucizhyi wakwe wakalaa myaka yone. Bakali kukkala mucibaka camuvwubi. Ŋanda yabo yabwizu yakali kumamanino aamulongo wazyisamu.

lines.english:
When Sakima was three years old, he fell sick and lost his sight.

Sakima was a talented boy.

translations.bemba: Ilyo Sakima aali ne myaka itatu, alipofwile ku mulandu wa bulwele. Sakima aali mulumendo uwakwete icabupe.
translations.kaonde: Kimye Sakima kyoajinga namyaka ya kusemwa isatu, wabeleele kabiji walekele ne kumona. Sakima wajinga nsongwalume wajinga na kyabupe.
translations.lozi: Sakima hananani lilimo zetalu, nakulile mi aba sibofu. Sakima neeli mucaha yana fuyozwi.
translations.lunda: Chashikiliyu yaaka yisatu, Sakima wakatili nakufwa mensu. Sakima wadin’ga kansi weyala wukweti wana.
translations.luvale: Omu Sakima apwile namyaka itatu yakusemuka, avijile nakufwa meso. Sakima apwilenga mwana wakuthachikiza vyuma.
translations.nyanja: Pamene Sakima anali ndi zaka zitatu, anadwala ndipo anakhala wa khungu. Sakima anali ndi matalanta.
translations.tonga: Naakali amyaka yotatwe, Sakima wakaciswa akuleka kubona. Sakima wakali musankwa wakajisi cipego.

lines.english:
Sakima did many things that other six year old boys did not do.

For example, he could sit with older members of the village and discuss important matters.

translations.bemba: Sakima aaleecita ifintu ifingi efyo abalumendo bamyaka mutanda baaleefilwa. Ico mwingamwenako cimo cakuti, uyu Sakima aaleikala pa bakulu bamumushi no kulanshanya pa milandu iikankaala.
translations.kaonde: Sakima waubanga bintu byavula byakankalwanga kuuba bakwabo banyike bamyaka yakusemwa yonka yoajinga nayo itanu nakimo. Nobe kyakumwenako, wakonshanga kwikala nabakulumpe bamumuzhi ne kwisamba nabo pamitwe yanema.
translations.lozi: Sakima naezanga lika zeñata kufita litaka zahae za lilimo zesilezi. Kamutala, nainanga ni babahulu ba mwa munzi kuambola litaba zabutokwa.
translations.lunda: Sakima welilen’ga yuma yina akwawu ayaaka yitanu niwumu hiyatwesheliku. Chakutalilaku, wadin’ga nakushakama nakuhanjeka nawakulumpi yuma yaswezha Kulema.
translations.luvale: Sakima alingile vyuma vyavivulu vize vakwavo vamyaka yakusemuka itanu naumwe kavalingilengako. Chitalilo, atwaminenga navakulwane mwimbo nakuhanjika vyuma vyavilemu.
translations.nyanja: Sakima anali kukwanitsa kuchita zinthu zambili zomwe ana a zaka zisanu ndi cimodzi sankakwanisa kuchita. Mwachisanzo, anali kukhala ndi anthu akalu a m’mudzi ndi kukamba zinthu zofunikila.
translations.tonga: Sakima wakali kucita zyintu zyinji, balo beenzyinyina bamwyaka yakwe nzyibakali kwaalilwa kucita mbuli kukkala abapati-pati bamuminzi akulanganya twaambo tumwi tupati-pati abapati.

lines.english:
The parents of Sakima worked at the rich man’s house.

They left home early in the morning and returned late in the evening.

Sakima was left with his little sister.

translations.bemba: Abafyashi bakwa Sakima baaleebomba pa ŋanda ya mukankaala. Baaleefuma pa ŋanda ku macaaca no kubwela inshita ya bushiku. Sakima aaleeshaala na nkashi yakwe.
translations.kaonde: Bansemi yanji Sakima basebezanga kunzubo ya munonshi. Bafumanga pa nzubo lukeelo-keelo kabiji babwelangatu mabanga ene. Sakima washalanga ne nyenga yanji wamwanyike.
translations.lozi: Bashemi bahae Sakima ne ba beleka kwa ndu ya muuna yoo yana fumile. Nebazwanga fandu kakusasani-sasani mi nikuyokutanga manzibwana luli. Sakima nasiyalanga ni kezela hae wa mwanana.
translations.lunda: Anvwali zha sakima adin’ga nakuzata kwitala deyala waheta. Adin’ga nakufuma kwitala muna bwididi nakufunta kumelela. Sakima wadin’ga nakushala namuhelindi wa Kansi.
translations.luvale: Visemi ja Sakima vazachilenga kuzuvo yauze lihando. Vafuminenga hembo chimenemene nakukinduluka kuchingoloshi. Sakima vamuselenga nasongo yenyi waphwevo.
translations.nyanja: Makolo a Sakima anali kusewenza pa nyumba ya bambo wolemela. Anachoka panyumba m’mamawa ndi kubwelela kunyumba mumadzulo mocedwa. Sakima anali kukhala ndi mlongo wake.
translations.tonga: Bazyali ba Sakima bakali kubeleka aŋanda yamuvwubi. Bakali kufwuma kuzwa aŋanda akupiluka kumangolezya. Sakima wakali kucaala aŋanda amusyoonto wakwe musimbi.

lines.english:
Sakima loved to sing songs.

One day his mother asked him, “Where do you learn these songs from, Sakima?”

translations.bemba: Sakima aalitemenwe ukwimba inyimbo. Ubushiku bumo banyina balimwipwishe abati, “Usambilila kwisa ishi nyimbo, Sakima?”
translations.kaonde: Sakima watemenwe kwimba nyimbo. Juuba jimo bainanji bamwipwizhe amba, “Nanchi nyimbo yowimba wiifunjila kwepi?”
translations.lozi: Sakima nalata kuopela lipina. Zazi leliñwi bo mahe se ba mubuza, “Kikakai koitutelanga lipina ze Sakima?”
translations.lunda: Sakima waken’gelen’ga kwimba tumina. Ifuku dimu, Mama yindi wamwehwili. “Kudi watan’gilan’ga tuminitu sakima?”
translations.luvale: Sakima azangile kwimba myaso. Likumbi limwe naye amuhulishile, “Sakima, nyi eyi myaso weji kulinangwilayo kulihi?”
translations.nyanja: Sakima anakonda kuimba nyimbo. Tsiku lina, amai ake anamufunsa, “kodi uphunzila kuti nyimbo izi, Sakima?”
translations.tonga: Sakima wakali kuciyanda kwiimba nyimbo. Buzuba bumwi banyina bakamubuzya kuti, “Ino uzyiyiila kuli nyimbo eezyi, Sakima?”

lines.english: Sakima answered, “They just come, mother. I hear them in my head and then I sing.”

translations.bemba: Sakima ayaswike ati “Shiisafye, maayo, nshumfwa mu mutwe elyo nashimba.”
translations.kaonde: Sakima wakumbwile amba, “Iyatu ine maama. Patanshi neyumvwa mumutwe apa bino kañimbe.”
translations.lozi: Sakima alaba, “Litahanga feela ima. Niliutwanga mwa toho yaka mi kipeto naliopela.”
translations.lunda: Sakima wakwili, “Twenzan’ga hohu mama. Natutiyan’ga mumutu wami kaha hinukutwimba.”
translations.luvale: Sakima akumbulwile, “Yeji kulijila kaha, mama. Ngweji kuyivwila mumutwe wami kaha hinanguyimba.”
translations.nyanja: Sakima anayankha, “zimabwela chabe, amai. Ndimazimvela m’mutu mwanga ndipo ndimaziimba.”
translations.tonga: Sakima wakaingula, “Zyiboola buyo baama. Ndizyimvwa buyo mumutwe, kwamana ndatalika kwiimba.”

lines.english:
Sakima liked to sing for his little sister, especially, if she felt hungry.

His sister would listen to him singing his favourite song.

She would sway to the soothing tune.

translations.bemba: Sakima alitemenwe ukwimbila nkashi yakwe, maka-maka nkashi yakwe nga aumfwa insala. Nkashi yakwe aaleekutika uko Sakima aleimba ulwimbo atemenwe saana, ninshi ayamba ukuisunsuntila ku ciunda ca lwimbo.
translations.kaonde: Sakima watemenwe kwimbila nyenga yanji wamwanyike, kikatakata inge waumvwa nzala. Nyenga yanji watelekanga saka bamwimbila lwimbo wanji yeatemwisha. Waimbangako lwimbo wa kumulelezha.
translations.lozi: Sakima na latanga ku opelela kezelaahae wa mwanana sihulu hautwa tala. Kezelaahae na teelezanga kuyena anze aopela pina yanalata hahulu. Nanyungwa maikuto kabakala minembo ye ombaomba.
translations.lunda: Sakima waken’gelen’ga kwimbila muhelindi, swezhe neyi muhelindi udi nanzala. Muhelindi wukumutiyilila neyi nakwimba kamina kaken’gayi. Wukutachika kutiya kamina Kauunda.
translations.luvale: Sakima azangile kwimbila songo yenyi, chikumanyi, nge nevu zala. Songo yenyi mwamwivwilila omu mwemba mwaso wenyi azangile chikuma. Mwanyengesa mutwe kukava uze mwaso.
translations.nyanja: Sakima anakonda kuimbila mlongo wake wam’gono, makamaka ngati anali wokwiya. Mlongo wake anamvelela ku nyimbo yake yapa mtima. Anatothozedwa.
translations.tonga: Sakima wakali kuyanda kwiimbila musyoonto wakwe musimbi, kapati kuti kamvwide nzala. Musyoonto wakwe wakali kuswiilila kuti Sakima kaimba lwiimbo ndwaakali kuyandisya. Wakali kunyanyaala akaambo kakulumvwa kabotu lwiimbo.

lines.english:
“Can you sing it again and again, Sakima,” his sister would beg him.

Sakima would accept and sing it over and over again.

translations.bemba: Nkanshi yakwe aaleemulomba ati, “Njimbilako na kabili, Sakima.” Sakima aaleesumina no kubwekeshapo ukwimba ulwimbo imiku iingi.
translations.kaonde: Nyenga yanji wamupopwelanga amba,” bwezhapo ne jikwabo ne jikwabo. Sakima waswanga ne kwimba jikwabo.
translations.lozi: “Kutela kuopela hape, Sakima,” kezelaahae namukupanga. Sakima na lumelanga mi nakona kukutela kuopela hañata-ñata.
translations.lunda: “Imbaku chen’gi nakufuntila-funtilahu Sakima,” muhelindi wukumushinjila. Sakima wukwitezha nafuntila-funtilahu.
translations.luvale: Ndumbwenyi mwamulambilila, “Wimbe nakuhilwisaho maphapa amavulu.” Sakima etavile nakwimba cheka nacheka.
translations.nyanja: “Imbanso, Sakima,” mlongo wake anamupempha. Sakima ankavomela ndi kuimbanso mobwelezela.
translations.tonga: “Koimba alimwi, Sakima” musyoonto wakwe wakali kulomba. Sakima wakali kuzumina akwiinduluka kwiimba.

lines.english:
One evening when his parents returned home, they were very quiet.

Sakima knew that there was something wrong.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo ilyo abafyashi bakwe baabwelele pa ŋanda, baalifye tondolo. Sakima aalishibe ukutiila pali ifyalubene.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo mabanga, bansemi yanji byobabwelele kunzubo, bazhindamine bingi. Sakima wayukile amba pajinga lukatazho.
translations.lozi: Lizazi leliñwi manzibwana bashemi bahae habato punya, nebasina mwangalo, Sakima alemuha kuli nekunani butata.
translations.lunda: Melela amu chiyafuntiliwu anvwali zhindi kwitala, adin’ga amwena. Sakima welukili nindi kunatami yuma yimu.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe nachingoloshi omu visemi jenyi vahilukile hembo, vaholele kulu. Sakima ejivile ngwenyi vyuma kavyapwile kanawako.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina pamene makolo ake anabwelela ku nyumba, anakhala chete. Sakima anadziwa kuti kunali vuto.
translations.tonga: Mangolezya amwi bazyali bakwe nobakapiluka kuŋanda, bakali kuumwine kapati. Sakima wakazyiba kuti kuli cilubide.

lines.english:
“What is wrong, mother, father?” Sakima asked.

Sakima learned that the rich man’s son was missing.

The man was very sad and lonely.

translations.bemba: “Finshi ifilubene, maayo, taata?” efyo aabepwishe. Sakima Baamwebele ukutiila umwana wa mukankaala aalilubile. Umukankaala aali no bulanda nganshi kabili aalifye eka bulanda-bulanda.
translations.kaonde: “Maama, taata, kika kyakatazha?” Sakima waipwizhe. Sakima ba mubujile amba mwana wa munonshi waeleka. Munonshi wajinga bingi na bulanda ne bunke.
translations.lozi: Butata kibufi, boma, bo ndate? Sakima abuza. Sakima alemuha kuli mwanaa mufumi wa mushimani na tondahalile. Mi ndatahe na lobehile hahulu pilu ni kuikutwa bulutu.
translations.lunda: “Kukalanyi chidiku mama, Tata?” Sakima wehweli. Sakima welukili nindi mwana ka iyala waheta wazhimbeli. Ona iyala wadin’ga kankayindi.
translations.luvale: Sakima ahulishile ngwenyi, “Ika inapihiko, mama, tata?” Sakima vamulwezele ngwavo mwana uze lihando ajimbalile. Shikaho uze lunga alinyengele nakwivwa uli.
translations.nyanja: “Kodi nichani chalakwika, amai, atate?” Sakima anafunsa. Sakima anamvela kuti mwana wa bambo wolemela anasowa ndi bambo wake anali ndi chisoni.
translations.tonga: “Ino ncinzi calubila baama abataata?” wakabuzya Sakima. Sakima wakaambilwa kuti mwanaa muvwubi musankwa wakalisweekede. Aboobo muvwubi wakalendelelwa akuusa kapati.

lines.english:
“I can sing for him. He might be happy again,” Sakima told his parents.

But his parents dismissed him.

“He is very rich. You are only a blind boy. Do you think your song will help him?”

translations.bemba: “Kuti namwimbilako. Limbi kuti asansamuka na kabili,” efyo Sakima aebele abafyashi bakwe. Nomba abafyashi bakwe balikene. Abati, “Uyu muntu mukankaala saana. Iwe uli mwaice kabili taumona. Uleetontokanya ukutiila ulwimbo lobe kuti lwamwafwilisha?”
translations.kaonde: Sakima waambile amba, “Nakonsha kumwimbila. Kampepo wakonsha kwikala kusangalala jikwabo,” Sakima wabujile bansemi yanji. Bino bansemi yanji bamukanyishile amba, “Awa munonshi bingi. Obewa wimwayiketu kabiji wimputa. Nanchi walanguluka amba lwimbo obe wakonsha kumukwashanyi?”
translations.lozi: “Nakona kuyo muopelela mwendi uka kona ku angulukelwa hape,” Sakima a bulelela bashemi bahae. Kono bashemi bahae bahana. “Bona yale ufumile hahulu. Wena usibofu feela, cwale unahana kuli pina yahao ikamutusa ñi?”
translations.lunda: “Natweshi kumwimbila. Wukwikala wamuzan’galu chen’gi,” Sakima walezheli anvwali zhindi. Ilan’ga anvwali zhindi hiyetezheliku. “Wukweti maheta nankashi. Eyi ukapuputa hohu. Wunamoni neyi mwasu weyi wukumukwasha?”
translations.luvale: Sakima alwezele visemi jenyi ngwenyi, “Ngunahase kumwimbila. Kwiji phamo mwawahilila cheka.” Oloze visemi jenyi vamukanyishile, ngwavo. “Apwa wakupita chikuma. Ukapuputa kamwanalunga. Unashinganyeka ngwove mwaso wove naumukafwa?”
translations.nyanja: “Ndingawaimbile. Angakondwelenso,” Sakima anaudza makolo ake. Koma makolo ake sanamuvokeze. “Ndi munthu wolemela kwambili. Iwe uli wa khungu chabe. Uganiza kuti nyimbo yako izamuthandiza?”
translations.tonga: “Inga ndamwiimbila. Ndiza inga wakkomana alimwi.” Sakima wakabaambila bazyali bakwe. Pesi bazyali bakwe bakamukasya. “Uuya ulivwubide. Yebo ulimusankwa biyo uubaide. Uyeeya kuti nyimbo yako inga yagwasya nzi kuli nguwe?”

lines.english:
However, Sakima did not give up.

His little sister supported him.

She said, “Sakima’s songs soothe me when I am hungry. They will soothe the rich man too.”

translations.bemba: Sakima taanenwiike. Nkashi yakwe aalimulandiileko. Aatiile, “Inyimbo shakwa Sakima shilantalalika nga ndi ne nsala. No mukankaala wine kuti shamutalalika. ”
translations.kaonde: Nangwa byonkabyo, Sakima kechi wikilekelene. Nyenga yanji mwanyike wamutundaikile. Waambile amba, “Nyimbo yakwa Sakima indelezha inge naumvwa nzala. Yakonsha kumutekeneshako munonshi.”
translations.lozi: Nihakulicwalo, Sakima nasikazwafa mi kezelaahae amutusa. Ali, “Lipina za Sakima zani ombaombanga hanishwile tala mi niyena mufumi lika muombaomba cwalo.”
translations.lunda: Hela chochu, Sakima halekeliku. Muhelindi wamukwashiliku. Hakuhosha nindi, “Nyasu ya Sakima yawundishan’ga neyi nidi nanzala. Yikuundisha ona iyala waheta niyena.”
translations.luvale: Oloze, Sakima kecheleko, Songo yenyi nayikhiye amuhakwilile ngwenyi, “Myaso ya Sakima yeji kungwivwisa kuwaha nge ngunevu zala. Shikaho inahase kwivwisa kuwaha uze pichi nawa.”
translations.nyanja: Angakhale conco, Sakima sanaleke. Mlongo wake wamng’ono anamupatsa mphamvu. Iye anati, “Nyimbo za Sakima zimandilimbikitsa pamene ndili okwiya. Zizalimbikitsanso bambo wolemela.
translations.tonga: Nokuba boobo, Sakima taakaleka pe. Musyoonto wakwe musimbi wakamugwasyilizya. Wakati, “Nyimbo zya Sakima zyilanduumbulizya kuti ndilaa nzala. Aboobo amuvwubi zyilakonzya kumuumbulizya.”

lines.english: The following day, Sakima asked his little sister to lead him to the rich man’s house.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, Sakima aebele nkashi yakwe ukumutungulula ku ŋanda ya mukankaala.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jalondejileepo, Sakima walombele nyenga yanji mwanyike kumutwala kunzubo yauno shetu munonshi.
translations.lozi: Zazi lelitatama Sakima akupa kezelaahae wa mwanana kuli amusindekete kwandu ya mufumi.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dasinsilimu, Sakima walezheli muhelindi kumutwala kwitala danona iyala waheta.
translations.luvale: Likumbi lyakavako, Sakima alwezele songo yenyi kumutetekeza kuzuvo yauze pichi.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lotsatilapo, Sakima anapempha mlongo wake kumupeleka ku nyumba ya bambo wolemela.
translations.tonga: Buzuba bwakatobela, Sakima wakaambila musyoonto wakwe kuti amusindikile kuŋanda yamuvwubi.

lines.english:
He stood below one big window and began to sing his favourite song.

Slowly, the head of the rich man began to show through the big window.

translations.bemba: Aiminine mwisamba lye windo ilikalamba no kwamba ukwimba ulwimbo aatemwishishe. Panoono-panoono, umutwe wa mukankaala wayambile ukumoneka pa windo.
translations.kaonde: Waimene munshi yawindo ikatampe kabiji watendekele kwimba lwimbo yeatemenwe. Pachepache, mutwe wauno shetu munonshi watendekele kuseela pa windo ikatampe.
translations.lozi: Hayema kwatasaa windo yetuna mi akala kuopela pina yanalata hahulu. Kabunya, toho ya mufumi yakala kubonahala mwa windo yeo.
translations.lunda: Wemeni mwishina da injanena yayineni nakutachika kwimba kamina kindi kaken’gayi. Chanti-chanti, mutu wanona iyala watachikili kumwekana ha injanena.
translations.luvale: Emanyine mwishi yanjanena imwe yayinene nakuputuka kwimba mwaso wenyi azangilenga kuhambakana. Kakandende kaha, uze pichi aputukile kunonoka muze munjanena.
translations.nyanja: Anaimilila pa pafupi ndi dzenela ndi kuyamba kimba nyimbo yake yapa mtima. Posachedwa, mutu wa bambo wolemela unayamba kuonekela pa dezenela lalikulu.
translations.tonga: Wakaima ansi ampulungwido akutalika kwiimba lwiimbo ndwaakali kuyandisya. Asyoonto-syoonto, mutwe wamuvwubi wakatalika kulibonya ampulungwido.

lines.english:
The workers stopped what they were doing. They listened to Sakima’s beautiful song.

But one man said, “Nobody has been able to console the boss. Does this blind boy think he will console him?”

translations.bemba: Ababomfi baaleekele imilimo yabo. Baaleekutika ku lwimbo lwakwa Sakima ulwawama nganshi. Nomba shitaata umo aatiile, “Tapaaba nangu umo uwakwanisha ukutalalika ba bwana. Bushe uyu mulumendo wapofula aleemona kwati kuti abatalalika?”
translations.kaonde: Bamingilo balekele byo baubilenga. Batelekele kulwimbo lwakwa Sakima wawama bingi. Shetu umo waambile amba, “Kafwako nangwa umo wakonsheshe kutekenesha bantangi betu ne. Nanchi awe mwanyike mputa walanguluka amba wakonsha kwiba tekenesha nyi?”
translations.lozi: Babeleki batuhela zene baeza mi bateeleza kwa pina yende ya Sakima. Kono muuna yomuñwi ali, “Hakuna ya konile kuombaomba mufumi, cwale mucaha yo wa sibofu unahana kuli yena uka kona?”
translations.lunda: Ankon’gi alekeli kwila yuma yadin’ga nakwilawu. Atiyililili mwasu wa sakima wawuwahi, ilan’ga wumu wawu nindi, “Ninowu natweshi dehi kukokwezha bosi kosi. Iwu Kansi weyala Wa kapuputa namoni neyi yena wukutwesha?”
translations.luvale: Vakakuzata vechele vize vapwilenga nakulinga. Vevwililile kumwaso wa Sakima wamwaza ngachize. Oloze lunga umwe ahanjikile ngwenyi, “Wauchi nahase kumuvendejeka ou pichi. Kaha ou kanyike wakapuputa ali nakushinganyeka ngwenyi ikhiye nahase kumuvendejeka?”
translations.nyanja: Anchito analeka zomwe anali kuchita. Anamvesela ku nyimbo ya Sakima yabwino. Koma bambo wina anati, “Kulibe omwe anakwanisapo kutonthoza akulu anchito. Kodi mnyamata wakhungu uyu aganiza kuti azawatonthoza?”
translations.tonga: Babelesi bakaleka nzyibakali kucita. Bakatalika kuswiilila lwiimbo lwa Sakima lubotu. Umwi musankwa wakati, “Kunyina waakonzya kumuumbulizya uutulela. Ino mwana ooyu ubaide uyeeya kuti inga wacikonzya kumuumbulizhya?”

lines.english:
Sakima finished singing his song and turned to leave.

But the rich man rushed out and said, “Please sing again.”

translations.bemba: Sakima alipwishishe ukwimba ulwimbo lwakwe kabili alimine ukuti aleeya ku mwabo. Nomba umukankaala alifumine panse no kutiila “Napaapaata, imba na kabili.”
translations.kaonde: Sakima wapwishishe kwimba kabiji wa alukile amba ayenga. Bino uno shetu munonshi walupukile lubilo ne kumwambila Sakima amba, “Nasansapo, imbako ne jikwabo.”
translations.lozi: Sakima hafeza feela kuopela pina yahae, hafetuha kuli hafunduke kono mufumi amumatela mi ali, “Opela hape.”
translations.lunda: Sakima wamanishili kwimba kamina kindi nindi atachikan’ga kufunta. Ilan’ga ona iyala waheta wedikili hanzhi nakuhosha nindi, “Nalembi Imbaku chen’gi.”
translations.luvale: Sakima amanyishile kwimba mwaso wenyi kaha alumukile mangana ayenga. Oloze uze pichi alwasumukile nakuhanjika ngwenyi, “Ngunakusakwilako imba cheka.”
translations.nyanja: Sakima anasiliza kuimba nyimbo yake ndipo anatembenuka kufuna kubwelela kunyumba. Koma bambo wolemela anatuluka naumuuza nati, “Chonde, imbanso nyimbo.”
translations.tonga: Sakima wakamaninzya kwiimba nyimbo yakwe akunyamuka kuti aunke. Pesi muvwubi wakabalikila anze akwaamba kuti “Ndakomba, koimba alimwi.”

lines.english:
At that very moment, two men came carrying someone on a stretcher.

They had found the rich man’s son beaten up and left on the side of the road.

translations.bemba: Apopeene kwaishile abantu babili nabasenda umuntu pa macila. Baasangile umwana wa mukankaala nabamupuma ku fipondo kabili bamushiile mumbali ya musebo.
translations.kaonde: Pakyonkakya kimye, bashetu babiji baishile saka basenda muntu pamakila. Bataine mwananji uno munonshi bamupuma kabiji bamusha ne kunsa ya mukwakwa.
translations.lozi: Kanako onayeo, kwataha baana bababeli bananuzi mutu fa saala. Nebafumani mwanaa mufumi wa mushimani inge anatilwe ni kusiiwa kwa tuko anzila.
translations.lunda: Hampinji kana iyi, kwadin’ga amayala ayedi enzili anyamuna muntu hachitamba. Aweni mwana kanona Iyala da maheta anamweti nakumushiya kumbadi ya mukwakwa.
translations.luvale: Luze vene lwola, malunga vavali vejile oho ngocho vanambate muthu muchipoya. Vawanyine uze mwana pichi vanamuvete nakumuseza kujila.
translations.nyanja: Pa nthawi yomweyo, amuna awili anabwela apo anyamula munthu. Anali anapeza mwana wa bambo wolemelayo atamenyedwa ndi kusiyidwa pambali pa mseu.
translations.tonga: Aciindi ncimunya ciya, kwakaboola basankwa bobilo kabanyamwide muntu akalo kabantu bacisidwe. Bakamujana mwanaa muvwubi kumbali aanzila kaumidwe.

lines.english:
The rich man was so happy to see his son again.

He rewarded Sakima for consoling him.

He took his son and Sakima to hospital so Sakima could regain his sight.

translations.bemba: Umukankaala aalisansamwike pa kumona umwana wakwe na kabili. Aalilambwile Sakima pa kumutalalika ku mutima. Aatwele umwana wakwe na Sakima ku cipataala mu kumona nga kuti Sakima atampa ukumona na kabili.
translations.kaonde: Uno shetu munonshi wasangalele bingi pakumona mwananji jikwabo. Wamulambwile Sakima pakumutekenesha na lwimbo. Watwajile mwananji ne Sakima kukipatela pakuuba amba Sakima atambule lubuko lwa menso.
translations.lozi: Mufumi na tabile hahulu kubona mwanaa hae hape. Hafa Sakima mupuzo waku muombaomba. Haisa mwanaa hae ni Sakima kwa sipatela kuli hayoalafiwa kwa meeto ahae kuli hakale kubona hape.
translations.lunda: Iyala da maheta watiyili kuwaha hakumona mwanindi weyala chen’gi. Wafweteli Sakima hakumukundezha. Watweli Sakima na mwanindi ku chipatela kulonda Sakima atweshi kumona chen’gi.
translations.luvale: Uze pichi awahililile chikuma hakumona mwanenyi cheka. Amufwetele Sakima hakumuvendejeka. Atwalile mwanenyi na Sakima kuchipatela mangana Sakima ahase kumona cheka.
translations.nyanja: Bambo wolemela anakondwela kwambili kuona mwana wake. Anapatsa mphatso kwa Sakima powatonthoza. Anapeleka mwana wao ndi Sakima ku chipatala kuti Sakima akayambe kuonanso.
translations.tonga: Muvwubi wakakkomana kubona mwanaakwe musankwa alimwi. Wakalumbula Sakima akaambo kakumuumbulizya. Wakabweza mwanaakwe musankwa alimwi a Sakima, akuunka kucibbadela, kuya kuzyiba naa Sakima inga wabona alimwi.

title:
Sakima lived with his parents and his four year old sister.

They lived on a rich man’s land.

Their grass-thatched hut was at the end of a row of trees.

lines.english: The small bus stop in my village was busy with people and overloaded buses. On the ground were even more things to load. Touts were shouting the names where their buses were going.

translations.bemba: Pa citesheni ca saaca mu mushi wandi pali abantu abengi na basaaca abaiswilemo abantu. Panshi napo ninshi pali ifipe na fimbi ifyakulonga. Abalumendo ninshi baleependilila ukuleya basaaca.
translations.kaonde: Kiteshenyi kicheeche kya mabbasi mumuzhi wetu pavujile bantu ne mabbasi ayujile nabipe ne bantu. Panshi napo pajinga bintu bikwabo byavula byakebewenga kulonga. Bansongwalume babijikilenga kumapunzha kwailenga mabbasi.
translations.lozi: Kateshini ka limbasi ka kwa hae yaluna ne kapatehile ni batu ni limbasi zenelilongilwe maswe. Fafasi nekusatezi lika zenelisaswanela kulongiwa. Bahuwi neba huwa mabizo a libaka konekuya limbasi.
translations.lunda: Kawimenu wa basi mumukala wami kenzeli nawantu na zhi basi zhaswezha kwenzala nawa. Hamaseki hadin’ga yuma yikwawu yadin’ga Nakuken’geka kulon’gewa. Atuponya adin’ga Nakubidika zhinzhila kwadin’ga nakuya zhina zhi basi.
translations.luvale: Hawimanyino wajisacha mwimbo lyami halihomene vathu najisacha jakuzala. Hamavu hapwilenga vyuma vyavivulu vyakuvandamina kulongejeka. Mitoloki vapwile nakutambakana kwapwile nakuya jisacha javo.
translations.nyanja: Poimilila mabasi ag’ono kumudzi kwathu panali potangwanidwa ndi mabasi olonga kwambili. Pansi panalinso katundu oculuka ofunika kulongedwa. Oitanitsa anthu anali kufuula maina akumene mabasi amapita.
translations.tonga: Citisyini cisyoonto camabbaasi cakazwide zyicitika abantu banji amabbaasi azwide bantu. Kwakali zyintu zyinji zyakeelede kukkwezekwa.Aansi aaalo akacili zyintu zinjaanji zyakeelede kukwezekwa. Bambi bantu bakali kwaamba mazyinaa masena nkwaakali kuunka mabbaasi.

lines.english: “City! City! Going west!” I heard a tout shouting. That was the bus I needed to catch.

translations.bemba: “Ku kalale! Ku kalale! Abaleya ku masamba!” Naumfwile baleepunda. Eesaaca nalingile ukuniina.
translations.kaonde: “Kutaunyi! Kutaunyi! Babena kuya kumuzhika!” Naumvwine nsongwalume wabijika. Yonkaya yoyajinga bbasi yonafwanyijile kukanjilamo.
translations.lozi: Tolopo! Tolopo! Kuliba kwa malikelelo! Nautwa bahuwi bapunda. Kona mbasi yenitokwa kukwela.
translations.lunda: Mbaka! Mbaka! Kuya kumuzhika! Natiyili kaponya nakubidika. Diyi basi inaken’gelen’ga kukandama.
translations.luvale: Ngwevwile mutoloki ali nakutambakana, “Mbaka! Mbaka! Yakuya kumulauko!” Ize ikhiko Sacha ngwatondele kukandama.
translations.nyanja: “Tauni! Tauni! Kupita kumadzulo!” Ndinamvela oitanitsa kufuula. Iyo ndiyo basi ndimafuna kukwela.
translations.tonga: “Dolopo, dolopo! Baya kumbo.” Ndakamvwa muntu kaamba cakuyobeka. Njenjiyo bbaasi njindakeelede kutanta.

lines.english: The city bus was almost full, but more people were still pushing to get on. Some packed their luggage under the bus. Others put theirs on the racks inside.

translations.bemba: Saaca yaaleeya ku kalaale ninshi ili mukwisula, nomba abantu beena ninshi bacili balelwisha ukuniina. Bambi baalongele ifipe munshi ya saaca. Bambi baalongele pa tushimbi twa mukati ka saaca.
translations.kaonde: Bbasi yailenga kutaunyi kwashajiletu pacheeche kuyula kabiji ne bantu baavula beshinjikilenga amba batwele. Bamo balongele bipe byabo munshi ya bbasi. Bakwabo nabo batujile bipe byabo mukachi ponka pakutula bipe.
translations.lozi: Mbasi ya kwa tolopo neseitezi kono batu babañata nebasakashana ili kuli bakwele mwateñi. Babañwi neba beile mikotani yabona mwatasaa mbasi. Babañwi nebabeile mwahalaa mbasi luli.
translations.lunda: Basi yakuya kumbaka yadin’ga kwakamwihi nakwinzala, ilan’ga antu adin’ga achidi nakudishinjizheka kulonda en’gili. Amakwawu alon’geli yiteli yawu mwishina da basi. Amakwawu nawa ashili yawa hayitamba mukachi ka basi.
translations.luvale: Sacha yakuya kumbaka yapwile kwakamwihi nakuzala, oloze vathu vavavulu vapwile nakulishinjika kutonda kwingila mukachi. Vamwe valongejekele viteli vyavo mwishi yasacha. Vekha vahakile vyavo hakhelulu jamukachi kasacha.
translations.nyanja: Basi yakutauni inali pafupi kudzala, koma anthu ambili anali akali kukankha kuti alowe. Ena analonga katundu yao munsi mwa basi. Ena anaika moika katundu mkati mwa basi.
translations.tonga: Bbaasi liya kudolopo lyakali kuyanda kuzula, pesi bantu banji bakacili kuyanda kutanta. Bamwi bakabikka zyintu zyabo mujungusi abbaasi. Bamwi bakatanta anzyizyo mukati.

lines.english: New passengers clutched their tickets as they looked for somewhere to sit in the crowded bus. Women with young children made them comfortable for the long journey.

translations.bemba: Abaaleniina baikatiliile utumatikiti lintu baalefwaya apakwikala muli saaca iyaiswile abantu. Banamaayo abaali na baana baafwaile abaana babo apakwikala bwino pa bulendo ubutali.
translations.kaonde: Ba kañenda baishilenga panyuma bakwachile matiketi aabo kumaboko saka bakeba pa kwikala mubbasi wayula. Bainetu bajinga na baana babacheeche bebabikile bulongo pakwikala namambo akuuba amba lwendo lwalepele.
translations.lozi: Bazamai babañwi babanca nebaswalelezi ma tiketi abona banze babata fa kuina mwa mbasi yeneitezi. Basali ni limbututu zabona baina ka kuiketa mwa musipili womutelele woo.
translations.lunda: Amaha akweleli basi adin’ga nakuvun’gulula tuzhi tiketi twawu nakuken’ga hakushakama muna mu basi yakwinzhala. Akamama adin’ga nanyana ayishakamishili chachiwayi mulon’ga wanzhila kuleha.
translations.luvale: Vaze vapwile nakwingila musacha vakwachile matiketi avo chosena vatondele hakutwamina muze musacha mwazalile navathu. Maphwevo navana vatwamishile kanawa haungeji wavo wausuku uze.
translations.nyanja: Okwela atsopano anagwila matikiti ao pomwe amafuna-funa pomwe angakhale mu basi yodzala ndi anthu. Azimai a ana ang’ono ang’ono anawakhazika bwino paulendo utali.
translations.tonga: Bamwi nibakabapa matiketi, bakayandaula akukkala mubbaasi. Bamakaintu bakalaa bana bakabakkazyika kabotu.

lines.english: I squeezed in next to a window. The person sitting next to me was holding tightly to a green plastic bag. He wore old sandals, a worn out coat, and he looked nervous.

translations.bemba: Naifyantike mupeepi ne windo. Abo naikeele nabo mupeepi baikete akacola ka pulashitiki akakatapakatapa. Baafwele indyato ishakale ne jaketi ilyapwa kabili baaleemoneka mwenso-mwenso.
translations.kaonde: Nechichimikele kubwipi nawindo. Muntu waikele kubwipi neamiwa wakwachijile kyola kyapulasitiki kyamanzha-matamba. Wavwajile nkwabilo yakala, jakete wapwa kabiji wamwekene kumvwa moyo.
translations.lozi: Seni isineleketeza kwa tuko a windo. Mutu yanainzi kwatuko nina naswalelezi pepa ya pulasitiki ya mubala wa butala. Natinile ma patapataa kale ni cansi yecancaukile mi nabonahala kusaba.
translations.lunda: Nadiswizhili kwakwihi nanjanena. Muntu washakamini kwakwihi nanami wadin’ga na Chola cha mafu amatamba ajinjikiliyi. Wavweli ma sando amwaka na jaketi yatabuzhoka kaha nawa wadin’ga nakumwekana wawoma.
translations.luvale: Ngwalichinyinyikile kwakamwihi nanjanena. Muthu atwamine kwakamwihi nayami akwachishile kungonga yenyi yandundu yamafwo-amatamba. Avwalile jisambalakata jamwaka, chashi chamwaka chakufwa kaha asolekele kupwa nawoma.
translations.nyanja: Ndinaziika pafupi ndi dzenela. Munthu amena anakhala pafupi ndi ine anagwilila pulasitiki ya msipu. Anavala nkhwawilo zakale, khoti lakutha, ndipo amaoneka wamantha.
translations.tonga: Ndakalisyanikizya akukkala munsi aampulungwido. Muntu wakakkede munsi lyangu wakajisi cipepa canyanzabili. Wakali samide nkwabilo zyakaindi akajansi kajujukide, kaboneka kuyoowa.

lines.english: I looked outside the bus and realised that I was leaving my village, the place where I had grown up. I was going to the big city.

translations.bemba: Naloleshe panse ya saaca elyo caisa mu maano ukuti ciine-ciine naaleefuma mu mushi wandi, incende nakuliilemo. Naleeya ku musumba ukulu.
translations.kaonde: Natajile pangye ya bbasi ne kulanguluka amba mbena kusha muzhi wami, mpunzha mona komejile. Nailenga kutaunyi mukatampe.
translations.lozi: Hanitalimela fande a mbasi seni hupula kuli neni siya munzi wahesu, kwa sibaka koneni hulezi. Neniya kwa tolopo.
translations.lunda: Natalili hanzhi ya basi hinikwiluka Nami hinikushiya kumukala, ilun’ga munakulili. Nadin’ga nakuya kumbaka.
translations.luvale: Ngwatalile haweluka wasacha nakwanuka ngwami ngwapwile nakuseza limbo lyami, limbo ngwakolelelemo. Ngwapwile nakuya kumbaka yayinene.
translations.nyanja: Ndinapenya kubwalo kwa basi ndipo ndinazindikila kuti ndinali kusiya mudzi wanga, kumalo komwe ndinakulila. Ndinali kupita ku tauni yaikulu.
translations.tonga: Ndakalanga anze abbaasi, ndamana ndakayeeya kuti ndausiya munzi ookwesu, mwindakakomenena. Nduunka kudolopo lipati.

lines.english: The loading was completed and all passengers were seated. Hawkers still pushed their way into the bus to sell their goods to the passengers. Everyone was shouting the names of what was available for sale. The words sounded funny to me.

translations.bemba: Bapwisha ukulonga na bantu bonse baikala. Abakushitisha ninshi bacili balepitana muli saaca mu kushitisha utwamakwebo yabo ku bantu. Cila muntu alepunda amashina yafyo aaleeshitisha. Aya mashiwi baaleelanda yaaleesekesha.
translations.kaonde: Kulonga bipe kwapwile kabiji ne bakañenda bonse baikele. Bapotesha bintu nabo batwelelenga mubbasi nakupotesha byabusulu bwabo ku bakañenda. Bonse babijikilenga mazhina abyonse byo bapoteshenga. Byambo byabo bwaumvwanyikilenga nobe byambo byabisela.
translations.lozi: Kulonga nesekufelile mi ni batu kaufela nesebainzi. Balekisi nebasaipumanela nzila yakukena mwa mbasi kulekisa lika kwa bazamai. Mutu ni mutu nahuweleza lika zananani za kulekisa. Manzwi nautwahala kusehisa kuna.
translations.lunda: Kulon’ga yitelu kwakumini kaha nawa antu ezhima ashakazheli. Akakulandisha yakuda adiswezhili Kulonda alandishi yakuda kudi antu mu basi. Ezhima wawu adin’ga Nakubidika yakuda yadin’gawu nayu. Mazhina kana wenawa adin’ga akusehesha.
translations.luvale: Kulongejeka kwakumine kaha nawa vosena vapwilenga musacha vatwamine. Vakakulanjisa vatwalilileho kulichichimika musacha nakulanjisa vyuma vyavo. Vosena vapwilenga nakutambakana kukulisa vize vapwilenga nakulanjisa. Mazu evwikile apwile akusehesa kuli yami.
translations.nyanja: Kulonga kunamalizika ndipo aulendo onse anakhazikika pansi. Azamalonda naonso anali kuzipatikiza kulowa mubasi kugulitsa katundu wao ku aulendo. Aliyense anali kufuula maina azomwe zinalipo zogulitsa. Mau anamveka odabwitsa kwa ine.
translations.tonga: Kubikka zyintu mubbaasi kwakamana alimwi basilweendo boonse bakalikkede muzyuuno. Pesi basambazi bakacili kuyanda kunjila mubbaasi kuti basambale. Aumwi wakali kwaamba nzyasambala. Mabala amwi akali kundisesya.

lines.english: A few passengers bought drinks, others bought small snacks and began to chew. Those who did not have any money, like me, just watched.

translations.bemba: Abalendo abanoono baashitile ifyakunwa, bambi bashita utwakulya batampa no kulya. Abashakwete indalama nga ine baletambakofye.
translations.kaonde: Bakañenda bacheeche bapotele byakutoma, bakwabo nabo bapotele byakujisha ne kutendeka kunyeuna. Aba bujile mali nobe amiwa, batajilengakotu na menso.
translations.lozi: Babañwi nebalekile lino, babañwi tuco-co totuinyani ni kukala kutafuna-tafuna. Benebasina masheleñi, inge na, nebabuha feela.
translations.lunda: Antu amakwawu mu basi alandili zhakunwa amakwawu twakubokota nakutachika kuda. Ana adin’ga abula madi neyami, adin’ga nakutala hohu.
translations.luvale: Vamwe valanjile vyakunwa, vakwavo valanjile vyakulya vyamweseke nakuputuka kutafunya. Vaze kavapwile najimbongoko nge yami, twatalileko kaha.
translations.nyanja: Aulendo ang’ono anagulako zakumwa, ena anagulako zakudya zotsekemela za zing’ono zing’ono ndipo anayamba kutamfuna. Aja amene analibe ndalama, monga ine tinangopenyelela.
translations.tonga: Basilweendo basyoonto bakaula zyakunywa azyakulya. Aabo bakanyina mali mbuli ndime, bakali kwiide kulanga.

lines.english: These activities were interrupted by the hooting of the bus, a sign that we were ready to leave. The tout yelled at the hawkers to get out.

translations.bemba: Ukushitisha no kushita kwapumfyanishiwe lintu uuta ya saacai yalilile, ukulangisha ukuti yaali mukwima. Kondakita epakupundilila bakashitisha bonse ukuti bekile muli saaca.
translations.kaonde: Bino byonse byaubiwenga byaimene pakumvwa kilulumo kyauta wa bbasi, kayukilo kakuba amba pano twinengezha kunyamuka. Bansongwalume babujile bapoteshenga kulupuka mubbasi.
translations.lozi: Ze kaufela nezipumelezwi ki mulumo wa mbasi, sisupo sa kukala kufunduka. Bahuwi babulelela balekisi kuli bazwe mwa mbasi.
translations.lunda: Kusekashana kweniku akwimikili mulon’ga waku bukuma cha basi hikumwekesha neyi basi yidi kwakwihi nakunyemuka. Kaponya walezheli akakulandisha kufuma mu basi.
translations.luvale: Evi vikilikita vyakulanjisa vaviluwanganyishile kukusopesa chasacha, chinjikizo chakusolola ngwavo vanaliwahisa nakuya. Mutoloki wajisacha alwezele vakakulanjisa kufuma muminyau.
translations.nyanja: Zocita zimenezi zinasokonezedwa ndi kulila kwa huta ya bus, kudziwitsa kuti tinali pafupi kunyamuka. Onenezela anafuulila ogulitsa kuti atuluke kubwalo.
translations.tonga: Eezyi zyakali kucitika zyoonse zyakanyonganinzyigwa akusiba kwabbaasi. Eeci cakali citondezyo cakuti bbaasi lyakali kuyanda kutalika kweenda. Basambala bakaambilwa kuti bazwe anze.

lines.english: Hawkers pushed each other to make their way out of the bus. Some gave back change to the travellers. Others made last minute attempts to sell more items.

translations.bemba: Bakashitisha balasunkana pa kufuma muli bashi. Bambi baleebwesesha cenji ku baali pa bulendo. Bambi nabo balelwisha ukushitishako ifyakulekelesha.
translations.kaonde: Bapoteshenga beshinjikilenga mulwabo pakuuba amba balupuke mubbasi. Bamo bapainenga makyengi kubakañenda bapotelenga bintu. Bamo nabo baesekelenga kupotesha japelako.
translations.lozi: Balekisi baikasha-kasha banze bazwela fande. Babañwi bafa cenci kubazamai. Babañwi nebasabata kulekisa lika zabona lwa mafelelezo.
translations.lunda: Akakulandisha adishinjikili wumu namukwawu kulonda afumi muna mu basi. Amakwawu adin’ga achidi nakuken’ga kulandisha muka mpinji kanyanya.
translations.luvale: Vakakulanjisa valishinjikile mangana vafume musacha. Vakwavo vahanyine jichenji kuli venyajo. Vakwavo vesekele kulanjisa muze vene mulwola lwamakumishilo.
translations.nyanja: Ogulitsa anakankhana wina ndi mnzace kuti atuluke mu basi. Ena anali kupeleka chenji kwa apaulendo. Ena amayesa kugulitsa zinthu zao nthawi yothela.
translations.tonga: Basambazi bakatalika kuzwa kumwi kabalimbana. Bamwi bakacili kupilusya mali aakali kwiindilila, bamwi bakacili kusola kuti basambale kamamanino.

lines.english: As the bus left the bus stop, I stared out of the window. I wondered if I would ever go back to my village again.

translations.bemba: Cilya saaca yafuma mu citesheni, nalaalolesha pa windo. Nalaatontokanya nga cakuti nkatala nkabwelelemo ku mushi na kabili.
translations.kaonde: Bbasi byoyafuminenga pakitesheni, nasumbijile pangye yawindo. Nalangulukilepo inge kyakuuba amba nkabwelako jibiji kumuzhi.
translations.lozi: Mbasi aseifundukile, senilubukela fande a lihaulo. Seninahana haiba nikakona kukutela kwa hae hape.
translations.lunda: Chiyadi’ga nakunyemuka basi, natalili hanzhi ya injanena. Nadin’ga nakudihula neyi nikamba chen’gi kufunta kumukala.
translations.luvale: Omu sacha yasunukile, ngwanonokele hanjanena. Ngwalihulishile nge nangukeza kukahiluka cheka kwimbo.
translations.nyanja: Pomwe basi imacoka pa sitesheni ya basi, ndinayangana padzenela. Ndinaganizila ngati ndizabwelanso kumudzi wanga.
translations.tonga: Bbaasi nilyakatalika kweenda, ndakalanga ampulungwido. Ndayeeyela mumoyo kuti ccita naa ndiya kujokela kumunzi alimwi.

lines.english: As the journey progressed, the inside of the bus got very hot. I closed my eyes hoping to sleep.

translations.bemba: Cilya tuleya, muli saaca mwakaba. Naisala amenso ukuti ningashipulako.
translations.kaonde: Byotwaendeleko palepa, mukachi mwa bbasi mwaishile kukaba kya kine kine. Nazhinzhibele namba kampepo nsakulaala.
translations.lozi: Musipili anze ukalile, nesekukalile kucisa mwa mbasi. Senitima meeto kunahana kuli mwendi nikalobala.
translations.lunda: Chitwatwalekenihu nanzhila, mukachi ka basi mwadin’ga mwatata. Nabutili menso ami nami hekwawu nikukama.
translations.luvale: Omu ungeji watwalileho, mukachi kasacha mwazumine. Ngwasokele meso ami kutonda kusavala.
translations.nyanja: Pomwe ulendo umacitika, mkati mwa basi munatentha kwambili. Ndinatseka maso anga kuyesa kugona.
translations.tonga: Nitwakeenda musinzo mulamfwu, mubbaasi mwakatalika kupya. Ndakasola kujala meso kutegwa ndoone.

lines.english: But my mind drifted back home. Will my mother be safe? Will my rabbits fetch any money? Will my brother remember to water my tree seedlings?

translations.bemba: Nomba amaano yandi yabwelela ku ŋanda. Bushe bamaayo bakekala umutende? Bushe bakalulu bandi bakashitishiwa? Bushe ndume yandi akulaibukisha ukutapilila utumuti twandi?
translations.kaonde: Bino milanguluko yami yabwelele kumuzhi. Nanchi ba maama bakekalatu bulongo nyi? Tululu twami tukaletanga mali nyi? Kolajami wamulume uka vulukanga kutekezha tubichi twami tucheeche nyi?
translations.lozi: Kono ngana yaka neinzi feela kwa ndu. Kuli bo ma bakasiyala hande? Tushakame twaka tukatisa masheleñi? Munyenaka wa mushimani ukahupula kuselaela tukota twaka?
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga yishin’ganyeka yami yadin’ga nakunfuntisha kumukala. Ochu mama wukwikala chiwahi? Ochu manakwami wukwanuka kuhempula imbuti zhami?
translations.luvale: Oloze vishinganyeka vyapwile kwimbo. Mama ali kanawa? Vambwanda jami navaneha nganyo? Songo yami mwanuka kuthukumwina jimbuto jamitondo yami?
translations.nyanja: Koma maganizo anabwelelanso kumudzi. Kodi amai anga adzakhala bwino? Kodi akalulu anga azabweletsa ndalama zilizonse? Kodi mukulu wanga adzakumbukila kuthilila mbeu zanga zamitengo?
translations.tonga: Mizeezo yangu yakajoka kumunzi. Sena baama banooli kabotu? Sena basulwe mbeevwubide baya kundijanina mali? Sena mwiiinandumi wangu uni kuyeeya kutilila zyisamu nzyeekasyanga?

lines.english: On the way, I memorised the name of the place where my uncle lived in the big city. I was still mumbling it when I fell asleep.

translations.bemba: Mu nshila naya ndesungila ishina lya ncende ukwaleikala bayaama mu kalaale. Ncili ndeilumbula mu kapoopo naponena mutulo.
translations.kaonde: Mujishinda, nalamine jizhina jampunzha kwaikalanga ba mwisho mutaunyi mukatampe. Nejitongwelenga ne mutulo inge nalaala.
translations.lozi: Mwanzila, nenipetile libizo la sibaka kone baina bo malume kwa potolo. Nenisalipeta ni mwabuloko.
translations.lunda: Munzhila yezhima nadin’ga nakwanuka izhina dambaka yayineni kwadin’ga nakushakamayi mandumi yami. Nadin’ga nakuyitena nikutulu chinakamini.
translations.luvale: Hakuya mujila, ngwalamine mumutwe lijina lyangalila atwaminengako nathu muze mumbaka yayinene. Ngwapwilenga nakuyivuluka likha chosena ngwalezukilile mutulo.
translations.nyanja: Mnjila, ndinakumbukila dzina ya malo amene amalume anakhalako mu mzinda ukulu. Ndinali ndikali kung’ung’udzila pamene tulo tunanigwila ndipo ndinagona.
translations.tonga: Munzila, ndakatalika kuliyeezya zyina lyabusena nkobakali kukkala baacisya mudolopo. Ndakacili kulyaambauzya mukaumuumu nohyakandibweza ŋonzi akoona.

lines.english: Nine hours later, I woke up with loud banging and calling for passengers going back to my village. I grabbed my small bag and jumped out of the bus.

translations.bemba: Panuma yansa pabula, nabukila mu congo cabalepunda no kupumpusha ukwita abaleebwekelamo ku mushi wesu. Nasompola akacoola no kufuma muli saaca.
translations.kaonde: Panyuma yama awala atanu ne ana, nabukile nakyongo kyobaimbilenga ku bbasi ne kwita bakañenda babwelelenga kumuzhi kwetu. Natolele ka kyola kami ne kulupuka mubbasi.
translations.lozi: Anze kufitile lihola ze ketalizoho ka zene, senizusiwa ki lilata ni bene babiza bazamai bene bakuta kwa hae. Seni shimba kakotani kaka ni kutuluka mwa mbasi.
translations.lunda: Ma aawa atanu nawa yedi, nahindukili namapumba akutambizheka antu anakufunta chen’gi kumukala wami. Nasendeli Chola chami Nakukilukamu mu basi.
translations.luvale: Omu mwahichile shimbu, ngwahindukile navyema vyakusanyika vathu vapwile nakukinduluka kwimbo. Ngwanonele kangonga kami nakufuma muze musacha.
translations.nyanja: Maola asanu ndi anai atsatila, ndinauka ndi phokoso lalikulu ndi kuitana kwa apaulendo amubasi apita kumudzi kwanga. Ndinatenga cola canga cacing’ono ndi kulumphila kubwalo kwa basi.
translations.tonga: Nikwakainda mawoola ali fwuka, ndakabuka akumvwa bantu kabapundilila basilweendo baunka kumunzi kwesu. Ndakabweza kabbeeke akusotoka kuzwa mubbaasi.

lines.english: The return bus was filling up quickly. Soon it would make its way back east. The most important thing for me now, was to start looking for my uncle’s house.

translations.bemba: Bwangu-bwangu saaca yakubwelelamo yayaileisula. Nombalinefye yalaima ukubwekelamo kukabanga. Icaali icikalamba kuli ine pali ii nshita kwamba ukufwaya iŋanda ya bayaama.
translations.kaonde: Bbasi wabwelelenga wayujile bukiji. Kwakubula kutaya kimye ne yatendekele kubwela kumusela. Pakino kimye kintu kyanema kwi amiwa kyajinga kutendeka kukeba kwajinga nzubo yaba mwisho.
translations.lozi: Mbasi yeneikuta neitala kamaububebe. Cwanoñu, neitwa iliba kwa mapazulelo a lizazi. Senesili butokwa ahulo kuna, neeli kukala kubata ndu ya bo malume.
translations.lunda: Adin’ga nakufunta kumukala adin’ga nakwinzheshamu swayi. Ken’ga yitachiki chen’gi kufunta kumutuntuki. Chuma chedin’ga chalema kudama chedin’ga chakuken’ga kwadin’ga itala da mandumi yami.
translations.luvale: Sacha yakuhiluka yapwilenga nakuzala washi, kalinwomu nayikinduluka. Chachilemu chikuma chasalileko kuli yami jino chapwile kutonda zuvo yanathu.
translations.nyanja: Basi yobwelela kumudzi imadzala mofulumila. Mosacedwa inayamba ulendo wopita kum’mawa. Cofunikila ceni-ceni kwa ine tsopano, cinali cakuyamba kufuna-funa nyumba ya amalume anga.
translations.tonga: Bbaasi lyakali kuyanda kuzula akutalika kuya kujwe. Pesi cintu cipati cakali kuyandika, nkuyandaula ŋanda yabaacisya.

title: The small bus stop in my village was busy with people and overloaded buses. On the ground were even more things to load. Touts were shouting the names where their buses were going.

lines.english: One elephant is going to drink water.

translations.bemba: Insofu imo ileeya mu kunwa ameenshi.
translations.kaonde: Nzovu umo ubena kuya nakutoma meema.
translations.lozi: Tou iliñwi iya kwa kunwa mezi.
translations.lunda: Mutupa wumu nakuya nakunwa menzhi.
translations.luvale: Njamba umwe ali nakuya nakunwa meya.
translations.nyanja: Njovu imozi ipita kukamwa madzi.
translations.tonga: Musovwu omwe uya kukunywa meenda.

lines.english: Two giraffes are going to drink water.

translations.bemba: Indyabuluba shibili shileeya mu kunwa ameenshi.
translations.kaonde: Banjabuluba babiji babena kuya nakutoma meema.
translations.lozi: Litutwa zepeli liya kwa kunwa mezi.
translations.lunda: Ansefu ayedi anakuya nakunwa menzhi.
translations.luvale: Vathungu vavali vali nakuya nakunwa meya.
translations.nyanja: Anyamalikiti awili apita kukamwa madzi.
translations.tonga: Nddudwa zyobilo zyuunka kukunywa meenda.

lines.english: Three buffaloes and four birds are also going to drink water.

translations.bemba: Imboo shitatu ne fyuni fine nafyo fileeya mu kunwa ameenshi.
translations.kaonde: Bambowo basatu ne bañonyi babena kuya nakutoma meema.
translations.lozi: Linali zetalu ni linyunywani zene ni zona liya kwa kunwa mezi.
translations.lunda: Angòmbi zhampata asatu na tuda awana newena anakuya nakunwa menzhi.
translations.luvale: Vaphakasa vatatu natujila vawana navakhiko vali nakuya nakunwa meya.
translations.nyanja: Njati zitatu ndi mbalame zinai nazonso zipita kukamwa madzi.
translations.tonga: Banyati botatwe abayuni bone baya kukunywa meenda abalo.

lines.english: Five impalas and six warthogs are walking to the water.

translations.bemba: Impombo shisaano na bamunjili mutanda baleeya ku meenshi.
translations.kaonde: Bakasha batanu ne bampenge batanu naumo benakuya kumeema.
translations.lozi: Lizui ze keta lizoho ni lingili ze silezi lilibile kwa mezi.
translations.lunda: Tupala atanu na yombu atanunawumu anakwenda nakuya ku menzhi.
translations.luvale: Tusenda vatanu navihengi vatanu-naumwe vali nakuya kumeya.
translations.nyanja: Mphala zisanu ndi nguluwe zisanu ndi imozi zipita kumadzi.
translations.tonga: Banakasya bosanwe abamunjile baali cisambomwe baya kukunywa meenda.

lines.english: Seven zebras are running to the water.

translations.bemba: Bacoolwa cine-lubali baleebutukila ku meenshi.
translations.kaonde: Babingalika batanu nababiji babena kunyemena kumeema.
translations.lozi: Lipizi zeketalizoho ka zepeli limatela kwa mezi.
translations.lunda: Ing’ala atanunawayedi anakutemukila kukalong’a.
translations.luvale: Vangolo vatanu-navavali vali nakuthuchila kumeya.
translations.nyanja: Mbizi zisanu ndi ziwili zithamangila kumadzi.
translations.tonga: Bacibize bali ciloba bazuzila kumeenda.

lines.english: Eight frogs and nine fish are swimming in the water.
