translations.bemba: Baacuula cine-konse-konse ne sabi pabula fileesamba mu menshi.
translations.kaonde: Babombwe batanu na basatu ne masabi atanu na ana abena kowa mumeema.
translations.lozi: Limbotwe zeketalizoho ka zetaalu ni litapi zeketalizoho ka zene zatapa mwa mezi.
translations.lunda: Yula atanunawasatu nanshi atanunawawana anakuwela mumenzhi.
translations.luvale: Vimbotwe vatanu-navatatu navayishi vatanu-navawana vali nakuhala mumeya.
translations.nyanja: Acule asanu ndi atatu kudzanso nsomba zisanu ndi zinai zinyaya m’madzi.
translations.tonga: Bacula bali lusele answi zyili fwuka zyilasamba mumeenda.

lines.english: One lion roars. He also wants to drink. Who is afraid of the lion?

translations.bemba: Inkalamo imo yabuluma. Nayo ileefwaya ukunwa ameenshi. Naani aletiina inkalamo?
translations.kaonde: Bokwe umo wabuluma. Naye ubena kukeba kutoma meema. Ñanyi ubena kuchiina bokwe?
translations.lozi: Tau iliñwi ya buluma. Niyona ibata kunwa mezi. Kimañi yasaba tau?
translations.lunda: Mutupa wuma nabulumi. Nakukengà kunwa niyena. Nakutiya woma wamutupa hinyi?
translations.luvale: Ndumba umwe mwateta. Nayikhiye mwatonda kunwa. Hiya ali nakwivwa woma wandumba?
translations.nyanja: Mkango umozi walila. Afunanso kumwa madzi. Ndani amene aopa mkango?
translations.tonga: Syumbwa omwe walila. Uyanda kunywa meenda awalo. Nguni uyoowa syuumbwa?

lines.english: One elephant is drinking water with the lion.

translations.bemba: Insofu imo ilenwa ameenshi ne nkalamo.
translations.kaonde: Nzovu umo ubena kutoma meema na bokwe.
translations.lozi: Tou iliñwi inwa mezi ni Tau.
translations.lunda: Nzovu wumu nakunwa menzhi na mutupa.
translations.luvale: Njamba umwe ali nakunwa meya nandumba.
translations.nyanja: Njovu imozi ikumwa madzi ndi mkango.
translations.tonga: Muzovwu omwe unywa meenda asyuumbwa.

title: One elephant is going to drink water.

lines.english:
Once upon a time,
there lived a happy
family.

translations.bemba: Patiile akantu, kwali ulupwa ulwaikeele mu mutende ne nsansa.
translations.kaonde: Kala kene, kwajinga kisemi kimo kyaikajilenga bingi na lusekelo.
translations.lozi: Kale kale koo, nekunani lubasi lone lupila mwa tabo.
translations.lunda: Kunyima yamafuku, kwadin’ga chisaka chawahilila.
translations.luvale: Lwola lumwe, vathu vatwaminenga mukuwahilila muthanga yavo.
translations.nyanja: Kale-kale nthawi ina, kunali banja lina lokondwela.
translations.tonga: Kaindi, kwakali mukwasyi wakali kukkala cakukkomana.

lines.english:
They never fought with
each other. They helped
their parents at home
and in the fields.

translations.bemba: Tabatalile abalwa beka-beka. Baaleeyafwa abafyashi baabo pa ŋanda na mwibala.
translations.kaonde: Abe bantu kechi balwanga ne. Bakwashishenga bansemi yabo pa nzubo ne kumajimi.
translations.lozi: Nebasa lwanangi. Nebatusanga bashemi babona kwa ndu ni kwa masimu.
translations.lunda: Hiyedin’ga nakudizun’gishaku. Akwashilen’ga anvwali zhawu ku maha.
translations.luvale: Kavazungilengako. Vakafwile visemi javo hembo nakumande.
translations.nyanja: Sanali kuyambana. Anali kuthandiza makolo ao panyumba ndi kumunda.
translations.tonga: Tiibakali kulwana pe. Bakali kugwasya bazyali aŋanda akumuunda.

lines.english:
But they were not
allowed to go near a
fire.

translations.bemba: Nomba tabaaleebasuminisha ukupalama ku mulilo.
translations.kaonde: Pano mino kechi bebaswishishe kuya pabwipi na mujilo ne.
translations.lozi: Kono nebasa lumelezwi kusutelela fakaufi ni mulilo.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga hiyayitezheli kuya kwakamwihi na kesiku.
translations.luvale: Oloze kavavetavijile kuya kwakamwihi nakakahyako.
translations.nyanja: Koma sanaloledwe kupita pafupi ndi moto.
translations.tonga: Pesi tiibakali kuzuminzyigwa kuswena munsi-munsi amulilo.

lines.english:
They had to do all their
work during the night.

Because they were made of wax!

translations.bemba: Baaleebomba imilimo yabo yonse ubushiku. Pantu bapangilwe ne pula.
translations.kaonde: Baingijilenga nkito yabo yonse kimye kya bufuku mambo babumbilwe na bupula.
translations.lozi: Nebanani kubelekanga misebezi yabona kaufela ka nako ya busihu kakuli nabapangilwe fa bulota.
translations.lunda: Edin’ga nakuzata nyidimu yezhima nawufuku. Mulon’ga edin’ga akutun’ga nandunda.
translations.luvale: Shikaho vazachilenga milimo yavo naufuko kaha. Mwomwo vapwile vakutungisa nandunda.
translations.nyanja: Anali kucita nchito yonse usiku. Cifukwa anapandidwa ndi chikonga.
translations.tonga: Bakali kubeleka milimo yoonse masiku. Nkaambo bakabambidwe aabunzuka.

lines.english:
But one of the boys
longed to go out in the
sunlight.

translations.bemba: Nomba umo pa balumendo aaleefwaisha ukuya panse mu kasuba.
translations.kaonde: Bino nsongwalume umo wakebeshenga bingi kuya mumute.
translations.lozi: Kono yomuñwi kwa bashimani na nyolezwi kuya mwa lizazi.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga umu hadi itu tunyana twamayala waken’gelen’ga kuya hanzhi ha mwaana.
translations.luvale: Oloze mwana umwe hakachi kavaze vamalunga asakile kuya mumusana.
translations.nyanja: Koma mnyamata umodzi anali kufunitsitsa kuyenda mdzuwa.
translations.tonga: Pesi umwi wabasankwa wakayandisisya kuti aunke muzuba.

lines.english:
One day the longing
was too strong. His
brothers warned him…

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo icakufwaya ukuya pa kusuba cacilamo. Bandume yakwe baalimusokele…
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo, lusako lwanji lwakoselako. Bakolojanji babalume baesekele kumukanya…
translations.lozi: Zazi leliñwi linyolwa lahae selitoba lelituna hahulu. Mizwale bahae bamufa mamela…
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu waswezheli kuken’gesha kuwudika. Amanakwindi amukanishili ....
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe kusaka chenyi echi chahyanyine. Vayayenyi vamulwezele kanda mwaya mumusanako.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina, kufunitsitsa kwake kunakula kwambili. Abale ace anamucenjeza…
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba kuyandisisya kwakakomena. Bapati bakwe basankwa bakamucenjezya…

lines.english:
But it was too late!
He melted in the hot
sun.

translations.bemba: Nomba balicelelwe. Asunguluka mu kasuba kaakaba.
translations.kaonde: Bino babanjile kumukanya! Wasungulukile namute.
translations.lozi: Kono nesekuliyehile! Hashengunukela mwa lizazi lenelicisa.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga alabili! wayen’gunukili mumwaana.
translations.luvale: Oloze echi chapwile kulishina! Ayengunukile muze mumusana uzuma.
translations.nyanja: Koma anacedwa! Anasungunuka mudzuwa lotentha kwambili.
translations.tonga: Pesi bakaccelwa. Wakeenzemuka muzuba lipya.

lines.english:
The wax children were
so sad to see their
brother melting away.

translations.bemba: Abaana bepula baali no bulanda pa kumona uko ndume nabo aleesunguluka.
translations.kaonde: Bano baana babupula baumvwine bingi kutama pa kumona mulongo wabo wasunguluka.
translations.lozi: Bana ba bulota nebaswabile hahulu kubona muhabo bona inge ashengunuka cwalo.
translations.lunda: Anyaana andunda atamininini hakumona manakwawu nakuyen’gunuka.
translations.luvale: Vaze vana vandunda vapihilile chikuma hakumona ndumbwavo mwayengunuka.
translations.nyanja: Ana aphula sanakondwele poona m’bale wao asungunika.
translations.tonga: Bana babunzuka bakausa kapati kubona mupati wabo kaenzemuka.

lines.english:
But they made a plan.
They shaped the lump
of melted wax into a
bird.

translations.bemba: Nomba baalyumfwene. Baapangile icuuni ukufuma kwipula ilyasungulwike.
translations.kaonde: Balangulukilepo maana akubumba abwa bupula bwasungulukile mukañonyi.
translations.lozi: Kono baba ni mulelo. Babupa nyunywani fa sikoto sa bulota bone bushengunukile boo.
translations.lunda: Ilan’ga ashin’ganyekeli zhakwila. Awumbili kazhila kudi indunda yayen’gunukili.
translations.luvale: Oloze vashinganyekele mwakulinga. Vambachile ize ndunda nakuumba kajila.
translations.nyanja: Koma anapangana zocita. Anaumba kambalame kucoka kuphula wa m’bale wao.
translations.tonga: Pesi bakajana muzeezo. Bakabweza bunzuka bwakeenzemuka akubumba ciyuni.

lines.english:
They took their bird
brother up to a high
mountain.

translations.bemba: Baasendele ndume nabo bapangile mu cuuni pa muulu wa lupili ulutali.
translations.kaonde: Basendele nkasabo kañonyi ne kumutwala kumutumba.
translations.lozi: Baisa munyenaabona wa nyunywani fa lilundu leli pahami luli.
translations.lunda: Atweli manakwawu wakazhili ku mpindi yayilehi.
translations.luvale: Vatwalile kajila kandumbwavo helu lyaphili.
translations.nyanja: Anapeleka m’bale wao mbalame pamwamba pa phili.
translations.tonga: Bakabikka cibumbwa atala amulundu.

lines.english:
And as the sun rose, he
flew away singing into
the morning light.

translations.bemba: Lilya akasuba katula, aalipupwike aya aleimba mu cengelo ca lucelo.
translations.kaonde: Mute pakusama, aye watumbukile akwe saka enda nakwimba.
translations.lozi: Lizazi haselipazuzi, afufa inge aopela mwa liseli la kakusasani.
translations.lunda: Chiwenzili mwaana, watukili nakwiimba kamina muna budidi.
translations.luvale: Omu likumbi lyazundukile, atukile nakuya nakwimba muze mumusana wachimene.
translations.nyanja: Pamene dzuwa inakwela, kambalame kanauluka ndikuimba m’dzuwa ya m’mamawa.
translations.tonga: Nilyakazwa zuba, wakauluka kaimba nyimbo mumumuni wamafwumo-fwumo.

title:
Once upon a time,
there lived a happy
family.

lines.english: One day, mama got a lot of fruit.

translations.bemba: Ubushiku bumo bamaayo balikwete ifisabo ifingi.
translations.kaonde: Juuba jimo, ba maama basendele bipangwa byavula.
translations.lozi: Lizazi leliñwi, boma nebangile litolwana zeñata.
translations.lunda: Ifuku dimu, mama wasendeli nyikabu yayivulu nankashi.
translations.luvale: Likumbi limwe, mama ambachile mihako yayivulu.
translations.nyanja: Tsiku lina, amai anatenga zipatso zambili.
translations.tonga: Bumwi buzuba, baama bakaleta michelo minji.

lines.english:
“When can we have some fruit?” we ask.

“We will have the fruit tonight,” says mama.

translations.bemba: Twaipusha ati, “Ni nshitanshi twalalyapo ifitwalo?” Bamaayo abati, “Tuleelya ifitwalo ubushiku.”
translations.kaonde: “Kimyeka kyotwakonsha kujapo bipangwa?” Twaipwizhe. “Tusakuja bipangwa bufuku,” ba maama bakumbwile.
translations.lozi: “Lukaca lili litolwana?” lwabuza. “Lukaca litolwana kacenu busihu,” boma babulela.
translations.lunda: “Tukadaku nyikabu ifukwinyi?” twehwili. “Tukuda nyikabu wufuku,” nindi mama.
translations.luvale: Natuhulisa ngwetu, “Natupwa namihako lwola muka?” Mama akumbulwile ngwenyi, “Natupwa namihako lelo naufuku.”
translations.nyanja: “Ndipotani tingakhale ndi zipatso?” Tifunsa. “Tidzadya zipatso usiku walelo” Anatelo amai.
translations.tonga: “Tulailya ciindi nzi micelo?” Twakabuzya. “Tulailya masiku” bakavwiila baama.

lines.english: My brother Rahim is greedy. He tastes all the fruit. He eats a lot of it.

translations.bemba: Ndume yandi Rahim alifunuka. Alyako ku fitwalo fyonse. Aalya ifingi.
translations.kaonde: Nkasami Rahim uji na lwiso. Ujapo pa bipangwa byonse. Kabiji uja byavula.
translations.lozi: Munyanaka Rahim utimana hahulu, ulikanga kuca litolwana kaufela mi ulicanga kabuñata.
translations.lunda: Manakwami Rahim wachifwa. Watompan’ga nyikabu yezhima. Wadan’ga yayivulu.
translations.luvale: Yaya walunga Rahim walifwi. Namakhila mihako yosena. Eji kulya yayivulu.
translations.nyanja: M’bale wanga Rahim ndi ozikonda. Alawa zipatso zonse. Akudya ziphaso zambili.
translations.tonga: Musyoonto wangu Rahim mulyato. Walabila michelo yoonse. Ulalya michelo minji.

lines.english:
“Look at what Rahim did!” shouts my little brother.

“Rahim is naughty and selfish,” I say.

translations.bemba: “Moneni ifyo Rahim acitile,” efyapundile kandume yandi. Nayasuka nati, “Rahim toomfwa kabili aliitemwa.”
translations.kaonde: “Talai pabyaubile Rahim!” Nkasami wamulume wabijikile “Rahim wazhikwa kabiji witemwa,” byobyobaambile.
translations.lozi: “Hamubone zaezize Rahim!” munyenaka wa mushimani ahuwa. “Rahim autwi mi witata hahulu,” nabulela.
translations.lunda: “Tala zheliliyi Rahim!” manakwami wamunyanya wabidikili. “Rahim wamanya na chifwa,” nahoshi.
translations.luvale: Songo yami mwatambakana ngwenyi, “Tala ovyo Rahim nalingi!” ami nanguhanjika ngwami, “Rahim wakuhuka kaha muthu wakulizanga ivene.”
translations.nyanja: “Onani zimene Rahim anacita!” Anafuula m’bale wanga wamg’ono. “Rahim ndiwamakani ndiponso ozikonda” Nditelo.
translations.tonga: “Langa nzyaacita Rahim!” wakoompolola musyoonto wangu. Ndakati “Rahim tamvwi alimwi ulaliyanda.”

lines.english: Mother is angry with Rahim.

translations.bemba: Bamaayo naabamufulilwa saana Rahim.
translations.kaonde: Ba maama bazhingijile na Rahim.
translations.lozi: Boma bamunyemezi Rahim.
translations.lunda: Mama nahili na Rahim.
translations.luvale: Mama napihilila na Rahim.
translations.nyanja: Amai ndiokalipa na Rahim.
translations.tonga: Baama balinyemede akaambo ka Rahim.

lines.english: We are also angry with Rahim. But Rahim is not sorry.

translations.bemba: Na ifwe bonse naatumufulilwa Rahim. Nomba Rahim tasakamene.
translations.kaonde: Ne atweba twamuzhingijila Rahim. Bino Rahim kechi walombele lulekelo lwamambo ne.
translations.lozi: Niluna lumunyemezi Rahim kono yena haikutwi maswabi.
translations.lunda: Tunataminini na Rahim ilan’ga Rahim koti kudanakena.
translations.luvale: Nayetu tunapihilila na Rahim. Oloze Rahim wapyaku.
translations.nyanja: Naifenso ndife okalipa na Rahim. Koma Rahim sapepesa.
translations.tonga: Aswebo tulinyemede. Pesi Rahim talilekeleli.

lines.english: “Aren’t you going to punish Rahim?” asks little brother.

translations.bemba: Akaice kandi kaipusha akati, “Bushe tamwamukande Rahim?”
translations.kaonde: “Nanchi kechi musa kumukambula Rahim nenyi?” nkansa wamulume waipwizhe.
translations.lozi: “Kana amuna kumufa koto Rahim?” munyenaa luna wa mushimani abuza.
translations.lunda: “Hiwukubabesha Rahim wanyi?” manakwami wamunyanya wehwili.
translations.luvale: Songo yenyi walunga mwahulisa ngwenyi, “Kamwechi kumuzangamisako?”
translations.nyanja: “Kodi simuzamupatsa cilango?” Afunsa m’bale wamng’ono.
translations.tonga: “Sena tamukoomupa cisubulo Rahim?” Wabuzya musyoonto wangu.

lines.english: “Rahim, soon you will be sorry,” warns mama.

translations.bemba: Bamaayo bamusoka ati, “Rahim caalakubipila nombaline.”
translations.kaonde: “Rahim, katatakatu ukamone byakukumya,” ba mama bamujimwineko.
translations.lozi: “Rahim, onafa ukainyaza.” Bo ma ba mufa mamela.
translations.lunda: “Rahim, ken’ga wukudanakena,” mama wamulezheli
translations.luvale: Mama mwamutenukila ngwenyi, “Rahim, kalinwomu naumona.”
translations.nyanja: “Rahim, posacedwa apa, uzacita cisoni,” amucenjeza amai.
translations.tonga: “Rahim, lino-lino ulausa,” bakacenjezya baama.

lines.english: Rahim starts to feel sick.

translations.bemba: Rahim atampa ukuumfwa ukulwala.
translations.kaonde: Rahim watendekele kumvwa kubela.
translations.lozi: Rahim akala kuikutwa kukula.
translations.lunda: Rahim watachikili kutiya kukata.
translations.luvale: Rahim mwaputuka kwivwa kuviza.
translations.nyanja: Rahim wayamba kumva kudwala.
translations.tonga: Rahim watalika kulimvwa kuciswa.

lines.english: “My tummy is so sore,” whispers Rahim.

translations.bemba: Rahim atootoosha ati, “Ulufumo lwandi lwalakalipa.”
translations.kaonde: Rahim wanongotwele amba, “Munda mwami mubena kukola,”
translations.lozi: “Mwa mba yaka kuutwa bumaswe,” Rahim ashobota.
translations.lunda: “mwivumu dami mudi yilonda,” nindi Rahim.
translations.luvale: Rahim mwayeveta ngwenyi, “Mujimo lyami muli nakwivika jimbandu.”
translations.nyanja: “M’mimba mwanga mwayamba kuwawa,” anong’oza Rahim.
translations.tonga: “Mwida mulacisa,” waamba Rahim cakupetekezya.

lines.english: Mama knew this would happen. The fruit is punishing Rahim!

translations.bemba: Bamaayo baalishibe ukuti ifi efyali no kucitika. Ifitwalo filekanda Rahim.
translations.kaonde: Ba maama bayukile amba abye bikamwekana. Bipangwa ke bimukambule Rahim!
translations.lozi: Bo ma nebazibile kuli ze likaezahala. Litolwana lifa koto Rahim.
translations.lunda: Mama welikili nindi izhi zhikumwekana. Mukabu wunakubabesha Rahim!
translations.luvale: Mama ejivanga ngwenyi echi nachisoloka. Muhako uli nakuzangamisa Rahim!
translations.nyanja: Amai anadziwa kuti izi zidzacitika. Cipatso cimupatsa cilango Rahim!
translations.tonga: Baama balizyi kuti eeci cilacitika. Muchelo wamusubula Rahim.

lines.english:
Later, Rahim says sorry to us. “I will never be so greedy again,” he promises.

And we all believe him.

translations.bemba: Panuma, Rahim alomba ubwelelo kuli ifwe. Alaya ati, “Nshakafunuke na kabili.” Bonse twamusuminisha. Takabwekeshepo icimusango cakuitemwa.
translations.kaonde: Pa kupita kimye, Rahim walombele lulekelo lwamambo nekwamba amba, “Kechi nkabwezhapo kuuba lwiso jikwabo ne,” wachipile. Kabiji bonse bamumvwijile.
translations.lozi: Kasamulaho, Rahim ainyaza kuluna. “Hanina kutimana hahulu hape nikamuta,” asepisa. Kaufelaluna lwa mukolwa.
translations.lunda: Chihahitili kapinji, Rahim wadanakeneni kudi etu. “Hinikamba kekala na chifwa chen’giku,” wadishikili. Kaha nawa twamukuhweleleli.
translations.luvale: Omu mwahichile lwola, Rahim mwalikonekela kuli yetu. Ashikile ngwenyi, “Kangwechi cheka kukapwa nauminyiko.” Tuvosena tumufwelelenu.
translations.nyanja: Pambuyo pake, Rahim apepesa kwa ife. “Sindidzakhalanso wozikonda tele,” alonjeza. Ndipo timukhulupilila tonse.
translations.tonga: Nikwakainda ciindi, Rahim wakalilekelela. “Nsekainduluki kuba mulyato alimwi,” wakasyomenzya. Toonse twakamusyoma.

title: One day, mama got a lot of fruit.
